# [Was Fetterman right? ](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=5233352&post_id=173979667&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTczOTc5NjY3LCJpYXQiOjE3NTgyNDAyMTAsImV4cCI6MTc2MDgzMjIxMCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTUyMzMzNTIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.31VSrdbM15LI2jAKbyGI-qB6Vzfr1nUjjAtCYaZPV2I)
### He says Trump is just "different."
| | [Conor Lamb](https://substack.com/@conorlambpa)

---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8f86c375-6758-48ba-89e0-25f7c6694943?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
([CNN](https://substack.com/redirect/d561a6f1-9bd9-4150-8fc8-e97473168a33?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg))
Last weekend, CNN aired an [interview](https://substack.com/redirect/5ffb9d30-8c85-407e-bfa8-c18508a7ca3a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) with John Fetterman, including this [part](https://substack.com/redirect/d561a6f1-9bd9-4150-8fc8-e97473168a33?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) about Trump and democracy. The question from Manu Raju and Fetterman's answer were:
_**Manu: So you don 't think that Trump is, at all, shattering any of the norms of democracy, in any way?**_
_**Fetterman: I 'm saying, he's definitely different, but that's what America voted for. Again, I don't agree with many of these things, but that does not make him an autocrat.**_
It's a stunning answer. The question assumes the existence of norms of democracy, which are as fundamental to the job of a senator as the force of gravity is to the job of a physicist. Fetterman thinks the question is just about what he personally agrees and disagrees with. As if the voters hired him to pontificate, not to stand for something. It's unacceptable and sad.
You could make a long list of which norms of democracy a more attentive senator might have addressed, but some obvious, top-of-mind ones would be things like telling the truth (especially about elections), not imprisoning people in foreign gulags, respecting the freedom of speech, acknowledging the rule of law. In his own self-interest Fetterman could have even said, well Trump shouldn't eliminate government departments and engage in warfare without authorization, since that's Congress's job under the Constitution. But no.
What's worse is how he suggests that democracy means once a President is elected, they can do what they want. That just isn't true, and that's why this discussion is worth your time. If Trump has convinced one of the most famous Democratic politicians in America to give him free rein -- to ignore how many things Trump is doing that are _not_ things "America voted for" -- it's a sure sign we're in bad shape. How could Fetterman have failed to mention these, if nothing else:
* On immigration, Trump [promised](https://substack.com/redirect/07093162-6ca8-4b5f-a41b-36b1980a114c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) he would "launch the largest deportation program of criminals in the history of America." But after the election he abandoned the "criminals" part and started going after ordinary, law-abiding workers who were paying taxes. Most Americans don't approve of this, it's going to make budget deficits [worse](https://substack.com/redirect/e19766a9-c6a4-4987-94d5-5e605db55015?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and it will shrink our GDP.
* Trump [promised](https://substack.com/redirect/d72b46d1-b5c1-4f84-8be8-932cad73b75f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to make America rich, not make himself rich at our expense. But earlier this month, the Trump family [added](https://substack.com/redirect/f2ba24db-27f4-43b2-aaaf-6a8685e632a8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) $5 billion to its wealth through a crypto scheme involving foreign buyers getting major [benefits](https://substack.com/redirect/3cedf7f6-d391-40cc-a59d-5f4dcf880a7e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) from the US government. In March, Forbes wrote about how Trump had [doubled](https://substack.com/redirect/575a286e-3ab2-4187-910d-ac7d2898cc5a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) his net worth in the past year, turbo-charged by his election as president. We've all seen how he's forced networks, tech executives, and law firms to pay him. Meanwhile, Americans are becoming more [pessimistic](https://substack.com/redirect/d83fbe89-2a48-4700-b1df-1c032fe3a525?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) about this economy all the time, and even Fox News found they [blame](https://substack.com/redirect/28906453-9964-49e8-ab88-2d2d3011fd92?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Trump's policies.
* I [wrote](https://substack.com/redirect/271e9250-d7e2-4a05-b9b0-a31e4f2e8825?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) earlier this week about how healthcare premiums are about to go up by 82% in Pennsylvania. Fetterman definitely knows about that, and you would definitely remember it if Trump had promised to add to inflation by another 82%? But he didn't, because no one ever would have voted for that. And it somehow doesn't get a mention.

If I were arguing for Fetterman here, I'd say, if Trump failed people in the way you suggest, democracy means he'll pay for it in future elections. Isn't it strange, then, that Trump is pushing an unprecedented and blatantly partisan gerrymandering plan in the red states, along with an [effort](https://substack.com/redirect/8e02e9b6-68cc-4110-b84d-461cf42c0ccc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to re-do the census, and trying to make America comfortable with domestic military deployments? Isn't it strange that he tried to overthrow the 2020 election, and still lies about it? If steps like these don't represent the shattering of basic norms, how come no other presidents acted this way?
In my "Faith and Democracy" class at Duquesne, we talk about what Lincoln believed was the most fundamental norm of democracy: the Declaration's claim that we're all created equal. That's how Lincoln explained that slavery was wrong, even if local majorities were in favor of it. From that we get the Bill of Rights in the Constitution, and it's also how we ended up with three branches of government. A single branch could easily produce a president who did whatever he wanted, like Trump does. Once he started sending people to gulags, for example, it was obvious that an unchecked executive was inconsistent with the idea of equal rights.
Perhaps what is most "definitely different" about Trump is actually about Congress itself: it's hard to imagine that Henry Clay, Daniel Webster, Lyndon Johnson, or if I'm permitted a local reference, John Murtha would have ever stood for this. Congresses in the past would stopped Trump in his tracks, if by no other means that the power of the purse. But Fetterman already [surrendered](https://substack.com/redirect/082146fb-5474-4b66-a3fd-a382a88eb25f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that too.
So maybe next time the interviewer should turn the question on him. It's really a question we should turn on all of our representatives and senators in Washington. Do you even understand what your job is, and the duties the Constitution has charged you with? We would get better answers from some of them, but not enough.

Dear Peter,Right now, California is at the frontlines of one of the most high-stakes redistricting battles in American history. Ahead of the 2026 midterm elections, Donald Trump ordered Republican-led states around the country to redistrict and steal seats from Democrats – _because he knows they won’t win any other way_.Zoe Lofgren is working alongside Democratic leaders like Gavin Newsom and Nancy Pelosi to fight back against Trump’s power grab. By putting redistricting on the ballot box in California, they’re giving Californians the opportunity to cancel out Trump’s partisan gerrymandering and ensure fair midterm elections in 2026.

Peter, Republicans hold the _slimmest House majority in nearly a century_ , so Donald Trump knows their odds of losing in 2026 are **more than likely**. Yet he’s so desperate to hold onto power that he’ll do anything to keep it, even if it means undermining our electoral system and American democracy itself. By passing California’s redistricting proposal, voters can put a direct check on Donald Trump’s actions, overcome this slim Republican House majority, and **flip the House blue in 2026!** But with less than two months until California’s map goes to a vote, time is running out to stop Donald Trump’s anti-democratic scheme.
---
[**Please, Peter, step up today and donate now to support Zoe’s work and elect Democrats who will stand with her against Trump. >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115488228/570484458/-1467160713?amount=25&refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2025-09-18_RDG_GAV_ES-31669&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmNjMjg5Ny1lYjk0LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VcFUoX35DVeGC1yYgVLhXoRECjW21jCg9oonzmDV8Gs=)

By passing California’s redistricting proposal, voters can put a direct check on Donald Trump’s actions, overcome this slim Republican House majority, and flip the House blue in 2026! name: Rev. Raphael Warnock
subject: We must protect the First Amendment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
Friend,
Jimmy Kimmel has poked fun at many politicians and public figures over the years. He’s a late-night talk show host. That’s what he does.
Donald Trump has frequently been the subject of his jokes. As you can imagine, this has not endeared Kimmel to the president.
Trump’s inability to handle criticism took a new, dark turn this week, when Trump’s handpicked FCC commissioner mounted a pressure campaign on Kimmel’s bosses to get Kimmel taken off the air – and it worked.
Last night, Kimmel was officially suspended by ABC, and his show was pulled from the air indefinitely.
This is not an isolated incident. It’s a pattern under the Trump administration of stifling dissent, and I’m extremely concerned about what it means for the future of free speech in our country.
Trump’s efforts to stifle criticism from the free press are wide ranging. We should also remember: The lawsuits against _The New York Times_ , _Wall Street Journal_ and _60 Minutes_. The _Associated Press_ being blocked from the White House press pool for merely refusing to call the Gulf of Mexico the “Gulf of America.” The list goes on.
Make no mistake about it: We are witnessing a shameless assault on the First Amendment, and we all need to speak up and fight back – right here, right now. That’s why I’m counting on you to take action today and sign my new petition.
[**Please, will you add your name now to condemn Trump and protect our First Amendment rights?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115488310/570484934/539316169?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=250,100,50,25&code=jtk5612-su-nd&refcode=jtk5612-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGNkMjg5Ny1lYjk0LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2KJZlqTG05L_Bb4lVWFV9hiWgk2RYPALrVa9lg99h5g=&emci=bea02c21-c494-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=08cd2897-eb94-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=1586379)
| | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115488311/570484935/539316169?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=250,100,50,25&code=jtk5612-su-nd&refcode=jtk5612-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGNkMjg5Ny1lYjk0LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2KJZlqTG05L_Bb4lVWFV9hiWgk2RYPALrVa9lg99h5g=&emci=bea02c21-c494-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=08cd2897-eb94-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=1586379)

Together, I know we can win this fight and protect the country we love. Thanks for speaking out.
– Rev. Raphael Warnock

name: Brent Hennrich
subject: I will not take a dime of AIPAC money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brent Hennrich for Washington
body:
| | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMU_BeZcmRBr16dPjlrMKhhjiC51ataw3Peft1wIO87ITSxjytRqnk5Se65PvvR0SC1Vi60eIcmGaf4kR6MPJnbRGd2XwIrhDn8ZZ-Z4PPuO0Vx2PdmM8zh_l0Ht__s0eBOUkWSLHQq4dQ1Xsh74on14buaTZWRqQlRcRRPmD16hn6cQNtqFc1G_LrtVJXd9NSTk1P36Ckb0A3EasTl0ZNeivMQLxA2lmVYjh0eNuyKp8/4k1/mw3Ye7nYRQ61-S6Hxpx-Gg/h0/h001.R1PUUX1MCzH1F3ZSk7CpZPVA12UWYQKB3lVACudHrns)
---
Peter,

For two years, we've watched as Israel has committed the most heinous of crimes in the Gaza Strip: genocide. I want to be very clear about something right up front: the genocide must be stopped. We cannot continue to let our politicians use our tax dollars to subsidize the Israeli government's trampling of human rights, decency, and international law. **AIPAC has too much sway over our national foreign policy, and we need to fight back. Unlike my opponent, I will NEVER take a dime from AIPAC.**
---
| [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUAmr4w9Q6B-W_sj3x-3f9W6P2T0UnayrVdMeeqIxgpH1ZQ_ekMaXPibDWGTg2wXMgh7tXE6vRD96sh19nykV6jWNa8nyxobVDcvRHhqn06O-kJaocFXkM7jDJqLD_K7UHrNEuMlrntGe04X9UTB7r3n3Dd8lL1bXWgbR7sWJ3hF7LrdrVblpa0TYbBfmOba1qLxzhIhds_RBdd8C6C9LkxiV4tSe--NH7qLXyLF85GlsUQWy5jy2sX8QjkbDZ9ZQJgCFPu4iMl6CgXcg0zZXq96/4k1/mw3Ye7nYRQ61-S6Hxpx-Gg/h1/h001.HsunCpKOOQuJUr6CrGiLO-zTDXajiwf2eqf6b90bETw)
---
I've never minced words about the human rights violations there. And most fellow Democrats agree with me. In fact, a super majority of Democratic voters - 77% - believe that Israel is committing genocide in Gaza. **Now, an independent commission set up by the UN is saying it.** This week, the UN Human Rights Council released a 72-page report that concluded for the first time that Israel is committing genocide against Palestinians in Gaza. The report found that top Israeli leaders are guilty of inciting genocide, that the people of Gaza are being targeted collectively, that killings are occurring in designated safe zones, and that children are being shot in the head by snipers. It's unimaginable to me that, having witnessed the crimes of the Israeli government over the last two years, any politician would still be willing to accept money from AIPAC. I know that if I were to receive a check from them, I'd have no problem tearing it up or sending it back. There are some checks you just don't cash. **My opponent, Marie Gluesenklamp-Perez, doesn 't agree. She just cashed a check from AIPAC in _June_ of this year! ** I'd prefer to have my campaign funded by voters and people who care about what I'm trying to do here in WA-03, not special interest groups like AIPAC. That's why I'm writing to you today for your help. [**If you believe NO politician should accept AIPAC money, please stand with me with a donation of $5, $25, $50, or any amount and help me represent the super majority of Democratic voters who decry human rights violations and collective punishment, no matter where they occur.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUAmr4w9Q6B-W_sj3x-3f9W6P2T0UnayrVdMeeqIxgpH1Sno4ahTVn-CpTgxONobzQBW169i5EEFjOn-uw7M-i1ERJEaOF20MmL6UZRfXDE7WSzQvkC7S_PTKDR75nmzqx4QnF9sPz7X-lIqgDnzM9XGP-Dc9rZFVgpnRgMTKq_enAls3yEMv-yG8Ho6dKADrP-os5koDc_v4NRwDAYxgLnYH-sD5bwbEeya87ldEztXrYcRymgrHUNngf9H-SjxNzQoe_OyuzbvzMMO1fIJ6w_P/4k1/mw3Ye7nYRQ61-S6Hxpx-Gg/h2/h001.krqbrLVrccd49bvKADX-G-dr0o--ufdVrbR_r_LCVN8) If there are no protections for civilians in Gaza, there are no protections for civilians anywhere. We must defend the rule of law everywhere, or we will have it nowhere. Let's Heal Washington. Let's Heal the World. Brent Hennrich
---
[ **SUPPORT BRENT TODAY** ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUAmr4w9Q6B-W_sj3x-3f9W6P2T0UnayrVdMeeqIxgpH1X_eWMgCHm27iXckie-X2z0lLPUphpqOKmCEL8NXw12yd3d3dnE9DenGu2LaFEvk6tMgTRpe2QA0FPrWWKAIjIb1Ejvon7nN2TubXh8ELh30Fu6DtTAaGcZfbKN6zUwTiTvc4vGMLGoAwgIUSe8pCAgyzAWlVVG6tbyzJP3KCxRy0QDMS5Hg_z_rYFlzQYzIlz3v4IDKFMUzKgDVp1s62DJ_wwEA-KZt5qRJpTccb3nH/4k1/mw3Ye7nYRQ61-S6Hxpx-Gg/h3/h001.6ONMCxGjkZhs-FiZmVCuvU8woQyMoGOUChrc4gyGR2w)

clean_body: | | Peter, For two years, we've watched as Israel has committed the most heinous of crimes in the Gaza Strip: genocide. I want to be very clear about something right up front: the genocide must be stopped. We cannot continue to let our politicians use our tax dollars to subsidize the Israeli government's trampling of human rights, decency, and international law. AIPAC has too much sway over our national foreign policy, and we need to fight back. Unlike my opponent, I will NEVER take a dime from AIPAC. | I've never minced words about the human rights violations there. And most fellow Democrats agree with me. In fact, a super majority of Democratic voters - 77% - believe that Israel is committing genocide in Gaza. Now, an independent commission set up by the UN is saying it. This week, the UN Human Rights Council released a 72-page report that concluded for the first time that Israel is committing genocide against Palestinians in Gaza. The report found that top Israeli leaders are guilty of inciting genocide, that the people of Gaza are being targeted collectively, that killings are occurring in designated safe zones, and that children are being shot in the head by snipers. It's unimaginable to me that, having witnessed the crimes of the Israeli government over the last two years, any politician would still be willing to accept money from AIPAC. I know that if I were to receive a check from them, I'd have no problem tearing it up or sending it back. There are some checks you just don't cash. My opponent, Marie Gluesenklamp-Perez, doesn 't agree. She just cashed a check from AIPAC in June of this year! I'd prefer to have my campaign funded by voters and people who care about what I'm trying to do here in WA-03, not special interest groups like AIPAC. That's why I'm writing to you today for your help. If there are no protections for civilians in Gaza, there are no protections for civilians anywhere. We must defend the rule of law everywhere, or we will have it nowhere. Let's Heal Washington. Let's Heal the World. Brent Hennrich | | Marie Gluesenkamp-Perez has betrayed Democrats and the voters of WA-3 by repeatedly voting with MAGA against women's rights, immigrants, and more. Brent Hennrich is a lifelong Washingtonian, a proud working class dad, and lifelong Democratic activist. name: StateDemocrats.com
subject: BREAKING: ABC pulls Jimmy Kimmel off air indefinitely in new act of censorship
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
Add your name to stand with Jimmy Kimmel before midnight »
#
[](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/sdc-kimmel-letter-september25?t=1&akid=9440%2E614464%2ESpQp6u)
**WOW, did you see this, Peter?**
Last night, after facing pressure + criticism from the Trump administration, ABC pulled Jimmy Kimmel’s late night comedy show off air _INDEFINITELY._
First, it was Stephen Colbert. Now, it’s Jimmy Kimmel.
**_This is a direct attack on free speech._**
**Please read our open letter from Democratic supporters like you to Jimmy Kimmel now,[then please add your name before midnight tonight to show your support for free speech in the face of this extreme GOP censorship!](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/sdc-kimmel-letter-september25?t=2&akid=9440%2E614464%2ESpQp6u)**
**[SUPPORT JIMMY KIMMEL: ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/sdc-kimmel-letter-september25?t=3&akid=9440%2E614464%2ESpQp6u)**

Dear Jimmy Kimmel: I am horrified by ABC’s decision to pull your show off the air. _This is a clear act of censorship, and _I am standing with you.__ You have never shied away from speaking truth to power — bravely being a source of light and laughter during some of the darkest times for our country. In this moment, please know that supporters like me have your back. Together, we will defend the right to speak freely and hold the Trump administration accountable for trying to silence powerful voices like yours. Your work matters. Your voice matters. Thank you. X ___________________________ **[SUPPORT JIMMY KIMMEL: ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/sdc-kimmel-letter-september25?t=4&akid=9440%2E614464%2ESpQp6u)**

clean_body: It's clearer than ever where our opponent's loyalty lies. = Peter, we got word that Winsome Earle-Sears is campaigning with Vivek Ramaswamy tomorrow — on the first day of early voting in Virginia. Ramaswamy was Elon Musk’s right-hand man at DOGE, which authorized the firing of thousands of Virginians. Yes, you've got that right: Sears chose the billionaire architect of a program that devastated Virginia’s economy to kick off her sprint to Election Day. It's clearer than ever where our opponent's loyalty lies. Meanwhile, Abigail is hard at work reaching voters sharing her plan to grow Virginia’s economy. And she's counting on your $25 gift today to continue airing ads, hosting events, and driving up turnout for Democrats all the way down the ballot. = = = = = = = Thanks so much, Spanberger for Governor HQ By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. name: Team Haley Stevens
subject: LIVE PETITION: Stand For Free Speech
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
Stand with Kimmel

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=885%2E49239%2Eb1Wsxd)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/1437?t=2&akid=885%2E49239%2Eb1Wsxd)
---
**_BREAKING:_ Jimmy Kimmel Fired in a Blatant Attack on Free Speech**
**Team Haley here, will you sign our new petition?
**
**[_👉 Stand with Jimmy Kimmel now and defend free speech in America by adding your name. We need 10,000 signatures by midnight to show we won’t be silenced._](http://act.haleyformi.com/go/6023?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=885%2E49239%2Eb1Wsxd)**
| | [Add Your Name >>](http://act.haleyformi.com/go/6023?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=4&akid=885%2E49239%2Eb1Wsxd)
---
Null, comedian Jimmy Kimmel was abruptly pulled off the air by ABC solely because he criticized the MAGA movement. Now, Trump’s FCC chair is threatening to pull down broadcasters that air voices the administration doesn’t like.
Let’s be clear: **This is a dangerous move to shut down dissent.** Trump and his allies are trying to silence critics and intimidate the press. They want total control over what the American people say and hear.
We cannot stay quiet. If we don’t speak out now, we’re giving them permission to keep censoring and suppressing anyone who challenges them.

**This is a fight for the First Amendment. For democracy. And for the basic principle that no president gets to decide who’s allowed to speak.**
**[_Stand for free speech. Add your name to the petition now:_](http://act.haleyformi.com/go/6023?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=885%2E49239%2Eb1Wsxd)**
| | [Add Your Name >>](http://act.haleyformi.com/go/6023?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=885%2E49239%2Eb1Wsxd)
---
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/3894?t=7&akid=885%2E49239%2Eb1Wsxd) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/1437?t=8&akid=885%2E49239%2Eb1Wsxd)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

name: The Democratic National Committee
subject: We’re not giving up — neither should you
body:
This work is essential — thank you for being a part of it.
---
Derek, In just a second, we’ll be asking you to donate directly to the DNC. But first, we’ll take a moment and explain the urgency and importance of your support today: At the end of the month, we’ll be required to report how much we’ve raised over the last three months. _All eyes_ will be on that number. And a strong report with lots of donations will show Republicans just how unpopular their agenda really is. As Republicans keep trying to redraw congressional maps and rig the 2026 midterms in their favor, Trump and his allies would love nothing more than to see the Democrats throw in the towel and give up. **We’re not giving up — neither should you.** That’s why reaching our end-of-quarter fundraising goal is so important. We need to show everyone that Democrats are standing up and pushing back against Republicans’ historically unpopular agenda. We hope this message has shown you the urgency and importance of your contribution. So here comes our question for you, Derek: **[Will you be one of the supporters we’re looking for to chip in $3 to the DNC ahead of our end-of-month deadline?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-september-2025?refcode2=4604_22930333_yjibjc&akid=4604%2E22930333%2Eyjibjc ?refcode=em_20250918_4604_fr&amount=3)**

name: Kathryn Harvey
subject: Join me September 29 for an evening with the SC Sister Senators.
body:
Championing civil discourse.

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/396691331eb6/kathryn-harvey-for-congresscampaign-kickoff-6421442?e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
|
---
| | Welcome to Keeping Up with Kathryn Harvey. A weekly digest covering South Carolina politics and opportunities for engagement and action in the Upstate.
---
| |
# SC Sister Senators at Wofford Sept 29
# **There has never been a more important time to elevate freedom of speech and civil discourse.**
---
[|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=c1e49f7cbc&e=edbde6c9b1)
| | Join us for the second installment of “Candid Conversations” an effort to bring together leadership from across the isle to foster civil discourse in today’s political climate. Hosted by the President’s Office at Wofford College, the SC Sister Senators who bridged together to fight for women’s rights in South Carolina, will join us for a special panel session moderated by the Honorable Former Representative Rita Allison with a foreward by Susu Johnson. Doors open at 5:30pm and a screening of their new documentary film trailer will follow the panel.
---
| [Learn More](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=e8442d7b09&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
| |
# Check out my latest podcast
---
| | Kathryn Harvey sits down with Dr. Michelle Carney, a veteran infectious disease physician and former Spartanburg Regional Infection Prevention Director. Together, they explore how South Carolina politics and public health intersect in today's challenging climate. Dr. Carney reflects on her decades fighting diseases from HIV to COVID-19, discussing science denial and CDC weakening. She warns about the dangers when misinformation in South Carolina spreads faster than actual medicine can reach communities. Their conversation covers what local communities can do to fight disinformation and strengthen South Carolina public health policy.
---
[|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=e0aec0b96b&e=edbde6c9b1)
| [Listen Up](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=05f7bb56c9&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| |
# Knock doors with me on Saturdays & Sundays
---
| | Join me every Saturday at 10am & Sunday at 3pm for a neighborhood canvass to support my race for Spartanburg County Council! [You can register to volunteer ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=e930d5e659&e=edbde6c9b1). Interested in phone banking for my campaign this Fall? Join us the third Thursday evening of each month for a virtual phone bank training! This is a great opportunity to volunteer on your own time and help my race for County Council. Register at the link below and you'll [receive a link to make calls. ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=cee08b8062&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
[|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=1585127318&e=edbde6c9b1)
| [Knock doors with Kathryn](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=fcaab313c4&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| [Contribute to Kathryn](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=f89edd00dc&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
|
---
[|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=8423de67ff&e=edbde6c9b1)
| | ****Canvass with Kathryn Harvey every Sunday at 3pm**[**RSVP Here**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=3e00c81d49&e=edbde6c9b1)******
* September 25 District 5 School Board Forum Duncan Event Center
* September 28 District 6 School Board Forum Cyrill-Westside Library
* **September 29 Sister Senators at Wofford College 6pm**
* September 30 District 7 School Board Forum CC Woodson Community Center
* October 6 - SPCDP Monthly Meeting - meet Spartanburg’s new Sheriff
* October 14 - Early Voting for Senate 12 Primary
* October 18 - No Kings Rally in Spartanburg
* October 21 - 31 Early Voting for the 2025 General Election 8:30- 5:00
* November 4: 2025 General Election (7:00 a.m. to 7:00 p.m.)
* November 4: Senate 12 Primary Runoff
* November 10: SPCDP Monthly Meeting
* **December 1: State-wide Candidate Forum 6-7:30pm SCC Downtown Campus **

---
| [Learn more here](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=738b5d1e44&e=edbde6c9b1)

|
---
| | **CALL & EMAIL YOUR SENATORS ABOUT SENATE BILL 323 **MARK YOUR CALENDARS FOR 9:30AM WEDNESDAY, OCTOBER 1Gressette Building, Room 105 for the public hearing!**SENATE BILL 323 WOULD:** Ban all medication abortion and even its manufacture or possession. Remove exceptions for rape, incest, or fatal fetal anomaly. Redefine embryos as full legal persons, threatening contraception, IVF, and miscarriage care. Impose felony penalties up to 30 years on physicians and medical providers. Criminalize helping someone travel out of state for abortion care. Gag doctors and advocates from sharing accurate medical information — even online.
---
| [sign up to testify on October 1](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=da37b16e9e&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | **CONGRESS IS BACK—KEEP THE PRESSURE ON** With Congress back in session, constituent pressure matters more than ever. Call, email, and show up at town halls to demand action and accountability on our core priorities. We need to hold members to clear, public positions.
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| |
---
| | This past week we paid tribute to the People’s Mayor, Junie White. He lead with inclusiveness and had a tremendous impact on our community for decades. He was also my neighbor when I was three years old, and again when I was 43 years old. I attended a fundraiser for SC State House Representative Heather Bauer in Greenville. We have to fight to keep good representation in Columbia right now.
Tonight the Spartanburg County Democratic Party won an award for the Best Activist Organization by the Post & Courier. Thanks to our first Vice Chair Angelia Edwards for all the community work. Before the awards ceremony we joined my campaign treasurer, [Alix Refshauge](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=ea43639eec&e=edbde6c9b1) for her art exhibit, it was truly wonderful. And I had the pleasure of attending the 3rd Annual One Community Dinner hosted by Hope Blackley, candidate for Senate 12 special election. There are so many amazing women running for office in the Upstate this year. I hope you’ll consider supporting all of us. Democracy is a participatory experience, join me at [kathrynforcouncil.com](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=ec21d38f80&e=edbde6c9b1).

Hosted by the President’s Office at Wofford College, the SC Sister Senators who bridged together to fight for women’s rights in South Carolina, will join us for a special panel session moderated by the Honorable Former Representative Rita Allison with a foreward by Susu Johnson. Doors open at 5:30pm and a screening of their new documentary film trailer will follow the panel. | | | | Check out my latest podcast | | Kathryn Harvey sits down with Dr. Michelle Carney, a veteran infectious disease physician and former Spartanburg Regional Infection Prevention Director. Together, they explore how South Carolina politics and public health intersect in today's challenging climate. Dr. Carney reflects on her decades fighting diseases from HIV to COVID-19, discussing science denial and CDC weakening. name: It's now or never via RTP
subject: Stand up before free speech is gone for good
body:
Authoritarians don’t start with tanks in the streets. They start by silencing voices of dissent. Trump’s FCC has forced networks to pull Stephen Colbert and now Jimmy Kimmel off the air. This is not politics as usual. This is the FASCIST PLAYBOOK: ❌ Silence the comedians. ❌ Intimidate the journalists. ❌ Crush all opposition. If Trump gets away with this, free speech in America is gone. Full stop. We cannot sit on the sidelines while Trump dismantles democracy in real time. We must mobilize, organize, and resist. Do you stand with Colbert, Kimmel, and every voice Trump is trying to erase from our democracy? Yes, I do No, I do not [https://secure.everyaction.com/SrRo_aVPX0ykO3RLMxQajQ2]

Become a monthly donor today!

name: Oregon GOP
subject: You’re Invited: A Night to Inspire, Unite & Take Action
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE OREGON REPUBLICAN PARTY (COMMITTEE ID 379) 187 HIGH ST
body:
Seats are limited – reserve yours now for our September 27th banquet!

| | | | [ ](https://secure.oregon.gop/otom-dinner)
---
---
| | Friend, Oregon is at a turning point. With the recent heartbreaking loss of Charlie Kirk in Utah and the continued threat of crippling tax increases coming out of Salem, Oregonians are crying out for common-sense leadership. Young people, especially, are looking for **HOPE** for the future. That’s why Republicans from across Oregon are coming together for a powerful evening to inspire, unite, and set plans in motion. **When:****Saturday, September 27****Time:****6:30 pm****Where:****Mt. Hood Resort, Welches, Oregon****Early Bird Ticket Pricing Ends 11:59 pm Saturday, September 20** Enjoy a banquet dinner, connect with like-minded patriots, and be inspired by leaders who are advancing the conservative movement. We’ve lined up a powerful roster of voices who are leading the charge to restore faith, freedom, and common sense here in Oregon and across the nation: **_Special Guest Speakers:_**
* **Joe Gruters:** New Chairman of the RNC, in one of his first public appearances.
* **Taren Darr:** Turning Point USA Ambassador, sharing stories of working alongside Charlie Kirk to inspire the next generation and carry on his legacy.
* **Bruce Starr:** Oregon Republican Senate Leader, giving updates and encouragement from the front lines in Salem.

body:
Have you heard of this?

Have you heard of this thing called a Labubu?[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4g6rcdec20gkn1i45jo0nj09gi4es0oru3m6jf8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s9jm6o36chh2bs)It's the latest "must-have" doll that's supposed to be all the rage among kids.

[That's the kind of indoctrination the Extreme Left is pushing for.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9fa0o9fr2k66r7vld90uta3o7vaj38q3cbar5v0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s9jm6o36chh2bs)

name: James O'Keefe
subject: Let’s Shame the Devil
body:
My life has changed since watching Charlie Kirk’s death. America has changed. An awakening occurred in an instant. With that, a bright line developed between good and evil. Pastor Signorelli wrote after Charlie Kirk’s passing, “The Devil overplayed his hand.”

| [****](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2znv62f76i43ggm51118fd42bvhpoepdn8ad7enu8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s9jm6o35cph2bs) [****](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zpaueec49v1jr34nm2e24jl1cnujg5ibejfu6fsg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s9jm6o35cph2bs) Dear Patriot,

My life has changed since watching Charlie Kirk's death.

America has changed. An awakening occurred in an instant.

With that, a bright line developed between good and evil. Pastor Signorelli wrote after Charlie Kirk's passing, "**The Devil overplayed his hand**."

Evil is exposed, out in the open, mocking us, and there is no better opportunity than now to Shame the Devil.

**In honor of Charlie Kirk, that 's exactly what we're going to do**. [**I ask that you join me in an unprecedented operation**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zhautectimn2pv38iku5qum96v4in4kib0lkqmco_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s9jm6o35cph2bs) to **expose the wicked, evil, depraved, and wrathful souls who are grooming our high school and college students with their agendas of hate**.

The students who debated Charlie with indignant intolerance were educated by teachers and professors who were too cowardly to stand in front of Charlie Kirk themselves.

It's time for America to see who these educators are.
**Through our non-profit, the Citizen Journalism Foundation, we 'll be giving hidden camera equipment to students across the nation and providing them with the training, legal and ethics training they will need to do their part to Shame the Devil.**
[**Please, donate to help cover the costs of this massive operation**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ziilnd5jjb3ji8oasrrk0gfsm1g5qfgumci7dfq8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s9jm6o35cph2bs).
Our staff is booking the largest facility we can find in Arizona to train and equip students for **the day after Charlie Kirk 's funeral**.

This is where we start, and [**I cannot do this without you**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z3hm1cvl5jel2j2usoipg3uott3lre0lrbvjacvg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s9jm6o35cph2bs).
Some may believe that the Devil does not exist, but I think the following quote from an old movie:
**" The greatest trick the devil ever pulled was convincing the world he didn't exist."**
The teachers, professors, and administrators we hope to expose are advancing an agenda that corrupts the minds of our youth, playing right into the Devil's hand.

This is our opportunity, "Shame the Devil" by exposing the playbook and the players behind it.

Millions of America's students are standing by. They want our direction. They want our guidance to do something that matters. **They want to do good**.

This is where I need to ask a favor of you. This campaign is going to conservatively cost $250,000 to get off the ground. We must equip, train, and prepare thousands of students for this to have the type of impact worthy of Charlie's legacy. [**I can 't do that without your help**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z37520fhhl2npn6u4hvdkmicaghmg84uatg1e87o_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s9jm6o35cph2bs).

name: John Rich
subject: J6 defendants punished for being veterans
body:
I recently came across a striking statistic... 72% of J6 defendants were military veterans or first responders.

| | | [View this email in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zodtbt1ckce49v98j5or6p94sese67af750msjb0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s9jm6o35clh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z47tfm3hfrrgm6avaepr62q3cpisbaq42mnfak88_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s9jm6o35clh2bs)
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsb6nn0sp331rs9d3h0skke7q4acbroqsbf8r1u0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s9jm6o35clh2bs)

Friend,

I recently came across a striking statistic.

**72% of J6 defendants were military veterans or first responders.**

And while courts often consider prior service as a factor for lighter sentences, the prosecutors and judges in these cases used their veteran or first responder status to argue for _**harsher penalties**_.

_Is this how our criminal justice system thanks them for their service?_

I’ve always honored those who serve. We are living the American dream _because_ of them. The way these patriots were treated is a grave injustice.

And while President Trump has pardoned almost all of the J6 defendants, they still haven’t received justice.

The lives and reputations of these patriots remain shattered from the lost years to the consistent government and mainstream media smear campaign they endured.

That’s why I’m proud to support Stand in the Gap.

This remarkable organization provides real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives.

[If you believe in liberty, in due process, and in standing up for our fellow Americans, I hope you’ll make a donation to Stand in the Gap today. >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3keeqblu9fljc47648i31pjq9vovvi1mudplano_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s9jm6o35clh2bs)
[Donate](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbq94763q2at7gs251dcl0e4ucdc2v2e1e8riuk0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s9jm6o35clh2bs)
Before January 6th, many of these patriots were unaware of just how broken the American justice system truly was.
Even after being pardoned, many J6 defendants still face...
* Difficulties finding a job
* Loss of rights, like the right to vote or the right to own a firearm
* Harassment on social media and in their personal lives
* Strained family relationships due to lost time in prison
* And even homelessness.

For many, returning to some semblance of a normal life is overwhelming.

**Stand in the Gap is committed to being a comprehensive support system for J6 defendants and their families by providing essential resources to help these American patriots heal physically, mentally, emotionally, and spiritually.**

Stand in the Gap believes in second chances, providing support to individuals transitioning back into society after incarceration, and working towards a more forward-thinking and restorative prison system that sends non-violent offenders into the world better off than they were when they went in.

Through their programs, partnerships, and advocacy efforts, they are making a lasting impact on the lives of those in need.

**There are nearly 1,600 Americans who are looking for a second chance.**

Let’s show these patriots they’re not forgotten.

[Will you help J6 defendants get back on their feet by donating $10, $35, $50, or even $100 to Stand in the Gap today? >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvookhsh9qkq5odl32rojhrh7mqicvem5as70140_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s9jm6o35clh2bs)
[Donate $10](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zts1pklj0ujhnvtour8k2nidsq04n5alf3ua13o8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s9jm6o35clh2bs)

[Donate $35](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zt775rj4goec0lq8uf3hi74tgm6m12ads04tgcj0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s9jm6o35clh2bs)

[Donate $50](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z590a69si2ibvv39m5nik1enss95a96bo467ai80_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s9jm6o35clh2bs)

[Donate $100](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrkvcj5jc2l03bbroj6bfbtl0ub14mhugnullmmg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s9jm6o35clh2bs)

[Donate $250](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zr410dpdeui8cen0s13oosj5q36mjjkfvdnc4uvo_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s9jm6o35clh2bs)

[Donate $500](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5d9apnlp6hllpui791v0piosgsb8tr388f3rkfg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s9jm6o35clh2bs)

[Donate $1,000](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zg6s5l5itv4e73ac31887m4dc5ks6q149s8uhtug_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s9jm6o35clh2bs)

[Donate Any Amount](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgtem2vrk216p7d4qpl4d1cumhbo4bloba8qt6mo_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s9jm6o35clh2bs)
This isn’t about politics. It’s about justice.

These are real Americans — veterans, first responders, fathers, mothers, hard-working citizens — who exercised their First Amendment rights and were persecuted for their political beliefs.

_**If we don’t fight for our fellow patriots now, who will?**_

When you donate to Stand in the Gap, you’re not just defending individuals. _You are defending the soul of our country_.

**As long as there’s breath in my lungs and truth in my heart, I’ll be singing to honor veterans and first responders. I hope you’ll join me by taking action right now.**
[Donate](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0kv6mj8okp2f0aklg1h73poa7gohlo7cj0ipjf8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s9jm6o35clh2bs)
For faith, freedom, and country,

John Rich

subject: Crockett came after me again
body:

| | | | | She's as Radical Left as they come.

J _asmine Crockett 's attacks against me just hit an all-time low. _

**Democrats tout being the party of "diversity" and "tolerance" until they go up against someone like me who knows the FACTS, then they can't stand it.**

This is Byron Donalds, I've received a lot of flak since I announced my bid for Governor after Trump endorsed me, but what's happened now is truly unbelievable:

Pelosi's Top Henchman **Jasmine Crockett** has been on a rampage against me after I helped Trump clean up the streets of DC - now she's on the record DEFENDING dangerous criminals, even suggesting they should roam the streets **FREELY.**

_I 've tried challenging her to debate, and was met with silence._

_I 've confronted her with the FACTS, and was called a liar. _

_This isn 't the first time she's come after me, and it won't be the last._

Her insults don't bother me, it's the **ARMY** of liberal billionaires under her command that are more fired-up than EVER to see me surrender.

President Trump told me if we lose Florida, ALL of the MAGA Movement could crumble overnight.

**We can 't let that happen. **

My race is the tip of the spear against the Radical Left, and I can't do this alone - so could you spare _**[$25, $47, or $100](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z5kp4qces4e23b86cu96tva53f6qdlr0g884mcmo_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s9jm6p74cth2bs "$25, $47, or $100")**_ before midnight to help me score a **BIG** win for _MAGA_?

---
The Radical Left wants to take me down: Fake News Smear Campaigns, Pelosi's henchmen spreading lies, and liberal billionaires spending MILLIONS to prop up my opponent.

It's a national effort to stop me. But with you by my side, I'll never let them win.

So please - will you chip in today to help me stand strong against Jasmine Crockett and the Radical Left?

name: John Rich
subject: J6 defendants punished for being veterans
body:
I recently came across a striking statistic... 72% of J6 defendants were military veterans or first responders.

| | | [View this email in your browser](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zsn6bl6ja4med3074fcgafs83dm3jns5dfj6thug_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s9jm9or4cjh2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z5ijfp7mesfnhqemstj8d9t0v6fhmn9kpmpp3q6g_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s9jm9or4cjh2bs)
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z4t3j0q71d3bv80b73luaa344jbdvs69h6qggtoo_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s9jm9or4cjh2bs)

Friend,

I recently came across a striking statistic.

**72% of J6 defendants were military veterans or first responders.**

And while courts often consider prior service as a factor for lighter sentences, the prosecutors and judges in these cases used their veteran or first responder status to argue for _**harsher penalties**_.

_Is this how our criminal justice system thanks them for their service?_

I’ve always honored those who serve. We are living the American dream _because_ of them. The way these patriots were treated is a grave injustice.

And while President Trump has pardoned almost all of the J6 defendants, they still haven’t received justice.

The lives and reputations of these patriots remain shattered from the lost years to the consistent government and mainstream media smear campaign they endured.

That’s why I’m proud to support Stand in the Gap.

This remarkable organization provides real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives.

[If you believe in liberty, in due process, and in standing up for our fellow Americans, I hope you’ll make a donation to Stand in the Gap today. >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zuekgtt6quvquip8a4bgpduoim4a6ukch4lqh8o8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s9jm9or4cjh2bs)
[Donate](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z3681583qmbrkqpige7vbfmubehal5kmjgpf57po_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s9jm9or4cjh2bs)
Before January 6th, many of these patriots were unaware of just how broken the American justice system truly was.
Even after being pardoned, many J6 defendants still face...
* Difficulties finding a job
* Loss of rights, like the right to vote or the right to own a firearm
* Harassment on social media and in their personal lives
* Strained family relationships due to lost time in prison
* And even homelessness.

For many, returning to some semblance of a normal life is overwhelming.

**Stand in the Gap is committed to being a comprehensive support system for J6 defendants and their families by providing essential resources to help these American patriots heal physically, mentally, emotionally, and spiritually.**

Stand in the Gap believes in second chances, providing support to individuals transitioning back into society after incarceration, and working towards a more forward-thinking and restorative prison system that sends non-violent offenders into the world better off than they were when they went in.

Through their programs, partnerships, and advocacy efforts, they are making a lasting impact on the lives of those in need.

**There are nearly 1,600 Americans who are looking for a second chance.**

Let’s show these patriots they’re not forgotten.

[Will you help J6 defendants get back on their feet by donating $10, $35, $50, or even $100 to Stand in the Gap today? >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z6l06i03jlat442333t9fn8std5hbg9se45tmd78_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s9jm9or4cjh2bs)
[Donate $10](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zni83vmu8h8cpkjajpq10441028on8plliqr3d2g_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s9jm9or4cjh2bs)

[Donate $35](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z12lvtkfrmdfm9hs11o57gfe7ka1vh2khouvupo8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s9jm9or4cjh2bs)

[Donate $50](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z8g6u4iqql17sscgqa008thhn520950dnqdmqhkg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s9jm9or4cjh2bs)

[Donate $100](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zmoj7dj8vmpvad1o6m0cvn7bes2q4fshtavkh448_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s9jm9or4cjh2bs)

[Donate $250](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z9mbih4l6o3valsiqvd0inbnp4e576jdsnet0vt0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s9jm9or4cjh2bs)

[Donate $500](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z8jd5k0fr0mc0le7slfaa23kjtpam51r2f9dgj98_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s9jm9or4cjh2bs)

[Donate $1,000](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z590n7ieqv4dehjn62ue10pc90g6qa9oln157q1o_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s9jm9or4cjh2bs)

[Donate Any Amount](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zn9rhqjfatejgbmqbb3ac4h234genrhklbcu9rig_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s9jm9or4cjh2bs)
This isn’t about politics. It’s about justice.

These are real Americans — veterans, first responders, fathers, mothers, hard-working citizens — who exercised their First Amendment rights and were persecuted for their political beliefs.

_**If we don’t fight for our fellow patriots now, who will?**_

When you donate to Stand in the Gap, you’re not just defending individuals. _You are defending the soul of our country_.

**As long as there’s breath in my lungs and truth in my heart, I’ll be singing to honor veterans and first responders. I hope you’ll join me by taking action right now.**
[Donate](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z2r7arfnm7o38ne4tea6vf7qjsfkhnb6l9qa3jd0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s9jm9or4cjh2bs)
For faith, freedom, and country,

John Rich

Stand In The Gap is registered as a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent permitted by law. Stand In The Gap’s tax identification number is 93-1417599.

name: Erika Kirk
subject: My cries will echo around the world like a battle cry
body:
We will never surrender. Ever.

| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z9m4rki8h351br2israqed3kbt3a7l1cd0s093a0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s9jm9or4cth2bs)
---
Friend, I want to thank you for loving my husband. For standing with us in the worst days of our lives. For praying. For mourning. For remembering. But now, _I need you to listen closely..._ **Because the evildoers who took Charlie 's life? They have NO idea what they have done. ** They didn't just try to silence a man...
They tried to silence his message -- a message of patriotism, of faith, and of God's merciful love. Instead, they ignited something even greater. **If they thought my husband 's mission was powerful before... ****_They have NO idea what they have just UNLEASHED._** **Not just across this country...**_**_But in me_**** _._**_ They have no idea the fire they've lit inside this wife. And to those listening across America... Let me be clear: The movement my husband built will not die.
**_I refuse to let that happen._** And I know all of us will refuse to let that happen, too. Charlie's mission will grow: Stronger. Bolder. Louder. Greater than ever. I shared these words publicly, from my heart -- just two days after I lost the love of my life.
[**I want you to watch. I want you to hear what Charlie meant to me. And I want you to hear what comes next:**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zbv7ibcmogankojef6akr1jkj21vusq16to9rkf0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s9jm9or4cth2bs)

[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zad899lnue4uajbmvi0rvo9nrh07thr2vslnojao_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s9jm9or4cth2bs)
---
Charlie gave everything for this country. And I will never stop speaking his name. We will not let the light he lit go out. Not now. Not ever. For Charlie,
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z671m06g6h37ev3ql7cserlom3fqgofd6q07q0so_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s9jm9or4cth2bs)

Erika Kirk On behalf of the Turning Point USA Family

name: Republican Party of Wisconsin
subject: How far-left are the growing list of Democrat Governor candidates going to go?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN** NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qdjjuit-didthutlhu-r/) Patriot, Just when you thought the Democrats' field for governor couldn't get any more extreme, another far-left radical jumps in. Yesterday, State Rep. Francesca Hong--a proud member of the Democratic Socialists of America and the Wisconsin Legislative Socialist Caucus--announced her bid for governor, promising to be a "wild card" in the race. If that's not a red flag, I don't know what is!Hong isn't hiding her socialist agenda. She's pushed for an "Economic Bill of Rights" that would hand over more control to big government, hiking costs on hardworking families and small businesses. She's backed extreme climate mandates aiming for net-zero emissions by 2050, which could crush our energy sector and kill jobs in manufacturing and agriculture. She's joining an already crowded field of left-wing Democrats like Lt. Gov. Sara Rodriguez, Sen. Kelda Roys, and Milwaukee County Exec David Crowley, all vying to outdo each other on progressive policies that would raise taxes, expand government overreach, and weaken our state's economy. How far-left are they willing to go? From socialist caucuses to job-killing green deals, it's clear: these candidates are out of touch with Wisconsin values. [STOP THE RADICAL FAR-LEFT FROM TAKING OVER WISCONSIN](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qdjjuit-didthutlhu-y/) We can't let them turn our great state into a socialist experiment. That's why the Wisconsin GOP is fighting back to protect our freedoms, grow our economy, and keep Wisconsin strong. But we need your help to win in 2026.Will you chip in [$10, $25, or $50 today](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qdjjuit-didthutlhu-j/) to stop the far-left takeover? Your [donation](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qdjjuit-didthutlhu-d/) will fund our efforts to expose these radicals and support strong Republican leadership.[Donate Now.](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qdjjuit-didthutlhu-h/) Together, we'll keep Wisconsin red and reject the socialists.-Team WisGOPP.S. # Elon Musk Warns of America’s $36 Trillion Dollar Debt Bomb
# The system is crumbling, protect your wealth or suffer the fallout.

Elon Musk has avoided two major financial crises before. He pulled Tesla and SpaceX back from the brink of collapse and built two of the most valuable companies in history.

Now, he’s sounding the alarm about America’s $36 trillion debt time bomb that could destroy the fabric of our society.

While head of the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) under President Trump, Musk exposed just how bad things are:

✅ Runaway government spending has pushed national debt to unsustainable levels
✅ The Federal Reserve’s rate hikes are squeezing the economy, making inflation irreversible
✅ The stock market is on shaky ground, putting traditional 401(k)s, IRAs, and TSPs at risk

With Trump back in charge, major spending cuts are coming. While necessary, these cuts may send shockwaves through Wall Street, creating unpredictable market turbulence.

That’s why financial elites aren’t waiting to react, they're moving their wealth now.

name: Erika Kirk
subject: My cries will echo around the world like a battle cry
body:
We will never surrender. Ever.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zup3a9imf9l6ciavrkfrl6btr0ckskve0cqnk080_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s9ge2p32chh2bs)
---
Friend, I want to thank you for loving my husband. For standing with us in the worst days of our lives. For praying. For mourning. For remembering. But now, _I need you to listen closely..._ **Because the evildoers who took Charlie 's life? They have NO idea what they have done. ** They didn't just try to silence a man...
They tried to silence his message -- a message of patriotism, of faith, and of God's merciful love. Instead, they ignited something even greater. **If they thought my husband 's mission was powerful before... ****_They have NO idea what they have just UNLEASHED._** **Not just across this country...**_**_But in me_**** _._**_ They have no idea the fire they've lit inside this wife. And to those listening across America... Let me be clear: The movement my husband built will not die.
**_I refuse to let that happen._** And I know all of us will refuse to let that happen, too. Charlie's mission will grow: Stronger. Bolder. Louder. Greater than ever. I shared these words publicly, from my heart -- just two days after I lost the love of my life.
[**I want you to watch. I want you to hear what Charlie meant to me. And I want you to hear what comes next:**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbfgnukocvnl5hcc9a5qv7v4e976td1gt548dgb0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s9ge2p32chh2bs)

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za48vbp35nhvb1p465v46fjgmqvbe1uqgo7cfu0g_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s9ge2p32chh2bs)
---
Charlie gave everything for this country. And I will never stop speaking his name. We will not let the light he lit go out. Not now. Not ever. For Charlie,

| Peter,
This year, the MassGOP quietly built a tool that is changing elections in Massachusetts.
We launched our own texting service that lets Republican candidates and Town Committees talk directly to voters for half -- even a third -- of what outside vendors charge.
✅ 4¢ per message with MassGOP ❌ 8-15¢ with outside vendors
And the results speak for themselves: ✅ Chris Shepley -- elected to Andover School Committee ✅ Ralph Page -- re-elected to East Longmeadow Town Council by just 7 votes ✅ Overrides defeated in Stoneham, Needham, Westwood, Hamilton/Wenham, and Easton ✅ Conservatives winning local seats in Worcester and Shrewsbury
This is how we fight smarter. This is how we win in Massachusetts.
But to keep this program running, and expanding into 2026, we need your help right now!
Will you please help fuel the most cost-effective voter contact program in the state?

body:
We will never surrender. Ever.

| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zr8ahkhv26lmf1c1qi864r5dv4ru1uejclms3tso_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s9ge6o72c1h2bs)

Friend, I want to thank you for loving my husband. For standing with us in the worst days of our lives. For praying. For mourning. For remembering. But now, _I need you to listen closely..._ **Because the evildoers who took Charlie 's life? They have NO idea what they have done. ** They didn't just try to silence a man...
They tried to silence his message -- a message of patriotism, of faith, and of God's merciful love. Instead, they ignited something even greater. **If they thought my husband 's mission was powerful before... ****_They have NO idea what they have just UNLEASHED._** **Not just across this country...**_**_But in me_**** _._**_ They have no idea the fire they've lit inside this wife. And to those listening across America... Let me be clear: The movement my husband built will not die.
**_I refuse to let that happen._** And I know all of us will refuse to let that happen, too. Charlie's mission will grow: Stronger. Bolder. Louder. Greater than ever. I shared these words publicly, from my heart -- just two days after I lost the love of my life.

name: The Flyover
subject: Kimmel Uproar, Dragon Stones, and a Samurai Sword Defense
body:
Late-show host Jimmy Kimmel’s suspension from ABC over comments about Charlie Kirk’s death has caused a political uproar, with House Democratic leaders [demanding the resignation](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2unDAUhJ_GdF4ZYwwULjaK6DYpUiQd8rUPy7nxD_Ixi_btI5JHSDeakUb6vp-P5WExYHp-sxFMXfOS4KQAtUJZfmOMEI69ZFt8sc-cqOYEZBcpZM_FxNtp8RbDe1GNNyuAhK4B0w79KAfdd0OzmV596G6Y1DppP4FolZTrOLlRAIDuRd-gud7E1E6tEGOvb0prKWWvRm0_hlZ1TAnwWHO5fWZMdYM1vPMLys3l2ASz1boT6-5MzkzO53neIqVrY3KGxA9icr6gmJz3HLCiu-Inxvjm_wg5HbRDIsyJ034U4ls-CLiHmF2xFR0PYD0U4jVfrU2er85xt1ksvADhMzE528Lv9_bx_dcjsG7ODj3rvn655MJJP6DsTTF-PzEEJD0wJZ7RYviLUf_L_cvIPwEAAP__nu-axQ) of Federal Communications Commission (FCC) Chair Brendan Carr.

## Kimmel Suspension Sparks Political Uproar
Late-show host Jimmy Kimmel's suspension by ABC over comments about Charlie Kirk's death has ignited a political uproar, with House Democratic leaders [demanding the resignation](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2unDAUhJ_GdF4ZYwwULjaK6DYpUiQd8rUPy7nxD_Ixi_btI5JHSDeakUb6vp-P5WExYHp-sxFMXfOS4KQAtUJZfmOMEI69ZFt8sc-cqOYEZBcpZM_FxNtp8RbDe1GNNyuAhK4B0w79KAfdd0OzmV596G6Y1DppP4FolZTrOLlRAIDuRd-gud7E1E6tEGOvb0prKWWvRm0_hlZ1TAnwWHO5fWZMdYM1vPMLys3l2ASz1boT6-5MzkzO53neIqVrY3KGxA9icr6gmJz3HLCiu-Inxvjm_wg5HbRDIsyJ034U4ls-CLiHmF2xFR0PYD0U4jVfrU2er85xt1ksvADhMzE528Lv9_bx_dcjsG7ODj3rvn655MJJP6DsTTF-PzEEJD0wJZ7RYviLUf_L_cvIPwEAAP__nu-axQ) of Federal Communications Commission (FCC) Chair Brendan Carr. On Thursday, Sinclair Broadcasting, a large TV broadcast group, [upped the ante even further](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2u3CAQBeCnwR0rPDYYFxRp6G7alNZkGa_nLj8WkLtynj7a5BFSH-nTOefHx_aBHDk_vmMi1_eyZXq1SL1T3Z6cEsVfZy1YQ8VHya2XTA03UKClWuW4bgE5Xts8BLcTAU0DuXHRFhajp2U4nAE7TzCh1rDrKSDamVQIeLdmNQrswO6tqXVcR6WsNrfZGADQszX4cxnnScyKAvdSb5-Fcz9oj1f5onq7lzREd_R-NjF9E-AF-HydpfV3JMC_YQFerQL8aAX4RIFRgG-c7xG5ykAJc2jyk1O65L_BEs8Sy4N_k-xF3g-skUk-uT6b3DFxvAT4obpwvjhGbmYRs3ok5Pi3Uf-vG78c_AkAAP__Fx2GAA), saying ABC's suspension of Jimmy Kimmel was insufficient and announcing it will yank _Jimmy Kimmel Live!_ " from its stations until the host apologizes directly to Kirk's family and makes a donation to his organization, Turning Point USA, Show business news site _Deadline_ reported that [Kimmel refused to apologize](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2u2zAQhE9DdTSo5Z9UsEijzmlTCmtzJa9DkQbF2NDtA713hFcOBvgw8_25zlfkxHn9jRuFtpQ502dP1BrV-S9vG6V_r1qwxopryXsrmXacQYGVapT9OEfkdMymi2EhAtIdhd7bAbyz2nePYGCBRd_NAAYQjSY1krca0Z8Rlo7DSVNjP_ZKDdZdjHMAYM3g8OZ7o4VRFLmVenkWzu1BSzrKm-rlXrYuhUdrr13oXwImAVMkjIkznaWA6UQLmNQoYHryth3y-5SMdOedS5aR90yHjJhRfjBFyvJWbpJXqrIH7azxzvYCpq6G-PpwSrw7L4xaN-T0taH9SNw7wP8AAAD__8saf6Y) in a call with Disney leadership and that he planned to escalate his criticism of Trump supporters before the show was pulled. The decision to suspend Kimmel was then made by Disney Co-Chairman Dana Walden and CEO Bob Iger. The controversy began with remarks by Kimmel on his Monday show accusing the "MAGA gang" of trying to spin Kirk's murder for political gain. Two days later, the FCC's Carr sharply criticized those remarks, warning broadcasters that they must serve the public interest and sparking a firestorm of criticism from Democrats.
## Nvidia Bets $5 Billion on Intel Revival
Nvidia will [invest $5 billion in Intel](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D1urDAUxfHVmA5kX4wxhYvX0M1rUyKDr4eb-GNkHNDsPiJbSH2k35H-H4_lYSlQev63EU31eUl4HQFrxbJ8UYwYvl8l2-KKfeZ01JzwsAtwGFo-tWJanKXwXmTjjEcE7Bs0Yhw0jGrox2Y30q9WaM29Fn4a3br5zYleO6WFxB59Q-bW-CQmwbkeVCeVAoBBamXXUcieSY6Oai7dZ6ZUd_ThnU8s3ZZjE8xe6-tg_T8GM4P5uq5uS-t2jwzmm2Yw84nBLDSDmVLF0KaTHNmW0olHjZhqt9cYmmLc66IQ6FAjk_wZLYXfl_qnNKeBnwAAAP__Ug12-A) and take a 4% ownership stake in the struggling chip-maker, news that pushed Intel stock up 23% on Thursday. The move follows a separate $5.7 billion U.S. government investment for a 10% stake in Intel, and marks a major effort to revive the once-dominant firm under new Intel CEO Lip-Bu Tan. The companies plan to [produce multiple chip generations together](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LHupCAQx_GnwY4NIIoUFNfY7bVXGlxGnRPBwLibffuL9wr_eiaf_PL985yeHiOm9bc_wNGSpwSfGoEIyrTjcUC8zpJ9CcWvOVXKCaqflFAdF5ZLOwWP8TvpJrgFQEHbgJOmG5Tpu9Y0m7PaGD-YZZ4tKDnoMFijbWtDOwtjpWnQ3Zqw0kohhq5_6L5XSnV66P1spG6ZFhCQcnn8zZhogyV-8xvK45WPJrqN6Kys_cXUyNSYvmeudJ-YGm-YqVFYpkY5MDXOV8UEtd6Pbwzo-eF3qLyb-QzEc-KVyrWudxGOiSDyD9LGK_kd-GvDkwfwkfuFoHAq13Fy8nG_waa4cH4wRqy9YVqsh8f4fyP9KOzbqX8BAAD__3AGjCc), teaming up to co-develop data center and PC chips. Analysts say the deal gives Intel much-needed credibility and capital, while Nvidia shores up its U.S. manufacturing footprint amid tensions with China.

clean_body: Late-show host Jimmy Kimmel’s suspension from ABC over comments about Charlie Kirk’s death has caused a political uproar, with House Democratic leaders of Federal Communications Commission (FCC) Chair Brendan Carr. | | | | | | Friday, September 19, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1959, Soviet leader Nikita Khrushchev, during his first U.S. tour, erupted in anger in Los Angeles after learning security concerns . The Flyover covers news across all of America, but we also publish nine state-specific editions that offer the same unbiased format to cover the most interesting news in each of these states: 🤠 , 🐊 , 🍑 , 🐻 , 🛶 , 🎸, 🏈 , 🏔️ , and 🌵. You can subscribe for free to any of them by clicking on its link. If your hair keeps thinning no matter what products you try, the real culprit may not be age or hormones—it could be a simple scalp mistake that’s suffocating your follicles. That's why you should check out today's sponsor, , for a solution. | Kimmel Suspension Sparks Political Uproar Late-show host Jimmy Kimmel's suspension by ABC over comments about Charlie Kirk's death has ignited a political uproar, with House Democratic leaders of Federal Communications Commission (FCC) Chair Brendan Carr. On Thursday, Sinclair Broadcasting, a large TV broadcast group, , saying ABC's suspension of Jimmy Kimmel was insufficient and announcing it will yank Jimmy Kimmel Live! " from its stations until the host apologizes directly to Kirk's family and makes a donation to his organization, Turning Point USA, Show business news site Deadline reported that in a call with Disney leadership and that he planned to escalate his criticism of Trump supporters before the show was pulled. The decision to suspend Kimmel was then made by Disney Co-Chairman Dana Walden and CEO Bob Iger. The controversy began with remarks by Kimmel on his Monday show accusing the "MAGA gang" of trying to spin Kirk's murder for political gain. Two days later, the FCC's Carr sharply criticized those remarks, warning broadcasters that they must serve the public interest and sparking a firestorm of criticism from Democrats. Nvidia Bets $5 Billion on Intel Revival Nvidia will and take a 4% ownership stake in the struggling chip-maker, news that pushed Intel stock up 23% on Thursday. The move follows a separate $5.7 billion U.S. government investment for a 10% stake in Intel, and marks a major effort to revive the once-dominant firm under new Intel CEO Lip-Bu Tan. The companies plan to , teaming up to co-develop data center and PC chips. Analysts say the deal gives Intel much-needed credibility and capital, while Nvidia shores up its U.S. manufacturing footprint amid tensions with China. List: America’s Most Beautiful Libraries A new roundup highlights , blending architectural beauty with cultural value. Standouts include the glass-and-mountain-framed , Cleveland’s Beaux-Arts main branch, and the Carnegie Library in Pittsburgh. Kansas City’s Central Library, with its “community bookshelf” facade, and Iowa’s ornate State Law Library also make the list. . name: America First War Room Sponsor
subject: Apple’s Starlink Support Sets Stage for Mode's Global Takeover
body:
Here's what the merger means for investors...

---
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1053729/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvajJFVXc5S3FVdw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MTk/LbmNsUW9MU1dSZQ/qP2hpZHM9bmM1cVBTWjBSU3FlOExscw/gaM0uhA/s1je714eaa8)
| | | | | |
---
| |
---
| | | Breaking news, Friend:
Apple just enabled Starlink satellite support to T-Mobile iPhones.
One of the biggest potential winners from global satellite coverage?
**[Mode Mobile.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
Just about everything Elon touches turns to gold:
* SpaceX now worth $350B+
* Tesla up by over 25,000% since IPO
* And now - iPhone’s get satellite access

But while Wall Street focuses on Apple, Mode Mobile is quietly positioned to capitalize on this global satellite revolution.
Their EarnPhone technology already:
* Reaches 50M+ users worldwide
* Helped those users save and earn $325+ million
* Grew revenue 32,481%

And that was before global satellite coverage.
With SpaceX eliminating "dead zones" worldwide, Mode's earning technology can reach 3B+ unbanked people globally in rural populations worldwide.
We’re talking about emerging markets with no infrastructure.
And right now, you can still **[invest in Mode, but only limited space remains in the current round.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**
They’ve secured their Nasdaq ticker $MODE, and their pre-IPO offering is live now. But their previous round at **$0.30/share** sold out fast, with over 55,000 investors.
**The time to invest is now,** before any potential IPO.
**[See how to get in before Mode’s potential public debut.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**
* * *

_*Mode Mobile recently received their ticker reservation with Nasdaq ($MODE), indicating an intent to IPO in the next 24 months. An intent to IPO is no guarantee that an actual IPO will occur._
_*The Deloitte rankings are based on submitted applications and public company database research, with winners selected based on their fiscal-year revenue growth percentage over a three-year period._
_*Tesla return calculated based on Yahoo Finance adjusted stock price data from June 29, 2010 to January 31, 2025._
_In making an investment decision, investors must rely on their own examination of the issuer and the terms of the offering, including the merits and risks involved. Mode Mobile has filed a Form C with the Securities and Exchange Commission in connection with its offering, a copy of which may be obtained here:[https://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/1748441/000164117225025402/ex99.pdf](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1053729/VaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2VjLmdvdi9BcmNoaXZlcy9lZGdhci9kYXRhLzE3NDg0NDEvMDAwMTY0MTE3MjI1MDI1NDAyL2V4OTkucGRm/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MTk/LbmNsUW9MU1dSZQ/gaM0uhA/sdr6d6fae21)_

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1053729/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MTk/LbmNsUW9MU1dSZQ/qP2hpZHM9bmM1cVBTWjBSU3FlOExscw/gaM0uhA/s7k6d538928)

name: Bob Brooks
subject: Congress is a dumpster fire. I’m a firefighter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
It’s not about putting the fire out. It’s about what we build from the ashes.
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T503033a7-805b-4045-8ea8-8e33372e7e59/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Peter, I’m going to be honest. I don’t look or talk like most politicians. And I think that’s a good thing! Because Congress is a dumpster fire. It’s filled with people like my opponent, Ryan Mackenzie, who represents everything that’s wrong with Washington: a Career politician, takes big money, cuts taxes for the rich over and over again. Screws working folks. I’ve spent my career climbing a different kind of career ladder. Pizza delivery guy, dishwasher, bartender, short-order cook, beer-truck driver, baseball coach, landscaper, snowplower. Firefighter for 20 years. Now I’m running for Congress against Ryan Mackenzie to fight the fires of corruption and a system that burns working folks while letting billionaires tear through our communities without consequence. [If you’re with me in this fight, I’m humbly asking you to split a few bucks between my campaign and Blue Amp Action. Because I’ll tell you this, Peter, the billionaires definitely will not be on our side.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T47c2ddb4-bcc8-4145-a7bf-089080276e1a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE $10 NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T51163fa2-bd3e-4df0-a14d-5f5ec49fe8cf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE $25 NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8c24e27f-0891-42d5-842a-f27e197ca126/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE MORE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1e0b4831-5b95-4347-9079-85c9a62932e5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | Listen, I’m not JUST running for Congress to flip this seat, and I’m not running JUST to beat Ryan Mackenzie. I’m running to build something new. An economy where no one ever has to choose between food on the table or a roof over their head. A health care system where people don’t have to go without lifesaving medical care because politicians like Ryan Mackenzie decided it was more important to line the pockets of billionaires. A system where your elected leaders do their damn jobs — that’s transparent and accountable instead of one that’s rampant with corruption. [Yes, Peter, we need to defeat Mackenzie and flip this seat. But what we really need to do is build something new — so that we’re making life better for Americans instead of constantly making things easier for billionaires. If that’s a mission you’re on board with, I hope you’ll chip in what you can to support my campaign and Blue Amp Action:](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc8ed19d4-2d6d-4fe6-92a4-f360ffab5770/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2dc5f0e8-7088-4b1b-aedc-d8cf0097b466/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
