I don’t look or talk like most politicians. And I think that’s a good thing! Because Congress is a dumpster fire. It’s filled with people like my opponent, Ryan Mackenzie, who represents everything that’s wrong with Washington: a Career politician, takes big money, cuts taxes for the rich over and over again. Screws working folks. I’ve spent my career climbing a different kind of career ladder. Pizza delivery guy, dishwasher, bartender, short-order cook, beer-truck driver, baseball coach, landscaper, snowplower. Firefighter for 20 years. Now I’m running for Congress against Ryan Mackenzie to fight the fires of corruption and a system that burns working folks while letting billionaires tear through our communities without consequence. | | | | | | | | | | | | Listen, I’m not JUST running for Congress to flip this seat, and I’m not running JUST to beat Ryan Mackenzie. I’m running to build something new. An economy where no one ever has to choose between food on the table or a roof over their head. A health care system where people don’t have to go without lifesaving medical care because politicians like Ryan Mackenzie decided it was more important to line the pockets of billionaires. A system where your elected leaders do their damn jobs — that’s transparent and accountable instead of one that’s rampant with corruption. | | | | | | | Thanks, Bob | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Action PAC PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC | | or

name: The Texas Flyover
subject: Best BBQ, FBI Probes Text Message Scam, and Rare Bird Draws Crowd
body:
_Southern Living_ released a new list of the Top 50 BBQ Joints in the South, and 17 are in Texas. The rankings were determined by Daniel Moss, the magazine's contributing barbecue editor, based on his overall impression of each establishment.

# Friday, September 19, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1864, entrepreneur [Florence Thornton Butt](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD1uxCAUhE-DO1vwwLAUFGncbdqUFj_PayRsHCDr3dtHzhVSjjSa0fd93ee7jSnuj0-7oWmvJc87njVha1hmh7U59724eJR8BXy1DWu1M1AYe6p7pudgY3rPogvG0aBZh4ap8QZKK5DdargUQt3siF6GBTnlwgL1gUqvqXQoumiuMaqZZowCFYNQzHt5s3zkKugQiKAYYstlaCs2fNm6pHd-Yhl83rpk1taOSvgHgYnAdJ7nsL2r3e3e8h7zVSIwXVQEppS9TQQmW1r0CQlMK7p-yT97wNIDVRok58OxHl0x4ThjSrFKRQR9bDamv8f2P09PA78BAAD__5HDfMQ) was born in Buena Vista, Mississippi. After moving to Kerrville with her family in 1905, she opened a grocery store that her son Howard would later expand to become H-E-B. Texans don't get too many chances to see the Northern Lights, but folks in the Panhandle did this week. A thunderstorm provided an [impressive effect](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDHO4yAUhE-DO1vwMMEUFNu4y7ZbWmBeAhI2XniKk9v_cq7wdzMa6RvN_Lsvd5dy2p9_3YaW3o-y7Hi2jERYF4-NvP__8Omo5TL4pg1bcwtwUD03vTBLcCl_lrEL1vNgRIdWaDWBNhpuXbRSez1pmKT0kwpCa2ccV4LLyXE9CuiSvWDcCCMEBz4OoxbrepucVFIHEwIbOYZEpQ4UkfDt2iN_ygvrsJatyzYSHY3JPwxmBvN5nsMaa9mvlMF8zWEwt8OtyGB2ldKaL7WXShHr3uf0jNT6L7kHwZVUZhyOeHTVhuNMOad202zkz82l_C2l3131svATAAD__95afMw) to the dramatic display. Two 84-year-old Texans turned friendship into a fearless adventure and set out to travel the world in 80 days. Watch on this week's [**_Feel Good Flyover_ podcast**.](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DtuwzAQBNDTUJ0F_iSaBYt84CZwuiClQHJXFgHKdMS1Zd0-UK6QcmaAV8z3eTj7lNP18ulndPQcy3DFtWYkwmUIWCmEnzGk21L2gE-asVY_SC67A7cHYQfwKW-DbsAFDlY06ITpjtJYI_tmcv1RdeC516OMkVsBGtAA4Ii9AQWxSW7HuBVWCC65brURMfZHrzplwAIwzRESlaWlCQmfvo55Kw9c2ljmJruJ6FaZemHyxORpXdd2K3e6B9z3vfEUJ6ZOD6beP976dJnlK_-qzeLgtqacU-0N0_wy-5T_SPrfEQ8nfwMAAP__3YxyyQ) If constant tingling or burning in your feet has been holding you back, you’ll want to see the simple at-home device from today's sponsor, [Vita Feet,](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL1uwyAURp8Gb4nggk0YGCJV7pQmQ9R0s8Bcxyg4duE2P29fpa_Q8dMnnSOd067buZji9fzhJrT0GObuiveSkAhz57GQ99-Dj0ueXwMfNGEprgMO9YqblTBdcDE9O1UF63kwokIrdL0BbTQ01Wg5cOyFRwG1UELyJkBTh2GjG2UG43QV7QvGjTBCcOBqrbTo-2bjZC11MCEwxTFEmvOaRiR8uDKk53zDvO7nqUp2JFoKk1sGLYM2YULKl9fHoB2oMGjl4fm-vUO5wglWcr_97C9RXQ7hyGS7_PgUy4iZybfjV7uvsg3LPaYUS6OZ4ufJxfRnov_1uVn4DQAA__-WR3iC) which is helping seniors finally find fast relief without drugs or costly treatments.

## Foreign Land Ownership Ban Challenged
Three Chinese citizens with ties to Texas have filed a class action lawsuit challenging the constitutionality of a [new state law](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2SozAQhJ9GZKLEmB8rUHAJmS-9kBpJg1GdEF5pbPA-_RZ-hQ3np7_q7n-36YYhhnT_iysZPuZtSrSXSMyUJ0uFrf2abXjk7Rzo4JVKwQkUdFJp2ejJY4jvqa28scrrpiLTDN0VBj1AXy2mAwXYdjTP3qEGdHpWzvfofHu16HQVzAlTutFNo0C1dTs0zvVXvHSXwWvvRavIB95yzQsxHVjm-N5elGu3rVU0C_OjiMsfAaOAcd_3-v-B6TwKGM80AsaPTMDolpCokHSBwzelIsuT5MmSnw8ZcZcWUwrpLnmhVc55W6V9vs9FJoySCiOTgLHKxj_2EGMo_SBadV8xxI8l_l2RLwM_AQAA__-tGou6) that prohibits citizens of China, Russia, North Korea, and Iran from owning real estate in Texas. Last month, a federal judge [dismissed a case](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD3u2zAMR08jbzEoyh9_DhqyaEvXjoYs0YkKOU4lJnFuXzhX6EQQD3h4-P2-TBefcrpff_mVrezLNt35XTOLcJlmrjLPf5c5Pcp2PLzLyrX6CQH7E9BJ0xR9yp-pa6KdIZJu2Oqx_8GRRhyamw0EFBgI5ojcE2g_w7AMBMBLHIxpkj1kQJq0BoSu7UYdwvDjTW_GSDGqDjgm2UorNxbefV3yZ3txacO2NtneRB5VmbNCp9Bl_27_PKskf2CFLvjKVaFbOHLxWaGLqUpJQU5hexY52Nd63L3GwApdp8z5yAovMBqMQoegByJQ6AwpdE2x8fFOOac6jKqD6-pT_gbJ_834svgvAAD__624g-k) brought by a pair of Chinese visa holders who claimed the law [discriminates](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2O2zAQhJ-G6tYgV5J1LFi4EZAEl_ZKgT8raxGKdEieZb99YL9Cul0M5sPMfH0un5Yjp-tvu5NpjzUviY4aqTUqi6PanPu7Or6V_Hro0Xaq1S4ocQSpQeklWI7PZeiCcTJo1ZFR0_iBk57w3G1mdUr1wUuLeiDUqsdpHXW_DmpEfe5tx-YFk1pppSTK4TRMyvvzh-3Hfgo6BDFICtxyObWNGj1sXeMz36mcfN67aLbWblX0F4GzwPk4jtNe00sTOFOC7ypwfpUSOL9vv3GiSpBs45wIIt85XYETvOFQvwlaBhez_wPRpgD5SFTqxjdwNoG3Mb4NDQJXX3jnZFsuT4GzLXC5qF_rj59fXTHhdnCMXM-TGOR1txzfkdv_DX03-C8AAP__QJeUzA) against them based on race and ethnicity. The new lawsuit contends the law encroaches on the federal government’s prerogative to determine foreign policy. The law "casts a cloud of suspicion over anyone of Chinese descent," [according to the lawsuit](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGO6yAYhE-DOywg2JiC4jXu8totLTA_DhKGLPwbO7dfOVfYbkYafZqZr_tytzHFvP23Oxg8Q1kyHC0BItTFQUPnvoOLz1ouAyfu0JpdBBMDZZpyvXgb03uRnTeOec07MFwNk1BaibF7mElzJwMfJWgOo2JykJMXLKzSAZdh6KK5YExzzTkTTPZS8XUdJ3sbbspr74lk4COW2uMDEE7bQnqXF9R-LXuXzAPx2cjtHxEzEfNxHH0Fm678WnYi5msQETNWyP4jLgRN9mg_EamzOce80VAqxC3TmF_QsNRGLwqFhhaBiLmrxj-PmFJsoyKSbbuN6dMA__bby4jfAAAA__8874R1). One of the plaintiffs, a sophomore at Baylor University, claims the law's prohibition on leases longer than a year is an obstacle to finding an affordable place to rent. As of 2023, at least 120,000 Chinese nationals were estimated to be living in Texas. Since 2021, 26 states have [passed laws](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLuOwyAURL8Gd7EAv6Cg2MZdtt0S8bgkRNgkcBXiv195f2G7GY10pDk_V301McX99m02UPgJWe_QagJEKNpCRWtfwcZnyWeBD25Qq9Gc8ulC5YVJ7U1Mhx47ryz1knWg2DIJvsiFz91dcWaMpAFmYd0sp2EIYqBSBBBCOgu0i-qEUckkY5TTsR8X5twszDANi5fek5GCj5hLj3dA-Jga0pHfUHqXty6pO-KzkuGL8JXwtbXWW-vOjfD1PEP4agpGl-CM7vY4Xvvu3-2Ru6L8s8WUYp0XMtLbZmL6o-L_XLwV_w0AAP__6F50RA) restricting foreign property ownership.
## Festivals Around Texas
As [fall approaches](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2uozAUBOCnMR3I_8aFi23osu2WyMTHiSWDWfskwNtfJa9wy5FG30jz7zbffMppe_z1Kzg8Y5k3OFoGRKjzAg2X5X9c0l7LJ8CJK7TmZ0656qntmZ2DT_maZRfcQoNlHThm1MiNNVx3T8eijNzqUXHKlFDSSDGCCNowLRRo1SX3wahlljHKqRykYfe7Hr1QwgQbApEUQsJSB3wCwulbzFd5Qx3uZe2yeyLujYg_hE-ET8dxDGXLV9qu8qoNPcKnR_i0eXxVIHz6GoRP0efcx5KTf0C_-r3Hs6su7EfKOTVtiKSP1af83cHfvfN2_CcAAP__Zbp59A) and the weather begins to cool off, Texans can visit several outdoor festivals and fairs, including the Texas State Fair, which kicks off next week. The East Texas State Fair in Tyler [starts today](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFuwyAYBOCnwRsRYAJmYOjClq4drR_zO0bCsQt_k_jtq6SP0PF00qfTfV3GC-SSb9dPWNHTc97GGz5aQSKsY8RGMX7PMe91ewV80oqtwaiEOnPhuHRjglyOUXfJR5Gc7NBLex6UdVaZbvFaD1MEi4MBE3sRo5F61qI3aG0Ppu-yf2HCSSelUEKftJXTZAboz71NLiWmBaZMWz3RgoRPaHM5tjvW07StXfEL0d5Y_8FUYCrQUbDusP_VTIWXzlQQjqkgB6YCQiP-dngjIOQz5MobpFSw8Z-dz1vlUjha-IFQeb7xN8pU6KpP-yOXkpuxTIvrCrm8Z9D_zrt79RsAAP__8GOCuA) and runs through next Sunday. Organizers expect up to 15,000 people a day. This year's fair will feature its first-ever PRCA-sanctioned rodeo. The World Taco Eating Championship is [coming to San Antonio](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGO4yAQBuCnsTsswBBCQXGNu1x7pTUGHI-EwQejOHn7lVf7BluO5tOvX_-_x_wATJiff2GPjt5rmXM8W4pEsc5LbLQs_9cFj1quI75pj63BLLnUjFsm7BwA02dWfXALD1b00Qmj79JYI2_95lYvvb64DbDocQSlrBHSmiDNqpe1R3d9uRVWCC65GpQR3t_uMOrRBBtCp3gMSKUOtEWKb2hr-pRXrIMve5_cRnS0bvzTyamT03mew_5pkCFTyVgu1MlpLSV0coJK6FO8XKkpMAJfWATC_GR-g_3AktuGB2uQ2U8Ck4ILbZUeju3oqwvHiSlhu5lO8ecOmL6L0O_mezn5FQAA__-kOYXx) on Saturday, with $10,000 up for grabs. The Alamo City is also hosting the [Texas Eats Food Festival](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL3O3CAQRZ_G7rCAtQ0UFGncbdqU1gDDLgo2Dsz-vX3kfYWvnNHR0b33z3W9Qsppv_2GDS29Y1l3fLWMRFhXh42c-xddOmo5D3zThq3BKrmcGDdMmDVAyp917IN1PBjRoxVq0lIZJef-brlGP2nDwWunZoyTwBADQNRSyOB1n-wp40YYIbjk4zAq4f2s4TJdVDAhdCPHkKjUge5I-IYW86c8sQ6-bH22d6KjdZdfnVw6uTTYYaeypzL4R6ZHxQ2Ok-zkclbr5FKxETwq7NSYg3q-vlqGQI3FUgKL2Cg9ITNK_i_SifTVhuOVck5tVt3Ibxuk_I1APxvuaeX_AAAA__8qQ4Yd), the eighth annual [Paranormal Fest](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykUL2OtCAUfRrtNIA_SEHxNXbztVuaK1xGEgQXbsbx7TdO9g22OyfnLzlfj-UBPvj4_A87anq7tEQ8S0AizMuKhdb1263-yOkm-KYdS4FFMDE0TDVcLRZ8uJa-tnplVvEaNZfDJKSSYqw33Vvgohvdym1nRzPwwQ3AnRkEd9YwqL2-y5jiinMmWN_2khszTtANnbTK2qpnaD2l3NKGhG8oLlzphbk1aa-D3oiOUnX_KjFXYj7Ps92vAhEipejTbarEHLzDQlfASsyQyZsPOiBDTHmH0NxyUyA2v7lGsInLaZraYzvqrO1x-hB8GWXVs-cOPnzm6W-nvbT4CQAA__8w0YMK), and the [Hello Kitty Cafe Truck](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u4yAUhJ8Gd0T8GlO42Mbd3XZLC8MhRsGQhXPj5O1X3le45Wik0Xzfn6_1y6Wcyv23O2DGd6xrgbNnQIS2btBx2_7GLT1bvQK88YDe3SqY0JRZyu0aXMqfVQ1h3liwfICZGz0JY40Yh32eeGSTYTGOQWupTeSjnmwIMijrBVNDmq8xZrnlnAmmbspw78fJSS1NsCEQxSAkrO2GOyC8XY_5U1_Qbr4eQ553xGcn8hcRCxHLeZ63B5Sur5aIxTVMPgMRywVGxJKrd5mIZYecK30kxA_1LgLF9u0ftAF-t5LKnWKl3RXqCtaSKsU9dXoCPKAEIhZhJJ2MjKPikiqtN6pgGumFSwW3WnIB0U9xaHN4ninn1EdDFLsfLuX_z_Fnvl-z-BcAAP__blGS2A). About 100,000 people are expected to attend the 46th annual [Plano Balloon Festival](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDHO4yAUhE-DOyx4xvinoEjjLrvlltazeU6QMHiBxPHtV84VtpvRSKNv5s99uqMPPj5-4Ua2ftY0RTpKoFopTzOVOs9_19nvOV2GPnWjUnACAT0XhkszOfThnFTj7CyckQ1ZOfQ_MJgBdPO03aqE6412CpAWA6BRus7BIrRwrheNt1eZMNJIKUCoVg1yWfQPdn03OOMcU4Kcrym39UmVPljWcKY35XZJWxPss9a9sO7GYGQwHsfRbiVeGYORIn8VBuM1isH41a-dv3aO0XE88OR7wJj4jCGkFPlKpfo3Br5QoDljpcKV5idhLtxHfrEyGDHz203ej1X_brJ1--FD8EUPTInHhj580er_Hfq28C8AAP__PFGKew), where more than 30 hot air balloons will take flight. Waxahachie will host the 10th annual [C10s in the Park](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D1uhDAUBODTmA7kP_C6cJGGbtOmRM_2Y7FifoKfgL19RK6QcqTRfNJ8PYcnpJyW1yfM6Oga12HBs2Qkwn3wWMj7n9GnbV_vgBfNWAoMksu25rYWdoiQ8nvQVXSeRysqdMK0D2mskV01OVBePbQM3Oo2KIEChea6s6HlZrTCVMndY9wKKwSXXDfaiBC6B6hWmWhjZJpjTLTuDU1IeEEZ83s9cG_COlfZTURbYeqDyZ7J_jzP5oQLJghTwnD4u8VkjwcuVJjsb43JPghe6rTUNGG9wf6tqt3F7Uw5p9IZpvlrhpT_CPrfMYeTvwEAAP__f-l2bg), the largest gathering of Chevy C10 pickup trucks in the South.
## 17 Texas BBQ Joints Among Best in South
_Southern Living_ released a [new list](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2OqzAUBOCngQ7kH4xx4eI26XLbLS0bH8JZGZy1T0Ly9ivyCluONPqkma-ru3pMuN_--w0svZbsdjhqAiIoLkClEH6WgPeSzwAv2qBW7wQTqmOm48ZFj-nthjbawKLhLViu1SS00WJsV6tAAPOjkkHGuGitOPPgpQAGJmhtWrQnxgw3nDPBhn7QfJ7HyUsldTQxNgODiJRLTysQvHxd0js_ofRz3tpkV6J7beS_RlwacTmOo6_5QSuUPeET99tZa8Ql-BJgfkD3nXGn2n0mcK4nruTUFhvvB6aEddTNwG6bx_Tx6W-vPK34DQAA__85IHaH) of the Top 50 BBQ Joints in the South, and 17 are in Texas. The rankings were determined by Daniel Moss, the magazine's contributing barbecue editor, based on his overall impression of each establishment. Snow’s BBQ in Lexington secured the No. 2 overall spot, trailing only City Limits Barbecue in South Carolina, which happens to be [where Moss lives](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLuOhSAYhJ8GOww3RQqKbezOtlsakN8jCYoHfs_l7TfuK2w5ky8zmfm5TTcXU9zv324Di-8lTzu8agJEKJOHit4_Fh-Pki8Bb9ygVjcJJjrKDOVmCi6mz6SaYD0Lhjdgue4GoY0WfbNaNcg-wCI7EzyXYeAsKC4XJjrGmTayifYKY4YbzplgqlWaz3M_ONlJHUwIRDEIEXNpcQWEt6tL-uQnlHbOW5PsinhUIr-IGIkY3Vkx7u18JjwLbO64KCLGaxYRY4GK7ixux0q9K5dV84krlJ2m-Iz7nXr_oAlK_tAEr3gRTbHheMWUYu01Uey-uZj-2vF_nz2t-A0AAP__2_2CnQ). Patriot - I've been in some tough situations before, but this could be the hardest mountain I'll have to climb...

While I was barred from accepting any campaign donations during Virginia's legislative session, my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was **RAKING IN** hundreds of thousands of dollars! I'm not kidding - _a liberal group gave Spanberger $500K all in one shot, Patriot!_

**This is a _BAD_ situation that will only get worse if folks like you don't step up to the plate! clean_body: I’ve been in some tough situations before, but this could be the hardest mountain I’ll have to climb... I’ve been in some tough situations before, but this could be the hardest mountain I’ll have to climb...| | | | Patriot - I've been in some tough situations before, but this could be the hardest mountain I'll have to climb... While I was barred from accepting any campaign donations during Virginia's legislative session, my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was RAKING IN hundreds of thousands of dollars! I'm not kidding - a liberal group gave Spanberger $500K all in one shot, Patriot! This is a BAD situation that will only get worse if folks like you don't step up to the plate! I'm coming to you with a plea from the bottom of my heart; "please send in any amount you can to help me and my team make up the fundraising difference:" I'm doing everything I can to win this race, make history, and keep logging conservative wins. But I know I can't do this all on my own; it's going to take all of us, and I really mean all of us , to win. If you can't afford to send in even just $17, I'll understand. That's right - all I 'm asking is that you send in $17 or more to help me catch up with my Democrat opponent's LUDICROUS fundraising numbers! "CHIP IN NOW>>" Look, this race is tied. The ONLY thing holding me and my team back from winning right now is my liberal opponent's crazy cash advantage. I know we can close the gap and win this race together, but we need to get to work RIGHT NOW! Thank you for being a critical part of my team, Patriot. I can't tell you how much I appreciate your support. -Winsome Earle-Sears Mother Marine Lt. Governor of Virginia . Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. Lieutenant Governor.I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Each one hasn't been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born.Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community means so much more. ** This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this. | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. PO Box 71596 Richmond, VA 23255-1596

name: MassGOP Events
subject: Weekend Vigils for Charlie Kirk
body:
Thank you for your continued support!
| | | | | [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JykeYbH389mr5pn8uATG7XTyOteUvSgN4oM5Qcju4gKJ-5xRGMlEHPx8RyaGO1T7KV1h-Rz97l7H4x9LgIdxEdw_R588sfNuURCyqrtqg-wyaqOtpg8nBGOFhjqKO8rUocEnKO7d8HWQcaHDiWzsJw==&c=xpe2NjNK0Ntun2M5VilXUIWM8FXRIPaJncJiiXJsQ77tu_ohEMvJKw==&ch=CFGoSMRQ-OmUgBDeBaR5rA-sIlxyhfDyybF0qUzHpsu5OXA_jDnhJA==)
---
| Peter,
Last night, thousands of patriots braved far-left activists to pay their respects to Charlie Kirk in Boston. Cell phone data from the event indicates that over 5,000 attendees were present.
Our message is being heard loud and clear: Charlie Kirk did not die in vain, and Republicans are only more energized to see that his dream of a conservative America is further realized in 2026.
---
| |
---
|
Many RTCs have submitted additional vigils through the weekend, which are below. Please find your nearest one here or on our [Events Page](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JykeYbH389mr5pn8uATG7XTyOteUvSgN4oM5Qcju4gKJ-5xRGMlEHKKso6pszQCEtJlkiqs70IoT9oIhPmjjnpNWZyHk0FY2M8ERKeaxaRQ-lCDZQ9sP37QKVSGctX_r5pOiCQ25TZMACpFXGRjq90_Wr6fDJxLI&c=xpe2NjNK0Ntun2M5VilXUIWM8FXRIPaJncJiiXJsQ77tu_ohEMvJKw==&ch=CFGoSMRQ-OmUgBDeBaR5rA-sIlxyhfDyybF0qUzHpsu5OXA_jDnhJA==). As always, submit them to [mark@massgop.com](mailto:mark@massgop.com) directly for inclusion.

name: Kathryn Harvey
subject: Join me September 29 for an evening with the SC Sister Senators.
body:
Championing civil discourse.

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/c37341cdd69d/kathryn-harvey-for-congresscampaign-kickoff-6421529?e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
|
---
| | Welcome to Keeping Up with Kathryn Harvey. A weekly digest covering South Carolina politics and opportunities for engagement and action in the Upstate.
---
| |
# SC Sister Senators at Wofford Sept 29
# **There has never been a more important time to elevate freedom of speech and civil discourse.**
---
[|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=9330c8f84e&e=edbde6c9b1)
| | Join us for the second installment of “Candid Conversations” an effort to bring together leadership from across the isle to foster civil discourse in today’s political climate. Hosted by the President’s Office at Wofford College, the SC Sister Senators who bridged together to fight for women’s rights in South Carolina, will join us for a special panel session moderated by the Honorable Former Representative Rita Allison with a foreward by Susu Johnson. Doors open at 5:30pm and a screening of their new documentary film trailer will follow the panel.
---
| [Learn More](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=5fc6d7153a&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
| |
# Check out my latest podcast
---
| | Kathryn Harvey sits down with Dr. Michelle Carney, a veteran infectious disease physician and former Spartanburg Regional Infection Prevention Director. Together, they explore how South Carolina politics and public health intersect in today's challenging climate. Dr. Carney reflects on her decades fighting diseases from HIV to COVID-19, discussing science denial and CDC weakening. She warns about the dangers when misinformation in South Carolina spreads faster than actual medicine can reach communities. Their conversation covers what local communities can do to fight disinformation and strengthen South Carolina public health policy.
---
[|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=55f8562800&e=edbde6c9b1)
| [Listen Up](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=e54324db26&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| |
# Knock doors with me on Saturdays & Sundays
---
| | Join me every Saturday at 10am & Sunday at 3pm for a neighborhood canvass to support my race for Spartanburg County Council! [You can register to volunteer ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=e5833ae48f&e=edbde6c9b1). Interested in phone banking for my campaign this Fall? Join us the third Thursday evening of each month for a virtual phone bank training! This is a great opportunity to volunteer on your own time and help my race for County Council. Register at the link below and you'll [receive a link to make calls. ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=02a3974552&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
[|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=04dc4bd5cd&e=edbde6c9b1)
| [Knock doors with Kathryn](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=e7807998a8&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| [Contribute to Kathryn](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=a2e026515f&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
|
---
[|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=95f49dbf4d&e=edbde6c9b1)
| | ****Canvass with Kathryn Harvey every Sunday at 3pm**[**RSVP Here**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=d07b653198&e=edbde6c9b1)******
* September 25 District 5 School Board Forum Duncan Event Center
* September 28 District 6 School Board Forum Cyrill-Westside Library
* **September 29 Sister Senators at Wofford College 6pm**
* September 30 District 7 School Board Forum CC Woodson Community Center
* October 6 - SPCDP Monthly Meeting - meet Spartanburg’s new Sheriff
* October 14 - Early Voting for Senate 12 Primary
* October 18 - No Kings Rally in Spartanburg
* October 21 - 31 Early Voting for the 2025 General Election 8:30- 5:00
* November 4: 2025 General Election (7:00 a.m. to 7:00 p.m.)
* November 4: Senate 12 Primary Runoff
* November 10: SPCDP Monthly Meeting
* **December 1: State-wide Candidate Forum 6-7:30pm SCC Downtown Campus **

---
| [Learn more here](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=6013f7377b&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
|
---
| | **CALL & EMAIL YOUR SENATORS ABOUT SENATE BILL 323 **MARK YOUR CALENDARS FOR 9:30AM WEDNESDAY, OCTOBER 1Gressette Building, Room 105 for the public hearing!**SENATE BILL 323 WOULD:** Ban all medication abortion and even its manufacture or possession. Remove exceptions for rape, incest, or fatal fetal anomaly. Redefine embryos as full legal persons, threatening contraception, IVF, and miscarriage care. Impose felony penalties up to 30 years on physicians and medical providers. Criminalize helping someone travel out of state for abortion care. Gag doctors and advocates from sharing accurate medical information — even online.
---
| [sign up to testify on October 1](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=db1108b882&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | **CONGRESS IS BACK—KEEP THE PRESSURE ON** With Congress back in session, constituent pressure matters more than ever. Call, email, and show up at town halls to demand action and accountability on our core priorities. We need to hold members to clear, public positions.
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| |
---
| | This past week we paid tribute to the People’s Mayor, Junie White. He lead with inclusiveness and had a tremendous impact on our community for decades. He was also my neighbor when I was three years old, and again when I was 43 years old. I attended a fundraiser for SC State House Representative Heather Bauer in Greenville. We have to fight to keep good representation in Columbia right now.
Last night the Spartanburg County Democratic Party won an award for the Best Activist Organization by the Post & Courier. Thanks to our first Vice Chair Angelia Edwards for all the community work. Before the awards ceremony we joined my campaign treasurer, [Alix Refshauge](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=f5fa0df091&e=edbde6c9b1) for her art exhibit, it was truly wonderful. And I had the pleasure of attending the 3rd Annual One Community Dinner hosted by Hope Blackley, candidate for Senate 12 special election. There are so many amazing women running for office in the Upstate this year. I hope you’ll consider supporting all of us. Democracy is a participatory experience, join me at [kathrynforcouncil.com](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=8b65164684&e=edbde6c9b1).
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| |
---
|
---
[|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=990dc33deb&e=edbde6c9b1)
| [Share this with a friend, sign up for our newsletter using this link: https://bit.ly/KeepingUpWithKathrynHarvey](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=b989c3196a&e=edbde6c9b1)
---

Our mailing address is:
Kathryn for SC P O Box 7102 Spartanburg, SC 29304-7102 USA

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/profile?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=496d225702&e=edbde6c9b1&c=f27980fe23) or [unsubscribe](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=496d225702&t=b&e=edbde6c9b1&c=f27980fe23)

GENIUS Act Threatens Your Financial Future. The new federal law called the GENIUS Act will essentially cancel your money.| | | | | | | [ ](https://links.the.strategicfinancehints.com/u/click?_t=c827edc9cd4849678c13316ef72d680a&_m=33f7bd4a00d14cdf9311606bf4a88735&_e=6MiFJbx8ZGfFHi4yAWXTL-xJKg5Ph2j4SK19C_H_95AElrJHIwUICR3l16iHbaP4t7sAeNfihi1iCgdNGFP6YoyWf9M2hhxxWC91gQUgxDPhZDhKNeMkrEL6lO1uyrIBacny8hhSJoMcNwoWz2mPmcF9hL5zbvSFxu2k3rZcqG6RTV74w7bfpAnjeJh0G7c6qJl3eCO1b0V0I4WeoRIkpSJpwjbPyd_T_2KnuulQ2J3ry7SiacbsW_cmgGcSUWO_ZOcFqeA14VcGgKshqDYrghOzAHUyflOvwGa5pfUicSV-b4BXC-69NTnUW54DGgNpiMaRJxLKasvRW1hXTOs9CQ%3D%3D)

**GENIUS Act Threatens Your Financial Future**
The new federal law called the [GENIUS Act](https://links.the.strategicfinancehints.com/u/click?_t=c827edc9cd4849678c13316ef72d680a&_m=33f7bd4a00d14cdf9311606bf4a88735&_e=6MiFJbx8ZGfFHi4yAWXTL-NpLa9RAncmflFJ0kjCs-nexLNuqnVVTHVqMz9vfmeICyscySqaarEw_db-dcYVLPPmXeXX-83aUQn4Kn9Evmyaks6kQI6aUbNtzzD1pBObudJJT-un2nlFeC5EEYkESaDHBHHRcijVJD0dJsJHIbVYcMAv-ZQyD55KyK6RSuX68WGaPHoqDlcgYSmPB2fLKvkCJg669DKJ3XrMW-wuyjX9VOA9AMLvosDZZRkiMaczEF8Y5qWVrKrsrTUvAGQvxSxfuNC4znD_i5XaHk8FbXM-i5aE2ndO-NokWHACG_x9cYVtsZgKN_EHYFthxbFFilWnCgkMwoqjZdduc2og6lH5h9stNHtosVKNGkupUgub4njojJ5F0GnSUvHFlDxme-gDGJVEXiak6hYBdxqAl8luABLpAMXfoPvia8bFz71G_u9e_67JRbRpPnnM63P8qYhKMUyWEkZCL2B_lAfMN3dRvBvjf2BQDFUdiLXFKpz0RNaZba3yjxNc99NX094nfwf_MVEx5oWc_LFL3QNExja3bQ5VLKv-zp8bdSKmvfv-TwkIwOgSdvUb6P51qhuGyq-BMpu_mfnkQPEWmR4t6fE%3D) will essentially cancel your money.

You see, the government and its allies have found a new way to roll out programmable, trackable digital currency—without calling it a CBDC.

Now, private corporations like Circle, BlackRock, and Tether are being handed the keys to issue stablecoins...

Digital dollars backed by the U.S. government, but controlled by unelected tech and finance elites.
[ ](https://links.the.strategicfinancehints.com/u/click?_t=c827edc9cd4849678c13316ef72d680a&_m=33f7bd4a00d14cdf9311606bf4a88735&_e=6MiFJbx8ZGfFHi4yAWXTL-NpLa9RAncmflFJ0kjCs-nexLNuqnVVTHVqMz9vfmeICyscySqaarEw_db-dcYVLPPmXeXX-83aUQn4Kn9Evmyaks6kQI6aUbNtzzD1pBObudJJT-un2nlFeC5EEYkESaDHBHHRcijVJD0dJsJHIbVYcMAv-ZQyD55KyK6RSuX68WGaPHoqDlcgYSmPB2fLKkGKD1va63Qje5sznx8TSlAEXKzK4gqXSzZrWwDxc7Vcs8tE-RT9O0FEFaQRxDQZK67Li_5I59za8sR8VuVDY7R3FaP-kaB010HEXOsP8HYJodU41dfOziTr5j09sxtbhUEwRunHTuxGYFUfetDbVdp8QtYYdPvD51vgA4kW2C6m3apDMQTEjVyrvVZAAVUtXRVt-59sBQ2quoDg8HXCaCtn_GeHzCqgaK1A5wgGjP_zi033-sFeNFIAZKn7EhuF_3TaFSwE_8CP_JrfZRW1foBWvc9r4ebhJ7nnZN1WCx7FrB9Xs-7WvMdgRcpA-1B3ur6bwAkfSkJdDWLi8hY6OgHFtrhvRbyDPs0TTKIK_GfZyXda2d23mBijlRyBHvEdjWH22-Gd_Pp_sc0db5lag1E%3D)
This gives "them" full control to:

* Legally spy on how you spend every penny...
* Freeze your transactions or block your purchases...
* Enforce rules on when, where, or how you can use your money...

**You may think, "I'll just never touch a stablecoin."**

But here's the problem...

**You won't have a choice.**

Once these coins are embedded into major apps, banks, payroll systems...

Even retail stores, you'll be pushed into using them by default.

And once this system goes live across the board?

Every American and every business will be trapped inside a financial system they don't control, and can't escape.

[Here's the secret for protecting your money](https://links.the.strategicfinancehints.com/u/click?_t=c827edc9cd4849678c13316ef72d680a&_m=33f7bd4a00d14cdf9311606bf4a88735&_e=6MiFJbx8ZGfFHi4yAWXTL-NpLa9RAncmflFJ0kjCs-nexLNuqnVVTHVqMz9vfmeICyscySqaarEw_db-dcYVLPPmXeXX-83aUQn4Kn9Evmyaks6kQI6aUbNtzzD1pBObudJJT-un2nlFeC5EEYkESaDHBHHRcijVJD0dJsJHIbVYcMAv-ZQyD55KyK6RSuX68WGaPHoqDlcgYSmPB2fLKgYRkfl_eO1HfxcSncC0U_sg1mzIn3m3R4DHErApUe6IXPNFToDTDfK1B_kMzAIWKDAnMimqzMgODtkj2oDt69d3LvlBdbgPuNIK-07Nhc9SDYK4WXfe2TFQWwv61Y0-I9rIR8ydf58syX6Y7Ipxbcmfv8sifLzBzwpmz7Mz5tyupImxl3mMq-aomfFqlsHg_Jo2tHJiPQWBYXH3lHDhflSO6HCQeldlKSxbZpYYDftA0xr_rXi6gyfF6F1prdIedTdG644CwslN1LiGevSOejwHsdAKhnR7_wvEOb-su49IAU9zFNfj_JsoovBSp9fQMThENe1qm4xjrIKNhKnuhbtkfCTJL57VxySZvbDLryG7K5lsxznBahBOYNINF_AcLc-iN0ybl0oCS6E9_utrO-I%3D)**from Big Tech having full control of...**
When...

And even **where** you spend your money.
But you don't have to stand for it.

You still have time to sidestep the system—**but the window is closing fast.**

[Get your free information kit NOW before it's too late.](https://links.the.strategicfinancehints.com/u/click?_t=c827edc9cd4849678c13316ef72d680a&_m=33f7bd4a00d14cdf9311606bf4a88735&_e=6MiFJbx8ZGfFHi4yAWXTL-NpLa9RAncmflFJ0kjCs-nexLNuqnVVTHVqMz9vfmeICyscySqaarEw_db-dcYVLPPmXeXX-83aUQn4Kn9Evmyaks6kQI6aUbNtzzD1pBObudJJT-un2nlFeC5EEYkESaDHBHHRcijVJD0dJsJHIbVYcMAv-ZQyD55KyK6RSuX68WGaPHoqDlcgYSmPB2fLKrhdigmbUBvBgQjJ-xXNkdOSXpv4f2zszddXqli-Mxu5ez5sorBcRQMWDOJRfbZRxq72SxE_PyDsBgwrFeHVmlxNh2eckdNyB1W5N-PKkkMGFrbCT3eaz-vXy9_In1DdoYCPF1rjxGFDSS_j8iDj6ugktExXWGV9uu-Vgb27T2jLf-NQCBL-Rs475dT4fsvDKW5ZydlOltOmtyu6BXzYI8k1TqMLBSwdgbkpT6BSBhakXspM_hpNdVMrf_KKJdSJP5-LsGDisxc62YTD-kv8Vi1zgvYRoe_oaZtmiphruJrsTE9EUVZ9Q4CN3wm9Hz5Kart9kL-hYyU_qHDqE59V7HnUkiNcVW4aFFqEUmZVPmSlTAve8_Jp8_axxGXyEmyCyxz_G0zNyVaS7DUTQh7_HC8%3D)

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: My recovery after the car crash
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me.
| [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=f75dd170ffb740a1aace562908be8d31&_e=buiNB3kijGmLs2FB_dh2XhG5R35txKYuBaiaSohlG8A67LVoqKg6AxjS-Ukp-FNqkYkhLHg590ndgwxOZrVOVCjMn3iayqWWZvk07NYIRherO_OLzkMontBuG82_OiiMzUWQqCDB_TVayMXw0kM1IC8x8yhGhfC_NBHC46wDGShElupKELPXyD12b9Q5m9enrC9jRO_HuDDs5kuC1qd3UQMRVG44w4u88jaQYyvseDUUMKihGZ6gkA_KOjK1K3ixAjw7HtaYdHjBInvSdsnu5h4UORBo1XJhFqj877umUPCl-FYPfDrol-zd6YKNK9Q9M37P6bOg7AJCoZeSPP_T65UU0gxjEDsgAMmlgXWksRHRA8pPY-yzlI0xMzULhRefxKa5q5ISreKoln5PglEUGO1ZzcIr9Yt91oILywRD_QnBisC2PwdasARrQ5F_W0jzVwWdgb3rrqdQ-2L0SUEWQleQs7XmRQwrrv1Z3fy3bqXRRhQThRZqyiXcUzpuzUNU4XKdaLd6hNYVnuWiTMxlAsgd28OKOWeFHkcAMrmD9WpGOIji--cVb0s6FNmsb63q5t0QFYs1ydAhvcKtbhM1Covco0rEcp-2XM-I8ZWKxIYQ0Hd_rTEOUxBLlC5s-XwSpOH_FW9b3JzzwRDUTv5lWA%3D%3D)
---
Peter,
---
So many kind souls like you have asked how I’m doing, so I wanted to personally update you on my recovery.
---
I was hospitalized after a devastating car crash. We were struck by a vehicle going what felt like 70-80 miles per hour. Had I not been wearing a seatbelt, I would’ve been killed.
---
Right now, a back brace is holding my fractured spine together.**
---
But if I could survive being arrested in the most violent jail in America, I know I can survive **__ANYTHING!__**
---
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=f75dd170ffb740a1aace562908be8d31&_e=buiNB3kijGmLs2FB_dh2XhG5R35txKYuBaiaSohlG8A67LVoqKg6AxjS-Ukp-FNqkYkhLHg590ndgwxOZrVOVCjMn3iayqWWZvk07NYIRherO_OLzkMontBuG82_OiiMzUWQqCDB_TVayMXw0kM1IC8x8yhGhfC_NBHC46wDGShElupKELPXyD12b9Q5m9enrC9jRO_HuDDs5kuC1qd3UbQ-f-_3nF2P7MB7f28fkcR_hP-KlUFxlN5tPeSlDsdzt2twMrPFE8vJ9rEPUnY8G2YY_OHRBLe3jtQ4Zfr8DJb8JEbtV7xEsDWfG2-oQI5RnO-TPvxcPBdNY8pimpQ5F5gdo5tVXcGczhCJkYtOYZnllgn_2t96wBj6LA772plAzaYca48mpAqc2QOwdkpw-ur_dJzDihQIl3u1iiZV8pKJ2KG6endY1NALJnTUKby2kWhSdyw-VGYGWunKwb9tPsm-hOUkLy3o5mlb_sLXvqlGtNbUzkMyKnpgqQX1p7RATJAxNsmxmrehtNMAtadXhy0T5tu3k58QQGiC_wOs2OvNVkstUTECasERbDqtxjkUzm8rDdyISHsKhU-WfBaS6Uj966E1ctSaoljbPgFHDXybzUZmJKvYocjR0LQkOyXUbUX6DEPH-OOkasL1okuZ2A%3D%3D)
__
---
One thing especially helped take the pain away...
---
...**President Trump has announced that he will award me with the Presidential Medal of Freedom – _the highest civilian honor in America._**
---
**President Trump knows I’m in a dire situation right now. His pardon powers only apply to _federal_ cases, which means he _legally_ _cannot_ save me from the bogus _state-level_ charges brought against me by a radical Democrat Attorney General who is trying to imprison me for 20 YEARS.**
---
**Left with no pardon, no safety net, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance at walking free is to secure a top-notch defense team.**
---
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
---
**And now, this car crash has set me back even more...**
---
And so, my last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
---
That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue fighting for my _FREEDOM_ and my _JUSTICE_.
---
__Because when President Trump places the Medal of Freedom around my neck, I want history to always remember that I FOUGHT for my freedom and justice until the VERY END!__
---
[**So, if you can, please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to ensure I have the resources needed to retain a top-notch defense team in what is now the FINAL BATTLE for my freedom and justice.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=f75dd170ffb740a1aace562908be8d31&_e=buiNB3kijGmLs2FB_dh2XhG5R35txKYuBaiaSohlG8A67LVoqKg6AxjS-Ukp-FNqkYkhLHg590ndgwxOZrVOVCjMn3iayqWWZvk07NYIRherO_OLzkMontBuG82_OiiMzUWQqCDB_TVayMXw0kM1IC8x8yhGhfC_NBHC46wDGShElupKELPXyD12b9Q5m9enrC9jRO_HuDDs5kuC1qd3UcY_xErxq8e84na8BURIXIRwQ92-muxX-hlThvf8spEXAiOtV69tORtOnYX_Uk_PF7NUD6WTONVppJom30El-lV5IcM54XiBuIq27tme707sF5yZd4h7R0106Po17O8QH4Y7u1gGeSh8zNiK1PsurzOy7Lu-wp7Fxhy_kR75SfOaiHwqVtg37CTttsEGsBZZK8KM51p5K3tb9yydjVnq4sxYbK94I8ynrECd9OR_Xelp7-Brw7aaz6q0VqXbHzzFpuyNQx4G5h47HRX9btaSobQ5_ZTmBRTNtogpm803ZtKIUT7md_fkiV-kHsiC8GXTIQAXgLVGD5AIIPhz4kOT_mhoI1U0mPe23_FE_ofYFBj2KepyZrnwRGpdICB4TmBx7kXIo9UkHMvgiFYnf5uRB6b4oV_ocTVO23HNXFdPhPxoM37A5R9FWw1niwjwapvD9w%3D%3D)

clean_body: Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me. | Peter, So many kind souls like you have asked how I’m doing, so I wanted to personally update you on my recovery. I was hospitalized after a devastating car crash. We were struck by a vehicle going what felt like 70-80 miles per hour. Had I not been wearing a seatbelt, I would’ve been killed. Right now, a back brace is holding my fractured spine together. But if I could survive being arrested in the most violent jail in America, I know I can survive ANYTHING! One thing especially helped take the pain away... ...President Trump has announced that he will award me with the Presidential Medal of Freedom – the highest civilian honor in America. President Trump knows I’m in a dire situation right now. His pardon powers only apply to federal cases, which means he legally cannot save me from the bogus state-level charges brought against me by a radical Democrat Attorney General who is trying to imprison me for 20 YEARS. Left with no pardon, no safety net, and no lifeline, my ONLY chance at walking free is to secure a top-notch defense team. But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of BANKRUPTCY. And now, this car crash has set me back even more...** And so, my last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like YOU. That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue fighting for my FREEDOM and my JUSTICE. Because when President Trump places the Medal of Freedom around my neck, I want history to always remember that I FOUGHT for my freedom and justice until the VERY END! Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: All of us will miss Charlie. None of us will ever forget him.
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj207m970b2mw3vexexqoaz5jrpnuwg6rzt1bw40k6vb32vww34n4dpq2lm8tv9xehwogr6yv6h0lf6isbkx2&__stmp=t2u5e9&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2u5e9&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol3zclu7grq6ps4zy7hasurbe9gx31qquwvd9my4azcq5d72vd9dguklooikedyxab0padfqhqjzh5lf31pghc08qgnzot7w1oi245pcr3yz0phcfdzv3dtwkviueairrii3payaf4p2&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2u5e9&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2u5e9&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2u5e9&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2u5e9&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol3zclu7grq6ps4zy7hasurbe9gx31qquwvd9my4azcq5d72vd9dguklooikedyxab0padfqhqjzh5lf31pghc08qgnzot7w1oi245pcr3yz0phcfdzv3dtwkviueairrii3payaf4p2&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2u5e9&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2u5e9&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Jessica Hamilton, Evergreen
subject: THIS WEEKEND: stand up to fossil fuel billionaires
body:
Join a Sun Day event near you
| | | | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3997301/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
---
| Here’s a question for you, friend:

Do we want to be a movement of dire warnings, dense jargon, and scary changes?

Or do we want to be a movement that celebrates progress, creates joyful momentum, and shares the fantastic news about the rapid growth of clean energy solutions?

**More importantly, which version do you think will attract the most people?
**
If you agree that our movement must include joy and celebration as we race against time and the entrenched power of fossil fuel billionaires to build a better, brighter future...

...I want to tell you about [**Sun Day**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3997302/87SdQ4wZ), a nationwide day of action **happening THIS Sunday, September 21.**

We’ll build, march, rally, and come together in communities across the country to celebrate the power of the sun, advocate for stronger policies, and stand up for clean energy projects—and we need you to join us!

[**Find a Sun Day event closest to you and be a part of this first-ever day of action on Sunday, September 21.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3997303/87SdQ4wZ) |
| [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3997304/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
---
| Why are we mobilizing NOW?

**Because the clean energy transition is at a critical tipping point, and we need to build a _bigger_ movement. **

Solar power is now the cheapest form of energy on the planet, clean energy jobs are growing rapidly, and communities across the country are experiencing the benefits of cleaner air and lower energy costs. **But powerful fossil fuel interests and their political allies are working overtime to preserve the status quo and block progress.
**
We need to grow the movement to accelerate clean energy deployment, support workers and communities in transition, and ensure everyone has access to affordable, clean power.

**On September 21, we’ll show that the clean energy future is here—and that we won’t let the defenders of a bygone fossil fuel era slow us down.
**
We want everybody who supports lower energy bills, cleaner air, a safer future, and good-paying American jobs to join us. **Is that you?**

[**Head over to sunday.earth to learn more and find an event near you!**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3997305/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
| See you on Sun Day, |
---
| | |
---
### Jessica Hamilton
Senior Director of Digital Advocacy
Evergreen Collaborative
---
---
* * *
---
| _Evergreen is building the ambitious, actionable policy roadmap for an all-out mobilization to defeat climate change—and to create millions of jobs in a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future. None of this would be possible without your support._ |
---
[DONATE](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3997306/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
---
| | [ ](https://evergreenaction.com/?utm_source=digital_template&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=evergreen&utm_content=footer)

And follow our new project, **Hope This Helps.**

Friend, Four years ago, you helped Jason Miyares make history — electing the first Latino Attorney General in Virginia's history and delivering real results for families across the Commonwealth.

**Today, early voting begins.** Your chance to help Jason finish the job starts right now.

_Since taking office, Jason has:_ ✅ **Cut violent crime** by 30% statewide
✅ **Secured over $1.5 billion** protecting Virginia consumers
✅ **Fought back** against sanctuary city chaos
✅ **Defended girls' sports** and parental rights

But the Left wants to reverse every bit of progress we've made. They want an Attorney General who puts criminals first and Virginia families last.

We cannot let that happen.

**Early voting runs from today, September 19th, through Saturday, November 1st.** That's 44 days to make your voice heard and keep Virginia safe.

clean_body: Early voting for Virginia Attorney General begins TODAY.| | | Friend, Four years ago, you helped Jason Miyares make history — electing the first Latino Attorney General in Virginia's history and delivering real results for families across the Commonwealth. Today, early voting begins. Your chance to help Jason finish the job starts right now. Since taking office, Jason has: ✅ Cut violent crime by 30% statewide ✅ Secured over $1.5 billion protecting Virginia consumers ✅ Fought back against sanctuary city chaos ✅ Defended girls' sports and parental rights But the Left wants to reverse every bit of progress we've made. They want an Attorney General who puts criminals first and Virginia families last. We cannot let that happen. Early voting runs from today, September 19th, through Saturday, November 1st. That's 44 days to make your voice heard and keep Virginia safe. | MAKE YOUR PLAN TO VOTE NOW! | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | Paid for by Miyares for Virginia | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: TN House Democratic Caucus
subject: Trump says he might put the military on Tennessee streets
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Ronnie Glynn, Treasurer_
body:
If Trump sends the National Guard to Memphis, Nashville would be next.
| | | | Can't see this email? [View in Your Browser](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01K5H0582F09V468XZ6WE7S9M9_0)
---
| | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01K5H0582F09V468XZ6WE7S9M9_1)
---
| | | | Peter, President Donald Trump just confirmed that he’s deploying the National Guard to Memphis—without any clear plan, accountability or coordination with local leaders. He went on national television and said he would send “the military too, if we need it.” Let that sink in.
This isn’t about public safety. This is about political theater. Trump is federalizing and using our brave National Guard personnel as a prop—putting Tennesseans at risk to boost his own image and distract from his economic failures and the Epstein files. If it can happen in Memphis, it can happen anywhere—especially in our most Democratic cities. What’s to stop Trump from ordering troops to stand outside polling sites next? From intimidating children entering public schools? From sending in the Guard every time and everywhere he wants?
We have to act. Now. We’re fighting to protect our communities and preserve the integrity of our elections. But we can’t do it without your support. Rush a donation today to help us hold the line against this dangerous abuse of power:
---
| | [ Donate Now ](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01K5H0582F09V468XZ6WE7S9M9_2)
---
| This isn’t just about politics. It’s about the safety of our neighbors, the dignity of our service members, and the sanctity of our democracy. Thank you for standing with us in this moment of urgency. In solidarity, Tennessee House Democratic Caucus P.S. The National Guard is supposed to serve the people—not be weaponized against them. Help us push back before it’s too late.
---
| | | |
---
| _Paid for by the Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Ronnie Glynn, Treasurer_
---

subject: Extremist views or Common sense?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE FOR GOVERNOR, INC
body:
Tell us what you think.

Peter,

**Barack Obama just said that the Trump Administration is using the power of the government to push "extremist views." He has it all wrong.**

We are not fighting for extremism. We are fighting for America's core values, for the Patriotic Judeo-Christian values that built our country. The MAGA Agenda fights for our future and our identity.

Protecting family, faith, and freedom isn't extremist. It is what America was built on.

I want to hear what YOU think. Let me know what values you want defending in Washington.

I took off the gloves and took big swings at Pete Hegseth (our country’s favorite DUI-hire), the idiot known as Elon Musk, and the dumbest person in Congress: Marjorie Taylor Greene. Then, I turned my attention to Donald Trump. I responded to his calling me a “very low IQ person” and challenged him right then and there to an IQ test. If you're with me, please donate a few bucks to support my campaign to take back Congress and send a message to the MAGA idiots running this Administration that we're done playing games: | | | | | | | Thanks for your support, -Jasmine ♥️ | | | | Paid for and authorized by Protect Our Democracy Fund | No longer want to receive these emails? . DemsGive 712 H St NE Unit # 8746 Washington, DC 20002

name: MassGOP Events
subject: UPDATED: Weekend Vigils for Charlie Kirk
body:
Thank you for your continued support!
| | | | | [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001I0lUBxYkX4tl3u0sOiv8CoJgUPGvkAFOSUPeM4LQzvy8HzezHXge0wOIPShGmKamLPdOEHn9ACP30cPCtZsDtIIXr0allCeOCfClScp3vbCsDsnQPR4yK9AaYw50Bn36xFBBSx5J_0pg5-vX_E6xIA==&c=r0nWLdT6vKLiumFTk8KSV15dutJ--RDxbQWKBlOaMRd-BV8itzV_Xg==&ch=HT1HcK0UCsGJlZL2tkuPrju2_HbG6KoZLfYytXWCRRJWRaTdcR4ckw==)

| Peter,
Last night, thousands of patriots braved far-left activists to pay their respects to Charlie Kirk in Boston. Cell phone data from the event indicates that over 5,000 attendees were present.
Our message is being heard loud and clear: Charlie Kirk did not die in vain, and Republicans are only more energized to see that his dream of a conservative America is further realized in 2026.
---
| |
---
|
Many RTCs have submitted additional vigils through the weekend, which are below. Please find your nearest one here or on our [Events Page](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001I0lUBxYkX4tl3u0sOiv8CoJgUPGvkAFOSUPeM4LQzvy8HzezHXge04fPbvkp45AwLGxkE-AV_2u8l2kdTSIhJfVxxoreHAcU598S0cyROP2seLaztueUd92nKQLWSgcpHbd432SHevCgFdON7Bhy5wbnHRXZOZye&c=r0nWLdT6vKLiumFTk8KSV15dutJ--RDxbQWKBlOaMRd-BV8itzV_Xg==&ch=HT1HcK0UCsGJlZL2tkuPrju2_HbG6KoZLfYytXWCRRJWRaTdcR4ckw==). name: Erika Kirk
subject: They have no idea what they just unleashed.
body:
[Mark as Spam](http://trk.greatamericandigest.com/?xul=4cscvssgesax5z0sq32w5s6hg84wy6huzb96f77heii4e6gtxff1t8vk6rvun1h7sop2b926qpb6qv3lzhok4iaxuup72vqu7q5h5ljov59llta&__stmp=t2u7fi&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) | [Unsubscribe](http://trk.greatamericandigest.com/?xul=4cscvssgesax5z0sq32w5s6hg84wy6huzb96f77heii4e6gtxff1t8vk6rvun1h7sop2b926qpb6qv3lzhok4iaxuup72vqu7q5h5ljov59llta&__stmp=t2u7fi&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
* * *
Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.
* * *
We will never surrender. Ever. p; | | | | [](http://trk.greatamericandigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2u7fi&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, I want to thank you for loving my husband. For standing with us in the worst days of our lives. For praying. For mourning. For remembering. But now, _I need you to listen closely..._ **Because the evildoers who took Charlie’s life? They have NO idea what they have done.** They didn’t just try to silence a man...
They tried to silence his message — a message of patriotism, of faith, and of God’s merciful love. Instead, they ignited something even greater. **If they thought my husband’s mission was powerful before...****_They have NO idea what they have just UNLEASHED._** **Not just across this country...**_**_But in me_**** _._**_ They have no idea the fire they’ve lit inside this wife. And to those listening across America... Let me be clear: The movement my husband built will not die.
**_I refuse to let that happen._** And I know all of us will refuse to let that happen, too. Charlie’s mission will grow: Stronger. Bolder. Louder. Greater than ever. I shared these words publicly, from my heart — just two days after I lost the love of my life.
[**I want you to watch. I want you to hear what Charlie meant to me. And I want you to hear what comes next:**](http://trk.greatamericandigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2u7fi&__onlt=h)
---
[](http://trk.greatamericandigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2u7fi&__onlt=h)
---
Charlie gave everything for this country. And I will never stop speaking his name. We will not let the light he lit go out. Not now. Not ever. For Charlie,
---
[](http://trk.greatamericandigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2u7fi&__onlt=h)
---
Erika Kirk On behalf of the Turning Point USA Family
---
[](http://trk.greatamericandigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2u7fi&__onlt=h)
---
**P.S.** Charlie always said: _“Never surrender.”_ He built something bigger than himself — and now we must carry it forward. If you believe in what he stood for... if you refuse to let Charlie’s vision die...
---
[ **Give in Charlie’s Honor**
**Support Turning Point USA**](http://trk.greatamericandigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2u7fi&__onlt=h)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
| | |
---

The way I look at it, we aren't just deciding Virginia's future this November.
_We're setting the tone for 2026, 2028, and beyond._ By embracing a politics that puts Virginians first — not a president, not a party; by drawing on the powerful conversations I've had with thousands of Virginians; and by laying out a common-sense agenda, starting with a plan to make all of our lives more affordable.
Our victory at the ballot box will pave the way for Democrats for years to come.
That's why far-right Republicans have spent tens of millions of dollars against me. It’s why Donald Trump is attacking me from inside the Oval Office. _And it's why meeting our fundraising goals is so important._
But as I learned working cases at CIA and crafting laws at the U.S. Capitol, you're only as good as the team around you.

clean_body: Will you pitch in to help us win the biggest election of 2025? = Hi, Peter, it's Abigail Spanberger, Democratic nominee for Governor of Virginia. You're one of my top supporters, so I wanted to be the first to tell you: As of this morning, the first votes have been cast in our race for Governor. = If you are signed up for ActBlue Express, your contribution to Abigail Spanberger will be processed immediately: = = = = = = The way I look at it, we aren't just deciding Virginia's future this November. We're setting the tone for 2026, 2028, and beyond. By embracing a politics that puts Virginians first — not a president, not a party; by drawing on the powerful conversations I've had with thousands of Virginians; and by laying out a common-sense agenda, starting with a plan to make all of our lives more affordable. Our victory at the ballot box will pave the way for Democrats for years to come. That's why far-right Republicans have spent tens of millions of dollars against me. It’s why Donald Trump is attacking me from inside the Oval Office. And it's why meeting our fundraising goals is so important. But as I learned working cases at CIA and crafting laws at the U.S. Capitol, you're only as good as the team around you. = = = = = = = I'm honored by the trust you've placed in me, and I hope that you'll continue to follow our campaign from here until November 4th. Thank you for the continued support, Abigail Spanberger By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. I don't write emails like this often. But right now? After what happened to Charlie... _I can 't stay quiet._**Charlie Kirk was my friend.** Not just someone I admired, but someone I loved and respected deeply. Losing him was devastating.

In many ways, all of us share in this loss. Charlie fought every day of his life for each one of us... fighting to keep America as great, free, and prosperous. No one I know ever fought for that harder than Charlie.America won't ever be the same. **No one can ever replace him -- but we can make sure his legacy continues on. **_We owe him that._ Because if you knew Charlie, you would know exactly what he would say to us right now: _**"Don 't you dare quit."**_Charlie poured his heart into building a movement to save America. He believed in young people. He believed in ordinary Americans. And he believed that even in our darkest hours, America was the beacon of goodness, freedom, and truth.That's what the Turning Point movement was all about -- and Charlie gave everything he had to that fight.**And our task now is not only to protect what he built -- it's to grow it bigger, stronger, and bolder than anyone ever thought possible. ** More students. More churches. More families. More courage from everyday Americans to stand up and fight for what is right.Turning Point USA was Charlie's vehicle to save America. **He didn 't just start a movement... _he started a revival. _**And now, Peter, we must carry that forward. If you share the same sense of responsibility that I do to honor Charlie's work and press on with his vision...** _Then please join me in keeping his fight alive by making a gift to Turning Point USA today. _** **[Let’s make Turning Point USA the biggest thing that this nation has ever seen... bigger than Charlie ever thought possible. That’s how we honor him best.](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/sb6IR4H3EGqKDlsjTNHac4f33mTuejJRhYPqYpw8ET8aQCmpRas10BCS87rMeROr_I71Fh52-wEGpaod7vMwyZdAauywybCWP7yMvt9bTpX-H2bUAMzzgSmBFExrb20ip8oNbJPcbJdW8yg528Xgcjq0J3x6gcHF8yabF2I2G7EpC3rFjuvAsk2BvTgx7qH_mxIoVZoC8mU1EYdkbOE6iMlx454_z2UbnCUS-EAqmllNpHV38sgrnCk0iaWlRJOSwWGr-oSHiSxCqEjO9Df9QzmZRdHsIYD6E17if1yEgTVAr1czuxO83JxM0fNv6pZZhDE15WgSp7GWAGamtrHme1ndi5vwoMcKbVatXnJ4UhvVxhLz9NlBZgW0h_dZ7kxYUtkMfpmgoBkh2AKQQdzXBSP9jSv41WKn5aZ5SPyIkWGMbdAm25mpmYJA-UHRYpJGzqqi4aMREhfNxNm1NtIVsah_0TZ-Pyv78M6hvGU3Qef4iHtAC5CBXCWj7vwKQgUEutn5LxGBfXXYeJosCovzj1TwHoPeGiP4VTG-8C94VwDjunRBcO-JPwqkXJXniQHG0esps6Q_2qpKyCTOCZ0qmxcxgylDOgUIv5bfMQix-TroZmkLxZtwKvbtjps1XKwPJdlgqEb7pYkEjbbnKsHytan8dKBg5DZIuCJpJAUj9YOMb5Wwvtu0gxnp3hEfQgV7YqsLTVjAg0AnsAoloI2JydfC2fjcnoJeXXAv8-E0jE_VjQupNdkaNyP599coyJOH24WF4HpGduyKxJtoxbXcUHg9VPYJJv4iZxFpHCQSlLpf3W5pebepd0Dn8PAuEC9UOGC1g52n06PBUjDPvKmURbK5-nq-jVc-iZsJfmCuIF11zKlpKQddhDEuTwpHZvmDOuoBspnre3EEgUQLgor3/dXwgOANe77MnNe-uKFnhfTtyGhjJ4LrT/13)**

clean_body: Right now, Charlie would say, "Don't you dare quit" | | | Peter I don't write emails like this often. But right now? After what happened to Charlie... I can 't stay quiet.Charlie Kirk was my friend. Not just someone I admired, but someone I loved and respected deeply. Losing him was devastating. In many ways, all of us share in this loss. Charlie fought every day of his life for each one of us... fighting to keep America as great, free, and prosperous. No one I know ever fought for that harder than Charlie.America won't ever be the same. No one can ever replace him -- but we can make sure his legacy continues on. We owe him that. Because if you knew Charlie, you would know exactly what he would say to us right now: "Don 't you dare quit."Charlie poured his heart into building a movement to save America. He believed in young people. He believed in ordinary Americans. And he believed that even in our darkest hours, America was the beacon of goodness, freedom, and truth.That's what the Turning Point movement was all about -- and Charlie gave everything he had to that fight.And our task now is not only to protect what he built -- it's to grow it bigger, stronger, and bolder than anyone ever thought possible. More students. More churches. More families. More courage from everyday Americans to stand up and fight for what is right.Turning Point USA was Charlie's vehicle to save America. He didn 't just start a movement... he started a revival. And now, Peter, we must carry that forward. If you share the same sense of responsibility that I do to honor Charlie's work and press on with his vision... Then please join me in keeping his fight alive by making a gift to Turning Point USA today. Rest in peace, Charlie. We'll carry the torch you lit from here. For Charlie, Tucker Carlson 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 |

name: Erika Kirk
subject: My cries will echo around the world like a battle cry
body:
We will never surrender. Ever.

| | | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Patriot, I want to thank you for loving my husband. For standing with us in the worst days of our lives. For praying. For mourning. For remembering. But now, _I need you to listen closely..._ **Because the evildoers who took Charlie’s life? They have NO idea what they have done.** They didn’t just try to silence a man...
They tried to silence his message — a message of patriotism, of faith, and of God’s merciful love. Instead, they ignited something even greater. **If they thought my husband’s mission was powerful before...****_They have NO idea what they have just UNLEASHED._** **Not just across this country...**_**_But in me_**** _._**_ They have no idea the fire they’ve lit inside this wife. And to those listening across America... Let me be clear: The movement my husband built will not die.
**_I refuse to let that happen._** And I know all of us will refuse to let that happen, too. Charlie’s mission will grow: Stronger. Bolder. Louder. Greater than ever. I shared these words publicly, from my heart — just two days after I lost the love of my life.
[**I want you to watch. I want you to hear what Charlie meant to me. And I want you to hear what comes next:**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Charlie gave everything for this country. And I will never stop speaking his name. We will not let the light he lit go out. Not now. Not ever. For Charlie,
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Erika Kirk On behalf of the Turning Point USA Family
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
**P.S.** Charlie always said: _“Never surrender.”_ He built something bigger than himself — and now we must carry it forward. If you believe in what he stood for... if you refuse to let Charlie’s vision die...
---
[ **Give in Charlie’s Honor**
**Support Turning Point USA** ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

Fellow Conservative,

Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one's shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway.

The out-of-touch fake news "reporters" at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: **Navy SEALs.**

We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can't abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country.

_**Yet the liberal news corporations, who _desperately_ want to keep the status quo, _attacked us_ for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government.**_

clean_body: They’re targeting the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. | Fellow Conservative, Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one's shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway. The out-of-touch fake news "reporters" at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can't abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country. Yet the liberal news corporations, who desperately want to keep the status quo, attacked us for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government. All of us –Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we're up against more than just the DC establishment. We're up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats. We need you, Fellow Conservative to keep us on the frontlines, bucking the corrupt status quo! -> If the media wants to attack us for having a "warrior mentality" - the mentality to do whatever it takes to achieve a mission... -> If the media wants to attack us for supporting President Trump's MAGA movement - the movement that says we can make America great... -> If the media wants to attack us for taking on the government corruption, fraud, and waste - which has been exposed by Trump's DOGE department... ...Then they don't understand WHY Donald J. Trump and ALL of us were elected! As SEALs, we all shoot straight with each other. We're going to shoot straight with you, too: This hit piece was horsesht and part of a larger conspiracy to silence us. If they can silence us, they can sure as hell silence you. subject: If Trump wins this fight, democracy loses
body:

Yes, I do No, I do not Authoritarians don’t start with tanks in the streets. They start by silencing voices of dissent. Yes, I do No, I do not Authoritarians don’t start with tanks in the streets. They start by silencing voices of dissent. Trump’s FCC has forced networks to pull Stephen Colbert and now Jimmy Kimmel off the air. This is not politics as usual. This is the FASCIST PLAYBOOK: ❌ Silence the comedians. ❌ Intimidate the journalists. ❌ Crush all opposition. If Trump gets away with this, free speech in America is gone. Full stop. We cannot sit on the sidelines while Trump dismantles democracy in real time. We must mobilize, organize, and resist. Do you stand with Colbert, Kimmel, and every voice Trump is trying to erase from our democracy? Yes, I do No, I do not [] [] The Real Texas PAC 1150 N Loop 1604 W Ste 108-230 San Antonio, TX 78248 United States Contributions or gifts to The Real Texas PAC are not tax deductible. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, treasury funds, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation.
