| What's Happening:
Voter Registration & Constitution Day This week, we celebrate two profoundly patriotic occasions: National Voter Registration Day and Constitution Day. What better way to honor the values, ideals, and principles that define our great nation than by empowering others to engage in our democratic process? Register voters and inspire them to support [Constitutional Platform Republicans](https://feyrpzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001g_ZudeTMVXr8CjpCiWUGBg1MEvBxnkxTpHTAi2C6J9TpoqVuYuiwWV-Xjw6N1Zi4A25Vh9pZHikINMTSHXd7FeOfj0-xb9NnN-0KuClYrzwdQC6Qk9jpMCXNJRIaEH3_BPwpaaH0DMj2R2IpXk7vnKiU0BEj3jfQIi1xQXbVfuRtUUprHlMON_QY5_MqnKykV15HMA3JMqOyB0MkfQqWdg==&c=iLDVzMLx4jdjAn2qNyFoAshUWVxyLazxXx17mSXqtIYBCI-rk6JMMQ==&ch=GjLzN9Ind2kx9mbUwFV0L3ZbuxsNhR_8tg0dAwvhBCeB7Pj5bE4DMA==), ensuring their voices shape America's future.
To be an eligible voter in Nebraska, a person:
* Must be a citizen of the United States;
* Must be a resident of Nebraska;
* Must be least 18 years old;
* Cannot have been convicted of a felony, or if convicted, they must have completed their sentence for the felony, including any parole term; and
* Cannot have been officially found to be mentally incompetent.
*

Help those who meet this criteria register to vote using our short link: [ne.gop/vote](https://feyrpzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001g_ZudeTMVXr8CjpCiWUGBg1MEvBxnkxTpHTAi2C6J9TpoqVuYuiwWV-Xjw6N1Zi42Jb0zhnJAsJPcepssRQESrizUmPWaAtsPF_vv8tEF7Hvxis2qBphnqc38NrSo9mEDJrBHGkn-uIyx86gvxSTGA==&c=iLDVzMLx4jdjAn2qNyFoAshUWVxyLazxXx17mSXqtIYBCI-rk6JMMQ==&ch=GjLzN9Ind2kx9mbUwFV0L3ZbuxsNhR_8tg0dAwvhBCeB7Pj5bE4DMA==) Consider hosting a voter registration event in your community using the resources in our [Voter Registration Toolbox. ](https://feyrpzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001g_ZudeTMVXr8CjpCiWUGBg1MEvBxnkxTpHTAi2C6J9TpoqVuYuiwWV-Xjw6N1Zi4kT9_VBdGsPJovFMlVSXgPS-lPzlWmV1D5ACG2jfU608WQbTFz11vFQaPrkckGRDc4sgOBKusIwihnxRPWvBNSBzMvEqZehQPe1UhvViLqIYg3B3ic_bIz_RmpcoVjzsKdjyBW6IQiBphfq29InX_gQtlEof-TxIBDLnAYxm8-b7XBpwWLOp_Ww==&c=iLDVzMLx4jdjAn2qNyFoAshUWVxyLazxXx17mSXqtIYBCI-rk6JMMQ==&ch=GjLzN9Ind2kx9mbUwFV0L3ZbuxsNhR_8tg0dAwvhBCeB7Pj5bE4DMA==)
Campaign & Candidate Training There is less than a week until our Win Online - Lead Offline Social Media Bootcamp on September 22nd at NEGOP Headquarters, featuring Attorney General Mike Hilgers. This training is designed for candidates and activists eager to enhance their digital presence and connect with voters effectively. Secure your spot today:[ Register here](https://feyrpzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001g_ZudeTMVXr8CjpCiWUGBg1MEvBxnkxTpHTAi2C6J9TpoqVuYuiwWYfhsiA-DgAbt6Rq-HUkFiwiWa4MpSmDL3XpCOtnkh3pHnMqMG9F0DRPpDqpwKS3Oi11RYAHnJGYwbD9TR0r22dnpoPVNaOJTSAtNb6gxCqGsP29QMBr0rI1kxOv_SiqaYgYa6RdsgxbupJ8nIGOEJ0=&c=iLDVzMLx4jdjAn2qNyFoAshUWVxyLazxXx17mSXqtIYBCI-rk6JMMQ==&ch=GjLzN9Ind2kx9mbUwFV0L3ZbuxsNhR_8tg0dAwvhBCeB7Pj5bE4DMA==): [ ](https://feyrpzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001g_ZudeTMVXr8CjpCiWUGBg1MEvBxnkxTpHTAi2C6J9TpoqVuYuiwWYfhsiA-DgAbt6Rq-HUkFiwiWa4MpSmDL3XpCOtnkh3pHnMqMG9F0DRPpDqpwKS3Oi11RYAHnJGYwbD9TR0r22dnpoPVNaOJTSAtNb6gxCqGsP29QMBr0rI1kxOv_SiqaSy1z__ubMK1ANjXrWObGNU=&c=iLDVzMLx4jdjAn2qNyFoAshUWVxyLazxXx17mSXqtIYBCI-rk6JMMQ==&ch=GjLzN9Ind2kx9mbUwFV0L3ZbuxsNhR_8tg0dAwvhBCeB7Pj5bE4DMA==)[https://secure.anedot.com/negop/socialmediabootcamp.](https://feyrpzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001g_ZudeTMVXr8CjpCiWUGBg1MEvBxnkxTpHTAi2C6J9TpoqVuYuiwWYfhsiA-DgAbt6Rq-HUkFiwiWa4MpSmDL3XpCOtnkh3pHnMqMG9F0DRPpDqpwKS3Oi11RYAHnJGYwbD9TR0r22dnpoPVNaOJTSAtNb6gxCqGsP29QMBr0rI1kxOv_SiqaVnbJthaLBuA0-JuYdhyU9M=&c=iLDVzMLx4jdjAn2qNyFoAshUWVxyLazxXx17mSXqtIYBCI-rk6JMMQ==&ch=GjLzN9Ind2kx9mbUwFV0L3ZbuxsNhR_8tg0dAwvhBCeB7Pj5bE4DMA==)
The NEGOP Campaign & Candidate Virtual Bootcamp series is ideal for candidates at any level and anyone looking to get involved in campaigns. Mark your calendar and register for each training using the links below: October 23, 2025 at 6pm - Training 1: Finance - Raising the Money
* Develop a finance plan, diversify revenue streams, host effective events, and learn techniques for asking for donations.

clean_body: News, events, and action items to keep Nebraska red and growing strong. | | | | | | Letter from the Chair The Role of the Nebraska Republican Party (NEGOP) The Nebraska Republican Party (NEGOP) is often asked, "What do you do?" While candidates are visibly campaigning--knocking on doors, speaking to voters, and raising funds with the urgency of an election deadline--the NEGOP operates tirelessly, year-round, to provide the essential framework that supports Republican candidates and elected officials. As the "middle man" in the party structure, the NEGOP bridges the gap between national leadership, state operations, and grassroots efforts. Our Role in the Republican Ecosystem At the top, President Donald J. Trump and Vice President JD Vance serve as the titular heads of the Republican Party, shaping its overall direction. The Republican National Committee (RNC) supports state parties like the NEGOP, which, in turn, empowers county parties. This interconnected structure ensures a unified effort to advance Republican values and elect candidates at all levels. The NEGOP is the backbone of this system in Nebraska, providing resources, strategy, and coordination to strengthen Republican campaigns. Unlike candidates with finite campaign cycles, our work is continuous, laying the groundwork for success in every election. Preparing for the 2026 Election Cycle As we head into the fall of 2025, the NEGOP is focused on preparing for the 2026 election cycle. Our efforts include: Recruiting Candidates: Identifying and supporting strong Republican candidates for local, state, and federal offices. Fundraising: Securing the financial resources necessary to fuel effective campaigns. Strategic Planning: Developing comprehensive plans to maximize support for all GOP candidates. Voter Engagement: Driving voter registration and Get-Out-the-Vote (GOTV) initiatives to boost turnout. Campaign Resources: Providing campaigns with free tools, such as walk apps and data access, to enhance outreach and efficiency. These efforts are designed to create a cohesive, well-supported network of Republican candidates who can compete and win. The Power of County Parties County parties are the grassroots heart of the NEGOP. They play a critical role by: Organizing local Republicans to build community and momentum. Recruiting candidates for local races, ensuring strong representation at every level. Serving as a vital feedback loop, relaying the concerns and priorities of Nebraska voters to the state party. Unity is Our Strength When the NEGOP, county parties, and candidates work together, we achieve our greatest success. Collaboration creates economies of scale, fosters synergy, and amplifies our impact, leading to more Republican victories. However, if we operate in silos, we risk inefficiency and missed opportunities. By uniting our efforts, sharing resources, and aligning our goals, the NEGOP ensures that Nebraska Republicans are positioned to win elections and advance our shared values. Together, we build a stronger, more effective party for the future. Mary Jane Truemper Chairman, Nebraska Republican Party | | | What's Happening: Voter Registration & Constitution Day This week, we celebrate two profoundly patriotic occasions: National Voter Registration Day and Constitution Day. What better way to honor the values, ideals, and principles that define our great nation than by empowering others to engage in our democratic process? Register voters and inspire them to support ==, ensuring their voices shape America's future. To be an eligible voter in Nebraska, a person: Must be a citizen of the United States; Must be a resident of Nebraska; Must be least 18 years old; Cannot have been convicted of a felony, or if convicted, they must have completed their sentence for the felony, including any parole term; and Cannot have been officially found to be mentally incompetent. Help those who meet this criteria register to vote using our short link: == Consider hosting a voter registration event in your community using the resources in our == Campaign & Candidate Training There is less than a week until our Win Online - Lead Offline Social Media Bootcamp on September 22nd at NEGOP Headquarters, featuring Attorney General Mike Hilgers. This training is designed for candidates and activists eager to enhance their digital presence and connect with voters effectively. Secure your spot today:==: == The NEGOP Campaign & Candidate Virtual Bootcamp series is ideal for candidates at any level and anyone looking to get involved in campaigns. Mark your calendar and register for each training using the links below: October 23, 2025 at 6pm - Training 1: Finance - Raising the Money Develop a finance plan, diversify revenue streams, host effective events, and learn techniques for asking for donations. Register Here: == October 30, 2025 at 6pm - Training 2: Communications - The Messaging Workshop Master best practices, craft compelling campaign messages, understand earned vs. paid media, and implement rapid response tactics. Register Here:== November 3, 2025 at 6pm - Training 3: Data - Talking to the Right Voters Gain insights into RNC data, follow data best practices, use data for voter targeting, and receive data center training. Register Here: == November 13, 2025 at 6pm - Training 4: Political - The Ground Game and Putting it All Together Build grassroots infrastructure, execute voter contact strategies, manage mail campaigns, implement absentee voting, early voting, and Get Out The Vote (GOTV) efforts to mobilize voters, along with election integrity. Register Here:== Join us at these trainings to equip yourself with the tools to win elections and advance our shared values. Together, let's seize this opportunity to build a stronger, more prosperous Nebraska! Best, Joe Hagerty Political Director Nebraska Republican Party mailto:political@ne.gop | | | | == | == | | == | | | UPCOMING NEGOP EVENTS | | == | | == | | | Help Republicans win in 2026 and beyond. body:
Here’s a look behind the curtain at our key strategic priorities for 2025 and 2026 that will secure our representative democracy.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115526460/570612876/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg1M2E2MTUwLTY5OTUtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XK9NBvh4xNYdKEZ5Vyo4IxgUuqe6hssVOpAMIqCo9Z8=&emci=7c7035fd-d694-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=853a6150-6995-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=8431045)

Peter, Look no further than how desperately Trump and Republicans are trying to redraw maps and steal power ahead of the 2026 elections to understand just how critical the midterms are. 2025 has given new meaning to our tried-and-true adage that “there are no off years in redistricting.” Trump and the GOP have been relentlessly pulling every possible lever to tip the map in their favor and gain an unfair, unearned advantage in next year’s election. Meanwhile, we know that the future of our democracy hangs in the balance in critical state-level elections. The NDRC has identified 13 states in which we plan to do everything we can to elect pro-democracy leaders in key elections over the next two years — while pushing back on Republican attempts to silence millions of voters. **The NDRC’s unique mix of data-driven mapping, political analysis, and redistricting experience — combined with the fair maps movement’s responsive grassroots organizing and legal strategy — makes us a powerhouse fighting for fair maps. And right now, we’re facing down the toughest fights we’ve seen. ** [**With the 2025 and 2026 elections looming and democracy hanging in the balance, make a donation to power our work today. Your generosity will fuel our fight as we work to protect the future of representative democracy in America.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115526462/570612878/1110433579?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_PriorityStatesUpdate_email_20250919-NDRC-Tier1-PriorityStatesUpdate_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250919-NDRC-Tier1-PriorityStatesUpdate_&utm_campaign=PriorityStatesUpdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg1M2E2MTUwLTY5OTUtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XK9NBvh4xNYdKEZ5Vyo4IxgUuqe6hssVOpAMIqCo9Z8=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

**Here’s a look behind the curtain at our strategic playbook going into 2025 and 2026:**
**2025:**
* In Virginia, we’re laser-focused on keeping control of the state legislature and electing Abigail Spanberger as governor, giving the Commonwealth a fighting chance to strengthen its mapping processes.

* Meanwhile, in Pennsylvania, a pro-democracy majority on the state supreme court is up for grabs — these retention elections are critical for ensuring accountability when the right to vote is attacked.

**2026:**
* We’re investing in 12 key states — Arizona, Colorado, Florida, Georgia, Michigan, Minnesota, New Hampshire, North Carolina, Ohio, Pennsylvania, Texas, and Wisconsin — to elect Democracy Defenders and protect the progress we’ve made and fight for fairness in the run-up to the 2031 redistricting cycle.

* The NDRC will be investing in reforming the redistricting process in key states; protecting independent commissions; eliminating the threat of mid-decade gerrymandering; protecting fair-minded state supreme court majorities; and providing long-term investments in tougher states that will build our power.

[**As you can imagine, fighting to elect these Democracy Defenders requires enormous resources — which are already being stretched by the constant defense we are playing to defeat gerrymandering efforts cropping up seemingly each week. YOU have the power to beat back these attacks today and help us fight for a secure future for our democracy — make your donation to the NDRC today.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115526475/570612894/1110433579?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_PriorityStatesUpdate_email_20250919-NDRC-Tier1-PriorityStatesUpdate_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250919-NDRC-Tier1-PriorityStatesUpdate_&utm_campaign=PriorityStatesUpdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg1M2E2MTUwLTY5OTUtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XK9NBvh4xNYdKEZ5Vyo4IxgUuqe6hssVOpAMIqCo9Z8=)
Thank you,
National Democratic Redistricting Committee

clean_body: Here’s a look behind the curtain at our key strategic priorities for 2025 and 2026 that will secure our representative democracy. | Peter, Look no further than how desperately Trump and Republicans are trying to redraw maps and steal power ahead of the 2026 elections to understand just how critical the midterms are. 2025 has given new meaning to our tried-and-true adage that “there are no off years in redistricting.” Trump and the GOP have been relentlessly pulling every possible lever to tip the map in their favor and gain an unfair, unearned advantage in next year’s election. Meanwhile, we know that the future of our democracy hangs in the balance in critical state-level elections. The NDRC has identified 13 states in which we plan to do everything we can to elect pro-democracy leaders in key elections over the next two years — while pushing back on Republican attempts to silence millions of voters. The NDRC’s unique mix of data-driven mapping, political analysis, and redistricting experience — combined with the fair maps movement’s responsive grassroots organizing and legal strategy — makes us a powerhouse fighting for fair maps. And right now, we’re facing down the toughest fights we’ve seen. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Here’s a look behind the curtain at our strategic playbook going into 2025 and 2026: 2025: In Virginia, we’re laser-focused on keeping control of the state legislature and electing Abigail Spanberger as governor, giving the Commonwealth a fighting chance to strengthen its mapping processes. Meanwhile, in Pennsylvania, a pro-democracy majority on the state supreme court is up for grabs — these retention elections are critical for ensuring accountability when the right to vote is attacked. 2026: We’re investing in 12 key states — Arizona, Colorado, Florida, Georgia, Michigan, Minnesota, New Hampshire, North Carolina, Ohio, Pennsylvania, Texas, and Wisconsin — to elect Democracy Defenders and protect the progress we’ve made and fight for fairness in the run-up to the 2031 redistricting cycle. The NDRC will be investing in reforming the redistricting process in key states; protecting independent commissions; eliminating the threat of mid-decade gerrymandering; protecting fair-minded state supreme court majorities; and providing long-term investments in tougher states that will build our power. = Thank you, National Democratic Redistricting Committee = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

name: Voter Action Project
subject: Join powerful voices
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Jamie Raskin, Bernie Sanders, Elizabeth Warren -- with more and more powerful voices throwing their weight behind abolishing the Electoral College, we are on the verge of a breakthrough!
We deserve a popular vote system in this country to protect our democracy and our rights, from voting to choice and more. RUSH $25 or whatever you can to help ditch the Electoral College forever >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=091925_1&amount=25]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
MSNBC: Jamie Raskin thinks the Electoral College threatens democracy. He's right. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=091925_1&amount=25]
There's no greater defender of our democracy than Congressman Jamie Raskin -- and he knows the score, friend. Here's what he had to say:
“ I think that the Electoral College now, which has given us five popular vote losers as president in our history, twice in this century alone, has become a danger not just to democracy, but to the American people . It was a danger on January 6th, 2021. There are so many curving byways and nooks and crannies in the Electoral College that there are opportunities for a lot of strategic mischief. ”
The Electoral College isn’t just a vestige of the past; it is a ticking time bomb for exploitation in our democratic system. Congressman Raskin knows this, which is why he wanted the Jan. 6th Committee to propose getting rid of it. They didn't all agree, so it didn't make their list of final recommendations to Congress.
We know the vote suppressors will do anything in order to win. We have to remove this danger once and for all -- chip in $5, $15, $25 or more to help us end the Electoral College >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=091925_1&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=091925_1&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=091925_1&amount=25]
GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=091925_1&amount=50] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=091925_1&amount=100]
GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=091925_1&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=091925_1&amount=35]
We don’t necessarily have to wait for Congress to act, either. Movements like the one in favor of the National Popular Vote Interstate Compact (NPVIC) -- an agreement among a group of U.S. states and the District of Columbia to award all their electoral votes to whichever presidential candidate wins the overall popular vote in the 50 states and the District of Columbia -- might end the Electoral College without a constitutional amendment.
17 states plus DC have already joined the NPVIC, accounting for 210 electoral votes and 77% of the states needed to essentially make the popular vote the law of the land. Maine was the latest to join.
Whether it's the NPVIC or something else, it's clear that the Electoral College needs to go.
Help us end the Electoral College forever with $25 or more today! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=091925_1&amount=25]
Thanks,
Voter Action Project's Electoral College Team
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/ [https://www.facebook.com/] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://instagram.com/ [https://instagram.com/] https://www.linkedin.com/ [https://www.linkedin.com/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=091925_1&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=091925_1&amount=20]

name: Tom Fitton
subject: We are heartbroken
body:
It has been over a week now since we lost our friend Charlie Kirk to an assassin's bullet. Charlie was a Christian, a father, a husband, a patriot and a leader. His youth was no bar to wisdom, as I and millions of Americans looked up to this young and brilliant man for leadership and keen insight. He brought the young to light and was truly holy in his regard and enthusiasm for the Faith

|
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

It has been over a week now since we lost our friend Charlie Kirk to an assassin's bullet. Charlie was a Christian, a father, a husband, a patriot and a leader. His youth was no bar to wisdom, as I and millions of Americans looked up to this young and brilliant man for leadership and keen insight. He brought the young to light and was truly holy in his regard and enthusiasm for the Faith.
I found this picture with Charlie from several years ago. Look how young he was. Look at what we lost. We are heartbroken.

Of course I want all of you to support Judicial Watch, but I also want all of you to support Turning Point USA. At this time, your support could be crucial. [https://donate.tpusa.com](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76671&L=36095&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9kb25hdGUudHB1c2EuY29tP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=fb74ce26aefc0c8c7ac15a0e4db3147c3d3300cd02d9f6fdc858d956973a3fed)
And please keep Charlie and his family in your prayers.
Thank you.
Tom Fitton President Judicial Watch

name: Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, & Ryan Zinke
subject: At least we're not getting shot at anymore...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
They’re targeting the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. |
---

[**MESSAGE FROM NAVY SEALS TIM SHEEHY, ELI CRANE, & RYAN ZINKE**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6403ea4c32944ebc8f12fab880933c54&_e=LRzoo_9rA0ZeQt07SMdKw4TdunoSNlER5SfkCi4zqOswYMoJ3VVNHApXtrF2GSJsoavcSncWRKIHwGCtn1DDWoyw4sWyF2s-tHmZiEQYHWVvqW6F5y_vHPXCzr_b_Ba4P6o5g2eMxWmn996F7LyiOTALqSHhpsIg6Ch2RJDaCK3-Tjg3OFfO4kB5lkeuGaYTGWBqoUqOhXm4G4buH_QRsTZurSLmm1QixPFP32s99PrUmJeuho_tji_On8L5O1vf6X2fCQB9RxVa1q2rG3f-OsO4Tc4Hx8a44u5HVYk1uDJ-OvNYCMzBzMLLVbSDSdWBWSndJFkS1BpH7wA7-ScUeLyJAMWf0k8i0lOTa3PF3BpOywBLCWSFbEPMePVf9W16Zw6ZL5qwdcYzFgpaxxwkxXmzJoikk2G_Q94n-VAh3Wra4tpUo275KcM_max5YG1Om7ma9FDfDxjWytUsMwGwLMzd0gWOX0dlYS725rVdcZsce4RzMyJw0fSIaCdDdh9hrD3ZB7yE5RuuOxuwR4Sji4g2cgdVtk11lFibSTBywaL5UZW0TJZ4lBiW2KDz0n344oGWrYm0CQRZdYiDa0M4MBkBZFeKaRafRDgJKrCKah-VSk71hPDCr4foEgJkDb9cA4_elfQ2ivzfnzc-v92TLXirjXVC-AvorP5cjbXhbG29C4R1KMSFl3rw_irnxiLGmMQPMvlC74l39VJDKrL38xqGhEeH-owTVha1JCEhzoQ%3D)
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6403ea4c32944ebc8f12fab880933c54&_e=LRzoo_9rA0ZeQt07SMdKw4TdunoSNlER5SfkCi4zqOswYMoJ3VVNHApXtrF2GSJsoavcSncWRKIHwGCtn1DDWoyw4sWyF2s-tHmZiEQYHWVvqW6F5y_vHPXCzr_b_Ba4P6o5g2eMxWmn996F7LyiOTALqSHhpsIg6Ch2RJDaCK3-Tjg3OFfO4kB5lkeuGaYTGWBqoUqOhXm4G4buH_QRsTZurSLmm1QixPFP32s99PrUmJeuho_tji_On8L5O1vf8anc0mkjyD2NVFNtTFTxmmgIN5aAdTF028t5nXjZmtNcuDWnjTrBN1HC59O3nQ7kY9WkpmjEwAU7gFGjLdGazRRGTactunVo91zNsIBAxeo0UJpfeXAK2SMybAMwlRCi7FhxoqYmAvQuwkc-MkXQTYnbeeGuUpEGkyfJ5TjgAxcIP-TmDDnc73L-nZUVt-443w3816iyJH5rjPl5QpkHRU0CQf-_bp7-FI6fPyq8sFB3eZ9lRx30NDvyDDgg4TyMd5CifC0xIY_bzyRx97ZAoL7frw9oCZgsweWz3xxMy_fZRDQvxeo5e135CUaffRpEMPlzuVCC8LNkZ2rgdqK-a5j9Vq6QtfbCd1Rd1Yjt_TgGrs49iEcVbbPl6wLJV7oBL6UsfTl5vO8pEet-JCdbh69X9NW00XVVxagUFqM8EzjK5TGx4vJbcvoO0Ibm33_KIEbCSGceQEJXSc7p3klUz3zo_f42_3GEDep-PR2sc9s%3D)

Peter,

Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one's shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway.

The out-of-touch fake news "reporters" at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: **Navy SEALs.**

We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can't abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country.

_**Yet the liberal news corporations, who _desperately_ want to keep the status quo, _attacked us_ for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government.**_

Well, not with guns, anyway. The out-of-touch fake news "reporters" at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can't abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country. Yet the liberal news corporations, who desperately want to keep the status quo, attacked us for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government. Friend,

I recently came across a striking statistic.

**72% of J6 defendants were military veterans or first responders.**

And while courts often consider prior service as a factor for lighter sentences, the prosecutors and judges in these cases used their veteran or first responder status to argue for _**harsher penalties**_.

_Is this how our criminal justice system thanks them for their service?_

I've always honored those who serve. We are living the American dream _because_ of them. The way these patriots were treated is a grave injustice.

And while President Trump has pardoned almost all of the J6 defendants, they still haven't received justice.

The lives and reputations of these patriots remain shattered from the lost years to the consistent government and mainstream media smear campaign they endured.

That's why I'm proud to support Stand in the Gap.

This remarkable organization provides real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives.

[If you believe in liberty, in due process, and in standing up for our fellow Americans, I hope you’ll make a donation to Stand in the Gap today. >>](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=7ecc7f23547c4768956327a5831b504f&_e=3L-_U3Z8JeI-DtsTt9gEvy6dbcBT2EOcv5m75ScLn0ACJ8e1hmIonQ9xSOB3ChIsTClt9TmxQtK-uQSywjYqECQZM8j_FJqhXMLGBh9IgiP3PaQ31BB2JbuJmdcxOW_gd0PW9EVKTjQPv6-L3p_u0PYv9K3VOGvCHnkmoU_G_Eua0GOhi3jypw-0m4I5t2dhnkAOkGF4vN77tNhpmc0jNd8pCSei7bi0s1-qwj0IU94eDkOl_v-4UFWStEhD7OdDmKMSib1jKTRXUsg4Iw46RhRogE_VVrJN_1bj466ZgN15dJ15PAFKxoF_xF9thy8QLA90Ij-dfYHPq5fYDwaz2ip_FSy7vqlGsdti24A3Xgiop0OfTUh-wwYpAq17mASFLLc8387xM5pkT3JhkKbhIfVpnnqYb4zS26eQFnWLJo5bTC_IATOxeoUF6gd1UDU7DMyFJDs7woyUtmxEDMi_sQmVBawg6J5tPAySwFvrE988drd8TQLSzxH7K--odFVKuqyBqkXjWUCh-iyjfrvjdzWjUDj5FfL2gxLOExF0jo7RpdYUyaMD3GiZIql9s1q9EaJpB7FqQzQESJOt44HeMuEw4m8M6ixKPxmde5qc-vRdFlqhs9dSAsg448jt_inKtT2SArZcMXggMhxSOlp_gQ%3D%3D)

Before January 6th, many of these patriots were unaware of just how broken the American justice system truly was.
Even after being pardoned, many J6 defendants still face...
* Difficulties finding a job
* Loss of rights, like the right to vote or the right to own a firearm
* Harassment on social media and in their personal lives
* Strained family relationships due to lost time in prison
* And even homelessness.

For many, returning to some semblance of a normal life is overwhelming.

**Stand in the Gap is committed to being a comprehensive support system for J6 defendants and their families by providing essential resources to help these American patriots heal physically, mentally, emotionally, and spiritually.**

Stand in the Gap believes in second chances, providing support to individuals transitioning back into society after incarceration, and working towards a more forward-thinking and restorative prison system that sends non-violent offenders into the world better off than they were when they went in.

Through their programs, partnerships, and advocacy efforts, they are making a lasting impact on the lives of those in need.

**There are nearly 1,600 Americans who are looking for a second chance.**

Let's show these patriots they're not forgotten.

This isn't about politics. It's about justice.

These are real Americans -- veterans, first responders, fathers, mothers, hard-working citizens -- who exercised their First Amendment rights and were persecuted for their political beliefs.

_**If we don 't fight for our fellow patriots now, who will?**_

When you donate to Stand in the Gap, you're not just defending individuals. _You are defending the soul of our country_.

**As long as there 's breath in my lungs and truth in my heart, I'll be singing to honor veterans and first responders. I hope you'll join me by taking action right now.**

clean_body: Friend, I recently came across a striking statistic. 72% of J6 defendants were military veterans or first responders. And while courts often consider prior service as a factor for lighter sentences, the prosecutors and judges in these cases used their veteran or first responder status to argue for harsher penalties. Is this how our criminal justice system thanks them for their service? I've always honored those who serve. We are living the American dream because of them. The way these patriots were treated is a grave injustice. And while President Trump has pardoned almost all of the J6 defendants, they still haven't received justice. The lives and reputations of these patriots remain shattered from the lost years to the consistent government and mainstream media smear campaign they endured. That's why I'm proud to support Stand in the Gap. This remarkable organization provides real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives. Before January 6th, many of these patriots were unaware of just how broken the American justice system truly was. Even after being pardoned, many J6 defendants still face... Difficulties finding a job Loss of rights, like the right to vote or the right to own a firearm Harassment on social media and in their personal lives Strained family relationships due to lost time in prison And even homelessness. For many, returning to some semblance of a normal life is overwhelming. Stand in the Gap is committed to being a comprehensive support system for J6 defendants and their families by providing essential resources to help these American patriots heal physically, mentally, emotionally, and spiritually. Stand in the Gap believes in second chances, providing support to individuals transitioning back into society after incarceration, and working towards a more forward-thinking and restorative prison system that sends non-violent offenders into the world better off than they were when they went in. Through their programs, partnerships, and advocacy efforts, they are making a lasting impact on the lives of those in need. There are nearly 1,600 Americans who are looking for a second chance. Let's show these patriots they're not forgotten. This isn't about politics. It's about justice. These are real Americans -- veterans, first responders, fathers, mothers, hard-working citizens -- who exercised their First Amendment rights and were persecuted for their political beliefs. If we don 't fight for our fellow patriots now, who will? When you donate to Stand in the Gap, you're not just defending individuals. You are defending the soul of our country. As long as there 's breath in my lungs and truth in my heart, I'll be singing to honor veterans and first responders. I hope you'll join me by taking action right now.** For faith, freedom, and country, John Rich Stand In The Gap is registered as a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent permitted by law. Stand In The Gap's tax identification number is 93-1417599. P.O. Box 470100 Tulsa, OK 74147

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: Free speech is under attack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
As a Senator, I am standing with every American who believes in free speech, dissent and accountability.
Our First Amendment rights are under attack. ABC just suspended _Jimmy Kimmel Live!_ at the Trump administration’s demand. Various ABC-affiliated stations dropped the show, and the FCC chair threatened regulatory consequences for ABC for refusing to penalize speech he didn’t like. **This is not just about one show.** CBS canceled _The Late Show_ after Stephen Colbert called out their $16 million settlement with Trump, and Trump has sued several other media organizations for criticizing him. It sets a dangerous precedent when media companies are pressured into silencing critical voices. When the president decides what is and is not permissible speech, our democracy gets weaker. As a U.S. Senator, I am standing with every American who believes in free speech, dissent and accountability. The Trump administration’s war on the First Amendment is an attack on the foundation of our democracy. **That’s why I’m calling on you to join me in demanding action.** [**_Will you add your name now to stand with Jimmy Kimmel and defend the First Amendment?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115528767/570619569/723906385?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.09.19_Kimmel_B1_F1_S1_C1_NC-AC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmQ4NTE1Ni02Yzk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zCBgpuudQPMTa-4enxVTeHf4_gI5GRcUBecG0HUiw7g=&emci=6afd8bf3-6095-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=e2d85156-6c95-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=7659029) | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115528768/570619571/723906385?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.09.19_Kimmel_B1_F1_S1_C1_NC-AC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmQ4NTE1Ni02Yzk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zCBgpuudQPMTa-4enxVTeHf4_gI5GRcUBecG0HUiw7g=&emci=6afd8bf3-6095-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=e2d85156-6c95-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=7659029)

name: Wes Moore
subject: Praying
body:
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=644%2E1086043%2E9pV7aS)
Peter, this is a longer message about what’s been on my mind the past few days — but if you don’t have time to read to the end, **[I’d appreciate if you could help power our reelection campaign with a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250919-1?refcode=em-20250919-1&refcode2=644_1086043_9pV7aS&akid=644%2E1086043%2E9pV7aS)**
The past few weeks were hard — the kind where headlines knock the breath out of you. But it’s not just one story. It’s all of it. The violence. The rhetoric. The threats. The sinking feeling that the foundation of our democracy is fraying at the edges.
Emotions are running high, and so is the political temperature.
As an elected official, this particular feeling is something I’ve become accustomed to. In fact, since I came to office, there has been a significant increase in threats to my office. There’s a reason for it.
Our current politics is filled with derision, hatred, and violence. This month alone, Charlie Kirk was murdered likely for his political views. His wife was made a widow and children were forced to go on without him. And our president is using the tragedy to incite more fear.
I know it can be hard to see the way out right now. In these moments – rather than moving further into the darkness – we must move toward the light.
Elected officials cannot do this alone. The path forward is going to take all of us: Clergy and houses of worship. Grandparents and parents. Schools, principals, and educators.
We have to decide that we are not fighting each other. In fact, we need each other if we want to solve our most vexing challenges – poverty, violence, wealth inequality.
We are in a moment of real tension, but we are not irreparably broken. And I will not allow anyone to convince me otherwise.
There is a path forward. It won’t be easy. But we know what it takes. Courage, compassion, and leadership that sees the humanity in every person – not just the ones who vote for them. It also requires citizens willing to believe in something bigger.
We’ve had dark moments before. This country’s history is brutal and uneven. But we’ve found a way through again and again. Not because the path was easy, but because the people demanded better. Because we still believed.
Through God’s grace and ethical leadership, we’ve overcome. And we must again.
I’m praying for all of us. For our country. That we find a way to move beyond the hate and vitriol.
The story of this moment needs to be that we got better – not that we got worse.
Together, we can make that a reality.
Elevate,
Wes
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250919-1?amount=5&refcode=em-20250919-1&refcode2=644_1086043_9pV7aS&akid=644%2E1086043%2E9pV7aS)**

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20250919-1&t=2&refcode2=644_1086043_9pV7aS&akid=644%2E1086043%2E9pV7aS)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=644%2E1086043%2E9pV7aS)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=644%2E1086043%2E9pV7aS)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

name: Working Families Party
subject: Our next endorsement for Congress: Mai Vang
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Peter, We need a Congress that fights for working people, not billionaire corporations and special interests. The status quo isn’t serving us. Too many families are working harder than ever and still falling behind while corporate interests run the show — and career politicians who’ve been in office for decades aren’t going to change it. That’s why we’re proud to support **Mai Vang** in her campaign to represent California’s 7th Congressional District. Mai was born and raised in Sacramento, and is the proud daughter of Hmong refugees. She has been a powerful champion for working people on the Sacramento City Council. And now she’s challenging a 20-year incumbent Democrat who has been absent in their district and has actively avoided town halls and meeting their constituents. Mai is the kind of leader we need:**she understands her community from the inside out and will fight tooth and nail for the people she represents.** **** [**Can you split a contribution today to help Mai take on this entrenched incumbent and power our fight to flip the House in 2026? Every dollar brings us closer to electing leaders who put working people first — and shows that voters across the country are ready for real clean_body: | | | Peter, We need a Congress that fights for working people, not billionaire corporations and special interests. The status quo isn’t serving us. Too many families are working harder than ever and still falling behind while corporate interests run the show — and career politicians who’ve been in office for decades aren’t going to change it. That’s why we’re proud to support Mai Vang in her campaign to represent California’s 7th Congressional District. Mai was born and raised in Sacramento, and is the proud daughter of Hmong refugees. She has been a powerful champion for working people on the Sacramento City Council. And now she’s challenging a 20-year incumbent Democrat who has been absent in their district and has actively avoided town halls and meeting their constituents. Mai is the kind of leader we need:she understands her community from the inside out and will fight tooth and nail for the people she represents. ** As a Sacramento City Councilmember, Mai created the Sacramento Children’s Fund to dedicate millions of dollars to kids facing poverty and trauma, secured over $40 million to strengthen neighborhoods, expand youth programs, and improve the quality of life for seniors, led one of the nation’s most linguistically diverse vaccination clinics , and championed Safe Haven policies to protect students and families regardless of their immigration status. When she gets to Congress, Mai will fight for guaranteed health care for every American, paid sick leave, affordable child care, and safe and affordable housing. She knows that the status quo isn’t working for working people. But this race isn’t just about Sacramento, Peter. Its outcome will send a message across the country: that entrenched incumbents can be challenged and that we can elect working class champions to represent our communities. Every dollar will help us reach more voters, share Mai’s story, and elect more candidates like her — leaders rooted in their communities, ready to fight for working families everywhere. In solidarity, Working Families Party Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. ** Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Join Me Tonight On FlashPoint!
body:
Tonight, I will be joining Gene Bailey on FlashPoint to discuss the #CharlieKirkEffect in America. You can watch it at: https://www.fparmy.com or via
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25041756.12950.1.38bde7eba4ce4b6a4fff9bda640497b1) |
---
Tonight, I will be joining **Gene Bailey** on [FlashPoint](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25041756.12951.1.f8f367854d416661498ae5337f3f5d48) to discuss the **#CharlieKirkEffect** in America. You can watch it at: [https://www.fparmy.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25041756.12952.1.f82deb860d8c4e480dff22b2b7f81dfd) or via **YouTube** , **X** and **Roku**. Time: 8pm EST / 7pm CT
---
---
|
---
**Charlie Kirk** 's Celebration of Life service will be streamed at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25041756.12953.1.437291e183a909480308884abce18d8f) this Sunday after our morning worship service and you are welcome to join others in celebrating his legacy.
**Sunday Service** = 10am CT w/**Dr. Randy Caldwell**
**Charlie Kirk's Legacy Service** = 1pm CT
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25041756.12954.1.a8863d50b1b1325d5e27c992a6716eba)
---
**WOW**... this Sunday at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25041756.12955.1.550c777e78444238332e7c0de7ec8e9b) was unlike anything I have ever seen. The auditorium was **completely FULL** 15 minutes before service even started. There was a long line of people trying to get into the auditorium. People who had not been to church in years and even decades decided to come to church. This did not just happen at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25041756.12956.1.3b0ba006d12c305c5745874df1bdcbdf) but churches all across America. Many are calling this the **Charlie Kirk Effect**. Not only are Pastors recognizing a spiritual hunger in Americans but so did **CNN**. For CNN to see and report on it means God is REALLY moving. Yesterday, I preached a sermon dedicated to my friend, **Charlie Kirk** , entitled, "[TURNING POINT](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25041756.12957.1.4e9b874e07c603af20eec013bf2bf93c)."
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25041756.12958.1.db17d9fa814ac5e033d1288b2a01609f)
---
I want to encourage you to watch this as it made a tremendous impact upon those who received it yesterday.
You can watch it here: [https://youtube.com/live/VThy9lMd7ec?feature=share](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25041756.12959.1.1ed774255c72ea2fc73e18d9c57ebed3)
May the fires of revival continue to spread across America.
Thank you
Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
| | [ Partner w/Sheridan.Church ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25041756.12960.1.7d54b3281936e02711551703d4e35eaa)
---
---
|
---
Recently, I woke up today with a really cool notification... My **FIRST** book, ["_Chasing After The Wind_ "](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25041756.12961.1.3423d3bfd9e883fd33c8d1e8fd471e8b) is out and has reached **#12 in Religion/ Christian Living / Personal Growth**! **I have been blown away by the response!** THANK YOU SO MUCH! If you have not ordered your copy you can still get the **Limited Edition Signed Book** here: _[*"Chasing After The Wind"*](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25041756.12962.1.37e33a40d4f732def274639b97eaeae2)_ It is also available on [Amazon](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25041756.12963.1.e094bd22ed12ba74fad1f091a1e23a6c)\+ [Barnes & Noble](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25041756.12964.1.7adc1839b155384f56b59aa6fa72f0b0). **Amazon** : [https://www.amazon.com/Chasing-After-Wind-Catching-Everybody/dp/B0F7M4GK26](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25041756.12965.1.d4f32e9a2ebf0e761d882da7ff3a53b9) **Barnes & Noble**: [https://www.barnesandnoble.com/w/chasing-after-the-wind-jackson-lahmeyer/1147391019](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25041756.12966.1.3bacfbe64af94e007b90a1db0f15c541) I really want to thank **MLB LEGEND Darryl Strawberry** for writing the Foreword and becoming vulnerable by sharing his story. The Foreword is worth getting the book, I promise. This book is 200 pages and I am confident will change your life as it has mine. In ["Chasing After The Wind"](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25041756.12967.1.be6be0573c3ff0bdcbf10f2beebd4292) I share VERY personal stories and I decided to get real and raw with the heartbreaks and triumphs I have experienced.
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25041756.12968.1.75aa0bd412989f7b5f1ab91e6341d654)
---
Get your [LIMITED EDITION SIGNED COPY](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25041756.12969.1.301a984748a66f6aa53555ef5f71ed5f) here: [https://books.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25041756.12970.1.7a40225d7fcdcd570fac01c30b34a0b9) Thank you,

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Jimmy Kimmel
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=8995%2E5257348%2E8plBsi ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek —

The president’s persistent attacks on the press and free speech are
putting our First Amendment rights at grave risk.

Stephen Colbert’s show cancelled.

Suits against the New York Times, Wall Street Journal, and 60 Minutes.

Extorting settlements from CBS, ABC, and others.

Blocking the AP's access to the White House.

And the latest — my friend Jimmy Kimmel’s show was pulled off the air
after Trump’s Federal Communications Commission chair threatened to pull
the network’s license — something he lacks the power to do.

The Trump Administration is responsible for the most blatant attacks on
the free press in American history.

And it’s not even close.

Any word of opposition spoken against Trump results in retribution —
whether you are a mega-corporation, a comedian, a politician, or simply an
activist voicing your opinion.

This is a dangerous precedent — another step as Trump does all he can to
consolidate power, silence opponents, and turn our democracy into an
autocracy.

Derek, what will
be left of the First Amendment when he’s done?

We cannot be scared into silence. We need to continue speaking out,
attending rallies, and voicing our opinions.

We must continue to do oversight, uncover this malfeasance, and use every
tool at our disposal to fight it.

Trump and his allies will try to punish those who speak out. They’ll throw
insults and attacks our way. But we cannot back down. And I won’t.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q32025_abs_em.sQXYU5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250919_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=8995%2E5257348%2E8plBsi ]Pitch in to help amplify our voices against Trump and his attack on the
First Amendment. Your support helps me speak out and fight back.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

subject: Regarding FCC Chair Brendan Carr

body:
FCC Chair Brendan Carr has disgraced his office.

---
| | | Peter, I’ll cut to the chase: I just called on the FCC Chair to resign immediately. Brendan Carr has disgraced his office and abused his power. body:
| | | ******Florida painted over the rainbow crosswalk outside Pulse — a memorial to 49 lives lost. When activists restored it with chalk, state troopers arrested them.**
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvY5hIpYyZFo4TAxtBXDcsH29Bm26a7rGkQQ4yATnWxNFLXcpllBDqX6mZcTq98S-e23nxGXDDnMhTictQ-4cMJ0_Mzwde7S-IrL-Y8qLS92q_dr52_pH8McYWpJH53Pt08WG4Z4PezkPBz5OoemnDgO0AkLYbMMp0pzhbGY8Rn7uR9jCf58G3LDLVRG6g95Te9-_dgbYCTUsQTBDuvfpzVelN3W-MESyByY4IWAt0qQJG2xvVTSvUnKKsO65Zztoa9TclvBcMmw6o60hASUPd9AjV9ei7B5a8l7R4688ojh8EN2_lacDd3UvSc0B_PqaqGgouuxGfokZCQViH2gmwJAUgbGQWIOTE-nVRyhIkdnB-6ZE0wPpp7HGNP6MBpd0Uyxj3y_hQ7XBek42uqaOl1JPvMXmUm475XmU_ebYPWGdIEvyTmPFegE8SJFzXaUfo/4k1/qoXrAryMTSiEAij4O7Sumg/h0/h001.78nT1r6n6ez9jtHCc_6CZrSlSQ7ErTw0ql-ebZY4Noo) **[We’re fighting back with a “Pride Will Never Be Erased” billboard, funded by Cedar Key Progress donors like you. Pitch in now!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvY5hIpYyZFo4TAxtBXDcsH29Bm26a7rGkQQ4yATnWxNFLXcpllBDqX6mZcTq98S-e23nxGXDDnMhTictQ-4cMJltqGwaUFMk3-xce8pPBKdcI3w8EZyhQHgEFWwxn0GcSvm7JaTFXV-biFuTafS7S9NYTFR6Mao36q-PUURjcvPiKXDCcpudY_cOC1wm_yaSa8Cm-76oVHQKkaI3m4KtPIYHmiKJAIbxuTWkyRfe2ArrMMfTw2q6WPVeuIDSiP9L9Tm7fXqhj9ND0DFPl1Dr93apemyBZyd1fkgluEsHhInRlqXJ69h9yCfzhn2DYLD5Xvvy7E-rTcFCW8x359139ZiHsi2P2jp_SVljMYdWdfiyGcXwYUFu_JumxQ-DJKby93NcD3Nk05Ivb_F4xlPnXIs3yyaI_U9HQLfM56BlKmycxeo1qkePL2Zu8lM-N0qOk/4k1/qoXrAryMTSiEAij4O7Sumg/h1/h001.FFq0H72pXoRGOtw-eTLZeMfLXMfjX1aDq7c4NVg5wcI)** **[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvY5hIpYyZFo4TAxtBXDcsH29Bm26a7rGkQQ4yATnWxNFLXcpllBDqX6mZcTq98S-e23nxGXDDnMhTictQ-4cMJ6APTZCN_-j_ytWVTvzrHSduQPzxjvlWuToDz_SWnVIGsDA0gxGh3FGlQqkTGrfw_u3ndX5HClEpL94rLXZUQ2_3JvsU8yB9z9UMcn_u7NsSQD9VbQOOzDDkdJzQWXTpaJNcBQ6eWhX-ffiJiHyBpZmmAoWKYs3s38HWXCAduHfwStIDByXo60cjMX_9D7NM8A2OS7iqjh_x9gztjURp0ZKpYB-lAn3MnO8UDcRXgY4_ScOG2zyjP-706Nd6WB3qIUJTcTrYIf1ACOXGbiYMqfUxGPJszY7HU2nxshHv-RhvuvXmAJfnRemuAywrBySRiCugveQOcU8p9WouecoJaODZsEIyC0dLcHuUNi2zyajc/4k1/qoXrAryMTSiEAij4O7Sumg/h2/h001.fmYFZiaFXUKFSI7KvSPoz0URlYI-n0z6gH3cFjxbJKc)**
* * *
People have literally been arrested for drawing rainbows. All the while, laws have been passed to erase or censor symbols of LGBTQ+ life and memory.
**_But Pride will not be erased._**
Cedar Key Progress is fighting back with a new upcoming billboard in the heart of Orlando declaring: **
** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvY5hIpYyZFo4TAxtBXDcsH29Bm26a7rGkQQ4yATnWxNFLXcpllBDqX6mZcTq98S-e23nxGXDDnMhTictQ-4cMJu0JQLylXoulI7ppvahW5F2kerocAnaTp9uVW91kj3SmEszX3R75Nv60KLwh-cNVzfdnJQRREvup9WZuRJYRve7QDfBSChShPwY5igbQHUunvBJCcrbkDyFlaPfbRKRveB4phZuUXIib9unq-O_GPh_nCfsB2LVSXWFa6fkkBJ5EDQ_zZDTX4-3GJvaJqq51du05dgr1qxRTng5W_EfdcWg5gggYDloxgQhN05Qutnx5VyagbDDSYhlvBDtCg1fdRW4ehZDgvd8et4x3B-7IHcRP5qlzqMG0Gszw3hWQbXYgtF5YJRAF77c88DtuLR7rZhonqp-CXaS7Jl64JTixCsx_EjLRjxGDmehj6f6-Ht4E/4k1/qoXrAryMTSiEAij4O7Sumg/h3/h001.Sl9wxJnDiFody69NwhQH9dbk2dMQtEdcFfZm7F0I4mI)
Unlike chalk, it won’t wash away in the rain. Unlike paint, it won’t vanish overnight. Unlike protests, it won’t be silenced by handcuffs.
With your help, every time someone drives by that billboard, they’ll see that Pride is enduring — _that love, resistance, and remembrance cannot be erased._
This is about memory. About dignity. About refusing to let hate win.
_Florida can paint over a crosswalk. They can threaten those who chalk. But with your help, they’ll look up and see our pride._

clean_body: | | | ****Florida painted over the rainbow crosswalk outside Pulse — a memorial to 49 lives lost. When activists restored it with chalk, state troopers arrested them. People have literally been arrested for drawing rainbows. All the while, laws have been passed to erase or censor symbols of LGBTQ+ life and memory. But Pride will not be erased. Cedar Key Progress is fighting back with a new upcoming billboard in the heart of Orlando declaring: Unlike chalk, it won’t wash away in the rain. Unlike paint, it won’t vanish overnight. Unlike protests, it won’t be silenced by handcuffs. With your help, every time someone drives by that billboard, they’ll see that Pride is enduring — that love, resistance, and remembrance cannot be erased. This is about memory. About dignity. About refusing to let hate win. Florida can paint over a crosswalk. They can threaten those who chalk. But with your help, they’ll look up and see our pride. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Thank you for your support. — The Cedar Key Progress Team | Cedar Key Progress support Democrats in competitive Southern districts who are building a diverse, inclusive, and just future. To donate by check, send to: Cedar Key Progress c/o Pocketbook Strategies 1110 N Virgil Ave #375 Los Angeles, CA 90029 \- \- \- Paid for by Cedar Key Progress and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to Cedar Key Progress are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . name: Donald Trump, Jr.
subject: For Charlie. For America.
body:
His fire lit a movement. It’s up to us to keep it burning.

#
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/02af3b8f-0627-44d7-8e95-99cd880695fe?source_code=MAWCO70238&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_term=MAWCO70238]

Dear friend,

I don’t even know how to begin to put into words the loss I am
feeling... but this isn’t about me.

TODAY, TOMORROW, NEXT WEEK — THEY’RE ALL ABOUT CHARLIE.

Because Charlie was truly one of the best men I’ll ever know.

He changed the direction of this nation.

He was a leader, a fighter, and a man whose character and conviction
were rare. Too rare.

He was an inspiration to millions around the world.

TO ME, CHARLIE WAS A LITTLE BROTHER. That honor I will carry with me
forever.

#
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/02af3b8f-0627-44d7-8e95-99cd880695fe?source_code=MAWCO70238&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_term=MAWCO70238]

I’m heartbroken knowing his death will leave a hole in the heart of
our nation.... and an even larger one in my life.

Charlie may no longer stand beside me — to remind me to push on when
things get tough.

_But his memory will._

_And I’ll make sure it does for this country he loved so well._

Charlie led a life of courage, strength, and conviction. NOW IT’S
TIME FOR ME, FOR YOU, AND FOR EVERY PATRIOT TO STAND UP AND FIGHT FOR
EVERYTHING CHARLIE STOOD FOR.

He poured every ounce of energy he had into saving this nation — and
he did that through Turning Point USA.

No one fought harder than Charlie. It was his mission in life to give
people the courage to speak up — and he did that. And none of us
will ever be silenced again.

He fought for you and all America. Now we must fight for him.

PATRIOT, IT’S ON US TO KEEP HIS LIFE’S WORK ALIVE... so it can
continue to reach young people, change lives, and embolden the
American people.

AS HIS FRIEND, I ASK THAT YOU HELP ME MAKE CERTAIN THAT CHARLIE’S
VOICE IS NEVER SILENCED, STOPPED, OR FORGOTTEN. That it’s heard
across the nation... in every church, in every school, and in every
home for generations.

_Let’s make the world remember him._

FRIEND, THE ONLY WAY TO DO THAT IS TO MAKE TURNING POINT USA THE
BIGGEST THING AMERICA HAS EVER SEEN... BECAUSE CHARLIE’S LEGACY
DOESN’T END HERE.
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/02af3b8f-0627-44d7-8e95-99cd880695fe?source_code=MAWCO70238&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_term=MAWCO70238]

GIVE IN CHARLIE'S HONOR
SUPPORT TURNING POINT USA

Charlie, we’ll keep fighting the good fight. We’ll carry forward
the torch you lit... and we’ll make sure it shines brighter than
ever.

FOR YOU, WE’LL SAVE OUR GREAT COUNTRY.

Rest in peace, brother.

FOR CHARLIE,

Don Jr.

#
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/02af3b8f-0627-44d7-8e95-99cd880695fe?source_code=MAWCO70238&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_term=MAWCO70238]

GIVE IN CHARLIE'S HONOR
SUPPORT TURNING POINT USA

4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044

Unsubscribe: https://app.vbout.com/index.php?r=Email/OptoutConfirmationForm&messageid=320314&trkid=929010884&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com

215 N Payne Street, Alexandria, VA 22314

AS HIS FRIEND, I ASK THAT YOU HELP ME MAKE CERTAIN THAT CHARLIE’S VOICE IS NEVER SILENCED, STOPPED, OR FORGOTTEN. That it’s heard across the nation... in every church, in every school, and in every home for generations. Let’s make the world remember him. FRIEND, THE ONLY WAY TO DO THAT IS TO MAKE TURNING POINT USA THE BIGGEST THING AMERICA HAS EVER SEEN... BECAUSE CHARLIE’S LEGACY DOESN’T END HERE. [] GIVE IN CHARLIE'S HONOR SUPPORT TURNING POINT USA Charlie, we’ll keep fighting the good fight. We’ll carry forward the torch you lit... and we’ll make sure it shines brighter than ever. FOR YOU, WE’LL SAVE OUR GREAT COUNTRY. Rest in peace, brother. FOR CHARLIE, Don Jr. [] GIVE IN CHARLIE'S HONOR SUPPORT TURNING POINT USA 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

name: Abdul El-Sayed
subject: This shocked me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20250919-929&t=1001&akid=957%2E251025%2EQjBfZl ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20250919-929&t=1002&akid=957%2E251025%2EQjBfZl ]Abdul for US Senate

Hey Peter,

When I was in college, I thought I’d spend my life studying disease. I
published dozens of papers on illness, medicine, and public health.

But eventually, I realized disease doesn’t start simply in our bodies — it
starts with our politics. Here’s what shocked me:

I could drive 45 minutes from Ann Arbor to Detroit.

And in that short drive, I crossed nearly a decade of life expectancy.

In Ann Arbor, where I’m raising my daughters, people live to about 80
years old. In Detroit, just down the road, life expectancy is nine years
shorter.

Nine years fewer to watch your kids grow up.

Nine years fewer to laugh with your partner.

Nine years stolen by inequality and greed.

That’s why I became Detroit’s Health Director, and later Wayne County’s
Health Director — to fight back against this injustice. We spearheaded a
program to erase $700 million in medical debt. We put free glasses on
kids’ faces. We held polluters accountable.

Peter, our
government should serve people, not corporations.

That’s why I’m running for Senate — to take on the system that lets
corporations profit while working people lose years of their lives. And I
need your help to get there.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20250919-1-ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250919-929&refcode2=957_251025_QjBfZl&akid=957%2E251025%2EQjBfZl ]If you can afford it, pitch in $10 to fuel our campaign.
We’re not taking any money from corporate PACs, so every bit of support
you can contribute goes a long way.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20250919-1-ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250919-929&refcode2=957_251025_QjBfZl&akid=957%2E251025%2EQjBfZl ]Donate $10 ››

In solidarity,

Abdul

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. To contribute via check, please address it to Abdul for U.S. Senate, PO Box 126, St. Clair Shores, MI 48080.

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1004&akid=957%2E251025%2EQjBfZl
Update Your Information: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/update-your-information
Unsubscribe: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1005&akid=957%2E251025%2EQjBfZl

Email us: info@abdulformichigan.com

Paid for by Abdul for U.S. Senate

subject: Re: Georgia’s Senate race

body:
#

Peter, we know you probably didn't wake up this morning with the intention of chipping in to Jon Ossoff’s reelection campaign. But, in a moment, that’s what we’re going to ask you to do.
If you already know the stakes and are ready to make a donation to Jon’s reelection campaign, here’s a link to chip in now: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ossoff-em-sep25**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-sep25.SYBMcx&refcode=em250919-1-f&t=1&akid=789%2E5691347%2Ex_dWtM)
Otherwise, we hope you’ll give us just a moment to catch you up on the state of Jon’s race in Georgia →
**FIRST:** Jon Ossoff’s seat was named by _The Hill_ as one of the top five most likely to flip in the midterms.
**THEN:** JD Vance came to Georgia and personally attacked Jon at his event.
**NOW:** Far-right Super PACs are spending millions of dollars on TV and digital ads attacking Jon. _And we know these attacks will only ramp up as we move closer to Election Day..._
We know we can win and defend this seat, but we need you with us because grassroots donations to emails like this one are the _number one_ way Jon funds his reelection campaign.
While he'd never expect you to donate to every email we send, we are hoping you’re able to pitch in this time around to push back against the right-wing megadonors and Super PACs swooping in to unseat Jon.
So please, Peter:
[**If holding this Senate seat and keeping Jon Ossoff in the Senate feels worth $5 to you, that is the donation we're asking you to make to his reelection campaign today.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-sep25.SYBMcx&refcode=em250919-1-f&t=2&akid=789%2E5691347%2Ex_dWtM)

Thank you in advance for your support today. We simply cannot fund a winning campaign without people like you who care enough to act when Jon needs you most.
\- Team Ossoff

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Shocking Extremist Exposed!
body:
After I posted this on X, US Assistant Attorney General for Civil Rights Harmeet Dhillon reposted my report, saying, "extremely concerning." She is correct. This is how Islamic terrorism and violence spread in our nation. This is how extremists get inspired to walk into nightclubs, like Omar Mateen did when he killed 49 people in Orlando in the name of ISIS.
| We appreciate your subscription to our alerts and updates.
To be removed from this list, **[unsubscribe here](https://libersend.loomered.com/unsubscribe/wJCYyn7638HXOcoR8928MiNxO5nXTgGo6s7D8pT0763BW8929so/jNrcjifZkRuM7634SQt2EHxg/tzcN5NJhqhv892qRUVGIr4763Q)**.
* * *
---
| [****](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/Aol1SDQ7635LCRxJ77e06CgQ/tzcN5NJhqhv892qRUVGIr4763Q) [****](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/Aol1SDQ7635LCRxJ77e06CgQ/tzcN5NJhqhv892qRUVGIr4763Q) Dear Patriot,

Nidal Jboor is the founder of an organization called Doctors Against Genocide. Sounds like a decent endeavor, doesn't it?

The organization obtained its non-profit tax status in 2024, and their name serves as a sympathetic title that Jboor uses to spread hate and violent speech against anyone who disagrees with his political views and opposes a Palestinian State.
My team and I recently published footage of Jboor speaking in Michigan at the "People's Conference for Palestine," in which he stated, under the guise of "love for the children," that:
_Leaders, "whether in Israel, Tel Aviv, Washington, or Europe. _
_They must be**locked up, taken out, neutralized **_
_to save children and humanity. "_
Jboor continued his call for violence by stating, "Speaking up isn't enough . . . **it 's time to escalate and act!**"

After I posted this on X, US Assistant Attorney General for Civil Rights Harmeet Dhillon reposted my report, saying, "extremely concerning."

She is correct. This is how Islamic terrorism and violence spread in our nation. This is how extremists get inspired to walk into nightclubs, like **Omar Mateen did when he killed 49 people in Orlando** in the name of ISIS.

It's how men like Nidal Hassan convince themselves to wage jihad and **kill 13 men and women during the Fort Hood shooting**.

It's how Al-Qaeda can find men like Mohammed Saeed Alshamrani, who killed three people at the Naval Air Station in Pensacola, Florida in a 2019 shooting.

That list goes on and on, and it will continue to grow as men like Nidal Jboor continue to spread their hate in the name of the Palestinian cause. But, I'm confident now that the Trump Administration is aware of Nidal's violent rhetoric, **the only audience he 'll have in the future will be his prison cellmate**.

And it's why I will continue to work with unrelenting vigilance to expose these bad actors. But my work [**doesn 't happen without your backing**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/Aol1SDQ7635LCRxJ77e06CgQ/tzcN5NJhqhv892qRUVGIr4763Q). Funds are low to continue paying for travel and my team of researchers, who continue to dig through the dark corners of the Internet to find this anti-American, violent, ad pro-Islamic jihad rhetoric, and bring it to light.

[**Please take a moment to donate any amount today to help me continue reporting and making an impact. **](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/Aol1SDQ7635LCRxJ77e06CgQ/tzcN5NJhqhv892qRUVGIr4763Q)

We cannot get complacent. President Trump and those in his administration who put America first WILL act. Still, it's our job to work together to make sure that men like Nidal Jboor don't go unseen.

It's vital that my reporting as an investigative journalist continues, but [**without your backing, my resources are limited**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/Aol1SDQ7635LCRxJ77e06CgQ/tzcN5NJhqhv892qRUVGIr4763Q), and the hate continues to spread . . . **and so will the political violence** **that has hit our country so hard.**

[**Please, donate today.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/Aol1SDQ7635LCRxJ77e06CgQ/tzcN5NJhqhv892qRUVGIr4763Q)

I appreciate all that you do.

Respectfully, Laura Loomer

---

name: YDA DNC Representatives via yda.org
subject: DNC Summer Meeting 2025 Recap
body:
Check out our update from the DNC summer meeting! | | | | | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsGRA_J6jtCqYTGf9TBARmggSPVbT9acGv-q3fuGkH5fpWKqqPlmD81G2Ja6cSXR_GQGr7irGGwY2TUsaA4tbOwnS_oVl-SCOjaRBBb7gBAOG9Z_D2-VrUhbjSbtGz2uvmTKXFvDLwhRYcRs4h08kxXp2JarDZREN-dsI2beE_wDj_llSlC3m7Ro2QjVkvnS5SYWdwnX46j6GXufVSaUvSEofEPn0lz9WGyFZ6Mc3LP20NdIGc1IKRCLzPkq9MLf4MVON0pDghUwoC4HP9Fn42MnnQraDTCU4DNO4zdJckXIkl8eGtZMBmRBM9_slTgoxStJcm4l_ZOEK7pIMUc0Bcr/4k1/YmwsHREMRyGrVvsCDrL3dA/h0/h001.mU3O1Xh0tdLCQcJYU-BVDhkkOcZj658yXKLCu_tjJFs)
---
---
---
Greetings Derek,

After the Young Democrats of America convention in Philadelphia in August, we committed to keeping everyone updated on our activities and how to get involved. Our DNC members have hit the ground running and we’re excited to share that young got it done at the meeting in Minneapolis! Check out our update below.

Young Democrats of America President, Fatima Heyward (NJ), delivered her first update on behalf of YDA at the DNC Youth Council meeting. She provided information on how to get involved at the national level, shared developing partnerships and electoral priorities, and highlighted recent actions and upcoming events. These events included the YDA Disability Caucus Advocacy Day in early September and the YDA Black Caucus Black Linkup, which will be held during the Congressional Black Caucus Conference.

DNC Representative Stephanie Campanha Wheaton (NJ/NY) was re-elected as Vice-Chair of the Youth Council, elected as Secretary of the Eastern Region, and participated in her first meeting as a member of the Rules & Bylaws Committee. She proudly voted to give the High School Democrats of America a seat on the DNC’s Executive Committee on the 20th Anniversary of their creation. Stephanie also spent some time at the State Fair in some YDA merch and you can get your very own [here](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtR7-gNdO-qCxI7nHafYAE2VK2SRJjVgYZgcUiTzK9ySDRFsZtkV7N0NAiNysuSLikETVlr8mL8Jaa5cPmd23DM1RuY5YtrVVL-MQM4yLcFfPp-fGhBNLuXsrXbwqRpn62QYqPR61t6te7xU-iybzCV0d6ZxNO36Tf9bksnqbrMN8Cgh19XFXMm8vdvovJURXvCqYG7qoUGAOsCeIsuN22KQe9v_4sqagHopGDAcL5hGKgzljM3kvLPmkRpxHI7M--A/4k1/YmwsHREMRyGrVvsCDrL3dA/h1/h001.mlAWRCpn8kKA75n0owyr62PjaGEeMhl6HC2JjjDxb8Y)!

DNC Representative Stephon Moore (KY) organized a Meet & Greet for YDA and the DNC Youth Council. This event provided an opportunity for young members of the DNC to meet the new YDA representatives, as well as all the YDA members who were present. He also stood in solidarity with the DNC Labor Caucus, Chairman Ken Martin, and American Federal Government Employees (AFGE) at a press conference advocating for labor rights.

Our representatives were joined by a number of Young Dems who not only attended the meeting, but were elected to serve in leadership positions for the Caucuses and Councils! Former Muslim Caucus Chair Reem Subei (NC) was elected as Co-Chair of the Interfaith Caucus, Environmental Caucus Chair Paul Presendieu (NY) was elected as Director of Youth Engagement of the Climate Council (shout out to great friend of YDA, Chair Michelle Deatrick (MI) to her re-election as Chair), Matt Hughes (NC) was elected Vice Chairperson for Civic Engagement and Voter Empowerment, Katherine Jeanes (NC) was elected Corresponding Secretary, and Manny Crespin (NM) was elected Recording Secretary of the LGBTQ Caucus, Ron Harris (MN) was elected Chair of the Midwestern Region, Oscar Mata (UT) was elected Vice-Chair of the Western Region, Kerrigan Sanders (TX) is now the 2nd Vice Chair of the Rural Council, and Coby Owens (DE) was elected a Regional Director of the Black Caucus.

Our leaders and members got to speak with Chairman Ken Martin about the importance of YDA and how we can ensure that more young people are involved at every level. We’re so proud to count him as a friend, ally, and alum of the Young Democrats of America and look forward to working with him for the rest of this term.

We're looking forward to seeing more Young Dems at upcoming meetings. The next DNC meeting is from December 11 to 13 in Los Angeles, CA. If you plan to attend, please complete this [short form](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hWwGamPY7W-vS4bGbFoLcGE_goybYzUFubWM_2Su_UtRTDNToFRHiAKKqpeO94RvbKkDQU7t2ga5W3qMlTpzoVJ6e98ko11dOmdKSfDJfU1l4LFLjKznYdLF5Obrz4X2GiUhtup_nJZ1PsLhmluapjlefl1blc13-uqAG8khIz6_d0_M0cLeepYmBagbMyIRtONZGf8UC9_C0pBctQnI0N33Tvwf7Ovrm5im5RwSzFHAKS5m4OmCrbQfbXX_pC023e5zBn4RLtHfRQuUFOQ0fFefPYcFT6s4OwSetCQx2XDQlmy5wUtd88rGSQwDKmtoAspn88MzkQub6DQ8mAAbHDrGxBGwpc46FLU5JFBIps3It/4k1/YmwsHREMRyGrVvsCDrL3dA/h2/h001.DMTORWMSY9FAU1e9g1Dcc0RkOXF3lZRxU4KD2oYvzYQ).

In solidarity,
Fatima Heyward, President
Stephanie Campanha Wheaton, DNC Representative
Stephon Moore, DNC Representative

| **_**The Young Democrats of America (YDA) is the official youth wing of the Democratic Party of the United States and the oldest partisan youth organization in the country. clean_body: Check out our update from the DNC summer meeting! | | | | | | Greetings Derek, After the Young Democrats of America convention in Philadelphia in August, we committed to keeping everyone updated on our activities and how to get involved. Our DNC members have hit the ground running and we’re excited to share that young got it done at the meeting in Minneapolis! Check out our update below. Young Democrats of America President, Fatima Heyward (NJ), delivered her first update on behalf of YDA at the DNC Youth Council meeting. She provided information on how to get involved at the national level, shared developing partnerships and electoral priorities, and highlighted recent actions and upcoming events. These events included the YDA Disability Caucus Advocacy Day in early September and the YDA Black Caucus Black Linkup, which will be held during the Congressional Black Caucus Conference. DNC Representative Stephanie Campanha Wheaton (NJ/NY) was re-elected as Vice-Chair of the Youth Council, elected as Secretary of the Eastern Region, and participated in her first meeting as a member of the Rules & Bylaws Committee. She proudly voted to give the High School Democrats of America a seat on the DNC’s Executive Committee on the 20th Anniversary of their creation. Stephanie also spent some time at the State Fair in some YDA merch and you can get your very own ! DNC Representative Stephon Moore (KY) organized a Meet & Greet for YDA and the DNC Youth Council. This event provided an opportunity for young members of the DNC to meet the new YDA representatives, as well as all the YDA members who were present. He also stood in solidarity with the DNC Labor Caucus, Chairman Ken Martin, and American Federal Government Employees (AFGE) at a press conference advocating for labor rights. Our representatives were joined by a number of Young Dems who not only attended the meeting, but were elected to serve in leadership positions for the Caucuses and Councils! Former Muslim Caucus Chair Reem Subei (NC) was elected as Co-Chair of the Interfaith Caucus, Environmental Caucus Chair Paul Presendieu (NY) was elected as Director of Youth Engagement of the Climate Council (shout out to great friend of YDA, Chair Michelle Deatrick (MI) to her re-election as Chair), Matt Hughes (NC) was elected Vice Chairperson for Civic Engagement and Voter Empowerment, Katherine Jeanes (NC) was elected Corresponding Secretary, and Manny Crespin (NM) was elected Recording Secretary of the LGBTQ Caucus, Ron Harris (MN) was elected Chair of the Midwestern Region, Oscar Mata (UT) was elected Vice-Chair of the Western Region, Kerrigan Sanders (TX) is now the 2nd Vice Chair of the Rural Council, and Coby Owens (DE) was elected a Regional Director of the Black Caucus. Our leaders and members got to speak with Chairman Ken Martin about the importance of YDA and how we can ensure that more young people are involved at every level. We’re so proud to count him as a friend, ally, and alum of the Young Democrats of America and look forward to working with him for the rest of this term. We're looking forward to seeing more Young Dems at upcoming meetings. The next DNC meeting is from December 11 to 13 in Los Angeles, CA. If you plan to attend, please complete this . In solidarity, Fatima Heyward, President Stephanie Campanha Wheaton, DNC Representative Stephon Moore, DNC Representative | The Young Democrats of America (YDA) is the official youth wing of the Democratic Party of the United States and the oldest partisan youth organization in the country. To help us mobilize the next generation of Democrats, | | | | | ---|---|--- | | Sent via .
