name: Michael Bennet
subject: I believe our children are our future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
We owe our kids solutions for the future – and that's why I'm in this race.
| | |
---
Friend,
If we have a responsibility to build opportunity for each other and the next generation, then it's of national importance that reading scores are at a 30-year low.
It's of national importance that our kids and teens are facing a mental health epidemic in the age of social media.
And it's of national importance that the next generation doesn't feel like the old systems in place – across K-12, higher education and workforce development – are preparing them to succeed in today's economy.
**That's got to change – and I'm running for governor because it's clear we can't count on Washington to do it for us. It has to start here, with us.**
**[If you agree, please chip in $5 or more toward my campaign's $100,000 end-of-quarter goal to help me prove we have the grassroots momentum to make that happen.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115532967/570631575/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk923-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTM0YTI2MS03Mjk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oKCIN6sxLJE3BpCFY4GFTCmKYXY-OZK6QUvEXGC1YZ0=)** And then let me explain:
When I became Superintendent of Denver Public Schools in 2005, I made a commitment to fostering success by raising expectations for our students, creating professional growth opportunities for educators, promoting parent and community engagement and partnering with philanthropists to put college within reach for more grads. A decade after our policies were implemented, graduation rates had increased significantly.
But I'm not running to copy-and-paste what worked 20 years ago. **We owe our kids solutions for the future – and that's why I'm in this race.**
I'm running to build educational opportunities that empower every child to get ahead, no matter where they live or how much their parents make.
I'm running to put the whole state to work to improve kids’ mental health and make mental health care affordable and accessible for all.
I'm running to help all our kids graduate high school with the skills to earn a living wage and enter the middle class – whether or not they go to college.
I'm running to partner with businesses and education leaders in our state to train tomorrow's workers with the skills they need to fill critical, high-paying jobs in IT, health care, biotechnology, aerospace, manufacturing and finance.
Because right now, our state has a golden opportunity to set an example for policymakers in Washington – **and I'm running because I believe Colorado can lead the nation by creating a 21st-century education system that provides opportunity for all.**
But friend, I need your help to make that a reality.
**_[As our next governor, I know we can make Colorado the best place in America to live, raise a family and educate a kid. If you do too, please consider donating $5, or anything you can give today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115532970/570631577/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk923-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTM0YTI2MS03Mjk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oKCIN6sxLJE3BpCFY4GFTCmKYXY-OZK6QUvEXGC1YZ0=)_**
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115532972/570631581/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk923-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTM0YTI2MS03Mjk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oKCIN6sxLJE3BpCFY4GFTCmKYXY-OZK6QUvEXGC1YZ0=)

George and Congressional Democrats are fighting tooth and nail against the dangerous efforts of the Trump administration, and he needs you by his side.
Republicans in Washington are creating chaos: cutting healthcare, slashing education, threatening veterans’ benefits, and attacking our most basic rights.
Trump is only focused on himself. He’s not delivering results, he’s not solving problems, he’s rigging the rules, fueling division, and doubling down on policies that make life harder and more expensive for the middle class — **we can’t let this chaos go unchecked.**

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: Defending reproductive freedom

body:
Earlier this week, a court sided with the Trump Administration to rip funding away from Planned Parenthood.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115534889/570638410/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2Q2ODFjZC03Mzk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TJK0pX1VhgLSxrY6Kek0x0d7dlUJUIAYh2S62k9EjTQ=&emci=9ceb518f-6095-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=57d681cd-7395-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=7731215)

| | Earlier this week, a court sided with the Trump Administration to rip funding away from Planned Parenthood. Here's what that means in real terms: it will be harder for women to get the care they need — from annual check-ups to cancer screenings to reproductive health services. For many communities, Planned Parenthood is the only provider they can turn to. **This decision threatens to put basic health care out of reach.** Planned Parenthood isn't just about reproductive care. It's about the mom who needs prenatal check-ups, the young person who needs accurate health information, and the cancer survivor who needs regular screenings to stay healthy. Cutting off this funding is cruel. **HELL NO. I'm fighting back.** Every American deserves access to affordable, high-quality health care, no matter where they live or how much money they have. And reproductive health care is health care. I'll keep pushing in the Senate to expand access to care and defend reproductive freedom against every attack. clean_body: Earlier this week, a court sided with the Trump Administration to rip funding away from Planned Parenthood. | | | | Earlier this week, a court sided with the Trump Administration to rip funding away from Planned Parenthood. Here's what that means in real terms: it will be harder for women to get the care they need — from annual check-ups to cancer screenings to reproductive health services. For many communities, Planned Parenthood is the only provider they can turn to. This decision threatens to put basic health care out of reach. Planned Parenthood isn't just about reproductive care. It's about the mom who needs prenatal check-ups, the young person who needs accurate health information, and the cancer survivor who needs regular screenings to stay healthy. Cutting off this funding is cruel. HELL NO. I'm fighting back. Every American deserves access to affordable, high-quality health care, no matter where they live or how much money they have. And reproductive health care is health care. I'll keep pushing in the Senate to expand access to care and defend reproductive freedom against every attack. Onward, Jeff | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Jeff Merkley instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon. | This email was sent by Jeff Merkley for Oregon PO Box 14172 Portland, OR 97293 United States Email is an important way for Jeff Merkley to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. name: Tucker Carlson
subject: Charlie gave it all. We owe him this.
body:
[unsubscribe](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xul=o5pvyewrzrxe8xiau9slbgewvoijc5tldcri2abb6d06h8j1vqcdteio8xf28dml300mma90tgd1t1z5wy7s2swf306ehbe9s7qofbo&__stmp=t2ufzd&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.
* * *
Right now, Charlie would say, "Don't you dare quit" | | | | [](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2ufzd&__onlt=h)
---
Friend,
---
I don't write emails like this often. But right now? After what happened to Charlie... _I can't stay quiet._ **Charlie Kirk was my friend.** Not just someone I admired, but someone I loved and respected deeply. Losing him was devastating.
---
[](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2ufzd&__onlt=h)
---
In many ways, all of us share in this loss. Charlie fought every day of his life for each one of us... fighting to keep America as great, free, and prosperous. No one I know ever fought for that harder than Charlie. America won't ever be the same. **No one can ever replace him — but we can make sure his legacy continues on.** _We owe him that._ Because if you knew Charlie, you would know exactly what he would say to us right now: _**"Don't you dare quit."**_ Charlie poured his heart into building a movement to save America. He believed in young people. He believed in ordinary Americans. And he believed that even in our darkest hours, America was the beacon of goodness, freedom, and truth. That's what the Turning Point movement was all about — and Charlie gave everything he had to that fight. **And our task now is not only to protect what he built — it's to grow it bigger, stronger, and bolder than anyone ever thought possible.** More students. More churches. More families. More courage from everyday Americans to stand up and fight for what is right. Turning Point USA was Charlie's vehicle to save America. **He didn't just start a movement... _he started a revival._** And now, Friend, we must carry that forward. If you share the same sense of responsibility that I do to honor Charlie's work and press on with his vision... **_Then please join me in keeping his fight alive by making a gift to Turning Point USA today._** **[Let's make Turning Point USA the biggest thing that this nation has ever seen... bigger than Charlie ever thought possible. That's how we honor him best.](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2ufzd&__onlt=h)**
---
[ **Give in Charlie's Honor**
**Support Turning Point USA**](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2ufzd&__onlt=h)
---
Rest in peace, Charlie. We'll carry the torch you lit from here.
---
**For Charlie,** Tucker Carlson
---
[](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2ufzd&__onlt=h)
---

**Support Turning Point USA**](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2ufzd&__onlt=h)

Phoenix, Arizona 85044

body:
I know it can feel exhausting to watch the news right now. Every day, it seems like there’s another attack on our freedoms, our health care, or our democracy itself.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115535278/570639544/32658279?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-09-19_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWRhMzkzMy03NDk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_xP0qr4_6F6lDE4r-jswmfKiyOIjIdmaxXRw4dz7Irs=)

| Hi there,

I know it can feel exhausting to watch the news right now. Every day, it seems like there’s another attack on our freedoms, our health care, or our democracy itself.

What always grounds me is supporters like you. Time and again, when things feel overwhelming, we come together, we organize, and we prove that hope is stronger than fear.
---
| [GIVE NOW ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115535279/570639545/32658279?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-09-19_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWRhMzkzMy03NDk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_xP0qr4_6F6lDE4r-jswmfKiyOIjIdmaxXRw4dz7Irs=)

Michigan is at the heart of this fight. With five competitive House seats (including mine), our state has the power to flip the House and put an end to the extremism emanating from Washington.

Republicans like the DeVos family are ready to spend big to stop our momentum. But I know we have something stronger: a grassroots movement built on people who believe in each other and in the future we’re fighting for.

[_**So even if you’re tired, I hope you’ll take a moment to stand with me today. Together, we can show what’s possible.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115535280/570639546/32658279?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-09-19_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWRhMzkzMy03NDk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_xP0qr4_6F6lDE4r-jswmfKiyOIjIdmaxXRw4dz7Irs=)

– Hillary

body:

| | | Breaking news, Friend:
Apple just enabled Starlink satellite support to T-Mobile iPhones.
One of the biggest potential winners from global satellite coverage?
**[Mode Mobile.](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)**
[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
Just about everything Elon touches turns to gold:
* SpaceX now worth $350B+
* Tesla up by over 25,000% since IPO
* And now - iPhone’s get satellite access

But while Wall Street focuses on Apple, Mode Mobile is quietly positioned to capitalize on this global satellite revolution.
Their EarnPhone technology already:
* Reaches 50M+ users worldwide
* Helped those users save and earn $325+ million
* Grew revenue 32,481%

And that was before global satellite coverage.
With SpaceX eliminating "dead zones" worldwide, Mode's earning technology can reach 3B+ unbanked people globally in rural populations worldwide.
We’re talking about emerging markets with no infrastructure.
And right now, you can still **[invest in Mode, but only limited space remains in the current round.](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)**
They’ve secured their Nasdaq ticker $MODE, and their pre-IPO offering is live now. But their previous round at **$0.30/share** sold out fast, with over 55,000 investors.
**The time to invest is now,** before any potential IPO.
**[See how to get in before Mode’s potential public debut.](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)**
* * *

_*Mode Mobile recently received their ticker reservation with Nasdaq ($MODE), indicating an intent to IPO in the next 24 months. An intent to IPO is no guarantee that an actual IPO will occur._

_*Tesla return calculated based on Yahoo Finance adjusted stock price data from June 29, 2010 to January 31, 2025._
_In making an investment decision, investors must rely on their own examination of the issuer and the terms of the offering, including the merits and risks involved. name: Erika Kirk
subject: My husband’s voice will ring out louder and clearer than ever.
body:
We will never surrender. Ever.

| | | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Patriot, I want to thank you for loving my husband. For standing with us in the worst days of our lives. For praying. For mourning. For remembering. But now, _I need you to listen closely..._ **Because the evildoers who took Charlie’s life? They have NO idea what they have done.** They didn’t just try to silence a man...
They tried to silence his message — a message of patriotism, of faith, and of God’s merciful love. Instead, they ignited something even greater. **If they thought my husband’s mission was powerful before...****_They have NO idea what they have just UNLEASHED._** **Not just across this country...**_**_But in me_**** _._**_ They have no idea the fire they’ve lit inside this wife. And to those listening across America... Let me be clear: The movement my husband built will not die.
**_I refuse to let that happen._** And I know all of us will refuse to let that happen, too. Charlie’s mission will grow: Stronger. Bolder. Louder. Greater than ever. I shared these words publicly, from my heart — just two days after I lost the love of my life.
[**I want you to watch. I want you to hear what Charlie meant to me. And I want you to hear what comes next:**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Charlie gave everything for this country. And I will never stop speaking his name. We will not let the light he lit go out. Not now. Not ever. For Charlie,
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Erika Kirk On behalf of the Turning Point USA Family
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
**P.S.** Charlie always said: _“Never surrender.”_ He built something bigger than himself — and now we must carry it forward. If you believe in what he stood for... if you refuse to let Charlie’s vision die...
---
[ **Give in Charlie’s Honor**
**Support Turning Point USA** ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: Action needed from your zip code
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC
body:
After we paused because of last week’s tragedy.
| **__A Personal Note from Rep. Elise Stefanik__**
---
Peter,
---
After last week’s tragedy, we immediately paused all of our fundraising out of respect for Charlie Kirk.
---
_There was simply no way we could continue like normal after something so horrible._
---
**But while we paused all our efforts, the Democrats kept on raising _MILLIONS OF DOLLARS_ from their Far Left donors – and now, they’re poised to gain the upper hand over us. **
---
_I just checked the numbers, and as it currently stands, we’re still pacing $43,590 behind our goal to DEFEND President Trump's House Majority and SAVE New York ahead of tonight’s mid-month fundraising deadline._
---
To be perfectly clear: I have no regrets about pausing our fundraising. Some things are simply more important than politics as usual.
---
**However, it’s left me with no choice but to turn to grassroots conservatives like _YOU_ for help getting back on track before the clock strikes midnight. **
---
If there’s any group of grassroots Americans who can do that, it’s my supporters. _You’ve always come through for me when I needed it most, Peter._
---
And right now, I truly need your help more than ever before.
---
I don’t mean to sound dramatic, but the very future of our state – _and our country_ – likely depends on it.
---
[**So please, if you can, please make a 500% IMPACT contribution before the mid-month deadline at 11:59 P.M. TONIGHT to help us get back on track after we paused our fundraising.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d3e487268288407d9315cf04d2e2f842&_e=TgUOFPoJ_VTsAhEyXZ-1SjYboEAssRwcTjji_k9l8SvFhL7a_YEJJ9TnewPMA66R6KIBd8xkG5QBHQLmTUSmA7iSehctf6wwTB4-jVHXo980O5hC4GiYjWd_CO7EtBxA0MgWbwn33A2_BNkY3kxDiBoy-d8gZLcNuAOIOc76F_Z1ojn5RTO3ZhTtQZw9_meN_hG-lXeKTikC5q0pYPTRPp-oDZJ37M0zK8mCaa-PM9VanuLHRT2GozIQdSVnGwQXgimd3Jq3LtRAzVPtgGXlIdklskNxmAtzADMfmKsFjkZjffbCTpDCw_o8RhPtbiSBcPzth2E6J9hl4XKTQ7wzUXI2EV3muCHVsVNpLtc9K36J7sM2nUlvA-AFBjPX2cHVcSlXgNo8Tq1pjLlgf73PnsubV5Ffxj6PtFB2Sd8_0YlGGa5fQrX2zNB09HJclZI_-1acrV1RNtNUKBE87PaoCBhI2mdcyHx41siG6RfsAmRTcfzUn3Grd4SqjriWOXxtQiCsIth8tyBFQPfbjO2Sw11ZmUyXG5NM362fJUUixxZ6YRIcZ9E_qD0IZrFw2zKEPPTn2znv2pETmopX7OhUN_dlsV111KNY7L3QbDf5LEA%3D)

clean_body: After we paused because of last week’s tragedy. | A Personal Note from Rep. Elise Stefanik Peter, After last week’s tragedy, we immediately paused all of our fundraising out of respect for Charlie Kirk. There was simply no way we could continue like normal after something so horrible. But while we paused all our efforts, the Democrats kept on raising MILLIONS OF DOLLARS from their Far Left donors – and now, they’re poised to gain the upper hand over us. I just checked the numbers, and as it currently stands, we’re still pacing $43,590 behind our goal to DEFEND President Trump's House Majority and SAVE New York ahead of tonight’s mid-month fundraising deadline. To be perfectly clear: I have no regrets about pausing our fundraising. Some things are simply more important than politics as usual. However, it’s left me with no choice but to turn to grassroots conservatives like YOU for help getting back on track before the clock strikes midnight. If there’s any group of grassroots Americans who can do that, it’s my supporters. You’ve always come through for me when I needed it most, Peter. And right now, I truly need your help more than ever before. I don’t mean to sound dramatic, but the very future of our state – and our country – likely depends on it. Thank you, []() Rep. Elise Stefanik Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC. www.elisestefanik.com PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801

Don't Miss Your Chance to be Trained by the Best!

### BIG NEWS: RNC Election Integrity Training Next Week!
---
---
| Massachusetts Republicans are taking election integrity to the next level!
We're thrilled to announce that the Republican National Committee will be hosting a special Election Integrity Blueprint training for ALL grassroots Republicans and EI activists. Don't miss it!
This special virtual meeting takes place on Tuesday, September 23rd beginning at 6pm. Click the button below to join the Zoom meeting (be sure to download Zoom on your computer or phone ahead of time).
---
---
| | [JOIN RNC ELECTION INTEGRITY BLUEPRINT ZOOM TRAINING](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KxSBsRP7_G1UTQYOB6yxySYFchaWvoIqO_OrbfLhzchmCUMQpP-b7swDppXwhcjctgRjuyZQICZu-HBtA9zZbGBPIZsYdiV3Owqf7dGz7-ZrAX7jtVc-r-etnDH0Bkyy3d5KRgwh0Zht4fU75nIzEPvaMfe1j2pQFQfzE8ZMGpg9rTr0e3DPiXPLot0JpENJiv-PVtQYlFCrOe2rtPrMNhLRew1wi7Tg&c=hNLAaXccezX-w6kFML4z4EvzPsAMxqun1Hw2FlquOot7SnZEKz9EAA==&ch=8c--EuGEJiQHt-b19kKv5zr7pC2hOC9LIMirZWxFZ6-rxWBVBX3mwQ==)
---
| |
---
| This special virtual event wouldn't be possible without the tireless work of Election Integrity Chair Julie Hall, Vice Chair Kathy Lynch, National Committeewoman Janet Fogarty, National Committeeman Brad Wyatt, and our partners at the RNC.
This training is geared toward the grassroots, teaching you the fundamentals on:
✅ Providing crucial resources on election laws and best practices ✅ Equiping volunteers with the knowledge to safeguard our elections ✅ Reporting concerns directly, ensuring transparency and accountability
RNC Committeewoman Fogarty and Committeeman Wyatt stated, "The Republican National Committee is committed to competing in all 50 states, and that includes Massachusetts as part of the Blue State Project, where careful monitoring of our elections for fraud and abuse can be the difference between winning and losing. Republican lawmakers and candidates can win with a robust army of grassroots activists behind them. We are thrilled to offer you this special opportunity to learn from the RNC's best and brightest election integrity specialists."
Much more is available at our Election Integrity page, which is regularly updated with new information.
🔎 Check it out now: [MassGOP.com/Election-Integrity](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KxSBsRP7_G1UTQYOB6yxySYFchaWvoIqO_OrbfLhzchmCUMQpP-b7qw-_WuL-Zhj8wSA2ceXPoe8n-wEiypliJlzhmBz2I-XyJ2oJ07QZ5wH26WC6IBePOU8Pg_kkxhRQ1fcMwQia2p3dWbu3D7b_s_XgOyYAZHTkR3mF_6QoVsn9MC9xum-3A==&c=hNLAaXccezX-w6kFML4z4EvzPsAMxqun1Hw2FlquOot7SnZEKz9EAA==&ch=8c--EuGEJiQHt-b19kKv5zr7pC2hOC9LIMirZWxFZ6-rxWBVBX3mwQ==)
The MassGOP Election Integrity & Research Committee (EIRC) is committed to ensuring free, fair, and secure elections for all Massachusetts voters. Join us in strengthening our democracy--because every legal vote must count!
Visit the site today and help us protect the future of our elections!
[🔗 Click Here to Explore](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KxSBsRP7_G1UTQYOB6yxySYFchaWvoIqO_OrbfLhzchmCUMQpP-b7qw-_WuL-Zhj8wSA2ceXPoe8n-wEiypliJlzhmBz2I-XyJ2oJ07QZ5wH26WC6IBePOU8Pg_kkxhRQ1fcMwQia2p3dWbu3D7b_s_XgOyYAZHTseNdRLyem3nS32M4F17wig==&c=hNLAaXccezX-w6kFML4z4EvzPsAMxqun1Hw2FlquOot7SnZEKz9EAA==&ch=8c--EuGEJiQHt-b19kKv5zr7pC2hOC9LIMirZWxFZ6-rxWBVBX3mwQ==)

clean_body: This is why we need your help. | Here’s what you already know, Peter: → North Carolina’s 2026 U.S. Senate race could be the KEY to deciding the Senate majority → National Republicans are coalescing around Donald Trump’s handpicked candidate, D.C. lobbyist Michael Whatley → Trump has personally gone after Roy Cooper because Roy is seen as the top threat to the GOP’s Senate majority → Polling shows a tight race that could swing either way = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = = Thanks for being with us, Team Cooper Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here. National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us. Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party. Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy. = = = mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Contributions or gifts to Cooper for North Carolina are not tax deductible. name: Adam Schwarze
subject: We’re all Charlie Kirk right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
As a former Navy SEAL, this isn’t the first battlefield death that I’ve seen - but it may be the most poignant | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2af583180cd84f5da27cae8603e6bb40&_e=6cl9umW8bg9QTcBUiScNPAZyF74zZl4a29Wnz1D4C7Ja4AWKPxSrbGKkWIPxKbHVOhLjXGj9L29BeeYJbAIQc_SX8hlGVa4MO8nXjn-tgfCcX4niQgMyRWU6CIp9LESJI7G1YgdSdA-8VB_Fxb7v7JJRMG2COY-NCJ3b7Pa_hKdiWho9wCG2LlbMVueeOojge0lfJIXJf1b6HBBpC8TGACF4ze-mK9VuehMoFV4pZrKXn8khRM-tNd1J9WEeOl_lDSuLvQEX1XmYrcWXXsOgDb3YAsiO3R4iZCT3uytY9VU8uNzWxok9xg7-WSwcwrXQVwZlswsQ7PqQ6EqF-Njeea-PTFNeB2PuB21dSa5oUHYn0leCEYbrVb-LC0KSo-LcXySxJRsfCF7uCUwB5NZxmD2X_rbHpgngowRvMG_3J9EZ3bkQzeFB6R7MYAVy4GzW3GR9-9V7nPYsGWy26Vzkc3lsnSZY87-ZSZD7ELv_gkwS5SVugh9pXjR62j5wgx2X-spW9eih9Zsypgdtkx8LMkEQL-eUGAWioJ__9itT1LZOi5W6EdWjArOFsc-C5K5TsF7EpZlt2qd2K2OXf5tnz8_cWeoiZWH06-3Gos8PmOAH1xXiuKHp2GkHdBAIz42-D79hQB0IFZ379re1rJCK84IKYeaPf0iazo4Sl7IjeqcnkLxwyBmmYISpGLJ9GvT_9FvD8g7OL2bW3PgaZkA_3VLGzj8Oo4Xw9SD3w-cuPhPuzkiJkUgB_3DC51arwS7R5bgkvqlJrKhrvsUKzoGHVwTY8lVDR7W5zU0wbwtLYno%3D)

---

Peter,

The nation mourns the tragic assassination of Charlie Kirk, gunned down on September 10, 2025, at Utah Valley University for daring to speak truth to power. His fearless voice—championing freedom, faith, and the American Dream—was silenced in a brazen act of political violence that has shaken us all to our core. Charlie fought hate with educated debate, not guns, using sharp wit and unyielding principle to challenge radical agendas. **Yet, he was punished with a bullet for his courage to speak.**

My name is Adam Schwarze. **I’m a former Navy SEAL running for the United States Senate in Minnesota, and Charlie Kirk is an inspiration to me.** Over the course of my career, I’ve met some very special men and women willing to put their lives on the line for God and country in some of the most inhospitable places imaginable.

**_I never had the pleasure of meeting Charlier Kirk, but as a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran, I can say with authority that he has to be one of the bravest individuals ever to champion the values of the United States of America._**

Charlie’s candor, professionalism, and respect for everyone he encountered will stick with me as I work to earn the support of every Minnesotan voter during this campaign. **Charlie’s life should serve as an example to my opponents on the other side of the aisle on how to treat political opponents and people who share different viewpoints, with respect.**

I joined the Marine Corps after 9/11, served in over 70 countries, and fought chaos and extremism. I know what it takes to serve something bigger than yourself—just like Charlie did with every debate, every speech, every stand he took. This Senate race is my most challenging mission yet. Minnesota hasn’t gone red since 1976. I’m the underdog. _**[But with your support, we can honor Charlie’s legacy by stopping the radicals who enabled this tragedy](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2af583180cd84f5da27cae8603e6bb40&_e=6cl9umW8bg9QTcBUiScNPAZyF74zZl4a29Wnz1D4C7Ja4AWKPxSrbGKkWIPxKbHVOhLjXGj9L29BeeYJbAIQc_SX8hlGVa4MO8nXjn-tgfCcX4niQgMyRWU6CIp9LESJI7G1YgdSdA-8VB_Fxb7v7JJRMG2COY-NCJ3b7Pa_hKdiWho9wCG2LlbMVueeOojge0lfJIXJf1b6HBBpC8TGACF4ze-mK9VuehMoFV4pZrKXn8khRM-tNd1J9WEeOl_lDSuLvQEX1XmYrcWXXsOgDb3YAsiO3R4iZCT3uytY9VVIyBkMAEFXmayfq7oxmMXfJ6vlo1vdusLMK4XD0UZ6ifX_hyFPGpe2a6ZcCAz_hiLUlVsRLkAhj6iGAk6eNJ3O0odY5OIhcxFUPnUCiuaaptPuc94tNoqOfuX46R-V3_5UMzUQVvgYc31lwEqQRzKR1iey4ILD0Eq-9udpftY7H8QsRnIeDnsyrxT444JMKQnCs59C_yYdtRdWGM0vMhH352gtilG3d4GeTumeXVb7_VJHMZZaaskk4HTa6Qk47TuKXah6Ok-Cmsuz2PvqUgPEyzMgxNe6wnRdWZG6EDoV0HWgaFfmixi6l_zLgZksTq6bBtCpjSD3O11BXFoGeWDUCifOlC9_QOYLSfo_2sR0ee162ds2cslNv1MfrjPlpjbR2b73XMourFWgyHen9H0CXQOOdc2Os6CTrAMDGeNZOW8rNd2qRbhlkhHAFU3JJlDpxY_ABpLKlkWpzFD_TqvhTNp6z3gwYy62XDdLHv9hypSdF_wN5dSBIsfzHusFX0I%3D)**_.

_[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2af583180cd84f5da27cae8603e6bb40&_e=6cl9umW8bg9QTcBUiScNPAZyF74zZl4a29Wnz1D4C7Ja4AWKPxSrbGKkWIPxKbHVOhLjXGj9L29BeeYJbAIQc_SX8hlGVa4MO8nXjn-tgfCcX4niQgMyRWU6CIp9LESJI7G1YgdSdA-8VB_Fxb7v7JJRMG2COY-NCJ3b7Pa_hKdiWho9wCG2LlbMVueeOojge0lfJIXJf1b6HBBpC8TGACF4ze-mK9VuehMoFV4pZrKXn8khRM-tNd1J9WEeOl_lDSuLvQEX1XmYrcWXXsOgDb3YAsiO3R4iZCT3uytY9VXSVU_FNVuwAp7JnYD1QdmFn8NhnkrCQ9qDsJcPeBWXLJ5D48-pMgz2qnkopIz54vitk7C2kzO6YseacLFw4UxqqAlvVJgM55IRXAvtRPZnUrHqBx4irLX9qlIt80wj8u2EMzcpfl3sqLBU3vovXKnu4TM9E8FO9_PPbsy1O0Avo5H6O89n8mk9qgiooPTMmrqC7oX6ECbHriU2AaUVbm0fx4Y6tjG6v_pRQRbKQiN3vcI05v_TxQ7KcjBjfkGO2YFxkd_sninX9Ma3WcUkWk-ULWjfgz44D0JKoEtM724uH_ZoHOq4R0ubR59NQxF4YCc3ywq3FGFgKTo5NJPtWGZDIxSiq2xzLqYscQUjgph2Of4ELjTmcpwMhN9D0D92Ve3AHiLN1AQbhP9Rat5qZmcytzkeVtqQyOdcdLPIvit1343GD3T9XZew1mEHhKvwfpckvTsaEBXrhPdW_A23d1QyJoYFuXmXT_1G1Z2y-faMEbSixHByFYaBR13_4LwLshQ%3D)_
[**FIGHT FOR CHARLIE
**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2af583180cd84f5da27cae8603e6bb40&_e=6cl9umW8bg9QTcBUiScNPAZyF74zZl4a29Wnz1D4C7Ja4AWKPxSrbGKkWIPxKbHVOhLjXGj9L29BeeYJbAIQc_SX8hlGVa4MO8nXjn-tgfCcX4niQgMyRWU6CIp9LESJI7G1YgdSdA-8VB_Fxb7v7JJRMG2COY-NCJ3b7Pa_hKdiWho9wCG2LlbMVueeOojge0lfJIXJf1b6HBBpC8TGACF4ze-mK9VuehMoFV4pZrKXn8khRM-tNd1J9WEeOl_lDSuLvQEX1XmYrcWXXsOgDb3YAsiO3R4iZCT3uytY9VXNIm3PhsqSnlyZ_i1z9KDepb7kAo7b2_pFC-0I_G42w4-Yt9mmJuq3WYVjpPoNhHFYC9OB-t5UMtvqDVquZEhCOuhAynNPzasZqOFI-ri-Lkp_TQr-7XgU-FvyjICfpslTR7RUnbY7eH66oVbZKVCkNaAK4DGdS-Vtc9E4s_jZ8Dhbuu5OOoyK83J4gkhJzyqPYGCpZlEz13JifkWm2pxp_hA7rLWfbRzAKNSmlqyYYIvMc7yVASvD74pxfGCgUVNNtPMCme9EOUuwxvhwbgCjkKLORE8Wc-DY_GJpcOtaKpHsu1BQ1qP9EQrnq83CL0M1Yas8TLc8sEetxu6uiFZY4enwYuzozETOIahe7n8THLkplO0ITLFfGGbeZM014xXO3eceS7N9ncGzYRI_bw8YpUwzx7DDyLs6QI2cDXHw8YLNUACuht_tSduJ4bqC-oy6FtfnmdZkmpxZGQUj2daETFiSVuzGI_VxS2zXIvinDMJkB_JBsmk6XaElVsWn9uI%3D)
Unfortunately, I’m running against Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, who, like her boss, shares a long history of inflammatory rhetoric.

Days before Charlie’s untimely death, Tim Walz, speaking in front of constituents at a political rally, lamented that President Trump hadn’t yet died, making his scripted condolences for Charlie’s family ring all the more hollow as he _**failed to disavow the extremists celebrating this tragedy online.**_

_**I thank God that President Trump defeated Kamala Harris last November.**_****

**Can you imagine a vice president with so little moral clarity that he would tolerate the hatred that led to Charlie’s murder?** **
**
I can’t.

Tim Walz and my opponent in this Senate race personify everything Charlie Kirk stood against: **arrogance, deceit, and a progressive agenda that sees conservatives not as opponents, but as enemies to be crushed.** Their party’s years of demonizing voices like Charlie’s set the stage for this violence. Their silence on the specifics of this tragedy speaks louder than their words.

They both push to disarm law-abiding Minnesotans while radicals run rampant. They both pander with land acknowledgments, dividing us further. They both view Republicans as threats to be eliminated, just as Charlie was targeted for his beliefs. **The woman in the photo below is my opponent, by the way.**

_[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2af583180cd84f5da27cae8603e6bb40&_e=6cl9umW8bg9QTcBUiScNPAZyF74zZl4a29Wnz1D4C7Ja4AWKPxSrbGKkWIPxKbHVOhLjXGj9L29BeeYJbAIQc_SX8hlGVa4MO8nXjn-tgfCcX4niQgMyRWU6CIp9LESJI7G1YgdSdA-8VB_Fxb7v7JJRMG2COY-NCJ3b7Pa_hKdiWho9wCG2LlbMVueeOojge0lfJIXJf1b6HBBpC8TGACF4ze-mK9VuehMoFV4pZrKXn8khRM-tNd1J9WEeOl_lDSuLvQEX1XmYrcWXXsOgDb3YAsiO3R4iZCT3uytY9VW_K5yHtEfgxX7xoMsewRLBjlpgu1ExJFfUbWJzG0KIA-_iPD6ktMkPAAsSwjs_Y7ch5aI0Kts_WJNDZXwmoWQnFL5apNrcHmxJ_1CEx3Be8O4m-B46IHEWB4mSb5K3MdObD2SBMv9beULnrhLuAQ87IEYXfQsOFgy7q9fcdGQI2eJZ9Npozv1dJAhlsP89zOOL4s6kgjxkMsSluoPZ26WKp6gO-upXVJVd6eRTYwQmRez9Q_bZahMivniv5CERJxQ8ugeeaykD_lzOBT_paENrY_u4OxqM3XjETYBzddfERyF3PXmDAp9hczhlITKju8DYXnFN6hx3iV4AgMEPJIc0XPygcdrWZpof6kxR-Ddo3UJ3hTebYbIdXHEcFNwvGhACsHalFnxpcJ_SV3JV6LbyF8bJwBEIlHD_YGD13GCo8naCtq2GT-e87nZFK9emXwF4AW9QmlFSXP49o7vJnwCOwGajFEjtLFTU5oXBKGa7N7IVMDH_fvX0nWiXNOZ-SdA%3D)_

**If they get their way, they’ll impose their warped vision on America, silencing patriots like Charlie Kirk forever—patriots who countered lies with reason, not violence.**

This fight isn’t just about Walz or Peggy Flanagan — it’s about the future Charlie Kirk died for. It’s about you, me, and everyone who believes in our nation’s founding values. They think we’re “buffoons.” **They think we’ll stay silent. They think we’ll let Charlie’s murder fade.**

When elected to the United States Senate, I promise I won’t stay silent; I won’t let his memory or work fade into the history books. **[I would be honored if you would consider a small gift of $5 or even $10 right now to help me take my fight to the far-left and ensure that we’re able to complete this mission - for Charlie, for our children, and for the good of the entire nation](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2af583180cd84f5da27cae8603e6bb40&_e=6cl9umW8bg9QTcBUiScNPAZyF74zZl4a29Wnz1D4C7Ja4AWKPxSrbGKkWIPxKbHVOhLjXGj9L29BeeYJbAIQc_SX8hlGVa4MO8nXjn-tgfCcX4niQgMyRWU6CIp9LESJI7G1YgdSdA-8VB_Fxb7v7JJRMG2COY-NCJ3b7Pa_hKdiWho9wCG2LlbMVueeOojge0lfJIXJf1b6HBBpC8TGACF4ze-mK9VuehMoFV4pZrKXn8khRM-tNd1J9WEeOl_lDSuLvQEX1XmYrcWXXsOgDb3YAsiO3R4iZCT3uytY9VU1H6Tur0_8ch0RR048uk5UgMrNSND0Bsu-CKpS7hi-vmdnegxFiszIXmrmTXg8zo3f6p16XgCuOgkKvE6NteD3nrzJis4jedyi_40P1vNcJmYxuEpvG7bGWm0kYV_uaoL26shqkbKj4C2kkVi4cNOSV7ajQaSdVQ713-OOAF8yw6m20z1qgVokV1zNb5uxI3iyRMsQnsau4HdlS7JozYs1ycJZNsUSu2xSPuDvNmD5r2XSwp1cXHxfcNpA2Z2FFf3EI8gBziVbOuyZ_I6V708JI0zjaueI3L76BqXssjlUP28i0jWyWJ1PaMgFU69IxHgrSuwIso97c2oA7uSfL35nieqOw9yFKUMAHDztiKrKzQCRWZSutZj66flG7Xsh9Dn_2Uxc1cR2PDl3ZuHQd9K5Me169eHu-BO6rDQp5lwu2r78HpxaY2g5-PHtCMAQTyvybPu70ck3mzdoRNTfcLxKybf4Gc9Xp5NZ0srMInarRZlA4Rjsg6IH_GkIfwparB0%3D)**.

[**CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT
**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2af583180cd84f5da27cae8603e6bb40&_e=6cl9umW8bg9QTcBUiScNPAZyF74zZl4a29Wnz1D4C7Ja4AWKPxSrbGKkWIPxKbHVOhLjXGj9L29BeeYJbAIQc_SX8hlGVa4MO8nXjn-tgfCcX4niQgMyRWU6CIp9LESJI7G1YgdSdA-8VB_Fxb7v7JJRMG2COY-NCJ3b7Pa_hKdiWho9wCG2LlbMVueeOojge0lfJIXJf1b6HBBpC8TGACF4ze-mK9VuehMoFV4pZrKXn8khRM-tNd1J9WEeOl_lDSuLvQEX1XmYrcWXXsOgDb3YAsiO3R4iZCT3uytY9VWu1bLl-luglp40vgdKWJeQUAR1iZo1KLrBfT-TkS9IlB5Ta0ND-EB29Otqr4YpXvZf72NaiQQsXIWC5m8ma3xNV9yTihBwyWCLicYqoPyVhs6IWMXfOfheCsRtMjOKQi_GP8mzooCxEzC77UCZmmseXQ7qEIk-iGBv3Qmh1jpxC8JHH6f8GBEmMQG-PTKc8FwYASS5mc5ZgVQzLtM10nWIoc2cUEFSxHt0fDTKc6x90z-7Ru3id3CHm7f-OyDXFMdKw6eergI8BbvuK_kj8KoQOEV40cL8uRgG7nv8_O51FUTCogmdRyXBzLFrzmwoNoX_YFdw6CZa0IMYb2ePiOwpBtTm-AmDSAIUatABp9mCncZDojuwUg79lSC77zMdzHtd7YQphbNwor09TCDTD7mpJy4Gfy9wZVC0dqI2o44OiqqdB9O0X_U3jRoyqj3NH5mYwrk0qe1iFBITinwrITAsrBRf86Eq6ULq88SoNHpFZwSjyaF0awvfTqoXvwFlIJM%3D)

Your contribution of $5, $10, or $25 today will fuel our fight to keep Charlie’s vision alive—building a Minnesota and an America where free speech is protected, not punished with bullets.

**You have a choice:** let them sweep this under the rug, or join me to ensure Charlie’s sacrifice galvanizes us to reclaim our values through the same fearless, reasoned debate he embodied.

**I’ve fought tough battles before. With you by my side, we’ll win this one—for Charlie, for America.**

With steadfast resolve,
Adam Schwarze

clean_body: As a former Navy SEAL, this isn’t the first battlefield death that I’ve seen - but it may be the most poignant | Peter, The nation mourns the tragic assassination of Charlie Kirk, gunned down on September 10, 2025, at Utah Valley University for daring to speak truth to power. His fearless voice—championing freedom, faith, and the American Dream—was silenced in a brazen act of political violence that has shaken us all to our core. Charlie fought hate with educated debate, not guns, using sharp wit and unyielding principle to challenge radical agendas. Yet, he was punished with a bullet for his courage to speak. My name is Adam Schwarze. I’m a former Navy SEAL running for the United States Senate in Minnesota, and Charlie Kirk is an inspiration to me. Over the course of my career, I’ve met some very special men and women willing to put their lives on the line for God and country in some of the most inhospitable places imaginable. I never had the pleasure of meeting Charlier Kirk, but as a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran, I can say with authority that he has to be one of the bravest individuals ever to champion the values of the United States of America. Charlie’s candor, professionalism, and respect for everyone he encountered will stick with me as I work to earn the support of every Minnesotan voter during this campaign. Charlie’s life should serve as an example to my opponents on the other side of the aisle on how to treat political opponents and people who share different viewpoints, with respect. I joined the Marine Corps after 9/11, served in over 70 countries, and fought chaos and extremism. I know what it takes to serve something bigger than yourself—just like Charlie did with every debate, every speech, every stand he took. This Senate race is my most challenging mission yet. Minnesota hasn’t gone red since 1976. I’m the underdog. . Unfortunately, I’m running against Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, who, like her boss, shares a long history of inflammatory rhetoric. Days before Charlie’s untimely death, Tim Walz, speaking in front of constituents at a political rally, lamented that President Trump hadn’t yet died, making his scripted condolences for Charlie’s family ring all the more hollow as he failed to disavow the extremists celebrating this tragedy online. I thank God that President Trump defeated Kamala Harris last November.** Can you imagine a vice president with so little moral clarity that he would tolerate the hatred that led to Charlie’s murder? I can’t. Tim Walz and my opponent in this Senate race personify everything Charlie Kirk stood against: arrogance, deceit, and a progressive agenda that sees conservatives not as opponents, but as enemies to be crushed. Their party’s years of demonizing voices like Charlie’s set the stage for this violence. Their silence on the specifics of this tragedy speaks louder than their words. They both push to disarm law-abiding Minnesotans while radicals run rampant. They both pander with land acknowledgments, dividing us further. They both view Republicans as threats to be eliminated, just as Charlie was targeted for his beliefs. The woman in the photo below is my opponent, by the way. If they get their way, they’ll impose their warped vision on America, silencing patriots like Charlie Kirk forever—patriots who countered lies with reason, not violence. This fight isn’t just about Walz or Peggy Flanagan — it’s about the future Charlie Kirk died for. It’s about you, me, and everyone who believes in our nation’s founding values. They think we’re “buffoons.” They think we’ll stay silent. They think we’ll let Charlie’s murder fade. When elected to the United States Senate, I promise I won’t stay silent; I won’t let his memory or work fade into the history books. . Your contribution of $5, $10, or $25 today will fuel our fight to keep Charlie’s vision alive—building a Minnesota and an America where free speech is protected, not punished with bullets. You have a choice: let them sweep this under the rug, or join me to ensure Charlie’s sacrifice galvanizes us to reclaim our values through the same fearless, reasoned debate he embodied. I’ve fought tough battles before. With you by my side, we’ll win this one—for Charlie, for America. With steadfast resolve, Adam Schwarze Retired Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA** | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

the second half of the month at a disadvantage while the Left piles on with
cash from Hollywood and big-city donors.

That can’t happen.

Join me in this campaign.

If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/9_07fM1dnEmqdVR1wv8kcQ2?unsubscribedata=htQtf8rBrz7AIRs3RdLDKnq7tpYKRO0ws5eAxTdlcf9J0ubGl34cLNMY0%2FGYX9etlHcv2te2ruj%2Fs06MX0s%2F4F2t9PMO6ehVPT05WXXQgMZY1gck%2BnWxl3PE31N2Uh0K%2Fm%2FmJZakIU5rakbU09Ahzb%2BAZxAEPlAuc5KcNpbFFFH%2BN21neA8xoEiRRthAGRbEaYAMOrFU7PAYrXSDlHmYeFsTpJRtiM5mNGOTcwWRUG3FOFUoJELX0G4YBZaFuwFtgSu%2BQN0UnOczugKx6O%2BnE1sz0ZHEUpsgFXCTsEwxL7muxB0HD%2B8YacIiUZJ%2F0rwEvXMX9rNZSQsytRkxnMhY9IXDghMPjGPryW2mAz3RhzH6Qq0xCYhfa0T3AqgQ9gDrtCoho%2BP%2F0dcGd5Zpw1zsi8oY%2Bz0g87O6wOsPp0UvIn8%3D)

|
Peter — North Carolina is a swing state, and we can be sure that Republicans will go all out to defeat us. But I know how to win North Carolina. _Whether it was Attorney General or Governor, I’ve done it over and over in the most competitive years._ It takes the dedication to connect with folks in every community and the commitment to stand for the rights that people hold dear. **I served as Governor for eight years. I know that North Carolinians don’t want to go backward. And based on the enthusiasm we’re seeing for our campaign from people across our country, that sentiment is true for Americans everywhere.** As a U.S. Senator, I will protect our rights to the ballot box, reproductive health care, clean air and drinking water, and more. I will work to make health care _more_ affordable and accessible — not yank it away from those most in need. I’ll advocate for better public schools, more clean energy options, and opportunities for good-paying jobs. I will defend our democracy. And I’ll never stop listening to what _the people_ need from me and meeting them where they are. I believe that this is how you win a swing state, Peter. And I _know_ that — with you on our team — we can succeed here in North Carolina. **[I’m asking you to split a contribution between my campaign and Valerie Foushee because _right now_ is when we can build the momentum to win. Chip in $10 today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115536940/570644361/-163669706?amount=10&source=SBD_VF_EM_SPL_091925_COOPER_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTViYTRhYS03ODk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ykTgrNod1oMr3ib9ZX7BjTa1ynJp9CfEkd57wLYeUwc=)** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115536944/570644363/-163669706?amount=10&source=SBD_VF_EM_SPL_091925_COOPER_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTViYTRhYS03ODk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ykTgrNod1oMr3ib9ZX7BjTa1ynJp9CfEkd57wLYeUwc=)

clean_body: Join me in this campaign. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | Peter — North Carolina is a swing state, and we can be sure that Republicans will go all out to defeat us. But I know how to win North Carolina. Whether it was Attorney General or Governor, I’ve done it over and over in the most competitive years. It takes the dedication to connect with folks in every community and the commitment to stand for the rights that people hold dear. I served as Governor for eight years. I know that North Carolinians don’t want to go backward. And based on the enthusiasm we’re seeing for our campaign from people across our country, that sentiment is true for Americans everywhere. As a U.S. Senator, I will protect our rights to the ballot box, reproductive health care, clean air and drinking water, and more. I will work to make health care more affordable and accessible — not yank it away from those most in need. I’ll advocate for better public schools, more clean energy options, and opportunities for good-paying jobs. I will defend our democracy. And I’ll never stop listening to what the people need from me and meeting them where they are. I believe that this is how you win a swing state, Peter. And I know that — with you on our team — we can succeed here in North Carolina. = | = Grateful to have you with me, Roy Cooper * | | | ---|---|--- = Valerie is fighting to protect access to health care, working families, and to reform our criminal justice system. But she needs your help to continue to do this great work in Congress. | Peter,
When tragedy strikes, real leaders call for peace.
But Lauren Boebert? She only knows how to lead with hate.
Ilhan Omar denounced the horrific assassination of Charlie Kirk--condemning violence in all forms while speaking honestly about his politics. Boebert twisted her words into a racist attack, telling Omar to "go back to Somalia."
Now more MAGA extremists are following her lead. Nancy Mace has echoed the same "go back to Somalia" smear. And Republicans just days ago tried to censure Ilhan and strip her of her committee assignments and President Trump called for her to be removed from Congress--all for daring to speak her mind.
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_IgMG4cYYv5r2Ec0jkEB3CCiP6z_5IXKTN1MJziVAyY0cMDhtY5vzYlFUvYP1vQE7yLHrl10RdQ5zK4Sgwrm9daX3Z2jydoTnc7BZES1h1tH77ggqOBilZeT51BjyCPsYTxMB7a8Zs1jlyfxGjJ99pyzS8rJ9UGJJGS-fJ-9pwKOuXEtxBjPr8rUlT_Kd-XxC-1v-zvUTjqdFetrKt4nAhvqBuVNXa9n4zgp__3e-dM=&c=FqEBGGfzCQkRIxg8LG4NvHZZq4QocUqeYBItTZtHQ3tcO6SOqRpNPg==&ch=jhslJd9UWi22PUnkdqwv4AdhBUJyQWFiRXAmwaiSP_HTDIzZaMN12g==)

| | | | Boebert and Mace know exactly what they are doing. They are fanning the flames of division, violence, and white supremacy. By targeting Ilhan Omar, they are sending a message to every immigrant, every woman of color, every critic of MAGA extremism: sit down, or you'll be next.
I refuse to let that stand. I'm running to defeat Lauren Boebert and bring something different to Congress: radical peace. That means rejecting hate and building a future where no one is told to "go back" for exercising their rights as an American.
But I can't do it without you. My campaign is powered by people, not billionaires, and every donation helps us fight back against Boebert's machine of hate.

name: Kat Abughazaleh
subject: I was assaulted by ICE again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kat for Illinois
body:
but I won't be deterred
---
|
---
To unsubscribe from future communications, please click [here](https://ka4il.us/l/0kOOlJYY95Oh)
---
| [ ](https://ka4il.us/l/Y2gyRd9FbXM3)
---
Friend, once again, while I was peacefully protesting outside the Broadview ICE detention center, **I was harassed and shoved to the ground by masked ICE agents.** Friend, it's Kat Abughazaleh, and if this isn't a sign of what's to come, I don't know what is.
As always, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, click [**here**](https://ka4il.us/l/Vhd4reeFcStB)**,** or if you'd like to unsubscribe from all future emails, click **here**.
**_Donald Trump is planning on attacking payment processor ActBlue in another attempt by his administration to push the limits of his power._**
The detainment of Mahmoud Kahlil, the deportation of Kilmar Abrego Garcia, and the outright denial to follow a ruling made by the Supreme Court are all blatant oversteps that attack our right to free speech and due process and challenge the rule of law.
Friend, I've spent years watching Fox News and listening to their rhetoric get more and more extreme, and Donald Trump is doing exactly what they want.
**_Fascism is, and has always been, their end goal._**
Their vision is one of a militarized country where only certain people—a few dozen rich men—have a seat at the table, and dissidents like me are silenced.
Trump and Elon know that progressive movements like ours are in the way because I've made it abundantly clear that strongly worded letters, wearing matching outfits while holding up signs, and meaningless acts of symbolism **aren't my thing.**
As a member of Congress, I'm going to be unwavering in my fight for our communities.
I will not vote for authoritarian bills in the name of "compromise," I will not abandon or demonize vulnerable groups to cater to the right, and I will not change my stances for fear of retaliation.
And Friend, that's what this action on ActBlue is: retaliation. Campaigns like ours rely on small dollars from people like you to support us, and ActBlue is integral to making that work.
[**If you can before you go, can you chip in (through ActBlue) to help us continue to fund mutual aid efforts and bring our unwavering commitment to the people of our district to Congress?**](https://ka4il.us/l/Jo0sSxptVDvy)
---
| [ ](https://ka4il.us/l/pQVCmA4tVbka)
---
We are facing fascism right on our doorstep. Our generation, and our country, will be defined by our response to Donald Trump's attacks on our First Amendment rights. Some Democrats do nothing. **I'll do whatever it takes – including putting my body on the line time and time again.** [**If this is the type of bold leadership you are expecting from progressive leaders, I hope you'll join my team with a grassroots contribution today.**](https://ka4il.us/l/jjvWvFGr0BeM) Even $3 will go a long way in sending a message to ICE collaborators and corporate Democrats that this moment is calling for courage and action. Thank you and stay safe, Kat Abughazaleh Friend, it's Kat Abughazaleh, and if this isn't a sign of what's to come, I don't know what is.
As always, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, click [**here**](https://ka4il.us/l/4M4t7YVuR6Kz)**,** or if you'd like to unsubscribe from all future emails, click **here**.
**_Donald Trump is planning on attacking payment processor ActBlue in another attempt by his administration to push the limits of his power._**
The detainment of Mahmoud Kahlil, the deportation of Kilmar Abrego Garcia, and the outright denial to follow a ruling made by the Supreme Court are all blatant oversteps that attack our right to free speech and due process and challenge the rule of law.
Friend, I've spent years watching Fox News and listening to their rhetoric get more and more extreme, and Donald Trump is doing exactly what they want.
**_Fascism is, and has always been, their end goal._**
Their vision is one of a militarized country where only certain people—a few dozen rich men—have a seat at the table, and dissidents like me are silenced.
Trump and Elon know that progressive movements like ours are in the way because I've made it abundantly clear that strongly worded letters, wearing matching outfits while holding up signs, and meaningless acts of symbolism **aren't my thing.**
As a member of Congress, I'm going to be unwavering in my fight for our communities.
I will not vote for authoritarian bills in the name of "compromise," I will not abandon or demonize vulnerable groups to cater to the right, and I will not change my stances for fear of retaliation.
And Friend, that's what this action on ActBlue is: retaliation. Campaigns like ours rely on small dollars from people like you to support us, and ActBlue is integral to making that work.
[**If you can before you go, can you chip in (through ActBlue) to help us continue to fund mutual aid efforts and bring our unwavering commitment to the people of our district to Congress?**](https://ka4il.us/l/kzxWy0vnrCLK)
---
|
---
Email is a really important way that grassroots campaigns can actually win: **we have power when we use technology to organize a large group of people.** If you were forwarded this email and would like to subscribe **[click here!](https://ka4il.us/l/ynjRgF2GcyGf) **

Our email sending software likes it when we have "clicks", but we don't always ask you to click a donation link. **[If you want to take 5 seconds helping us (for free), please click this link to our website after reading every email to help increase our "clickers".](https://ka4il.us/l/Wr98EXi7IsGU) **

We understand that email can be overwhelming. If you only want to receive the most important emails, click [here](https://ka4il.us/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&t=sXgk9gsjBbGd). If you're really just sick of every email, click [here](https://ka4il.us/l/djzlsD0nGXEq) and you'll be unsubscribed!
---
| **_Democratic leaders are abandoning us._** Our District deserves a fighter in Congress — someone who shows her constituents every day that she is doing everything possible to stop the authoritarian takeover of the United States. Kat has fought fascists before as a citizen, union rep, and independent journalist. Now, she's going to do the same in Congress. **Let's win this together.** **[Chip in!](https://ka4il.us/l/MJ1X6XX3WqL9)**
---
| | Paid for by Kat for Illinois
---

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Fascism is here
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

This week, the Trump administration rapidly escalated its assault on free
speech and political dissent. They’re no longer only targeting
pro-Palestinian activism: they’re censoring and attacking ANY speech they
don’t like.

Justice Democrats’ Rep. Summer Lee put it perfectly: “We aren't just
approaching authoritarianism—we're already in it.”

Look at what happened in this past week alone:

* An immigration judge agreed with the Trump administration and ordered
Palestinian activist and legal permanent U.S. resident Mahmoud Khalil
to be deported despite committing no crimes.

* Late-night show Jimmy Kimmel Live! was abruptly and indefinitely
suspended after Trump’s FCC threatened Disney/ABC and demanded the
network punish Kimmel for his commentary on Charlie Kirk’s death and
the MAGA response to it.

* While hosting Charlie Kirk’s podcast from the White House, JD Vance
blamed “left-wing extremism” for Kirk’s death, encouraged doxxing,
said private employers should fire people who criticize Kirk, and
vowed retribution against liberal organizations.

* Trump declared he’s designating ‘antifa’ as a terrorist organization,
even though it is not a singular, structured group and refers to the
broader anti-fascist movement.

* MAGA Rep. Nancy Mace spent the week tweeting and harassing Rep. Ilhan
Omar and tried to force a vote to censure her for comments about
Charlie Kirk she didn’t even make. She was unsuccessful, with even
some Republicans voting against it.

This is on top of the White House suing media outlets, threatening to
revoke funding for colleges and universities, and trying to hand TikTok to
pro-Trump investors.

Fascism is here, Peter, and we’re
not going to let this regime’s fear and intimidation tactics stop us from
speaking truth to power.

Justice Democrats is here to organize people against organized money.
We’re taking on Trump, his billionaire megadonors, and corporate super
PACs. We’re also challenging the Democratic establishment, demanding they
actually do their jobs and fight for us. We’re sending working-class
leaders to represent working-class communities in Congress. We are
building a progressive movement from the ground up and fighting back
against fascism.

But we can’t do it by ourselves. Especially now that Trump and Vance are
loudly and explicitly announcing their plans to target progressive groups
like ours.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250919?refcode=em20250919-37036&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=37036_1203867_H8df6i&akid=37036%2E1203867%2EH8df6i ]Please, if you can afford it, pitch in $5 or any amount
today to ensure we have the resources to fight back and continue growing
our movement in this critical moment for our country.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250919?refcode=em20250919-37036&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=37036_1203867_H8df6i&akid=37036%2E1203867%2EH8df6i ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250919-37036-footer&t=1002&refcode2=37036_1203867_H8df6i&akid=37036%2E1203867%2EH8df6i

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=37036%2E1203867%2EH8df6i

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

Peter,

At the end of this email, I’m going to personally ask you to **[chip in $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115537631/570646545/1631137775?refcode=em-9.19.25-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODczMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWFjZWQxNy03YTk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YlMBXILVLHfd3vXLYHkrISbE8Le-zFVl6Z_4TUFKD8c=)** toward my campaign to flip CA-40 blue. But first, I want to share something that really puts my race into perspective.

**Folks may not know this, but my opponent Young Kim lost a congressional race back in 2018. That election looked a lot like the one we’re in now – a midterm right in the middle of Trump’s presidency.**

Next year is another Trump midterm, and it’s already clear that the national GOP realizes just how vulnerable they are in this race.

The _Cook Political Report_ ranked CA-40 as one of the most competitive in the nation, and CA-40 landed on the DCCC’s list of the few seats “in play” for control of the House majority.

With Young Kim voting in lockstep with this Administration – _when our very democracy is on the line_ – we need to capitalize on this moment and vote her out.

**[That’s why I have to ask: Will you chip in $3 to flip this seat and win the majority? My team tells me we need another 16 donations from 18326 to stay on pace.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115537634/570646555/1631137775?refcode=em-9.19.25-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODczMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWFjZWQxNy03YTk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YlMBXILVLHfd3vXLYHkrISbE8Le-zFVl6Z_4TUFKD8c=)**

clean_body: | = Peter, At the end of this email, I’m going to personally ask you to = toward my campaign to flip CA-40 blue. But first, I want to share something that really puts my race into perspective. Folks may not know this, but my opponent Young Kim lost a congressional race back in 2018. That election looked a lot like the one we’re in now – a midterm right in the middle of Trump’s presidency. Next year is another Trump midterm, and it’s already clear that the national GOP realizes just how vulnerable they are in this race. The Cook Political Report ranked CA-40 as one of the most competitive in the nation, and CA-40 landed on the DCCC’s list of the few seats “in play” for control of the House majority. With Young Kim voting in lockstep with this Administration – when our very democracy is on the line – we need to capitalize on this moment and vote her out. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Christina | Christina Gagnier is a community leader, small business owner, former school board member, and privacy advocate defending Orange County and Inland Empire families. To support Christina's campaign = To volunteer on Christina's campaign, To receive fewer emails from Christina Gagnier's campaign, sign up for our option here. We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Thank you for supporting Christina Gagnier for Congress. Christina Gagnier for Congress 14071 Peyton Drive #1323 Chino Hills, CA 91709 United States

We’re sick and tired of powerful corporations ripping us off and making life worse.

We've seen corporations and their political allies take advantage of American workers — hiking up prices, crushing small businesses, shipping jobs overseas, and fighting against unions and fair contracts. They've been selling out communities like Western PA — and their kiss-ass politicians aren't doing anything to stop them.

**I'm fighting back against consolidated corporate power, and fighting *for* the people. No one’s trying to say that profits don’t matter, of course they do. But something else has to matter too.

Our safety has to matter. Our jobs have to matter. Our communities have to matter. Our country has to matter.

And for those things to matter, we have to break this corporate stranglehold on our economy and our government.
**[When all of us stand together and push back against the big corporations, we win. So Derek, stand with me and pitch in a few bucks. clean_body: Derek, for too long, powerful corporations have called the shots — and the American people are fed up. We’re sick and tired of powerful corporations ripping us off and making life worse. We've seen corporations and their political allies take advantage of American workers — hiking up prices, crushing small businesses, shipping jobs overseas, and fighting against unions and fair contracts. They've been selling out communities like Western PA — and their kiss-ass politicians aren't doing anything to stop them. I'm fighting back against consolidated corporate power, and fighting for the people. But to take on these powerful corporations, I’m going to need your help. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = No one’s trying to say that profits don’t matter, of course they do. But something else has to matter too. Our safety has to matter. Our jobs have to matter. Our communities have to matter. Our country has to matter. name: Mike Nellis - Endless Urgency
subject: Why I’m Not Going to Stop Calling Trump a Fascist
body:
I've had more than a few reporters ask me, in the wake of Charlie Kirk's murder, whether I'm going to stop calling Donald Trump a fascist--because the word "fascist" was found on the shell casing the murderer used.

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/endlessurgency/p/why-im-not-going-to-stop-calling?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

I've had more than a few reporters ask me, in the wake of Charlie Kirk's murder, whether I'm going to stop calling Donald Trump a fascist--because the word _" fascist"_ was found on the shell casing the murderer used. The answer is unequivocally, no.
As tragic and horrible as Kirk's murder was, it's not a reason to stop calling Trump exactly what he is. He's a fascist. Censoring media. Threatening universities. Undermining elections. Attacking judges. Defying court orders. The list goes on and on.
**[I'm committed to keeping Endless Urgency free for everyone--but I rely on paid subscribers (starting at just $8/month) to keep it going. If you find value in the work, consider becoming a paid subscriber:](https://substack.com/redirect/b0e64ca9-c1c1-4b3e-a3d6-dab6e71b33f6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/b0e64ca9-c1c1-4b3e-a3d6-dab6e71b33f6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
If it walks like a duck and quacks like a duck, it's a damn duck. And I'm not about to stop saying that just because the conservative movement wants to lecture Democrats about language, which they have zero credibility on.
Look, I don't toss the word "fascist" around lightly. Some Democrats do, and I think that's a mistake. But what else am I supposed to call a president who grows more powerful _because_ the judiciary and Congress are too cowardly or complicit to check him--_even as_ he becomes more unpopular and more extreme?
Two weeks ago, Trump posted a photo of my city--Chicago--engulfed in flames, implying _he_ had napalmed it. This week, his FCC chair threatened to yank ABC's license if they didn't take Jimmy Kimmel off the air for a joke. And just this morning, outside a detention center near Chicago, ICE fired some chemical agent into the air and got violent with peaceful protesters--protesters who were there because this administration rounded up immigrants en masse and are deporting them to countries they aren't even from.
And now I'm supposed to stop calling that fascism because something awful happened to Charlie Kirk? When Trump continues attacking people like me as "scum?" When his closest adviser is threatening me and my son? Hell no.
**[I'm committed to keeping Endless Urgency free for everyone--but I rely on paid subscribers (starting at just $8/month) to keep it going. If you find value in the work, consider becoming a paid subscriber:](https://substack.com/redirect/b0e64ca9-c1c1-4b3e-a3d6-dab6e71b33f6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/b0e64ca9-c1c1-4b3e-a3d6-dab6e71b33f6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
I am heartbroken over what happened to Kirk, and I'm holding his kids especially close in my thoughts. What happened was a crime against them and against this country. But the way the GOP and conservative media immediately tried to spin it--to weaponize Kirk's murder against Democrats, and inciting more violence from their far-right base--is despicable. And it's not going to work.
What Democrats _must_ do now is double down. We have to explain to the American people, clearly and relentlessly, what Trump is doing to this country and why it's wrong--why abusing power to line his own pockets, to punish comedians for telling jokes, to push the executive branch past the point of accountability--must be resisted at every level.
We _must_ keep fighting with everything we have. With relentless, endless, urgency. Inside the Democratic Party, and outside of it in the streets. Because if we don't, we will fall to this fascist and the people around him--people who fear anyone different, and want to crush anyone who dares speak out.
We have to get tougher. We cannot let Republicans dictate the terrain, no matter what happens. We cannot let them use Kirk's murder as some twisted excuse for us to back down.
So no--I'm not going to stop calling Donald Trump what he is. It would be wrong of me _not_ to.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/b0e64ca9-c1c1-4b3e-a3d6-dab6e71b33f6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
_Mike Nellis is a Democratic strategist and entrepreneur who has raised over $1 billion for Democratic campaigns and causes. This Substack is where he writes with endless urgency about the issues of the day--and how we can save the Democratic Party and our democracy._

name: John Goodman
subject: Time To Take Back Illinois!
body:
John Goodman is fighting for you!

| | | | | [|
---](https://goodmanforillinois.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0c6fe2abbb0109c63a8cab52c&id=3cdc64b45c&e=94c8429215)
| | | | | | Hello Friends!
What a year it has been so far. I am having the time of my life campaigning to win this US Senate in Illinois back, for you the people. We are done with Representatives who only represent special interests and a small amount of people. We want Representatives who stand up for the people, that aren’t afraid to say no to laws and bills that hurt the people, and truly fight every day to make America the best it can be. It’s our time for **WE THE PEOPLE** , not We The Party! It’s time to elect a grassroots candidate from Illinois to the US Senate.
**I am a TRUE GRASSROOTS CANDIDATE, and I will be your GRASSROOTS REPRESENTATIVE!**
---
| [Help Me Run For The US Senate](https://goodmanforillinois.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0c6fe2abbb0109c63a8cab52c&id=43492fc615&e=94c8429215)

| | | Goodman for Illinois merchandise has been popping up all over Illinois.
Interested in getting a yard sign, hat or bumper sticker to show your support you can [buy them here](https://goodmanforillinois.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0c6fe2abbb0109c63a8cab52c&id=b4f443bf5f&e=94c8429215).
[T](https://goodmanforillinois.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0c6fe2abbb0109c63a8cab52c&id=428732e74d&e=94c8429215)-Shirts, hoodies, long Sleeve shirts, coffee mugs and more, will be added in the next few days.

| [|
---](https://goodmanforillinois.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0c6fe2abbb0109c63a8cab52c&id=b843cbe3e5&e=94c8429215)
| | I have been all over the state gathering petition signatures, votes, support and energy for our campaign to win in 2026! But I need to ask for a lot help from all of you. We need to get oour message out to the voters in a big way. I need to [raise $180,648.88 ](https://goodmanforillinois.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0c6fe2abbb0109c63a8cab52c&id=6d77d9e2e6&e=94c8429215)by the end of September to help get our message out to the everyday voter. They need to hear we are fighting for their social security, term limits, safer communities, help for our veterans and more. Please give whatever you can spare, to help me bring my message to the voters. [$5](https://goodmanforillinois.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0c6fe2abbb0109c63a8cab52c&id=14e4c44522&e=94c8429215), [$10](https://goodmanforillinois.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0c6fe2abbb0109c63a8cab52c&id=ef64f26526&e=94c8429215), [$25](https://goodmanforillinois.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0c6fe2abbb0109c63a8cab52c&id=88c633669c&e=94c8429215), or maybe all the way up to [$3,500](https://goodmanforillinois.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0c6fe2abbb0109c63a8cab52c&id=196493c913&e=94c8429215). Everything would be appericated and will go along way to helping us win back Illinois.

name: Laura Friedman
subject: Tirelessly legislating for you in CA-30
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115540850/570656877/-1623651544?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDgxNmQzYTQtN2U5NS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qPhKuV0Zg8yhpxQ9z2NNzRwJa4hndKiFae0QB4NHAYQ=) Friend, The worst headlines are not always our reality. I was elected to make change for the better, and even with Donald Trump in the White House, I’m working to bring investments back into our community, tirelessly legislating to keep our communities healthy and safe, while boosting our local economies and keeping your costs down. I want to share just a few of the bills that I’m leading which will have a meaningful impact on Californians in Los Angeles County and across the state: | **Cut Red Tape for Housing Act:** Home costs were already out of reach for too many families before the devastating wildfires drove up housing scarcity even more, at a time when commutes in Los Angeles County are already among the highest in the nation. That’s why I’ve introduced the Cut Red Tape for Housing Act, which will reduce barriers to building affordable housing in order to lower housing costs. It's commonsense policy to help people spend less on rent and save more for other expenses. **Trade Review Act:** Donald Trump’s tariffs are illegal... period. Only Congress has the constitutionally recognized role to set trade policy, and we need to make that absolutely clear to everyone in Washington – and with it, reduce the financial strain these tariffs are causing small businesses, at kitchen tables around the country. I’m working with colleagues of all stripes to advance the Trade Review Act, so that our shops, schools, restaurants, and more get critical relief from bad policy that’s making their jobs harder. **FEMA Act:** Given the increased cost of natural disasters, including the ongoing recovery for tens of thousands of Angelenos, we need to make our nation’s top disaster aid agency more efficient and effective. Working with colleagues on Transportation & Infrastructure, we have crafted a sweeping FEMA Act to cover the cracks in support we’re observing in our communities. This legislation includes my **Don’t Penalize Victims Act** , which ensures natural disaster victims receiving community-based financial support do not get punished further by stripping them of federal disaster assistance.
---
I will never stop working for basic decency and the well-being of our neighbors and community – in Los Angeles, across CA-30, and in Washington.
Thank you,
Laura

clean_body: | = Friend, The worst headlines are not always our reality. I was elected to make change for the better, and even with Donald Trump in the White House, I’m working to bring investments back into our community, tirelessly legislating to keep our communities healthy and safe, while boosting our local economies and keeping your costs down. I want to share just a few of the bills that I’m leading which will have a meaningful impact on Californians in Los Angeles County and across the state: | Cut Red Tape for Housing Act: Home costs were already out of reach for too many families before the devastating wildfires drove up housing scarcity even more, at a time when commutes in Los Angeles County are already among the highest in the nation. That’s why I’ve introduced the Cut Red Tape for Housing Act, which will reduce barriers to building affordable housing in order to lower housing costs. It's commonsense policy to help people spend less on rent and save more for other expenses. Trade Review Act: Donald Trump’s tariffs are illegal... period. Only Congress has the constitutionally recognized role to set trade policy, and we need to make that absolutely clear to everyone in Washington – and with it, reduce the financial strain these tariffs are causing small businesses, at kitchen tables around the country. I’m working with colleagues of all stripes to advance the Trade Review Act, so that our shops, schools, restaurants, and more get critical relief from bad policy that’s making their jobs harder. FEMA Act: Given the increased cost of natural disasters, including the ongoing recovery for tens of thousands of Angelenos, we need to make our nation’s top disaster aid agency more efficient and effective. Working with colleagues on Transportation & Infrastructure, we have crafted a sweeping FEMA Act to cover the cracks in support we’re observing in our communities. This legislation includes my Don’t Penalize Victims Act , which ensures natural disaster victims receiving community-based financial support do not get punished further by stripping them of federal disaster assistance. I will never stop working for basic decency and the well-being of our neighbors and community – in Los Angeles, across CA-30, and in Washington. Thank you, Laura **=** | | Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress Laura's campaign doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs and completely relies on grassroots supporters like you! To chip in to Laura's campaign = To learn more about Laura's progressive record of supporting our working families, please visit: We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Laura Friedman for Congress PO Box 27296 Los Angeles, CA 90027 United States

body:
|
