**➤➤ BREAKING: Trump FCC crackdown leads to Jimmy Kimmel’s firing** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115541055/570657380/-65719988?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDI4NTJiMi03ZTk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XH_N81JbgY6I6eiwP2FaPrGW8prm3ElfS-lYKWKr02g=&emci=1d2852b2-7e95-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=242852b2-7e95-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=26828920)
* * *
Friend, Late-night host Jimmy Kimmel has been fired, reportedly under pressure from Donald Trump’s FCC chair, for doing the one thing this administration can’t stand: **Criticizing Donald Trump. ** This is about control. Trump is using the federal government to punish people who speak out. First it was NPR and PBS. Now it's late-night television. We’ve seen this before, both here and in other countries. Silence the press. Target election officials. Eliminate anyone who refuses to fall in line. Democratic Secretaries of State have stood up to Trump’s power grabs, and they know the stakes. As Arizona Secretary of State Adrian Fontes put it: “Trump has no business interfering in state voting laws.” **He has no business interfering in free speech either.** [**We’re launching an emergency petition to push back on Trump’s dangerous abuse of power. Will you add your name right now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115541056/570657381/-65719988?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDI4NTJiMi03ZTk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XH_N81JbgY6I6eiwP2FaPrGW8prm3ElfS-lYKWKr02g=&emci=1d2852b2-7e95-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=242852b2-7e95-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=26828920) | | **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115541057/570657382/-65719988?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDI4NTJiMi03ZTk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XH_N81JbgY6I6eiwP2FaPrGW8prm3ElfS-lYKWKr02g=&emci=1d2852b2-7e95-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=242852b2-7e95-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=26828920)**
---
**Freedom of speech is not just a line in the Constitution.** Our First Amendment is a guardrail against authoritarianism. When a president punishes public voices for dissent or criticism, we lose one of the last defenses of democracy.
Kimmel is just the latest example. But if this is allowed to stand, he won’t be the last.
[**That’s why we’re calling on everyone to take action. If you're ready to speak out, add your name and help DASS defend our democracy and the people who speak out to protect it.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115541060/570657383/-65719988?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDI4NTJiMi03ZTk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XH_N81JbgY6I6eiwP2FaPrGW8prm3ElfS-lYKWKr02g=&emci=1d2852b2-7e95-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=242852b2-7e95-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=26828920)
| **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115541062/570657386/-65719988?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDI4NTJiMi03ZTk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XH_N81JbgY6I6eiwP2FaPrGW8prm3ElfS-lYKWKr02g=&emci=1d2852b2-7e95-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=242852b2-7e95-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=26828920)**
---

Thank you,
Team DASS
| Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State -- the _only_ organization dedicated to electing and protecting Democratic Secretaries of States.

Right now, Republicans are changing the rules and changing the players to try and change the outcomes of future elections. _Democratic Secretaries of State are the last line of defense to protect our democracy and preserve the will of the voters._ Please consider a donation to fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda. | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115541063/570657389/-664592562?refcode=em-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDI4NTJiMi03ZTk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XH_N81JbgY6I6eiwP2FaPrGW8prm3ElfS-lYKWKr02g=)

Peter,

A lot has happened in recent weeks, so I wanted to take a moment to get you up to speed:
* **Republicans are doubling down on their extreme agenda** \-- pushing devastating cuts to Medicaid, education, and climate investments. They are backing reckless tariffs that are already driving up costs for Californians. These attacks aren’t abstract; they hit families, communities, and our future directly.

* **Our race to keep CA-27 blue in 2026 is already underway.** I flipped this seat just last year, and election analysts now list it as one of the top Republican targets in the entire country. I remain on the Democrats’ official “Frontline” list of the most vulnerable members of Congress.

* **A new Republican challenger officially entered this race.** That makes this FEC deadline my first test of strength since then -- and it’s critical we show we’re ready to fight back.

**[This is not the time to give up, and the fact is winning a House majority next year is the best way to create a real check on this administration. Please chip in $3 or any amount before our FEC deadline to help us prepare for the work ahead.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115541327/570658376/-1384072709?refcode=em-9.19.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTZkMTNhNC03Zjk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zw2USISF3qbMP6bNXLoqc7UxoTaNcz9snr-1C7PQdJA=)**

name: Addison McDowell
subject: Will you join me in prayer?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McDowell for Congress _Copyright(C) 2025 McDowell for Congress_ **Our mailing address is:**
body:
| | |
---
| | Friend, Pure evil has reared its ugly head in America. Right here in North Carolina, an innocent Ukrainian girl was brutally stabbed to death on the light rail after a normal day of work, murdered in broad daylight by a monster who should have been behind bars. And then came the unthinkable...Freedom Fighter Charlie Kirk was assassinated. Silenced forever for daring to debate ideas in the public square—the very principle on which our nation was founded. Evil and darkness surround us, but hear me now: **it will not prevail.** **_I believe_** _our nation is at a real turning point. _ **_I believe_** these recent tragedies have shaken us, but also awakened us. **_And I believe_** the work we are doing—in Congress and around our dinner tables—matters more than ever before. It’s time to be bold in our faith and our convictions. It’s time to fight—not with violence, but on our knees in prayer and with bold legislation—for the future of our nation. It’s time to appeal to heaven—to stand on truth and reject the lies this world is selling.

**_Will you join me in prayer?_** _Lord Jesus, I pray right now for our nation._ _I pray that you would bring revival to our land and a spiritual awakening in the midst of such evil._ _Lord, help us. We need you. Give us wisdom. Give us courage and strength._ _We reject all fear in Your name._ _Steady our hearts. Deepen our faith. Protect our children. _ _Be with us, Lord. Our hearts are wide open to you._ _We trust you, and we know that you will work_** _all things_** _together for your good._ _In Jesus’ mighty name we pray. Amen._

May God bless you and your family, Addison McDowellCongressman for North Carolina’s Sixth District
---
| | Paid for by McDowell for Congress _Copyright(C) 2025 McDowell for Congress_ **Our mailing address is:**
McDowell for Congress
PO Box 97275
Raleigh, NC 27624

name: Tell Congress: Impeach Donald Trump (Fight for Reform)
subject: (disgusting news) Trump is Threatening War on an American city
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23414%2E4449941%2EaB22oP) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23414%2E4449941%2EaB22oP) [ **_“TRUMP THREATENS ‘WAR’ IN CHICAGO”_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69051?t=3&akid=23414%2E4449941%2EaB22oP)
_USA Today_ [ **10,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED FROM YOUR AREA](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69051?t=4&akid=23414%2E4449941%2EaB22oP)
[TELL CONGRESS:
**]() [ **IMPEACH DONALD TRUMP >> **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69051?t=5&akid=23414%2E4449941%2EaB22oP) [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69051?t=6&akid=23414%2E4449941%2EaB22oP)
| [SIGN THE PETITION >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69051?t=7&akid=23414%2E4449941%2EaB22oP)
---
[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69051?t=8&akid=23414%2E4449941%2EaB22oP)
This is disgusting, team...

Donald Trump is **THREATENING WAR** on an American city:
[ **“Chicago is about to find out why it’s called the Department of WAR,”**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69051?t=9&akid=23414%2E4449941%2EaB22oP) the president said in a social media post, referring to the department he claimed to rename Friday.

Trump accompanied his post with an AI-generated image of himself in a Civil War-era military hat, evoking the film “Apocalypse Now.”

[ **“‘I love the smell of deportations in the morning,’”**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69051?t=10&akid=23414%2E4449941%2EaB22oP) Trump added in another allusion to the movie.

From _USA Today_
He’s claiming it’s in the name of public safety... _but it’s clear as day that it’s about sowing chaos, collecting power, and riling up his base._

This is nothing but another authoritarian power grab fueled by racism, lies, and fear.

If we let Trump get away with this, there will be no stopping him, team. If he can trample on Chicago’s rights, he can trample your city’s too.
[ **If we’re going to end this chaos, we NEED Congress to introduce Articles of Impeachment ASAP. So please, team, sign our petition urging Congress to act: **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69051?t=11&akid=23414%2E4449941%2EaB22oP)
[SIGN THE PETITION: IMPEACH DONALD TRUMP](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69051?t=12&akid=23414%2E4449941%2EaB22oP)
---
Together in the fight,

Fight for Reform

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: JD Vance
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4989%2E35263%2ET55hrG)
Peter, it’s Jon Ossoff. JD Vance came to Georgia to celebrate defunding hospitals and raising health insurance premiums. _The same JD Vance who once sold himself as the GOP’s working-class champion, then cast the deciding vote to rip health care and essential services away from millions of Americans._ The VP was also in Georgia to attack me. I welcome JD’s attacks — a man reduced to running little errands for the President he once compared to Hitler. He has sold out working families to the far-right billionaires who funded his political rise. And his MAGA bosses sent him to Georgia because they fear us. They know our grassroots power flipped Georgia and delivered Democrats the Senate majority in 2021. They fear we will do it again. That’s why they sent Vance, and it’s why their Super PACs are already unloading millions of dollars in attack ads against me. But here’s the thing: we’ve beaten them before. And we’ll beat them again — if we have the resources to fight back right now. So I am asking: **[Can you rush a $10 donation to my reelection campaign and Tammy Baldwin TODAY so we can respond to JD Vance right away and set the record straight?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2533?c0=stb-em-ossoff.cEl5Z4&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250919_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=4989%2E35263%2ET55hrG)** Thank you for chipping in, especially right now. — Jon Ossoff
---
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701
**[www.tammybaldwin.com](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=2&akid=4989%2E35263%2ET55hrG) | [INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM](mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=3&akid=4989%2E35263%2ET55hrG)**

name: JanePAC
subject: Early voting starts TODAY in Virginia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Everyone is watching to see if Trump's agenda is gaining ground.

**Early voting in Virginia starts TODAY, and the whole country is watching.** Pundits, politicians, and yes, Big Oil executives are treating this as an early test of whether Trump's agenda is gaining ground ahead of the 2026 midterms. **[We can't afford to show them weakness. Will you rush a donation (of any amount) to help amplify our Virginia slate of climate champions and deliver climate victories this November?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115541596/570659397/2105508926?refcode=ea.44141c2c-8095-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.44141c2c-8095-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ0MTQxYzJjLTgwOTUtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gob7Y1W-pqPROjXbINPYZbNJlwfo3gHZP0fbnTDkRVM=)** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115541597/570659399/2105508926?refcode=ea.44141c2c-8095-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.44141c2c-8095-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ0MTQxYzJjLTgwOTUtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gob7Y1W-pqPROjXbINPYZbNJlwfo3gHZP0fbnTDkRVM=) The stakes are sky-high for our Virginia climate champions: **➡️ Every single House of Delegates seat is on the ballot.** Republicans need just **two flips** to take control, and our opponents are spending over six figures in digital attack ads against one of our endorsed climate champions to make it happen. **➡️ Dominion Energy has already dumped over $600,000 into re-electing their puppet, Republican Attorney General Jason Miyares.** They know that if we elect Jay Jones as AG, he'll use the full power of that office to hold corporate polluters accountable and lead Virginia's legal resistance to Trump's federal attacks on our health and environment. **➡️ This is the moment when big spending kicks in from outside groups and the fossil fuel industry,** which makes this the very moment our climate champions need us most. Now it’s up to us to give them the resources they need to reach every voter who might make the difference between victory and defeat. **[Your support today — whether it's $5, $25, or $50 — could be the difference. Pundits, politicians, and yes, Big Oil executives are treating this as an early test of whether Trump's agenda is gaining ground ahead of the 2026 midterms. = = The stakes are sky-high for our Virginia climate champions: ➡️ Every single House of Delegates seat is on the ballot. Republicans need just two flips to take control, and our opponents are spending over six figures in digital attack ads against one of our endorsed climate champions to make it happen. ➡️ Dominion Energy has already dumped over $600,000 into re-electing their puppet, Republican Attorney General Jason Miyares. They know that if we elect Jay Jones as AG, he'll use the full power of that office to hold corporate polluters accountable and lead Virginia's legal resistance to Trump's federal attacks on our health and environment. ➡️ This is the moment when big spending kicks in from outside groups and the fossil fuel industry, which makes this the very moment our climate champions need us most. They've spent months knocking on doors, attending community meetings, and building the grassroots coalitions that win elections. They’ve done their part. name: Thomas Massie
subject: I only reach out like this when I must
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Thomas Massie for CongressPO BOX 72821 NEWPORT, KY 41072
body:
I wish I were reaching out today with better news.

| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zpjhc0li1c2sonpnu021rtqjtrpah57mfh572hho_rp22sh2s8i6epb0spi61pj6cth2bs)
---
Friend – I wish I were reaching out today with better news. _I know you don’t hear from me often, so please know that when I make a plea like this, it really is necessary._ The super PAC that pledged to spend their entire war chest to defeat me just spent _**$1 MILLION**_ on a MEGA ad buy to crush my re-election campaign. The neocon establishment has put a bounty on my head because I won’t support foreign wars and won’t vote to continue letting our national debt SPIRAL out of control. _I wish I could be more optimistic, but this is just the beginning of what is a declaration of_** _ALL-OUT WAR_** _on me and those who support me... _ _**_[And if I don’t pick up my fundraising efforts immediately, I'll be severely outmanned and outgunned. Because of this, what was just another end-of-quarter deadline has now become the biggest, most crucial deadline I’ve ever faced.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z1hto20vf1ebl3eer50g3a8o5p33b63dr0ubhm48_rp22sh2s8i6epb0spi61pj6cth2bs)_**_ Look, my least favorite part of my job is asking generous folks like you to sacrifice your hard-earned cash. That’s why I do it so rarely.** ** _**[I wouldn’t be asking for your help right now if it weren’t absolutely vital.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zr6jg4ajmimrrjcqj7j14egd6nrt20qddpn2cii8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0spi61pj6cth2bs)**_ **But this isn’t an enemy I can take lightly. This is the most powerful political apparatus in America, sitting on a massive $500 MILLION war chest.** Their smear campaign says I sided with a foreign country. Friend, the truth is, I sided with you. I didn't pledge my allegiance to my party or any of the Swamp creatures in D.C. I pledged to protect the Constitution at all costs and to keep my promises to the American people. **_They can’t stomach my presence in Washington because I'm a constant reminder of the promises they are BREAKING!_** They’re prepared to flood my race with immense sums of out-of-state cash to drag my name through the mud until they’ve BANISHED me from Washington for good. [_**So can I count on your support to help me stand strong against the full force of the neocon establishment?**_](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zf4p2om8soo0k3mit8vbvaokp6m26nu9ul097i80_rp22sh2s8i6epb0spi61pj6cth2bs) **Friend, I keep my promises. You have my word that I will NEVER back down. ** Sincerely, Thomas Massie

body:
We’re now in National Hispanic Heritage Month, a time to honor Latin American immigrants and push back against xenophobic attacks. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWnByXatCgr_9c03mXAK6h8CX33CE0p1kt8UsDM19mygylROkA6KEmNKFWZCLl6P2qzca6gKD9PSIRBr1ZEGOLn0V_tJCvwVvDUbOlfdzGpG27Ex5R4Y_GfTqxkaxsh2PSS6cP_D_501FLi-8bheACg5Wym4eXgO4RraNt1F3QXJU/4k1/u_8Et6LqROe0YqQpgFPLIw/h0/h001.H5_hzp8KqnsQ_BNL8oqn5PoGuaEXNOClQkXGIqHq44U)
---
Friend, We’re now in National Hispanic Heritage Month, a time to honor first-generation Latin American immigrants and Americans whose ancestors came from Latin America. **As Trump attacks Latin American immigrants in the U.S. and fuels deadly violence in Latin America, I want to lift up an organization I connected with while visiting Mexico City** last month**** for the**** PanAmerican Congress gathering to fight fascism. **Casa Tochán provides life-saving support for refugees and migrants coming through Mexico City** , who find themselves stuck in Mexico because the U.S. border is essentially closed. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hWyvZ6qHcZVKAtCcVrjLQS2MnUA8qZltJLpHQsO4-4ajOz3gIZxkAXhM4p4KJCYmDzoqaFlEdG-Jr2VUc5mMEqjNcBnk1BsGyEY7dpZG_tsr4F5PGrfz8DNk-Ixs6ZXM2yMcNTtv_htok5WFImN0xVEmOSZcFJrs0NYHrQQ8fMDlgPJdSqPLx_lvxkUJ6EYPKsuFB0GPUo6r2-8AQ5Azzvat4q2p99gc-3VmnFQ7LnlfUThh1xe-YjYTEp0auhkfmfX2-sHToCka00oOyCXng2484-pmhrSwcwk0Pi9rUIOG8/4k1/u_8Et6LqROe0YqQpgFPLIw/h1/h001.gRdtc-evSDMmCCFFZAeRue7HwftdBkc-8Kfy_BcavEE) The organization **houses and feeds** people, secures **medical attention** for them by regularly bringing in doctors and psychologists, provides**legal support** for people’s migration cases, and supports residents with **building skills and finding jobs**. [**Could you chip in today to support Casa Tochán’s life-saving work for refugees?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hWyvZ6qHcZVKAtCcVrjLQS2MnUA8qZltJLpHQsO4-4ajOul5CkbqCO7XJhTEzcRN-U1inSKzgIOWxA5_xDJehHxuwwXckG8615UVJ2A6hj1uK_Emim9kl9O-S9aQ7q3nNKCsXtE66qxdie9mUSBNf0hZuHHXQ7Up_tMyxm6Y1Unw04ejfthmjuDDNLEassdUy7q1ijppjraP3pMZgonSNTgYEWWPqFfJlaCUWaLdXtN-Wow5Mevjr-qSUYc_FurkNplLqtu1E4fA6Y7Lff0jxwm_UcBLEk8M8qSjKu9N5sToh/4k1/u_8Et6LqROe0YqQpgFPLIw/h2/h001.WaUDWckK_i3wlyRMfjH_tUytoXHOJT0YTn27YseQ1t4) | [PLEASE CHIP IN IF YOU CAN](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hWyvZ6qHcZVKAtCcVrjLQS2MnUA8qZltJLpHQsO4-4ajOZip3GVzSHrv_Z415BDpj_VpiOodXELUvn0ksA6EWn6S4giEzD3RYWLlVtCw6AWrrPkcSNuYLQOZltciNA_exGJw76t7pgSJJR0-OWNx8k-DGVsJcWcVhavzElRBymDkgzHquCQ2WihNmS8PjB-E2c9Od147TAI6xg2_capqnO1qfkNOf9VN_vxyAQv_5DVxBgCfRVBwWxlrpYsY8DAlsjNKzMkRkdFs1QhNEI4eBRDcPvl8bqs2FsgzU5su2gEQT/4k1/u_8Et6LqROe0YqQpgFPLIw/h3/h001.moRWsGz7diZzY6vkJD4VV1BGCJQ4wV-JxwcC69GSmtM)
---
Casa Tochán is a grantee of the U.S.-based Unitarian Universalist Service Committee (UUSC). UUSC runs the above donation page, with 100% of the funds going to Casa Tochán.
The shelter used to have a full-to-overflowing food pantry, which was enough to regularly share with other Mexico City movements and organizations.
But inflation and the sudden closure of USAID decreased locals’ ability to donate food or money, so most days the shelter only has just enough rice to make it through the day. Because of increased restrictions at the U.S. border, the shelter is also extending the standard length of time migrants can stay there.
Casa Tochán needs support to refill their food pantry and make much-needed infrastructure maintenance and upgrades so the house can continue to support those who live there.
With increased donations, the shelter would also be able to complete their screenprinting and carpentry workshops, where residents share their knowledge, learn skills, and produce items that provide needed income for residents and for the shelter.
[**Can you donate what you can today to keep Casa Tochán running and help save refugees’ lives?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hWyvZ6qHcZVKAtCcVrjLQS2MnUA8qZltJLpHQsO4-4ajOVH0owLfobtN4UtkMgbIDF_JE2DGtMItU93oaS3_uRMv2tpIjq5gmnmavJxDrcl7AYNV6KwKuqA6ZzElXxTxC0pAnBZBcZImGKiKxosDLLynr8_dDfdsG29Zw10R2NfeqZTJ5XVSRK0PJLokqL7wxyweEFUOaaIZOSOPpDw1fAVKTlt86Cv8IxHPlrtJXmNIhnyiKZsB6PCdpry0_W1ydvfmmZObp8vmPQFLpYvMPKEKxOp8MVjxwfYPVpcgooBeA/4k1/u_8Et6LqROe0YqQpgFPLIw/h4/h001.1Y-dtHxfYsAL9C4NQX68sRl1R5z1XClbxyJgcKGK4w4)
[DONATE NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hWyvZ6qHcZVKAtCcVrjLQS2MnUA8qZltJLpHQsO4-4ajOOdQRdHPQv6hZtPoFHljuWzijawrqjBDdqkHsoHJOOH-dORxhWwZajl7s4NqYpolrHdC7gal9szjQKkARvKl9Ba5O_Wb1S126kXE-PU8_tyhvJtsLXPu0Ku-hBFX_Ic-dFc-CnwkETzz7KfU9MpF6GAf2_ntH55rsQoDL9gHb0B2m8lblgUipdnM7K8HPhTb-8dGlodEUuBa_zJl2PxQzovRNaAcN8Io99i6-lNEjmwFhXqYzJae_94__6p8eHx4X/4k1/u_8Et6LqROe0YqQpgFPLIw/h5/h001.BEgJKPwjgcE_bEl46C1KYnzsNP2vuif4IRB-sY6HYqk)
---
Thank you so much. Together, we will continue demanding safety and dignity for all, including immigrants and asylum-seekers fleeing their homelands.
In solidarity,
Rashida

# Hello Capitalists,
### **Here is everything you should be following today:**
* Kimmel's firing ends a disastrous episode for Disney
* Senate declares Day of Remembrance for Charlie
* Trump roasts Kimmel over firing
* Pressure cranks up on Powell for MORE rate cuts
* Crypto ETF hits Wall Street

### **Today 's markets:**
* **DOW: 46288.93 ( ⬆️0.32%) - ✅**
* **S &P: 6653.42 (⬆️0.32%) - ✅**
* **NASDAQ: 22211.15 ( ⬆️0.50%) - ✅**
* **CBOE VIX Volatility Index: $15.73 ( ⬆️0.19%) - ⚠️⬆️**

* * *
* * *
# Kimmel's firing caps disastrous plunge in views and $40 Million ad revenue slump
ABC has indefinitely suspended "Jimmy Kimmel Live!" after host Jimmy Kimmel's controversial remarks on conservative activist Charlie Kirk's assassination, amplifying a brutal **[70-80% viewership](https://substack.com/redirect/9d99aec4-fdb7-4af8-b295-506474f196fa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** **[plunge](https://substack.com/redirect/9d99aec4-fdb7-4af8-b295-506474f196fa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that's bleeding broadcasters dry since 2015.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9d99aec4-fdb7-4af8-b295-506474f196fa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Viewership Plunges Dramatically** : Nielsen reports 72% drop in 18-49 demo for Kimmel's show, from 0.68 share in 2013-14 to 0.16 in 2024-25, outpacing Colbert's 0.18 and Meyers' 0.13.
* **Colbert's Show Faces Ax** : CBS parent Paramount plans to cancel "The Late Show with Stephen Colbert" post-current season, amid annual losses exceeding $40 million for the network.
* **Ad Revenue Halves Sharply** : Late-night slots across majors saw earnings tumble from $439 million in 2018 to $220 million last year, per Guideline data, eroding profitability.

[](https://substack.com/redirect/a272aa58-060b-434b-82da-43b9021d9ed1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Profits Vanish Forever** : Analyst deems 2022 the final profitable year for traditional late-night; widening net losses forecast, threatening entire format's viability.

* * *
* * *
**[Together with Natural Health Response](https://substack.com/redirect/e9a8f502-b6f4-48a5-845d-52b90ff168df?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

Angry liberals accused him of boosting _**conspiracy theorists, crockpots and grifters**_ ...
But Kennedy defiantly looked them dead in the eye...
And said exactly what they feared most...

"_**[The American people] deserve the truth and that 's what we're going to give them for the first time...**_"

And now, he's issued **[a terrifying new warning](https://substack.com/redirect/e9a8f502-b6f4-48a5-845d-52b90ff168df?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that Americans need to hear in 2025.

* * *
# Senate makes Charlie Kirk's birthday a day of national remembrance
In a striking bipartisan nod to conservative activism, the U.S. Senate unanimously passed a resolution Thursday declaring Oct. 14, 2025--Charlie Kirk's birthday--as the **[National Day of Remembrance](https://substack.com/redirect/e891ed7c-f3f6-4f5c-a0c7-1d453166c5fa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , urging Americans to celebrate his fervent push for civic education, faith-driven liberty and robust public discourse.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/e10564b7-844d-4a4d-b2f6-fc8c79d31acf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Resolution Sparks Civic Reflection** : Designates single 2025 date for nationwide pause honoring Kirk's role in amplifying conservative voices through debate and education.
* **Scott Leads Bipartisan Effort** : Florida Republican Sen. Rick Scott sponsored measure, securing unanimous passage to spotlight Kirk's enduring legacy in public service.
* **Encourages Community Engagement** : Calls on schools, groups and citizens to host events, prayers and ceremonies promoting democracy, family values and idea exchange.
* **Personal Tributes Highlight Impact** : Scott praises Kirk as magnetic leader, devoted family man and faith-guided patriot inspiring millions in liberty's defense.
* * *
* * *

# Trump scorches Kimmel over why he was fired in brutal post
Disney executives have **[indefinitely suspended](https://substack.com/redirect/12cda8e0-be54-4073-98ab-ed421d4ae46a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** "Jimmy Kimmel Live!" after host Jimmy Kimmel's Monday monologue blasted conservatives for politicizing conservative activist Charlie Kirk's recent assassination, prompting affiliate networks Nexstar and Sinclair to refuse airing the controversial episode amid fierce backlash.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/12cda8e0-be54-4073-98ab-ed421d4ae46a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Executives Swiftly Pull Broadcast:** CEO Bob Iger and co-chair Dana Walden ordered the suspension starting Wednesday, with no return date set, as Disney monitors fallout from Kimmel's pointed critique of "MAGA gang" exploitation.
* **Affiliates Fiercely Reject Airing:** Nexstar, operating 32 ABC stations, slammed Kimmel's words as "offensive and insensitive," while Sinclair, with 30 stations, demanded an apology and donation to Kirk's family and Turning Point USA.
* **Trump Celebrates Network Move:** President Donald Trump gloated on Truth Social, mocking Kimmel's "zero talent" and dismal ratings compared to rival Stephen Colbert, amplifying the political firestorm.
* **FCC Signals Tougher Scrutiny:** Chairman Brendan Carr vowed stricter oversight of broadcasters' public-interest programming, accusing Kimmel of misleading viewers on Kirk's death and broader Section 230 debates.

* * *
* * *
# Minneapolis Fed President turns up the heat on Powell, calls for more rate cuts
Minneapolis Fed President Neel Kashkari **[urged two additional interest rate cuts](https://substack.com/redirect/674ddf69-e472-4946-9505-6b63e2dd3592?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** this year after Wednesday's quarter-point reduction, citing a weakening labor market and minimal long-term inflation pressure from tariffs, despite August's core CPI at 3.1%.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/20e6b3d2-924e-499e-a6c6-dcf921f50741?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Tariffs Minimize Inflation Pressure** : Kashkari views proposed tariffs as a likely one-time effect, building confidence for sustained rate easing over the next couple years.
* **Labor Market Signals Weakness** : A softening job market, combined with contained inflation expectations, justifies a "bit easier policy" to support economic stability.
* **Housing Inflation Shows Easing** : Declining pressures in housing costs and wage growth bolster Kashkari's outlook for returning to the Fed's 2% target.
* **FOMC Meeting Remarkably Smooth** : Despite a new Trump appointee's presence, the 11-1 vote on the recent cut revealed no major discord among policymakers.

* * *
* * *
# Multi Crypto ETF goes live as Wall Street kicks off a new age
Grayscale Investments unveiled the **[U.S.'s first multi-token cryptocurrency ETF](https://substack.com/redirect/366fa181-8c0e-485b-92e9-26cc55da4b7b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on Friday, bundling Bitcoin, Ether, XRP, Solana and Cardano to deliver diversified exposure to over 90% of the digital asset market's value, following swift SEC approval.
* **Pioneering Multi-Token Launch:** Converts 2018 Digital Large Cap Fund into NYSE-traded ETF under ticker GDLC, marking Grayscale's bold entry into crypto indexing.
* **Weighted Asset Allocation:** Dedicates 70% to bitcoin and 20% to ether, with remaining slice spread across XRP, Solana and Cardano for balanced risk.
* **Robust Performance Edge:** GDLC surged over 40% in 2025, outpacing bitcoin by 11% since June, fueled by outperformance from altcoins.
* **Regulatory Green Light:** SEC's Wednesday nod signals accelerating mainstream crypto adoption, amplified by Trump-era policies opening retirement plans to digital assets.

* * *
* * *
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/93c943f8-d1c3-46b6-9d94-99f9d954c82a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

Every dollar goes directly to powering Becca’s fight for working people so she can focus on delivering results, not fundraising. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you! — Team Becca mailto:beccabalintvt@beccabalint.com | Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont P.O. Box 291 Burlington, VT 05402

Whether you're new to EMILYs List or you've been with us since 1985, you're a part of a movement that has changed the face of power in American politics forever, and this work is only possible because of _you_!

**Now, with less than 50 days to go until Election Day 2025, one of the best ways to support Democratic pro-choice women is by becoming a Friend of the List.**

When you make a commitment to donate $15 or more each month, you're setting our candidates up for success _for years to come_. **Your monthly donation allows us to give EMILYs List women a clearer picture of the support they can count on in these final two months.** And, since we know you're committed to chipping in every month, we're able to support even more women up and down the ballot heading into next year!

Plus, when you become a Friend of the List, you receive special perks like:
* No more fundraising solicitations — just meaningful, carefully crafted updates on how your support is making a difference.
* 20% off all merch every time you shop the EMILYs List store!
* Access to the EMILYs List Substack blog: _A Seat at the Table_.

name: Erika Kirk
subject: Charlie gave everything. Now it’s up to us.
body:
[unsubscribe](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xul=65a6x69jow166jo1opkmvmi0qs4xg0t3pjr428wbisoh7haqkd7skuguz3sonf84g7kj61f3ruu88tdyp3k2v9ll3ul0h3tbr&__stmp=t2uklg&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from our sponsor Turning Point USA.
* * *
We will never surrender. Ever. p; | | | | [](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2uklg&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, I want to thank you for loving my husband. For standing with us in the worst days of our lives. For praying. For mourning. For remembering. But now, _I need you to listen closely..._ **Because the evildoers who took Charlie’s life? They have NO idea what they have done.** They didn’t just try to silence a man...
They tried to silence his message — a message of patriotism, of faith, and of God’s merciful love. Instead, they ignited something even greater. **If they thought my husband’s mission was powerful before...****_They have NO idea what they have just UNLEASHED._** **Not just across this country...**_**_But in me_**** _._**_ They have no idea the fire they’ve lit inside this wife. And to those listening across America... Let me be clear: The movement my husband built will not die.
**_I refuse to let that happen._** And I know all of us will refuse to let that happen, too. Charlie’s mission will grow: Stronger. Bolder. Louder. Greater than ever. I shared these words publicly, from my heart — just two days after I lost the love of my life.
[**I want you to watch. I want you to hear what Charlie meant to me. And I want you to hear what comes next:**](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2uklg&__onlt=h)
---
[](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2uklg&__onlt=h)
---
Charlie gave everything for this country. And I will never stop speaking his name. We will not let the light he lit go out. Not now. Not ever. For Charlie,
---
[](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2uklg&__onlt=h)
---
Erika Kirk On behalf of the Turning Point USA Family
---
[](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2uklg&__onlt=h)
---
**P.S.** Charlie always said: _“Never surrender.”_ He built something bigger than himself — and now we must carry it forward. If you believe in what he stood for... if you refuse to let Charlie’s vision die...
---
[ **Give in Charlie’s Honor**
**Support Turning Point USA**](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2uklg&__onlt=h)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

[Unsubscribe](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xul=65a6x69jow166jo1opkmvmi0qs4xg0t3pjr428wbisoh7haqkd7skuguz3sonf84g7kj61f3ruu88tdyp3k2v9ll3ul0h3tbr&__stmp=t2uklg&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) / [Privacy Policy](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=11qfvsq9v6vloatctqxlmbeypb4srhx70i6bxojfi58xl4hwnk1ibzjdvxm04nsf9s6gvb6jvk0cza2kr7679lu5awmzmo2apv4jimmzqnysl6pj0zkd4ib4uspe&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2uklg&__onlt=h) / [Contact us](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=ukxuchlat4j5wozmtcro7qafbz590kn6m30e2e61bfne4id2qergwcq8bjk3kb4iqz0xy73aozfmvzrsshjrh5whvlxjfwh01b5xn2dtvdvvotfumtkxg&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2uklg&__onlt=h)

subject: This race just got real

body:

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T82332d35-3c87-4ff4-b5ab-95b89a7d60c9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

body:
What a recent analysis reveals:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=716%2E181023%2E8YIJLB)
Hi there — it’s Nikki, Jocelyn’s Campaign Manager.
A recent analysis revealed that Mike Duggan, a third-party candidate for governor, is receiving huge campaign checks from GOP donors who have also supported Trump and the extreme Republican candidates.
**While Jocelyn’s campaign is powered by the people, Duggan’s campaign is powered by pro-Trump, anti-labor megadonors.**
Duggan’s donors include former Michigan Republican Party Chair and Trump ally Ron Weiser and charter school profiteer JC Huizenga.
These donors know that a candidate like Duggan will work for their interests — and they know that Jocelyn can’t be bought or sold by corporate interests or megadonors.
Who’s investing in your campaign says _a lot_ about who you’re going to be listening to when you’re in office. **_And Jocelyn is going to be listening to the people of Michigan._**

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: We should be clear about who Charlie Kirk was:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
We should be clear about who Charlie Kirk was: a man who believed that the Civil Rights Act that granted Black Americans the right to vote was a “mistake,” who after the violent attack on Paul Pelosi claimed that “some amazing patriot out there” should bail out his assailant, and accused Jews of controlling “not just the colleges – it’s the nonprofits, it’s the movies, it’s Hollywood, it’s all of it.”
His rhetoric and beliefs were ignorant and sought to disenfranchise millions of Americans – far from “working tirelessly to promote unity” as asserted by the majority in the resolution voted on today.
We can condemn his horrific assassination and the scourge of political violence without uplifting these ideas.
In solidarity,
Alexandria

[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=1&akid=9780%2E2526796%2EJN_Lj6) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=2&akid=9780%2E2526796%2EJN_Lj6) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=3&akid=9780%2E2526796%2EJN_Lj6) | [](https://bsky.app/profile/aoc.bsky.social?t=4&akid=9780%2E2526796%2EJN_Lj6)
---|---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=9780%2E2526796%2EJN_Lj6)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

subject: “What SCUM we have in our country”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Donald Trump is at it again. Early this morning, he attacked me on social media with more baseless attacks.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1838%2E791427%2E8xETAv)
Friend,
Donald Trump is at it again. Early this morning, he attacked me on social media with more baseless, racist attacks.
It was exactly the unhinged ramblings we’ve come to expect from this deeply unwell wannabe king.
He’s directing his base and all of his MAGA propaganda machine to try to smear me and silence me. We have to take these threats seriously and make sure these attacks don’t go unanswered.
**[Will you make a contribution today to say you have my back? We’ll put your contribution to work fighting back against these attacks and building power for our movement.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-sep25.9TUzdV&refcode=em250919-1-subs&t=2&akid=1838%2E791427%2E8xETAv)
A responsible leader would be bringing down the temperature right now. Instead, he’s fanning the flames with these heinous attacks, calling me “disgusting” and “SCUM.”
And he knows exactly what he’s doing. He’s wanted me not just out of Congress but out of our country since his first term.
Trump’s billionaire donors have spent millions trying to take me down because I refuse to be silent and be complicit in Washington’s broken status quo.
**It’s so important that we have the resources for the challenges ahead. So I’m asking you:** **[Please contribute to my campaign today to make sure we have the resources to go toe to toe with Trump, his billionaire cronies and MAGA.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-sep25.9TUzdV&refcode=em250919-1-subs&t=3&akid=1838%2E791427%2E8xETAv)

| | There's a simple 15-second "Morning Test" that tells you more about your male health than expensive medical exams. It’s simple - did you wake up this morning with a rock hard erection or not? name: Signature Spot Closing Soon (VPP)
subject: Thank you, Gov. Newsom!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
You’re running out of time to sign
| **Gavin Newsom just RUINED Donald Trump’s day ⬇️⬇️⬇️** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94035?t=6&akid=21281%2E878179%2E3Rq-yY) Gov. Newsom is a Democratic HERO. His special election could single handedly SAVE the House — _and now, he’s even more popular than Trump!_

[**But we still haven’t heard from YOU. So we’re personally inviting you to THANK Gavin Newsom for defending our democracy! Join 200 top Democrats and ADD YOUR NAME BY MIDNIGHT →**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94035?t=7&akid=21281%2E878179%2E3Rq-yY) | [**DONATE $3 TO SIGN THE THANK YOU CARD »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94035?t=8&akid=21281%2E878179%2E3Rq-yY)
---
TO: Governor Gavin Newsom
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank you for taking a stand. Dear Governor Newsom,

_I am THRILLED about your redistricting plan to CRUSH the MAGA House majority and end Trump’s presidency as we know it!_

I refuse to sit on the sidelines while Trump attempts to STEAL the 2026 midterms.

**Thank goodness we have you leading the charge to FIGHT BACK!**

I’m doing everything in my power to protect Democrats like you who are brave enough to face Trump head-on and risk MAGA revenge.

[**I know you’re facing relentless attacks from Trump and his MAGA minions, so I’m signing this thank you letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to help Democrats keep fighting for justice and WIN in 2026 »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94035?t=9&akid=21281%2E878179%2E3Rq-yY) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94035?t=10&akid=21281%2E878179%2E3Rq-yY)
---

**_X A grateful Democrat_**
\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21281%2E878179%2E3Rq-yY). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21281%2E878179%2E3Rq-yY).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=21281%2E878179%2E3Rq-yY) to request fewer emails. name: Lt. Col. David Flippo
subject: President Trump’s Administration is levying fines against those who refuse deportation orders!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Flippo for Nevada]( "Paid for by David Flippo for Nevada")
body:
In Congress, I will fight to deport those who have no respect for our nation’s immigration laws! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/dc99b800caa7/welcome-to-team-flippo-10340170?e=273c9a71fb)
---
| | [ ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=67e700de62&e=273c9a71fb)
---
| | Patriot,

The United States is a nation of laws, and those who do not respect our laws do not respect our country! Recently, the New York Post reported that the Trump administration has fined illegal immigrants over $1.6 billion for refusing to comply with deportation orders. Now, the Trump Administration is preparing to enforce these fines, aiming to follow through on President Trump's promise to secure our border and deport illegal immigrants from our country!

I am proud to see strong leadership from President Trump and his administration on the border, but unless we send fighters to Congress who will stand with President Trump and enforce our immigration laws, the radical left will undo every bit of progress if they win the next election. Democrats are committed to mass illegal immigration at the expense of the American people, and in Congress, I will fight to secure our border and support President Trump's policies!
---
| [SECURE THE SOUTHERN BORDER](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=32804111dc&e=273c9a71fb "SECURE THE SOUTHERN BORDER")
---
| [DONATE NOW](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=07cb9deabd&e=273c9a71fb "DONATE NOW")
---
| Radical Democrats are determined to fight us at every opportunity in our mission to secure the border! In response to this policy from the Trump Administration, they have begun to say the quiet part out loud. The left has admitted that this policy will bankrupt illegal immigrants, unless they choose to self-deport and leave the country on their own accord. It's almost as if enforcing the law and not providing an incentive for mass illegal immigration, like the Biden Administration, is working.
---
| [ ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=b93af4f3ad&e=273c9a71fb)
---
| As your next Congressman, I will work tirelessly to secure our nation's southern border, respect and enforce our immigration law, and protect American communities. The American people made it clear in 2024 that the Democrats' message and approach to immigration were not what they wanted.

The Democrats know that they cannot afford to lose NV-04 if they want a shot at taking back the House, so they are pouring endless resources into this race. With your help, we can flip this seat red and secure our southern border!
---
| [DONATE TODAY](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=1ff23927a1&e=273c9a71fb "DONATE TODAY")
---
| Together, we will keep America strong, protect our freedoms, and ensure that our children and grandchildren inherit a safe, secure, and free nation.
---
| For God and Country, Lt. Col. David Flippo (Ret.) _Republican Candidate for U.S. Congress_
Nevada’s 4th Congressional District
_**[www.Flippo4NV.com](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=ea3a426924&e=273c9a71fb)**_

clean_body: In Congress, I will fight to deport those who have no respect for our nation’s immigration laws! | | | | | | | Patriot, The United States is a nation of laws, and those who do not respect our laws do not respect our country! Recently, the New York Post reported that the Trump administration has fined illegal immigrants over $1.6 billion for refusing to comply with deportation orders. Now, the Trump Administration is preparing to enforce these fines, aiming to follow through on President Trump's promise to secure our border and deport illegal immigrants from our country! I am proud to see strong leadership from President Trump and his administration on the border, but unless we send fighters to Congress who will stand with President Trump and enforce our immigration laws, the radical left will undo every bit of progress if they win the next election. Democrats are committed to mass illegal immigration at the expense of the American people, and in Congress, I will fight to secure our border and support President Trump's policies! | "SECURE THE SOUTHERN BORDER" | "DONATE NOW" | Radical Democrats are determined to fight us at every opportunity in our mission to secure the border! In response to this policy from the Trump Administration, they have begun to say the quiet part out loud. The left has admitted that this policy will bankrupt illegal immigrants, unless they choose to self-deport and leave the country on their own accord. It's almost as if enforcing the law and not providing an incentive for mass illegal immigration, like the Biden Administration, is working. | | As your next Congressman, I will work tirelessly to secure our nation's southern border, respect and enforce our immigration law, and protect American communities. The American people made it clear in 2024 that the Democrats' message and approach to immigration were not what they wanted. The Democrats know that they cannot afford to lose NV-04 if they want a shot at taking back the House, so they are pouring endless resources into this race. With your help, we can flip this seat red and secure our southern border! | "DONATE TODAY" | Together, we will keep America strong, protect our freedoms, and ensure that our children and grandchildren inherit a safe, secure, and free nation. | For God and Country, Lt. Col. David Flippo (Ret.) Republican Candidate for U.S. Congress Nevada’s 4th Congressional District | | | | | | | | | | | | | | "Paid for by David Flippo for Nevada" | Copyright © 2025 Committee To Elect David Flippo, All rights reserved.

name: Adam Schwarze
subject: We all need to be a bit more like Charlie Kirk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
As a former Navy SEAL, this isn’t the first battlefield death that I’ve seen - but it may be the most poignant | [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=6d20d49a2a074683be024031b724d59d&_e=vhya-vMjdV7BPTxpEJZcG1oh80Zos374vAykieJ6F9a91LeODBs5CIGP2AyrQc-hoJEV8ghvDM7Y6_nwaGbnQmEnkJvMu3mtiCMqQ8pK_w1I1XrYQmHgBERkErWxG7TdaiGT9bQwnd7ShCprJ-dWWOpfN-x3iIrjaBVU6tNX5sdmfwl_57T4vxWMhckkIy3S_gbnjqcpjKSs-uSlykw25zTDB58BC7C2blY0C3cko1yXmwWEWJHd0Qg1GJNgfUVdEd-H2LmcXfHy3NgQgocItNouoGTx8W4nSza7dCJ9uQLvsTIYOVF_0bTnLlVJPcNLQ1KjurRSHnG9ooOKSzaaoGctpO-4TqmMcyIAHTqC8uazOQJngIIMvGFELFHyV9JDR5mI0w5_bQ0Bi7V4BRJIz96TTUhcjT9vF0cWVMholXb79p2zI4euqhqrt5tiwDznAz5ETpdDTdH3h7VHKW_pV8IV-u2fXI8qyS7tdkZk8jQEb7g7H0MvywKD8XWsiAxRoQJh52JEqcxzyKKoN6ynj9u14skQ6H5OhwL7kAudI01AaO-57RDJzTbxMeWaSOctVggsfT3oNIG8bCsPnxfyZS5Xnz9S_0PE8J0Pm1jaBiwqUlRK7RSmdZDd4M5wgSjMIxT6O9OYZd3tip41fBpIAaFC28Lcfo3IV70dYoI9AEVhuYf17gx-k_mckyAIH8FZ5XWwLqO7NvhsumDfsMK57IbBwzfWW_z4SPBvJmPrwXa32da4TVMcKuGVuf_iCV5hiDMFJk6yX8KMm1w_i3mKorpUeXKh81lpvbATgqJUQqY%3D)

---

Fellow Conservative,

The nation mourns the tragic assassination of Charlie Kirk, gunned down on September 10, 2025, at Utah Valley University for daring to speak truth to power. His fearless voice—championing freedom, faith, and the American Dream—was silenced in a brazen act of political violence that has shaken us all to our core. Charlie fought hate with educated debate, not guns, using sharp wit and unyielding principle to challenge radical agendas. **Yet, he was punished with a bullet for his courage to speak.**

My name is Adam Schwarze. **I’m a former Navy SEAL running for the United States Senate in Minnesota, and Charlie Kirk is an inspiration to me.** Over the course of my career, I’ve met some very special men and women willing to put their lives on the line for God and country in some of the most inhospitable places imaginable.

**_I never had the pleasure of meeting Charlier Kirk, but as a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran, I can say with authority that he has to be one of the bravest individuals ever to champion the values of the United States of America._**

Charlie’s candor, professionalism, and respect for everyone he encountered will stick with me as I work to earn the support of every Minnesotan voter during this campaign. **Charlie’s life should serve as an example to my opponents on the other side of the aisle on how to treat political opponents and people who share different viewpoints, with respect.**

I joined the Marine Corps after 9/11, served in over 70 countries, and fought chaos and extremism. I know what it takes to serve something bigger than yourself—just like Charlie did with every debate, every speech, every stand he took. This Senate race is my most challenging mission yet. Minnesota hasn’t gone red since 1976. I’m the underdog. _**[But with your support, we can honor Charlie’s legacy by stopping the radicals who enabled this tragedy](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=6d20d49a2a074683be024031b724d59d&_e=vhya-vMjdV7BPTxpEJZcG1oh80Zos374vAykieJ6F9a91LeODBs5CIGP2AyrQc-hoJEV8ghvDM7Y6_nwaGbnQmEnkJvMu3mtiCMqQ8pK_w1I1XrYQmHgBERkErWxG7TdaiGT9bQwnd7ShCprJ-dWWOpfN-x3iIrjaBVU6tNX5sdmfwl_57T4vxWMhckkIy3S_gbnjqcpjKSs-uSlykw25zTDB58BC7C2blY0C3cko1yXmwWEWJHd0Qg1GJNgfUVdEd-H2LmcXfHy3NgQgocItNouoGTx8W4nSza7dCJ9uQLYISHR9P2JBOHjKnRlOrZajT3nxMjrlCSARpSPgDrUSn-SGrQSXcEAXkY9TdEg1mSsO2x2qoy-J4d3X0gqNYKFqF8UPHaefLMin77QsqmOpPh_X0FLWKpw-pkJMMOjE04lZy9CJ_YsLiYLwKJKHQm6jN9C-bmL0w9jpqAHh3V7wSUUNnqBfR4xHcsPqgGnZN_mtnBjupQ4vFe09XuHCGt9WAc8_6H6ZsxP4KwfMZh8AgLKpfCaBisah2k47TLz7tiAfngDs12o45Gj5vILmvYs8ojZGWxUlw6IxQX4lkgqpgewmfz9RkEBXYviEoKnh7MXqjPouabuRLQnTvgRCGLPIOIfoif692yrvv7ODLb6xs5lAqCkQiay_tDAl7v0O0Jen3xruUjwQn7Dc7rHN1NkEyZwtIjZnf1y-5IhFjdnUUEfErEmNxqrVFNLMnXaxKhpf0mn0E6UwLqay5SkDjGZTtjg8NdS_YBka7XLC6E4ylvIugw__K9jx3jhPirUty4%3D)**_.

Unfortunately, I’m running against Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, who, like her boss, shares a long history of inflammatory rhetoric.

Days before Charlie’s untimely death, Tim Walz, speaking in front of constituents at a political rally, lamented that President Trump hadn’t yet died, making his scripted condolences for Charlie’s family ring all the more hollow as he _**failed to disavow the extremists celebrating this tragedy online.**_

_**I thank God that President Trump defeated Kamala Harris last November.**_****

**Can you imagine a vice president with so little moral clarity that he would tolerate the hatred that led to Charlie’s murder?** **
**
I can’t.

Tim Walz and my opponent in this Senate race personify everything Charlie Kirk stood against: **arrogance, deceit, and a progressive agenda that sees conservatives not as opponents, but as enemies to be crushed.** Their party’s years of demonizing voices like Charlie’s set the stage for this violence. Their silence on the specifics of this tragedy speaks louder than their words.

They both push to disarm law-abiding Minnesotans while radicals run rampant. They both pander with land acknowledgments, dividing us further. They both view Republicans as threats to be eliminated, just as Charlie was targeted for his beliefs. **The woman in the photo below is my opponent, by the way.**

**If they get their way, they’ll impose their warped vision on America, silencing patriots like Charlie Kirk forever—patriots who countered lies with reason, not violence.**

This fight isn’t just about Walz or Peggy Flanagan — it’s about the future Charlie Kirk died for. It’s about you, me, and everyone who believes in our nation’s founding values. They think we’re “buffoons.” **They think we’ll stay silent. They think we’ll let Charlie’s murder fade.**

clean_body: As a former Navy SEAL, this isn’t the first battlefield death that I’ve seen - but it may be the most poignant | Fellow Conservative, The nation mourns the tragic assassination of Charlie Kirk, gunned down on September 10, 2025, at Utah Valley University for daring to speak truth to power. His fearless voice—championing freedom, faith, and the American Dream—was silenced in a brazen act of political violence that has shaken us all to our core. Charlie fought hate with educated debate, not guns, using sharp wit and unyielding principle to challenge radical agendas. Yet, he was punished with a bullet for his courage to speak. My name is Adam Schwarze. I’m a former Navy SEAL running for the United States Senate in Minnesota, and Charlie Kirk is an inspiration to me. Over the course of my career, I’ve met some very special men and women willing to put their lives on the line for God and country in some of the most inhospitable places imaginable. I never had the pleasure of meeting Charlier Kirk, but as a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran, I can say with authority that he has to be one of the bravest individuals ever to champion the values of the United States of America. Charlie’s candor, professionalism, and respect for everyone he encountered will stick with me as I work to earn the support of every Minnesotan voter during this campaign. Charlie’s life should serve as an example to my opponents on the other side of the aisle on how to treat political opponents and people who share different viewpoints, with respect. I joined the Marine Corps after 9/11, served in over 70 countries, and fought chaos and extremism. I know what it takes to serve something bigger than yourself—just like Charlie did with every debate, every speech, every stand he took. This Senate race is my most challenging mission yet. Minnesota hasn’t gone red since 1976. I’m the underdog. . Unfortunately, I’m running against Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, who, like her boss, shares a long history of inflammatory rhetoric. Days before Charlie’s untimely death, Tim Walz, speaking in front of constituents at a political rally, lamented that President Trump hadn’t yet died, making his scripted condolences for Charlie’s family ring all the more hollow as he failed to disavow the extremists celebrating this tragedy online. I thank God that President Trump defeated Kamala Harris last November.** Can you imagine a vice president with so little moral clarity that he would tolerate the hatred that led to Charlie’s murder? I can’t. Tim Walz and my opponent in this Senate race personify everything Charlie Kirk stood against: arrogance, deceit, and a progressive agenda that sees conservatives not as opponents, but as enemies to be crushed. Their party’s years of demonizing voices like Charlie’s set the stage for this violence. Their silence on the specifics of this tragedy speaks louder than their words. They both push to disarm law-abiding Minnesotans while radicals run rampant. They both pander with land acknowledgments, dividing us further. They both view Republicans as threats to be eliminated, just as Charlie was targeted for his beliefs. The woman in the photo below is my opponent, by the way. If they get their way, they’ll impose their warped vision on America, silencing patriots like Charlie Kirk forever—patriots who countered lies with reason, not violence. This fight isn’t just about Walz or Peggy Flanagan — it’s about the future Charlie Kirk died for. It’s about you, me, and everyone who believes in our nation’s founding values. They think we’re “buffoons.” They think we’ll stay silent. They think we’ll let Charlie’s murder fade. When elected to the United States Senate, I promise I won’t stay silent; I won’t let his memory or work fade into the history books. . Your contribution of $5, $10, or $25 today will fuel our fight to keep Charlie’s vision alive—building a Minnesota and an America where free speech is protected, not punished with bullets. You have a choice: let them sweep this under the rug, or join me to ensure Charlie’s sacrifice galvanizes us to reclaim our values through the same fearless, reasoned debate he embodied. I’ve fought tough battles before. With you by my side, we’ll win this one—for Charlie, for America. With steadfast resolve, Adam Schwarze Retired Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA** | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

body:
| Peter, While Dr. Ami Bera is working tirelessly to protect access to health care, his Republican colleagues continue to undermine our democracy, healthcare, and fan the flames of division.

| | Hi Peter, it's Austin. Much to my disappointment, I didn’t make my high school basketball team as a teen. But as Lieutenant Governor, I’ve seen firsthand how sports teams and extracurriculars provide invaluable safe spaces for our youth to grow and thrive. That’s why I’m so passionate about investing in Pennsylvania's kids. Here in Harrisburg, we’ve been working hard to invest in life-changing programs. One of my favorites has to be the Philadelphia Youth Basketball organization. PYB is helping keep our kids off the streets and gives them opportunities to thrive, not just in basketball but also through guitar lessons, entrepreneurship workshops, and more. **This is just one example of why I’m so proud to be an advocate for the next generation of Pennsylvanians.** **[Peter, if you'd like to support me in helping shape our future generation, would you chip in just $5 now to my re-election campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115544585/570670066/1445643945?amount=5&source=SBD_AD_EM_FR_091925_BBALL_30DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDE3ZTUzMS04Nzk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mUJGkOB7nPni9afmQnl4YRkY79ZSQyBxwOWVI8z6oCU=)** | | **[CHIP IN $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115544586/570670067/410908810?amount=5&source=SBD_AD_EM_FR_091925_BBALL_30DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDE3ZTUzMS04Nzk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mUJGkOB7nPni9afmQnl4YRkY79ZSQyBxwOWVI8z6oCU=)**

Investing in our youth and community programs around the state helps us create huge transformations and improvements in our neighborhoods. We’re giving our kids and teens opportunities to **succeed _and_ dream bigger. Two things that are invaluable during these uncertain times.**
Governor Shapiro and I often joke about basketball, disagreeing on how good he **_actually_** is. _(He thinks he's really good.)_

But as Lieutenant Governor, I’ve seen firsthand how sports teams and extracurriculars provide invaluable safe spaces for our youth to grow and thrive. For the first time, polling shows more Democrats identify with socialism over free market capitalism, with over 53% of Democrats favoring Bernie Sanders’ brand of extremism. | **POLITICO: Poll: Capitalism is out ... and socialism is in**
Fellow American,

For the first time, polling shows more Democrats identify with socialism over free market capitalism, _**with over 53% of Democrats favoring Bernie Sanders' brand of extremism.**_

The choice has never been clearer -- American free market capitalism or Soviet style command and control.

[**If we don't wage an aggressive campaign to defend this seat and our Majority**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d4eb86da88594ed7a71a506a2ab89f7f&_e=CWwLq6hUDBB98jMffa5SZNoRBHrC78mtXBRU_vp6LwpRGfvJYGS_9l1Iwoy9h1Sfwz9SWOTTL7nZTH1KblesOLGMh0n6G_6V5XMUzuYsJP1-K4lQ2zuZi5A2sLt4zokuPB-dSOUHmqmg_1I4PjhnStiR_c8uXI0HTtKKbvoqLaUaWNQ4WGeGO7pvBErcMKLsZr39lNJYLwhNTGqe-Jhg1B1cMWxoYkkCP_lvNLzzUAMfiWQFr5CBXQZPJpOqtzp_QF9F-5F5o-SCvRLW46q9M91BbM9UkFBo9AfUCx7dHIsOlKKBhwwmCrPmp0XIMU_AThByH-Yeng7RSxjHb7Vi4VhrTAA4jk9QJgKDNh9TGTy6Df7IMOyCijkVX7pBkOQ6cxUMEVYCtLJqMeDsfnD_gu3aJoOrwOlLbzt5bgZyeyATh2LCUwi863npM-yckA04mYwzK4w-VPoI0_5rp7lWad9CUfr-dzYZjmBcpWzwh5jhwW8vqjOcthpqWMYq1oNIONdLjcX6qJBoAU5k1ckFi0bxcpHk5bvwHDQHcfVoQ9pQHLhNU8GoJvReMLfephcEAaRbiiprwLLYojzXfyiNUMtNWbHm6bdi-x0z1la6KdTf-mihv1Z3-nmuwYJUPS_yS81VkgmwTcuu0xYZ7dpHFQlNS-ztsG6XGk1AzPS6Fhw_x7DgGAf-4tXdt3baTmBQNHDUxVId8XSmTsYOift4Hja16-ZjaAbLqFokm9sd_zGONlmC4e_ZlJE4EqAScfBpVcTTtGhxEmJGNgs3Lad0uw%3D%3D), this is the agenda that will dominate one branch of our government and bring President Trump's agenda to a crashing halt.

I've been saying for years that Democrats have allowed radical socialist ideology to seep into the party, and now it's gone mainstream.

If we don't take action now, the Left's extremism will spread further. Our generation has never witnessed anything like this: the public martyrdom of a Christian leader for boldly sharing his faith. That’s what makes Charlie Kirk’s death so different, and why it has shaken people around the world. Had he died in a tragic accident, we would still grieve deeply. But the fact that Charlie’s murder unfolded before our eyes, in clips that flooded our feeds, forced us to confront the reality of modern-day martyrdom. It shocked us because it reminded us that faith isn’t casual or comfortable - it is costly. And yet, that cost is already bearing fruit. All across America, churches are filling again. People who haven’t darkened a church door in decades are returning. Why? The blood of the martyrs is the seed of the Church. That phrase was penned in 197 AD by the early Christian writer Tertullian at a time when the Church was growing at the cost of the blood of believers. Today is no different. clean_body: Faith isn’t casual or comfortable—it is costly.| | | | | Our generation has never witnessed anything like this: the public martyrdom of a Christian leader for boldly sharing his faith. That’s what makes Charlie Kirk’s death so different, and why it has shaken people around the world. Had he died in a tragic accident, we would still grieve deeply. But the fact that Charlie’s murder unfolded before our eyes, in clips that flooded our feeds, forced us to confront the reality of modern-day martyrdom. It shocked us because it reminded us that faith isn’t casual or comfortable - it is costly. And yet, that cost is already bearing fruit. All across America, churches are filling again. People who haven’t darkened a church door in decades are returning. Why? The blood of the martyrs is the seed of the Church. That phrase was penned in 197 AD by the early Christian writer Tertullian at a time when the Church was growing at the cost of the blood of believers. Today is no different. | | | | | International Donors— donate Donate by Check or Money Order** Sean Feucht Ministries 310 Third Street NEWashington, DC 20002 Contributions are tax-deductible. | | | | | ---|---|--- Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Hold The Line. Click to unsubscribe.

name: Jayapal HQ
subject: Is this what Make American Great Again means?
disclaimer_text: paid for by everyone else
body:
Billionaires are winning, workers are losing, and Trump is laughing as his plan unfolds.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250919-5446-footer&t=1&akid=5446%2E420207%2EabzOJG)
**The Trump Economy is in full swing, and it’s working exactly as designed: to crush working families and boost billionaires.**
[**Pramila is fighting back for an economy that works for everyone — will you support her work for the progressive movement by pitching in $3 today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250919-1?refcode=em20250919-5446&amount=3&refcode2=5446_420207_abzOJG&akid=5446%2E420207%2EabzOJG)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250919-1?amount=3&refcode=em20250919-5446&refcode2=5446_420207_abzOJG&akid=5446%2E420207%2EabzOJG)**
Peter,
Unemployment is up. Layoffs are soaring, small business owners and working families are struggling, and the elite are amassing wealth faster than ever.
**This is the Trump Economy — a billionaire’s dream, paid for by everyone else.**
While everyday people work extra jobs and shifts just to make it to next week, the top 1% just got another tax cut – funded by cuts to Medicaid, SNAP, and other vital services poor and working people rely on.
**Pramila is fighting back**. Everyday, she’s taking corporate greed and the Trump Economy head-on by fighting to:
* Stop corporate monopolies and build stronger anti-trust laws
* Raise the minimum wage
* Secure Medicare for All
* Create a National Domestic Workers Bill of Rights

Pramila’s working for all of us — teachers, farmworkers, baristas, nurses, rideshare drivers — not the rich and powerful.
Trump and his billionaire buddies think they’re getting away with it, but with grassroots support from people like you, Pramila is working to grow our progressive movement and secure accountability, justice, and an economy that works for everyone.
[**Peter, can you chip in $5, $10, or any amount to fuel Pramila’s work for our movement?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250919-1?refcode=em20250919-5446&refcode2=5446_420207_abzOJG&akid=5446%2E420207%2EabzOJG)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250919-1?amount=3&refcode=em20250919-5446&refcode2=5446_420207_abzOJG&akid=5446%2E420207%2EabzOJG)**
The billionaires behind the Trump Economy are starting to get nervous — because when working people across the country stand up, their schemes don’t stand a chance.
Thank you for standing with us,
Team Pramila
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250919-5446-footer&t=2&refcode2=5446_420207_abzOJG&akid=5446%2E420207%2EabzOJG)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: Tucker Carlson
subject: Charlie gave it all. We owe him this.
body:
Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.

* * *
Right now, Charlie would say, "Don't you dare quit" | | | | [](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2umjm&__onlt=h)
---
Friend,
---
I don't write emails like this often. But right now? After what happened to Charlie... _I can't stay quiet._ **Charlie Kirk was my friend.** Not just someone I admired, but someone I loved and respected deeply. Losing him was devastating.
---
[](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2umjm&__onlt=h)
---
In many ways, all of us share in this loss. Charlie fought every day of his life for each one of us... fighting to keep America as great, free, and prosperous. No one I know ever fought for that harder than Charlie. America won't ever be the same. **No one can ever replace him — but we can make sure his legacy continues on.** _We owe him that._ Because if you knew Charlie, you would know exactly what he would say to us right now: _**"Don't you dare quit."**_ Charlie poured his heart into building a movement to save America. He believed in young people. He believed in ordinary Americans. And he believed that even in our darkest hours, America was the beacon of goodness, freedom, and truth. That's what the Turning Point movement was all about — and Charlie gave everything he had to that fight. **And our task now is not only to protect what he built — it's to grow it bigger, stronger, and bolder than anyone ever thought possible.** More students. More churches. More families. More courage from everyday Americans to stand up and fight for what is right. Turning Point USA was Charlie's vehicle to save America. **He didn't just start a movement... _he started a revival._** And now, Friend, we must carry that forward. If you share the same sense of responsibility that I do to honor Charlie's work and press on with his vision... **_Then please join me in keeping his fight alive by making a gift to Turning Point USA today._** **[Let's make Turning Point USA the biggest thing that this nation has ever seen... bigger than Charlie ever thought possible. That's how we honor him best.](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2umjm&__onlt=h)**
---
[ **Give in Charlie's Honor**
**Support Turning Point USA**](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2umjm&__onlt=h)
---
Rest in peace, Charlie. We'll carry the torch you lit from here.
---
**For Charlie,** Tucker Carlson

clean_body: | | This is it. We're down to the wire. My election is less than 2 months away, and the future of Virginia and our nation hangs in the balance! I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I'm running for Governor of Virginia. But I'm not just running for office--I'm running to stop the liberal establishment from destroying our country. They're pouring MILLIONS into my Democrat opponent's campaign, and we're running out of time--chip in NOW to protect our country's future. I need 1,000 Patriots like you to contribute to my campaign in the next hour. If we can do that, I know we can win this. But if we fall short, the consequences will be devastating: higher taxes, more regulations, and a government completely out of touch with our values. Your donation right now can make all the difference. Let's send a loud and clear message that we won't back down. Thank you for standing with me when it matters most. Together, we can protect our values and continue leading America in the right direction. -Winsome Earle-Sears Immigrant. Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. Lieutenant Governor. I’m Winsome Earle-Sears, and I’ve held many titles in my life. Each one hasn’t been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I’ve tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born. Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community means so much more. ** This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this. | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. "Upcoming Elections")” page to learn more Early voting is **safe, secure, and the proven path to victory.** We cannot let bad weather, emergencies, or unexpected circumstances stop us from turning out this fall. That’s why banking Republican votes early is the cornerstone of our strategy. We’ve seen this work before. In 2021, early voting was key to electing Governor Glenn Youngkin, Lt. Governor Winsome Earle-Sears, Attorney General Jason Miyares, and a Republican House Majority. This year is shaping up just like four years ago—and once again, Republicans must build a robust early vote operation to win. The stakes could not be higher.
