clean_body: | | | | Friend, Early voting is officially underway in Virginia—and it is absolutely critical that every Republican makes a plan to vote early. Here are some key things to remember: Early voting is open NOW through 5:00 p.m. on November 1 The deadline to apply for a ballot to be mailed to you is 5:00 p.m. on October 24 The deadline to register to vote or update an existing registration through the "Citizen Portal") is October 24 You can see who is on your ballot by viewing the "candidates list") You can view the Virginia Department of Elections “ "Upcoming Elections")” page to learn more Early voting is safe, secure, and the proven path to victory. We cannot let bad weather, emergencies, or unexpected circumstances stop us from turning out this fall. That’s why banking Republican votes early is the cornerstone of our strategy. We’ve seen this work before. In 2021, early voting was key to electing Governor Glenn Youngkin, Lt. Governor Winsome Earle-Sears, Attorney General Jason Miyares, and a Republican House Majority. This year is shaping up just like four years ago—and once again, Republicans must build a robust early vote operation to win. The stakes could not be higher. Virginia Democrats are running on a radical agenda that would: Raise the cost of living with higher taxes and reckless spending. Destroy women’s sports and parental rights in schools. Undermine public safety with early release for violent criminals and sanctuary policies for illegal aliens. Push dangerous energy mandates that will hike your utility bills and risk blackouts. Stopping this extremism starts with getting as many Republican votes in early as possible. Every ballot cast early is one less the Democrats can cancel out. 👉👉👉 Make your plan today : "CLICK HERE") With your help, we will build another historic Republican victory this November. Sincerely, The Republican Party of Virginia** \- = PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF VIRGINIA

body:
Our playbook works, and now we’re sharing it across the country |
#
---
Team, In 2022, the pundits said the Michigan Governor’s race was too close to call. They predicted a nail-biter. But Governor Gretchen Whitmer won — _by 11 points._ In a swing state. In a tough year. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115545005/570671585/-1120195955?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250919_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjk3YmE0NzEtODk5NS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NV5vJJ4AT0XhOrImcw1iPMF971jnFDvi9Pn8234lph8=) How? By running a campaign that met voters where they were, built trust, and fought like hell for working people and their freedoms. **Now, Fight Like Hell PAC is taking that same playbook and putting it in the hands of community leaders across the country!** This fall, we’re hitting the road to run in-person trainings and we're kicking it off in two key battlegrounds — Michigan and Wisconsin. **We’re training candidates, staff, and organizers with the skills, strategies, and grit they’ll need to win tough races, just like Gretchen did.** But launching these trainings takes resources. Then Wednesday, I'll be talking with Assistant Attorney General for Civil Rights, Harmeet Dhillon about the aftermath of Charlie Kirk's assassination. You won't want to miss it!

If you watch the show or have been reading the newsletter for a while you know I have been on my own MAHA/wellness journey. ## A life lived well...
Charlie Kirk was just 31 when he was assassinated.
I keep coming back that number for a lot of reasons.
Not because it's young--though it is--but because of what he packed into those years.
The first and most obvious is what he accomplished by this age.
He built Turning Point USA from the ground up, turning a tiny organization into a business that now employs thousands.
And that's not even mentioning his most profound personal accomplishments:
By 31 he was a husband and father, leading his family with love and faith while continuing to grow his business.
I think it's an example that we should all reflect on.
Charlie lived such a meaningful life in 31 short years--what will we be able to say our accomplishments are when we look back our lives?...

| | Dear Friend, Another week in the D.C. sewer—Democrats tried to spend more of your money. Shocking, I know. They wanted to spend over a trillion new dollars in the CR, but we pushed back and got the CR passed. Y’all know I don’t like CRs. Actually, I hate them, but [I held my nose and voted for it](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/w73T2otKmIV35td9NFhPuCHWPS01PEITAeez0hQGgQgU4gaNGolT5egJSzF-AxosgBTLk2gsQYNB1HwV8-PFrqcnbuoDgmhU1b3R-vCt1nHXdLfTISvLIvl5f8o8sbeElygQMuVbXllmDY2gk0MBl8mKZvn1K9fAMLwU99lXmgwpbyeAoahHg1asO3RZgpaanPt2SIP2UnctkqDOViFDK7mHf1yAcPpleNa-a_zZUpBvV3dcupZIFwkEUYzWObe0gic2Vl_PSVX03mEAZ8o1Ow7jRftTtA7nEFGEen_XM949ystvSrQNq4D5Qc_juH14z6PWKjWRWHzxKYWrrystSkWnmqM7x9MkSpbZMtDutnoz3wL-DMZUh9q5Uw7KTGjxcMrwcqAXsjaXiiChibCIPFjCmdUMMPqF0_1mDKRSAhQFWGcX-eKDfWQX-wxPBEY/NcEunbmDjmvzAkbgGUJp7v-ogxDKuWf2/13). The government will stay open (yay). The main takeaway is that we **need** to start having budget hearings and actually dealing with them! It’s not rocket science to this East Tennessee boy. [Trump’s cleanup of DC is working—despite the left’s screaming](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/Yt9JD7RUgEt-oM-hiC-b1p8NUAmUkR-8mshK5M-vRxb1E-P1I-mlu16XAlR5YJYDuw5nToMFBACB2eco9r65jRXcWuXP6dXTVzOG1kDpxOT3ASpJ0crr9-8L2SmDfDu6IyQxq-3Wt1WiGrJ8BQ0sNBlM5au9dAI2_sDHfes4Jf9wuLZsBOCNufaMg_KKWRLceQif5CICA3ot67v_kci9fGu1rCFZG0rYswSKZIy_Anj0tVxbAm6VdpmE0qdD214zs_ID6AenCoyJPi1SOOxlekyKuUmiRLxboEVvtukAht0kTrei1Uvr_1OFefjov33lO_GSnP2DZmF35DtoOhLJzaDlybSosOwYqqiIpIEI9VtS6-0nPPSXz-9wDwEZ3BScozA2kHQeR8QqS3URPPDFKTdXaLnC0m4cuMTz_bhjrG19gRV0v1It3gSYJr0unC4/UvaETWR0u1Ha0HF0bBVMpG_agQF-YOkX/13). You can’t argue with the facts, folks. **Violent crime reduced by 36%**. A week of **ZERO murders** —unheard of in DC. My weekend plans? [Tennessee football](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/aSeHHcfhHgsiAsGFL3hfb_-IzronwR0ek1ro5255o1H7CTbfAGdD00DwwXzolT8C0ocudJvEXucbniya2mt1wm9m1-iQ4MyFgPGKrGn4S3m3eG9V7_kb9bUA7HO1qEs0BaP0DK6m_CfvAgYjVVTasQOgSaW824QmVD4Kt1Q6OUHCIvdy-3a9NeigrQOXEysGsaT1b4hxbH_SmVgbRoMOfIuE9-4rMarIsPDlyNRqfUyrpMv0qXJOf3vX66f28WoE6mSD-eeOtiNuaw0fZEDIsapelXZZY_LaEqx7msGB_uInK0H6UQ6Oyc7jfkQDd64fvHdTOh6E_5MAF3bXrE8a_4ZB03k813vVDU9aiNN-Z0BJK--x9HcmPiW1IRBmkHpf5wzUlOzmKUIwTO67n7XrI3f6ADs8XbtcaHAGaL0PLgKiRsF5s3aUB2Dws91n15O5OBX6sBXyE0kz5xMMN9oJ10ksHLJn1loMXzu6/znSp1WD7szDbigsmFYDeTD90YV57b2W4/13), donkey wrangling, and learning how to TikTok. I finally gave in and made an account. If you’re on the TikTok, give me a follow [@realtimburchett](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/FRicRq933FEpsmDQ486DQEXhTcKIGOule3DogiOS9btt7xucZiU3SK-RxWqogpKayxMzurBPTC0LFGhfeb2ebSw25hR4RtdChKr3Sy7XWR3FAQkpk5JhrFIpZpp0AFKNknmIdxyuIBkHtpFGBqQPvhP0G4Oz8pwVx1OYvCTzgvpJxeQR2dZiEc5dHgZJLOc7rKVH5wVZnn2zZbeqJxxLyspAAdoqSpnLdJJN0QdQqyuThPL_Noh79skNMFE9IFgaQKWn7IHzcRvZXIqyvOGmkxQVza72EnU5Akh26jcXfSG88_yRu__BMsUMaFJERNsMPujHp64FpFCk1m-8O7UyLLQBeWXCjK6V5IJmXEGaVD57B6daaeFmb_Pkp2ox69OtTKhcAQYfd36o3YQ6TrLx-JPDN3XK6F1piM9MeO9sdlwmID-VJffo1eF2S-DQvmfM-S0Ujr6fOSog/qFYzUv5PiIURteIOoUgaQFL4hz34PZ04/13)!

body:
| **_Politico:_ House GOP leaders move to extend block on tariff termination votes** Earlier this week, Mariannette Miller-Meeks voted once again to protect the chaotic tariffs wreaking havoc on Iowa farmers, small businesses, and family budgets. Her vote ensured that legislation to roll them back can't even make it to the House floor.

_But, Peter, should we really be surprised?_

This is the third time she's taken this position. And every time she does, the costs land directly on Iowa families. **These tariffs are draining $2,300 per year from the average Iowan's pocketbook. That's money that should be paying for groceries, rent, gas, and school supplies. Even Senator Chuck Grassley commented that these tariffs were "stupid policy."**

By voting to shield these taxes on working families, Miller-Meeks isn't protecting Iowa. She's protecting her party bosses at the direct expense of the people she's supposed to represent.

subject: Crime is out of control in major American cities - In Congress, I will fight to get it under control
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GRANTHAM FOR CONGRESS]()
body:
Charlotte is only one example; Democrat-led cities repeatedly release violent offenders, and the consequences are catastrophic

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/4267cbfa9b0b/welcome-to-team-grantham-10141099?e=0b767f7f9d)
---
[|
---](https://mcshanellc.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a964730c3815d48603a3e5f85&id=62f5b744ee&e=0b767f7f9d)
| | | | | | Friend,
It is hard to write about crime in this country and not mention the assassination of our good friend Charlie Kirk. My thoughts and prayers are with his wife and children and the cause he served.
By now, most of us have seen the disturbing video in which a violent repeat offender stabbed a woman three times, once in the neck, and killed her. The offender has a long rap sheet of criminal offenses, including larceny, breaking and entering, and armed robbery. The tragedy is a classic example of a violent repeat offender, let back out into society thanks to liberal “soft on crime” policies in a Democrat-run city.
The Democrats’ response is what you would expect. Silence or excuses. The legacy media seems to want to ignore it because it is politically inconvenient for them. The policies supported by Democrats in the state of North Carolina, like cashless bail, allow these violent repeat offenders back on the streets, instead of staying behind bars where they belong. Criticize those policies or mention the facts of the case, and Democrats resort to the “Republicans are racist” defense.
It is vitally important that Republicans maintain their House of Representatives majority because radical, far-left Democrats intend to take these “soft on crime” policies to the federal level. Democrats are far more concerned with political correctness than with protecting the American people.
I have fought for tough-on-crime policies that protect the lives of Arizonans while in the State Legislature – I’ll do the same in the U.S. Congress! We have an opportunity to deliver real solutions to the American people, and winning the upcoming midterms will go a long way toward ensuring we deliver the “America First” agenda!

---
[|
---](https://mcshanellc.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a964730c3815d48603a3e5f85&id=5219c4702b&e=0b767f7f9d)
| [DONATE TO STOP “SOFT ON CRIME” POLICIES](https://mcshanellc.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a964730c3815d48603a3e5f85&id=3d57198189&e=0b767f7f9d)
---
| | _**I will work to defund liberal jurisdictions that are more concerned with political correctness than protecting American citizens. American citizens should not fear for their lives every time they leave their home, because the leaders of the city they live in choose to let repeat, violent criminals back onto the streets!**_
_**As your next Congressman, I will work to provide our law enforcement with the resources they need to protect Americans and prosecute criminals, no matter how much the left resists.**_
---
| [DONATE TO SUPPORT THE CAMPAIGN](https://mcshanellc.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a964730c3815d48603a3e5f85&id=e7cb215f08&e=0b767f7f9d)
---
|
---

---
| | **WHITE HOUSE DEMANDS JUSTICE FOR UKRAINIAN COMMUTER KILLED IN TRANSIT SYSTEM MORE DANGEROUS THAN ‘WAR ZONE’**
“Charlotte Mayor Vi Lyles, a Democrat, is facing criticism over her response to the killing of Ukrainian refugee Iryna Zarutska...”

On Thursday’s broadcast of CNN News Central, Sanchez insisted that Jimmy Kimmel hadn’t really implied Charlie Kirk’s assassin was a Trump supporter. Instead, he claimed, Kimmel was just “making a point” about right-wing finger-pointing after Kirk’s murder. But Kimmel’s actual [...] | [](http://trk.libertyledger._ZD01In0/vgKagtjl-GU9xq5eXdbfig)

# **[Texas University President Resigns](http://trk.libertyledger.-Tzz0e9uAn893fQttIQ)**
---
The leadership shake-up at Texas A&M University is the latest flashpoint in America’s raging battle over higher education, ideology, and the classroom. Mark A. Welsh III, president of Texas A&M, announced he will step down effective Friday, following days of escalating controversy over a children’s literature course that recognized more than two genders. The course, [...]
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger.-Tzz0e9uAn893fQttIQ)
[](http://trk.libertyledger._c2VnbWVudD01MjQwMDIifQ/oZ25oWlRxhs7J-1NRYnrbg)

# **[Nielsen Data Over Summer Shows Slide For Some Shows](http://trk.libertyledger.-jY7alb-Rb_wE5REQg)**
---
Jimmy Kimmel has been skating on thin ice for years with his cheap political shots and sanctimonious late-night rants. But his reckless attempt to tie Charlie Kirk’s accused assassin to the MAGA movement may finally have pushed him — and his flailing show — over the edge. ABC affiliates Nexstar and Sinclair weren’t just displeased [...]
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger.-jY7alb-Rb_wE5REQg)
[](http://trk.libertyledger.-71Kw3IauOU9smA)
# **[FCC Chair Issues Statement That 'The View' May Face Probe](http://trk.libertyledger.-71Kw3IauOU9smA)**
---
The fallout from Jimmy Kimmel’s suspension continues to ripple through ABC — and now another flagship program, The View, may find itself in the FCC’s crosshairs.
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger.-71Kw3IauOU9smA)
[](http://trk.libertyledger.)
# **[Clinton Promotes Book](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
Randi Weingarten, the long-reigning teachers’ union boss, has never shied away from using her perch to push ideology instead of education. But now, she’s promoting a book that reportedly smears conservatives as “fascists.” And who’s cheering her on? None other than Hillary Clinton. Of course.
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger.)
[](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/PeoZV7UhahJO10gm0wTpFQ)
# **[Kamala Discusses Her Running Mate Decision In New Book](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/PeoZV7UhahJO10gm0wTpFQ)**
---
Kamala Harris’ forthcoming book is supposed to be a campaign reset, the kind of memoir that reframes her image and stakes a claim to leadership. Instead, it reads more like a political self-sabotage manual. The headline revelation is stunning in its bluntness: Harris admits she passed over Pete Buttigieg as her running mate not because [...]

But Kimmel’s actual [...] The leadership shake-up at Texas A&M University is the latest flashpoint in America’s raging battle over higher education, ideology, and the classroom. Mark A. Welsh III, president of Texas A&M, announced he will step down effective Friday, following days of escalating controversy over a children’s literature course that recognized more than two genders. The course, [...] Jimmy Kimmel has been skating on thin ice for years with his cheap political shots and sanctimonious late-night rants. But his reckless attempt to tie Charlie Kirk’s accused assassin to the MAGA movement may finally have pushed him — and his flailing show — over the edge. ABC affiliates Nexstar and Sinclair weren’t just displeased [...] The fallout from Jimmy Kimmel’s suspension continues to ripple through ABC — and now another flagship program, The View, may find itself in the FCC’s crosshairs. Randi Weingarten, the long-reigning teachers’ union boss, has never shied away from using her perch to push ideology instead of education. But now, she’s promoting a book that reportedly smears conservatives as “fascists.” And who’s cheering her on? None other than Hillary Clinton. Of course. Kamala Harris’ forthcoming book is supposed to be a campaign reset, the kind of memoir that reframes her image and stakes a claim to leadership. Instead, it reads more like a political self-sabotage manual. The headline revelation is stunning in its bluntness: Harris admits she passed over Pete Buttigieg as her running mate not because [...] P.O. Box 455, Leesburg, VA 20178 No longer want to receive the Liberty Ledger? Unsubscribe .

name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: The New York Times says this race is a TOSS-UP
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
Making sure you didn’t miss this, Peter
#
**_New York Times: Tossup Race for NJ Governor Draws Big Money and a Bright Spotlight_**
With less than two months left in this campaign and mail-in ballots starting to go out this weekend, The New York Times officially classified my race as a TOSS-UP, and said that _all eyes are on New Jersey._
The country is watching us, Peter — because if we win here in the Garden State and reject our MAGA opponent, we send a powerful message to the country and to the White House. **But we can only do that with your support.**
**[This is the most competitive race in the country this year, and it’s neck-and-neck. In the final stretch of this campaign, can you split a contribution between my campaign and State Democrats Committee to help power my team to victory?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95470?refcode=em20250919-9449&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9449%2E614464%2E3FCOg1)**

Thank you so much,
Mikie Sherrill

subject: How we build a clean energy economy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Peters for Congress
body:
---
| | **It’s National Clean Energy Week!**
[Double down on our shared commitment to building a sustainable, affordable clean energy economy that works for all of us →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115547009/570679003/1180017127?refcode2=f7aafa07-8d95-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&refcode=SP_EM_PT_180DO_250919_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODA2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2FhZmEwNy04ZDk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AS7VlXPtEgJ5UhfNY-pcJ4o5cdQXd4gheQMXq0WOcvo=&emci=f1aafa07-8d95-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=f7aafa07-8d95-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=5258741) | | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115547010/570679004/1180017127?refcode2=f7aafa07-8d95-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&refcode=SP_EM_PT_180DO_250919_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODA2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2FhZmEwNy04ZDk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AS7VlXPtEgJ5UhfNY-pcJ4o5cdQXd4gheQMXq0WOcvo=&emci=f1aafa07-8d95-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=f7aafa07-8d95-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=5258741)
---

_Our country is at a crossroads, Peter._

While we work to develop solutions to the impending climate and energy crises, Republicans continue to push for more reliance on oil and gas – a false solution that has only resulted in price volatility and pain for everyday Americans.

Clean, innovative energy technologies and infrastructure are the long-term solution needed to address this crisis and meet our climate goals. But, outdated and complicated regulations are stopping us from advancing these projects at a quick enough pace.

Scott is at the forefront of this fight, and he remains committed to reforming permitting processes so we can build clean energy and housing faster and smarter, and lower costs.

[With the GOP continuing to stand in the way of progress, we must send a clear message and call on Congress to speed up our transition to a clean energy economy!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115547011/570679005/1180017127?refcode2=f7aafa07-8d95-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&refcode=SP_EM_PT_180DO_250919_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODA2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2FhZmEwNy04ZDk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AS7VlXPtEgJ5UhfNY-pcJ4o5cdQXd4gheQMXq0WOcvo=&emci=f1aafa07-8d95-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=f7aafa07-8d95-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=5258741) | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115547012/570679006/1180017127?refcode2=f7aafa07-8d95-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&refcode=SP_EM_PT_180DO_250919_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODA2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2FhZmEwNy04ZDk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AS7VlXPtEgJ5UhfNY-pcJ4o5cdQXd4gheQMXq0WOcvo=&emci=f1aafa07-8d95-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=f7aafa07-8d95-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=5258741)
---
The U.S. is significantly lagging behind other countries in building inter-regional transmission lines that are necessary to upgrade our power grid to support clean energy projects. Those delays are largely due to slow, outdated, and excessive permitting processes put in place by 50-year-old legislation.

Most of the critical solar, wind, and energy storage projects currently in the pipeline stand to be canceled if we cannot quickly build the necessary infrastructure to transmit that energy.

Funding clean energy projects is only part of the battle. If we don’t act faster, that investment will not be enough to address the magnitude of the climate and energy security crises.

We need to update the laws and regulations that are standing in the way of quick clean energy implementation – this can’t wait.

[That’s why we need you to join Scott in calling for permitting reforms that will allow us to quickly build the clean energy future we need. Add your name:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115547013/570679007/1180017127?refcode2=f7aafa07-8d95-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&refcode=SP_EM_PT_180DO_250919_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODA2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2FhZmEwNy04ZDk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AS7VlXPtEgJ5UhfNY-pcJ4o5cdQXd4gheQMXq0WOcvo=&emci=f1aafa07-8d95-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=f7aafa07-8d95-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=5258741) | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115547014/570679008/1180017127?refcode2=f7aafa07-8d95-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&refcode=SP_EM_PT_180DO_250919_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODA2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2FhZmEwNy04ZDk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AS7VlXPtEgJ5UhfNY-pcJ4o5cdQXd4gheQMXq0WOcvo=&emci=f1aafa07-8d95-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=f7aafa07-8d95-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=5258741)
---
Thanks for always standing with Scott.

– Team Peters

Those delays are largely due to slow, outdated, and excessive permitting processes put in place by 50-year-old legislation. Most of the critical solar, wind, and energy storage projects currently in the pipeline stand to be canceled if we cannot quickly build the necessary infrastructure to transmit that energy. Funding clean energy projects is only part of the battle. If we don’t act faster, that investment will not be enough to address the magnitude of the climate and energy security crises. We need to update the laws and regulations that are standing in the way of quick clean energy implementation – this can’t wait. | Thanks for always standing with Scott. – Team Peters | | | = | As a leader among Democrats in Congress, Scott Peters has one of the strongest track records of achieving progressive reforms and getting things done. He’s committed to protecting our environment, improving access to affordable healthcare, implementing compassionate immigration reforms and protecting reproductive freedom. Democrats in swing districts like Scott’s rely on grassroots supporters like you.**= | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Scott Peters for Congress Scott Peters for Congress PO Box 22074 San Diego, CA 92192 United States

We have an exciting announcement: When you become an Evergreen Member, your monthly gift will instantly unlock an additional $250 match! [https://secure.savetheredwoods.org/a/evergreen-match] Join Now [https://secure.savetheredwoods.org/a/evergreen-match]
Our generous board member, Peggy Light, has agreed to contribute $250 for each new Evergreen Member, up to a total of $100,000! [https://secure.savetheredwoods.org/a/evergreen-match] Don’t miss out on this incredible match opportunity to take bold action in defense of the redwoods and public lands.
https://secure.savetheredwoods.org/a/evergreen-match [https://secure.savetheredwoods.org/a/evergreen-match]
Evergreen Members provide steady, monthly support to power all of the League’s work. That support is critical when new land acquisition opportunities arise, allowing us to move swiftly to protect and restore more threatened forests.
The work to safeguard our redwood forests continues 24/7. You can be part of this mission every day of the year as an Evergreen Member. [https://secure.savetheredwoods.org/a/evergreen-match]
Join now, unlock a big match, and stand alongside a community of passionate redwood supporters— and we’ll also send you a pair of banana slug socks to show your redwood pride! [https://secure.savetheredwoods.org/a/evergreen-match]

body:
This is what I'll fight for as your Attorney General | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115547225/570679686/1546157161?refcode=em_JJR_FR_CampaignPromises_091925&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWUzNjUzNTQtOGU5NS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=mBHdI2tPSlMxqM2pYvWwikBma9sxj42HAr3QZZ8QKGo=&emci=1b614bf5-6b95-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=9e365354-8e95-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=32374386)
---
In a moment, **[I’m going to ask you to chip in just $5 to my campaign for Florida Attorney General](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115547226/570679687/1963674758?amount=5&refcode=em_JJR_FR_CampaignPromises_091925&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWUzNjUzNTQtOGU5NS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=mBHdI2tPSlMxqM2pYvWwikBma9sxj42HAr3QZZ8QKGo=)**. But before I do, I want to make you a promise, Peter. The moment I take office, these are the priorities I’ll tackle:
1. **I will crack down on corruption and fraud in both the public and private sectors.** From backroom deals in Tallahassee to corporate schemes that hurt working families, corruption will have nowhere to hide.
2. **I will hold powerful corporations accountable when they hurt Florida families.** Whether it's utility giants planning massive rate hikes or any corporation putting profits over people, I'll take them to court.
3. **I will serve as an independent voice for the people of Florida.** Not for special interests, not for corporate donors, but for you and your family.
4. **I will support law enforcement** while ensuring they have the resources and leadership they need to keep our communities safe.
5. **I will defend our rights** – from voting rights to civil liberties – no matter who tries to attack them.
6. **I will tackle the fentanyl crisis** that's devastating families and communities across our state.
7. **I will take on scammers** who prey on Florida families, especially our seniors.
8. **And I will protect minors and the most vulnerable** who need someone in their corner.

This is what the People's Lawyer looks like, Peter. This is the fight we're building together. But taking on the corrupt establishment isn't easy. They have deep pockets and powerful allies. That's why we need to start building our movement now. **[Will you chip in $5 today to help us lay the foundation for the campaign that will deliver on these promises? Every dollar helps us prove that when people power comes together, we can beat anyone.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115547227/570679688/1963674758?amount=5&refcode=em_JJR_FR_CampaignPromises_091925&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWUzNjUzNTQtOGU5NS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=mBHdI2tPSlMxqM2pYvWwikBma9sxj42HAr3QZZ8QKGo=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | **[DONATE $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115547228/570679689/1963674758?amount=10&express_lane=true&refcode=em_JJR_FR_CampaignPromises_091925&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWUzNjUzNTQtOGU5NS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=mBHdI2tPSlMxqM2pYvWwikBma9sxj42HAr3QZZ8QKGo=) **

clean_body: This is what I'll fight for as your Attorney General | In a moment, =. But before I do, I want to make you a promise, Peter. The moment I take office, these are the priorities I’ll tackle: 1. I will crack down on corruption and fraud in both the public and private sectors. From backroom deals in Tallahassee to corporate schemes that hurt working families, corruption will have nowhere to hide. 2. I will hold powerful corporations accountable when they hurt Florida families. Whether it's utility giants planning massive rate hikes or any corporation putting profits over people, I'll take them to court. 3. I will serve as an independent voice for the people of Florida. Not for special interests, not for corporate donors, but for you and your family. 4. I will support law enforcement while ensuring they have the resources and leadership they need to keep our communities safe. 5. I will defend our rights – from voting rights to civil liberties – no matter who tries to attack them. 6. I will tackle the fentanyl crisis that's devastating families and communities across our state. 7. I will take on scammers who prey on Florida families, especially our seniors. 8. And I will protect minors and the most vulnerable who need someone in their corner. This is what the People's Lawyer looks like, Peter. This is the fight we're building together. But taking on the corrupt establishment isn't easy. They have deep pockets and powerful allies. That's why we need to start building our movement now. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Onward, Jose Javier Rodriguez | = = PAID FOR BY JOSE JAVIER RODRIGUEZ FOR FLORIDA ATTORNEY GENERAL Jose Javier Rodriguez for Attorney General 701 S. name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: ANNOUNCEMENT: Erika Kirk Will Carry On Her Husband’s Mission
body:
| | |
---
Peter,In Ecclesiastes, King Solomon wrote that mankind is to be tested by _God._ Today, we are facing such a test, yet we also know that God has prepared us with everything we need to overcome this ordeal. It was the honor of our lives to serve as board members at Charlie's side. Charlie prepared all of us for a moment like this one. He worked tirelessly to ensure Turning Point USA was built to survive even the greatest tests. **And now, it is our great pride to announce Erika Kirk as the new CEO and Chair of the Board for Turning Point USA. **All of us at Turning Point USA have a special role in carrying Charlie Kirk's mantle and completing his vision of bringing us all closer to our Lord and fostering a prosperous country for generations to come.As Charlie always said, "We have a country to save."We will not surrender or kneel before evil. We will carry on. The attempt to destroy Charlie's work will become our chance to make it more powerful and enduring than ever before. May God bless Erika, the Kirk family, and the entire Turning Point USA family.
---
**For Charlie & Very Truly Yours, **
TPUSA Board of Directors

Doug De Groote
Mike Miller
Tom Sodeika
David Engelhardt
& The Turning Point USA Family
---

name: Kathleen Clyde, ODP Chair
subject: Republicans are running out the clock to rig our maps
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
In the next 11 days, will they silence Ohioans?
|
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115547962/570682020/879334541?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_MM3_250919_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2RjN2FlMi05MDk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mG8DacySyp_PvLSmHHy3mPUfmUotNYjrXBCJAvCyhWc=) Team,

We’re 11 days away from the September 30th deadline for lawmakers to pass a fair, bipartisan Congressional map that reflects how Ohioans actually vote.

But Republican leaders are ignoring voters on the fair, constitutional map proposed by Democrats. Instead of doing their own jobs, they are shutting voters out of the process, and, ironically, calling _our_ proposal “gerrymandered.”

[**_We can’t let them get away with it. Can you chip in right now to help us register voters and keep communities informed as we defend fair Congressional maps?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115547963/570682021/879334541?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_MM3_250919_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2RjN2FlMi05MDk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mG8DacySyp_PvLSmHHy3mPUfmUotNYjrXBCJAvCyhWc=) **When you chip in today, you’re powering two critical efforts:**
* **Organizing around redistricting:** making sure voters know what’s happening as the process unfolds and ensuring Ohioans have a voice in how our maps are drawn.
* **Year-round voter registration:** because with LaRose purging thousands from the rolls, it’s critical that every eligible Ohioan has an up-to-date registration before the next election.

Across the country, Republicans are pushing to redraw maps in ways that tilt the playing field even further in their favor.

Meanwhile, here at home, Frank LaRose is purging thousands of Ohioans from the voter rolls — making our year-round voter registration work more urgent than ever.

[**_Every dollar we raise helps get the word out in communities, register new voters, and keep Ohioans informed about how Republicans are trying to drown out their voices. Will you chip in today?_** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115547964/570682022/879334541?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_MM3_250919_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2RjN2FlMi05MDk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mG8DacySyp_PvLSmHHy3mPUfmUotNYjrXBCJAvCyhWc=) clean_body: In the next 11 days, will they silence Ohioans? | = Team, We’re 11 days away from the September 30th deadline for lawmakers to pass a fair, bipartisan Congressional map that reflects how Ohioans actually vote. But Republican leaders are ignoring voters on the fair, constitutional map proposed by Democrats. Instead of doing their own jobs, they are shutting voters out of the process, and, ironically, calling our proposal “gerrymandered.” = When you chip in today, you’re powering two critical efforts: Organizing around redistricting: making sure voters know what’s happening as the process unfolds and ensuring Ohioans have a voice in how our maps are drawn. Year-round voter registration: because with LaRose purging thousands from the rolls, it’s critical that every eligible Ohioan has an up-to-date registration before the next election. Across the country, Republicans are pushing to redraw maps in ways that tilt the playing field even further in their favor. Meanwhile, here at home, Frank LaRose is purging thousands of Ohioans from the voter rolls — making our year-round voter registration work more urgent than ever. = _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately: = = = = = = Thank you for standing with us, Kathleen Clyde, ODP Chair = | Ohio Democratic Party PO Box 130 Columbus, Ohio 43216 | Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | Click here to from the Ohio Democratic Party's email list.

# [How a Government Misstep Opened the Door to Justice](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=174049914&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc0MDQ5OTE0LCJpYXQiOjE3NTgzMTQ5NjMsImV4cCI6MTc2MDkwNjk2MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTMyNjAxMTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.l2FzwtwFFXXCO_VZwnn4QKIMLMju3QByFutKG7PRf2I)
### A week of filings that turn the tables: from defending against deportation to demanding justice, accountability, and Zahid's rightful place at home.
| | [Melissa Chaudhry](https://substack.com/@melissa4congress)
---
| Sep 19
---
| [](https://substack.com/@melissa4congress)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=174049914&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc0MDQ5OTE0LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1ODMxNDk2MywiZXhwIjoxNzYwOTA2OTYzLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzI2MDExMSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.YQ6p_-S-3G7X62kZ5TPKbw-iHuXyEoaDXdUqUkCgnYk&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=174049914&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc0MDQ5OTE0LCJpYXQiOjE3NTgzMTQ5NjMsImV4cCI6MTc2MDkwNjk2MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTMyNjAxMTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.l2FzwtwFFXXCO_VZwnn4QKIMLMju3QByFutKG7PRf2I&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=174049914&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc0MDQ5OTE0LCJpYXQiOjE3NTgzMTQ5NjMsImV4cCI6MTc2MDkwNjk2MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTMyNjAxMTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.l2FzwtwFFXXCO_VZwnn4QKIMLMju3QByFutKG7PRf2I)
---
| | [](https://substack..AHaQrWk_Xp9yUpsLcl85nWvSHb_DBY3K4nHQpACdJf4?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/melissa4congress/p/they-overreached-were-taking-advantage?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Friends,
Last time I wrote to you, it was about the government's filing of a Motion to Vacate the Stay of Removal - asking the 9th Circuit for permission to deport Zahid as soon as possible.
It turns out, that was a blessing in disguise.
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=174049914&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc0MDQ5OTE0LCJpYXQiOjE3NTgzMTQ5NjMsImV4cCI6MTc2MDkwNjk2MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTMyNjAxMTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.l2FzwtwFFXXCO_VZwnn4QKIMLMju3QByFutKG7PRf2I)
In evaluating his appeal, the Court was legally constrained in what evidence they're allowed to consider. The "administrative record" was formally closed almost five years ago. They were not _allowed_ to consider anything that has happened since that time, in making their decision.
Things that have happened since that time:
* Our marriage and the births of our two children.
* The severe decline in his health, resulting in _600 pages_ of medical records from _one year_ at _one_ facility.
* The blatantly transparent entrapment they pulled on the 21st of August.

_**Rather relevant, don 't you think?**_
But again, the Court _could not_ consider that evidence.... UNTIL the Government made that motion to vacate.
By introducing a new motion, asking for extraordinary relief - asking the court not just to decide to grant a stay, but to _actively lift_ a stay already in place - they left the door wide open.
Because the Court - historically speaking - **will open the record** to properly evaluate matters of justice pertaining to a stay of removal. The Court recognizes that new events since the close of the administrative record are often deeply important to the proper evaluation of a stay of removal.
So, basically, they overswung a punch, and left themselves wide, wide open.
And I've spent this _entire_ week throwing our punch back.
* * *
Here's what's gone in. You're welcome to read them - please do, it's quite educational. And **share**.
* [Petitioner's Motion to Supplement the Record](https://substack.com/redirect/4c750e92-f073-4a21-8a7d-f2e00992260a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* Asking the Court, in the interests of justice, to accept the new exhibit packet into the record and include more recent events in their evaluations. Critical, to everything that follows.
* [Petitioner's Proposed Exhibit List](https://substack.com/redirect/f2781d27-b449-45f9-99b2-3dfb1a02fe0a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* 183 pages of 47 exhibits, providing thorough coverage of the past 25 years - laying out in black and white their shenanigans and bad faith.
* [Petitioner's Opposition to Respondent's Motion to Vacate the Stay of Removal](https://substack.com/redirect/b3208332-e38e-42a9-b6c2-03053fa80a4b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* The big-deal moral and legal spine. Why their position is faithless, shallow, and cruel - why they fail on every measure to justify deporting Zahid, and why the Court has not just the opportunity but the _obligation_ to uphold justice and protect a beloved father, respected community leader, and disabled American veteran from deportation.
* Also including three other exhibits:
* ICE's own detention record saying he has no criminal history;
* The Immigration Judge's decision from 2018 affirming Zahid's permanent residency and issuing waivers for _any prior issues._
* A key-findings summary of a Berkeley Law report on deported veterans - there are thousands, and deportation almost _always_ results in permanent exile with devastating family, financial, and medical consequences.
* (That's important, because in their Motion to Vacate, they laughably argued that "no it's fine, you can deport him before his appeal is decided, because he can just continue the appeal from abroad! No problem!" \- HA. Patently and poisonously untrue.)
* [Petitioner's Motion to Expedite Decision](https://substack.com/redirect/c05691e8-e592-462d-b654-cbddd2000844?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* Asking the Court to decide his appeal as quickly as possible, since briefing is already complete and irreparable harm is ongoing. Every day counts.
* This one is a fairly quick and procedural request that should be easy for the Court to say yes to.
* [Petitioner's Motion for Release Pending Decision](https://substack.com/redirect/98c1cdad-b016-49f3-b29b-bcec45d120c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* This is also a big deal. The Ninth Circuit has the power to _**tell ICE to let him go**_. We don't have to wait _six months_ until his detention is "prolonged and arbitrary" in order to file a Habeas petition... and we don't have to wait months (or years...) for the decision on an appeal regarding Scala's bond determination. (Although we talk about that in front of the Ninth Circuit, for sure.)
* The courts are more cautious about this, but we have an overwhelming case. We're drawing from standard bond criteria and showing that not only is there NO reason to keep him detained, there's active and irreparable harm in doing so - not just to him but to the public's faith in the rule of law.

And last but certainly not least...
* [Petitioner's Motion for Naturalization, Sanctions, and Other Relief](https://substack.com/redirect/98c1cdad-b016-49f3-b29b-bcec45d120c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* The government has had 25 years of chances to do the right thing. They have failed to do so. Vexatiously. (That's actually a legal term in evaluation bad-faith abuse of the legal system, which the federal government has _absolutely_ committed -- care to imagine how many tens of millions of taxpayer dollars have been spent in this witch hunt?)
* Therefore, it's time to stop giving them chances.
* In this, we ask the Court directly to **sanction** Respondent (who, by the way, is Attorney General Pam Bondi, officially), **naturalize** Zahid, **award damages** , and "any other such relief as the Court may find just and proper."
* It's where we go on the offensive.
* They started it..... we'll finish it.

* * *
**What the government thought would be their knockout blow has instead cracked the door wide open.** They overreached--and in doing so, they gave us the opportunity to put the full truth on the record, where it belongs. Every filing this week is not just a defense, but a declaration: Zahid is a father, a veteran, a husband, and a man of peace. He is not a disposable body for bureaucrats to shuffle across borders. He is a human being whose life matters, whose family matters, and whose story illuminates the failures--and the possibilities--of American justice.
The fight is far from over. But for the first time in a long time, we are not only holding the line. We are advancing it.

name: Kevin Roberts
subject: Your free eBook on America’s Founding
body:
As we approach the landmark 250th birthday of our great nation in 2026, my colleagues and I at The Heritage Foundation are proud to offer a new eBook:

| | This comprehensive 300+ page guide brings to life 16 of the nation's most influential Founders--not as mythical figures, but as real statesmen confronting the immense political challenges of their time. From George Washington to Thomas Jefferson, you'll explore their pivotal decisions that laid the foundation for American liberty and self-government.

Oregonians are feeling the impacts of Trump’s agenda. Rising costs are hitting families hard, but Tina is taking action to keep utility costs low, strengthen consumer protections, and _actually lower your bills. _
**Tina is using every tool in her toolbox to advocate for Oregonians and fight for a better future — _that’s the kind of leader we deserve, Peter. _**

body:
Lily Franklin, Kimberly Pope Adams, May Nivar, and more are ready to take back power. |

Virginia's House of Delegates is hanging by a thread — Democrats hold just a 51-49 majority. And in just **47 days** , voters will decide whether we expand that majority or let Republicans take it all back.

****[**That's why we launched our Race to 2025 Fund with a $100,000 goal. Will you rush a contribution right now to help EMILYs List women expand Virginia’s majority and stop Republicans from rolling back decades of progress?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115549811/570687765/-140265690?refcode=WUEFE940_20250919_VAOppoRS_PL&sourceid=1057024&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDRlNDgzYS05Mzk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zz3-ELg4zOOpAz1xeXL3083iZZe54ruLTXaz6iJZ-Zo=)**** | [DONATE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115549813/570687768/-140265690?refcode=WUEFE940_20250919_VAOppoRS_PL&sourceid=1057024&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDRlNDgzYS05Mzk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zz3-ELg4zOOpAz1xeXL3083iZZe54ruLTXaz6iJZ-Zo=)

Here's what's at stake: Republicans hold ten seats we can flip with our Democratic pro-choice women, plus the governorship and lieutenant governorship — only if we have the resources to compete. The GOP caucus is packed with Trump loyalists and career politicians, and the next legislature will vote on constitutional amendments that could shape abortion access, marriage equality, and voting rights for a generation.

And based on their current actions, we already know what the Virginia Republicans' agenda looks like. They have stood by as rural clinics close because of Trump’s Medicaid cuts. They’ve backed Trump's "Billionaire Budget Bill," which will cost Virginians millions of dollars, even as their own constituents lose jobs because of reckless economic policies.

But EMILYs List women are ready to lead. **Lily Franklin** and **Kimberly Pope Adams** came within striking distance of victory last cycle, and **May Nivar** is challenging one of Donald Trump’s most loyal yes-men. With the right support, our entire slate of champions can win this fall and protect Virginia from Republican overreach.

I've worked on enough red-to-blue races to know that this is the tipping point. A burst of grassroots energy today can decide whether Democrats hold the line in November or watch Republicans roll back decades of progress.
****[**Please, if you can, chip in now to our Race to 2025 Fund goal to help Lily, Kimberly, May, and other EMILYs List women send Republicans packing:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115549814/570687771/-140265690?refcode=WUEFE940_20250919_VAOppoRS_PL&sourceid=1057024&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDRlNDgzYS05Mzk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zz3-ELg4zOOpAz1xeXL3083iZZe54ruLTXaz6iJZ-Zo=)****

clean_body: Lily Franklin, Kimberly Pope Adams, May Nivar, and more are ready to take back power. | = Hi Peter, Virginia's House of Delegates is hanging by a thread — Democrats hold just a 51-49 majority. And in just 47 days , voters will decide whether we expand that majority or let Republicans take it all back. **= | = Here's what's at stake: Republicans hold ten seats we can flip with our Democratic pro-choice women, plus the governorship and lieutenant governorship — only if we have the resources to compete. The GOP caucus is packed with Trump loyalists and career politicians, and the next legislature will vote on constitutional amendments that could shape abortion access, marriage equality, and voting rights for a generation. And based on their current actions, we already know what the Virginia Republicans' agenda looks like. They have stood by as rural clinics close because of Trump’s Medicaid cuts. They’ve backed Trump's "Billionaire Budget Bill," which will cost Virginians millions of dollars, even as their own constituents lose jobs because of reckless economic policies. But EMILYs List women are ready to lead. Lily Franklin and Kimberly Pope Adams came within striking distance of victory last cycle, and May Nivar is challenging one of Donald Trump’s most loyal yes-men. With the right support, our entire slate of champions can win this fall and protect Virginia from Republican overreach. I've worked on enough red-to-blue races to know that this is the tipping point. A burst of grassroots energy today can decide whether Democrats hold the line in November or watch Republicans roll back decades of progress. =** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = More soon, Amanda Sherman Baity (she/her/hers) Chief Communications Officer, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. # Friday, September 19, 2025
---|---
**Good Afternoon!** Two Texas grandmothers, Ellie Hamby and Dr. Sandy Hazelip, both 84, just [finished a dream](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFyhCAURb9GOxx44KoFRZrtNm1K5-l7uCQIO0iW2b_PmHxC-jP3zjkft_mGPvi4vePO1m1uLi7NkesRuBTOc8n45HASW8ZIOx5HCuQ5zyChF3ISapoJfXjNpiXrmIF1y1YN_agVaID2bo2RZNDoqV-J1KRXt6Acl3VBGuCil9bbc01OagIpe1CdVNKgBh7MOOA6QmMkky8pd5_Jx3JnF17pyblb094Gey_lcTT6rYFrA9daa3cqVOavE2jg6rLnSIegzLiLPykfN4E5fUcSNeVAAjcWoxSg4DLqsc2WHtWH4I_L0Bi57ejD71_5d6inhZ8AAAD__1Ixfvo) decades in the making, circling the globe together in 80 days. Their seven-continent, 50-country trek proves it's never too late to chase adventure and live boldly. If you could pick one friend to travel the world with, who would it be and where would you go first? Reply to let us know. We're sponsored today by [MEDVi](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkEGL6yAcxD-NuTXoX6PJwcOD0NNr32NZ2KNY_Zu4mFiMSem3X9qvsLcZZhiG39fFXGxMcZ2udkEdpmBqyGbFx5awViymFntgejWmYle_2G3LyUcsBih0Jzqc2GC8jelpRON1QATkDWqmup4z4ADNrEFS5wKTgXt5c7brqUBErkBJxfqba6J-rdGBDUBpB6yljArLAZXolXU9EEHRx5pL-53jWmcM6ZkPLK3LS5P0XOt9I_wPgTOB84L-iG0u08vyc46e8FEQkDaEt-4IyPt-I3xkXBGQNbv0Dj7_ncT_2ebnfE2jFBWHv2Fj-_xBQO51MVvei0PCxzpjDgFLU7S_P2JKcZOKCDotNqb3qfprmoeGnwAAAP__eCSIAA). Get started on your weight loss journey with their affordable GLP-1 medications.
|

## Texas Grandmas Travel World in Their 80s
Ellie Hamby and Dr. Sandy Hazelip, both 84 and from small-town Texas, just wrapped up a journey they dreamed about for decades--[traveling the globe together](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFyhCAURb9GOxx44KoFRZrtNm1K5-l7uCQIO0iW2b_PmHxC-jP3zjkft_mGPvi4vePO1m1uLi7NkesRuBTOc8n45HASW8ZIOx5HCuQ5zyChF3ISapoJfXjNpiXrmIF1y1YN_agVaID2bo2RZNDoqV-J1KRXt6Acl3VBGuCil9bbc01OagIpe1CdVNKgBh7MOOA6QmMkky8pd5_Jx3JnF17pyblb094Gey_lcTT6rYFrA9daa3cqVOavE2jg6rLnSIegzLiLPykfN4E5fUcSNeVAAjcWoxSg4DLqsc2WHtWH4I_L0Bi57ejD71_5d6inhZ8AAAD__1Ixfvo). The longtime friends first met on a mission trip in Africa and grew closer after losing their husbands, eventually turning late-night chats into a plan to see the world. Their "around-the-world-in-80-days" adventure took them to all seven continents and nearly 50 countries, including a ride on the Trans-Siberian Railway and a tense moment in the Syrian desert. [Watch a video here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D1u6zAQBODTUJ2F5VK_BYsHPLhzgBRBSmItLiUmlGhQtAjfPlCukHZm8BXzeTM38sFv8xutrN3sTHbRbFz2wDlzMjnRweFczIk2u9K-x2A9J4OA7QXGixyNJR9epqmsdszIqmIt-3ZQEhVitWi0DoCtbFmO4Hjops4pKVV3t726N1R5fWowyhEBWpQ1SGhIIffN0NM0oGiArc8x1V_Rb3lhF17x4FRPca2CXnJ-7EL9E3gVeC2l1K_4zM87n_2ZUJ4Woa6HUP_fKS4fQbXpu1RJ20fxIfi960UD80o-_JL5z18cGn8CAAD__xUkdGE). Back home, [they've written a book](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGO3CAQxvGnwR0rPLYXU1CkcXdpU1rjYzCTYLCAW2vz9JHzCtf_9emn79fH-oEcOe0_8SDrd782n9dEV43UGpW1FXxRvIu9YHIH1pqjYyorKJikMrI3q0OO73XsnPVEQENHttfTPPQwAHTB6m2eBnyap9JeGYMa_TTP_Uaw-X7AqWN7rynTG1Bqgv6hejXiAKTHWePnDGJU5Ljl8vidObVAPr7zi8rjMx9dtKG1s4rhh4BFwHJd1-OktH9xus35CPmr0p0KWLac_1QBi54Go58ClkCF5EVyz3J7S4qEKRcZ8NjeEpOTrsiKyRWUAf9S5FNe3IKkyBXlSa1wYgFLV6w7L46R61OLUe0HcvzPa9_-9WXhXwAAAP__ddePiw) and are spreading a simple message: it's never too late to live boldly. _" Get up out of your easy chair,"_ they say, _" make a plan and live."_
## Young Survivor Opens Homes for Families
Twelve-year-old leukemia survivor Harper Harrell and her mom [have launched Harper's Home](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOpDAQBNCvMZmR3YZhCBxcQjaXXoj67DZ4ZfCo7QHx9yv2Fzau0iup_r3mF8YU9-UvbmTDEuYa8rzTWRLVSjxXxoPS3VgYd79hKTn5SDyDgl6qUepx9hjTNXeNt4EIyDRk9dA_jQYD0KyWHv_Dw49OD4ZMCM5R7zroFGlN6E1oor01NeoRlOpBt0qrDg3Q0D0HdE8QnSIfa-b2K8e9rhTSlQ_i1uWtSXat9V2E-SNgEjCd59mejOkOBUwpBir1SiRgWglTXQVMGuRFyDInL8uHj3hklv7DK25yzRvJN_mIlaOTDndHLB3yLTRs_fuMKcXyGESnlg3jz1JTf_3fYeE7AAD__8USiFQ), a nonprofit offering housing to families traveling for care at Duke Children's Hospital. After more than two years in treatment, Harper knows how hard it is to be far from home during a medical crisis. The Durham-based project serves families living over 40 miles away. Two homes are open, with plans for six more. Funded by donors and volunteers, the homes run on a sliding scale--and they're pet-friendly, just like Harper wanted. clean_body: Ellie Hamby and Dr. Sandy Hazelip, both 84 and from small-town Texas, just wrapped up a journey they dreamed about for decades--. | | | | | | Friday, September 19, 2025 ---|--- Good Afternoon! Two Texas grandmothers, Ellie Hamby and Dr. Sandy Hazelip, both 84, just decades in the making, circling the globe together in 80 days. Their seven-continent, 50-country trek proves it's never too late to chase adventure and live boldly. If you could pick one friend to travel the world with, who would it be and where would you go first? Reply to let us know. We're sponsored today by . Get started on your weight loss journey with their affordable GLP-1 medications. | Texas Grandmas Travel World in Their 80s Ellie Hamby and Dr. Sandy Hazelip, both 84 and from small-town Texas, just wrapped up a journey they dreamed about for decades--. The longtime friends first met on a mission trip in Africa and grew closer after losing their husbands, eventually turning late-night chats into a plan to see the world. Their "around-the-world-in-80-days" adventure took them to all seven continents and nearly 50 countries, including a ride on the Trans-Siberian Railway and a tense moment in the Syrian desert. . Back home, and are spreading a simple message: it's never too late to live boldly. " Get up out of your easy chair," they say, " make a plan and live." Young Survivor Opens Homes for Families Twelve-year-old leukemia survivor Harper Harrell and her mom , a nonprofit offering housing to families traveling for care at Duke Children's Hospital. After more than two years in treatment, Harper knows how hard it is to be far from home during a medical crisis. The Durham-based project serves families living over 40 miles away. Two homes are open, with plans for six more. Funded by donors and volunteers, the homes run on a sliding scale--and they're pet-friendly, just like Harper wanted. . Now in remission, Harper hopes the homes give families a safe, cozy place to land during tough times. 🥰 Make sure to tune into this week's Feel Good Flyover Podcast, where host Amy Hess interviews Harper and her mom about what they want all kids to have during their cancer treatments. Towering Sunflower of Hope A Ukrainian-born gardener in Fort Wayne, Indiana, set a new that reached 35 feet, 9 inches, topping the previous record by 5 feet. Alex Babich, 47, raised the giant bloom, nicknamed Clover, as a and its ongoing struggle during Russia's invasion. Babich began growing sunflowers after the Chernobyl disaster uprooted his family. With help from his 10-year-old son, the flower became a local marvel and will soon star in a documentary titled Bloom. He now hands out sunflower seeds at festivals with the message: " Spread the love." . | Flying together with our sponsor Designed to curb appetite, regulate blood sugar, and promote sustainable fat loss, MedVi's doctor-prescribed treatment is a science-backed way to take control of your health. | ➤ A candlelit proposal inside London's Natural History Museum got even better when the bride-to-be discovered her favorite wedding videographer was secretly filming, causing a priceless reaction that has gone viral on social media. () ➤ After returning home from a 10-month deployment, an Oklahoma soldier surprised his first-grade daughter at school. The heartwarming reunion brought tears from teachers and cheers from students as the two hugged tightly in a long-awaited embrace. () ➤ Organ donor recipients gathered to honor 20-year-old Adelyn Miller, whose organs saved five lives after her tragic death. Her mother shared that the chance to meet them has been profoundly healing as her daughter's legacy continues to inspire. () ➤ Chewy, the Shih Tzu, was once abandoned on the streets of Austin, Texas, but has since been adopted by an assisted-living center. Now, he enjoys outfit changes, walker rides, and brings daily comfort to residents. () ➤ Brave chickens in Michigan, dubbed the "poultry patrol," chased a black bear off their property, sending it running in a hilarious viral video. () ➤ A 9-year-old boy in Illinois set up a "compliment stand," spending hours offering uplifting words with the belief that happiness should always be free. He said, " It makes people feel good. It also makes me feel good." () Flying together with our sponsor ➤ Neuropathy? Tingling Feet? This New Home Device Is a Game-Changer for Seniors. Millions of Americans are discovering the breakthrough that's helping them walk, sleep, and live without foot pain... and it has nothing to do with pills, injections, or expensive treatments. is changing lives in just minutes a day. Originally developed to improve circulation and reduce nerve discomfort, it's now going viral for its ability to relieve tingling, burning, and stabbing foot pain--fast. He's just the chillest, coolest little guy." -- , who runs The Philomena assisted-living center in Kyle, Texas, on Chewy, the rescued Shih Tzu. | | The Flyover, LLC 1910 Thomes Ave. Cheyenne WY 82001 ---|---

name: Casey Lowe, LCV
subject: This Sun Day, rise up for a sun-powered planet
body:
Find an event near you!

If you are unable to see the message below, [click here to view](https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTI5NTQ1ODUS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjMwMDI2NjYyOQS2&mt=1&rt=0).
| | | |
---
|
* * *
---
| | | | [**This Sun Day, join thousands of activists across the country for a day of action for the clean energy revolution!**](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/X6bzs~jY4gSL/ci9UVHM3NjkxY3dWSEJ6VmlDNDVabHNZeWh2Nmkxd1hFeFRSR3M3WEhBbkFOOTlmc2xmTGo5Z0IxRm5Jc3hIa1FaMEtiVUg5SnF2dzhKSzZ2Wm8wYnJhcEtpR0RPVkVUZ2VFSXY3NXpGTmc9S0/)
---
| | Peter, we know it’s a dark time, with dangerous attacks on our communities, climate progress, and environmental safeguards happening daily, which is why we need to join together in community to celebrate the light that clean energy creates! On Sunday Sep 21, we’re joining a national day of action to celebrate the progress we’ve made and push for more. With more than 350 events around the country, activists will be installing new solar, hosting e-bike parades, giving heat pump tours, and rallying for change.
---
| | | [ RSVP NOW ](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/gryxf47WpaSL/ci9UVHM3NjkxY3dWSEJ6VmlDNDVabHNZeWh2Nmkxd1hFeFRSR3M3WEhBbkFOOTlmc2xmTGo5Z0IxRm5Jc3hIa1FaMEtiVUg5SnF2dzhKSzZ2Wm8wYnJhcEtpR0RPVkVUZ2VFSXY3NXpGTmc9S0/)
---
| | LCV is working around the clock to protect climate progress by rallying with activists like you across the country to hold polluters accountable and push for an equitable and just clean energy future.
---
| | Powerful fossil fuel interests and their allies are fighting back harder than ever, spending millions to slow progress and protect their profits. They’re rolling back clean energy policies, spreading misinformation, and blocking the infrastructure we need to complete this transition despite the fact that solar, wind, and batteries are the cheapest form of power on the planet.
---
| | Clean energy jobs are growing faster than any other sector and we know that clean energy sources like solar will save people across the country money on their energy bills while making our communities healthier and more resilient in the face of climate change. We need to come together to protect clean energy jobs and make energy more affordable!
---
| | **That’s why we are joining Sun Day as the next mass mobilization to make a difference in your community NOW and build solidarity with everyone in this fight.** Sun Day events will range from marches across town to solar power demos and educational demonstrations. [**_Click here to find an event near to you!_**](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/Zzb0MqGxpyQP/ci9UVHM3NjkxY3dWSEJ6VmlDNDVabHNZeWh2Nmkxd1hFeFRSR3M3WEhBbkFOOTlmc2xmTGo5Z0IxRm5Jc3hIa1FaMEtiVUg5SnF2dzhKSzZ2Wm8wYnJhcEtpR0RPVkVUZ2VFSXY3NXpGTmc9S0/)
---
| | We believe in clean energy for all and a healthy, liveable future free from fossil fuel pollution. Join us on Sun Day to help bring that dream one step closer to reality. From saving money on your energy bills, breathing cleaner air, fighting climate change, and supporting good-paying American jobs – Sun Day is the time to stand up for the clean energy future we deserve.
---
| | See you on September 21st,
---
| | Casey Lowe
Digital Campaigns Director League of Conservation Voters
---
| | |
* * *
---
| | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,[ _update your contact information_](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=12954585&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjMwMDI2NjYyOQS2&spReportId=MjMwMDI2NjYyOQS2) _._ [_Click here to unsubscribe_](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=12954585&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjMwMDI2NjYyOQS2&spReportId=MjMwMDI2NjYyOQS2) from our supporter list. [_Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here_](mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=) , or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.
**740 15th St NW, Suite 700**
**Washington, DC 20005**
**202-785-8683**
---
| | | [ DONATE ](https://links.messages.lcv.)
---

| Peter,

Ryan Mackenzie just voted for a stopgap bill that leaves working families behind.

Instead of standing up for us, he backed a Republican plan that **failed to extend Affordable Care Act tax credits** — credits that keep health care within reach for thousands of families here in Pennsylvania.

Ryan Mackenzie chose partisan politics over protecting our care. This district deserves someone who will fight for affordable health care, not buck to party leaders and gut it.

Ryan Mackenzie is one of the most vulnerable Republicans seeking re-election. We can take him on, and WIN. But I need you by my side to create real change for Pennsylvanians.

[_**Unlike Ryan Mackenzie, I’ll never sell Pennsylvanians out. clean_body: Ryan Mackenzie just voted for a stopgap bill that leaves working families behind. | = | Peter, Ryan Mackenzie just voted for a stopgap bill that leaves working families behind. Instead of standing up for us, he backed a Republican plan that failed to extend Affordable Care Act tax credits — credits that keep health care within reach for thousands of families here in Pennsylvania. Ryan Mackenzie chose partisan politics over protecting our care. This district deserves someone who will fight for affordable health care, not buck to party leaders and gut it. Ryan Mackenzie is one of the most vulnerable Republicans seeking re-election. We can take him on, and WIN. But I need you by my side to create real change for Pennsylvanians. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Carol * | | = Paid for by Carol for PA Carol for PA P.O Box 83 Allentown, PA 18105 United States | | | ---|---|--- = =

name: Team Taylor
subject: This didn’t happen by accident
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
But here in Wisconsin, we have an opportunity to restore trust.
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20250919-593&t=1&akid=600%2E294397%2ES0Wk70)
Folks,
**Americans are losing trust in the courts.**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_20250919_1_ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250919-593&refcode2=600_294397_S0Wk70&akid=600%2E294397%2ES0Wk70)
A Gallup poll found that confidence in our judiciary has dropped sharply over the past year, one of the largest declines they’ve ever measured.
That didn’t happen by accident.
For decades, right-wing special interests have poured millions into stacking the courts with extreme candidates who will put their own political agenda and special interests before people.
But here in Wisconsin, we have an opportunity to restore trust.
Judge Chris Taylor has spent her career standing up for fairness, protecting rights, and making sure everyone is treated equally under the law.
As a judge on the Circuit Court and Wisconsin Court of Appeals, she’s earned a reputation for listening, respecting every person in her courtroom, and ensuring that justice is applied fairly.
Electing Judge Chris Taylor to the Wisconsin Supreme Court would be a major step toward rebuilding faith in our judicial system. **However, dark money groups are already preparing to spend heavily to buy a seat on our court.**
That’s why this grassroots team is so important. Every $5, $10, or $25 we raise together will help us reach voters across Wisconsin and make the case for a fair, independent court.
[**Will you chip in $10 today to help elect Judge Chris Taylor and restore trust in our courts?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_20250919_1_ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250919-593&refcode2=600_294397_S0Wk70&akid=600%2E294397%2ES0Wk70)
**[Donate $10 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_20250919_1_ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250919-593&refcode2=600_294397_S0Wk70&akid=600%2E294397%2ES0Wk70)**
With gratitude,
Team Taylor
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_footer&refcode=em20250919-593?t=2&refcode2=600_294397_S0Wk70&akid=600%2E294397%2ES0Wk70)**

name: VoteVets
subject: NEW STICKER: Veterans for Free Speech
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
body:
#
Each of us swore an oath to support and defend the Constitution and the rights it ensures. Many of us put our lives on the line for those rights. Our friends were wounded and killed defending them.
Donald Trump is trying to destroy free speech and the free press, and we’re not going to sit idly by and let him do it.
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-c4-em-sep25-free-speech-sticker.qgvYNx&refcode=em250919-1-120&t=1&akid=34626%2E3013755%2Ewu7Kia)
[**A donation of any amount will get you our “Veterans for Free Speech” sticker, free of charge. Chip in anything at all so we can send you your sticker!**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-c4-em-sep25-free-speech-sticker.qgvYNx&refcode=em250919-1-120&t=2&akid=34626%2E3013755%2Ewu7Kia)
| [GET YOUR STICKER](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-c4-em-sep25-free-speech-sticker.qgvYNx&refcode=em250919-1-120&t=3&akid=34626%2E3013755%2Ewu7Kia)
---
Not a Veteran? We bet you know someone who is, and that they love the First Amendment just as much as we do. Get a sticker for them.
Don’t be silent. We need you in this fight.
Thank you,
The team at VoteVets

PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND

clean_body: If you’re reading this, it means you check your email. I bet you also actively seek out and read the news. | Peter, If you’re reading this, it means you check your email. I bet you also actively seek out and read the news. But to win in the year 2025 and beyond, Democrats need to reach millions of Americans who don’t actively seek out news – and folks who don’t sign up to get emails from their congressperson! : get their news from social media. Put another way, your friends and family get their news from YOU. With that in mind, I’ve stepped up my social media game. My team and I are sharing videos, photos, and updates of all kinds to tell the story of our work, communities, and values. Please take a minute to follow me on your platform of choice: 📸 – I post here the most! 📸 📽️ ⏱️ 📚 📘 Like, share, and comment to let me know what you think! Thank you for everything you do 💙 — Emily = | | Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress Emily Randall for Congress P.O. name: Erika Kirk
subject: My cries will echo around the world like a battle cry.
body:
My husband is gone — but his mission is alive in ME.

<https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/f8f86882-401a-4702-8c9b-df5abce81f1f?source_code=GFY269604&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ek&utm_term=GFY269604>

Friend,

I want to thank you for loving my husband.

For standing with us in the worst days of our lives. For praying. For
mourning. For remembering.

But now, I need you to listen closely...

Because the evildoers who took Charlie’s life? They have NO idea what they
have done.

They didn’t just try to silence a man...

They tried to silence his message — a message of patriotism, of faith, and of
God’s merciful love.

Instead, they ignited something even greater.

If they thought my husband’s mission was powerful before... They have NO idea
what they have just UNLEASHED.

Not just across this country... But in me.

They have no idea the fire they’ve lit inside this wife.

And to those listening across America... Let me be clear: The movement my
husband built will not die.

I refuse to let that happen.

And I know all of us will refuse to let that happen, too.

Charlie’s mission will grow: Stronger. Bolder. Louder. Greater than ever.

I shared these words publicly, from my heart — just two days after I lost the
love of my life.

I want you to watch. I want you to hear what Charlie meant to me. And I want
you to hear what comes next:
<https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/f8f86882-401a-4702-8c9b-df5abce81f1f?source_code=GFY269604&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ek&utm_term=GFY269604>

<https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/f8f86882-401a-4702-8c9b-df5abce81f1f?source_code=GFY269604&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ek&utm_term=GFY269604>

Charlie gave everything for this country. And I will never stop speaking his
name.

We will not let the light he lit go out. Not now. Not ever.

For Charlie,

<https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/f8f86882-401a-4702-8c9b-df5abce81f1f?source_code=GFY269604&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ek&utm_term=GFY269604>

Erika Kirk

On behalf of the Turning Point USA Family

<https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/f8f86882-401a-4702-8c9b-df5abce81f1f?source_code=GFY269604&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ek&utm_term=GFY269604>

P.S. Charlie always said: “Never surrender.”

He built something bigger than himself — and now we must carry it forward.

If you believe in what he stood for... if you refuse to let Charlie’s vision
die...

Give in Charlie’s Honor
Support Turning Point USA
<https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/f8f86882-401a-4702-8c9b-df5abce81f1f?source_code=GFY269604&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ek&utm_term=GFY269604>

4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044

Unsubscribe
<http://links.g4yamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_s=528dbae31814499fb26f2b3ceb3105b4&_t=ESI4bE9_A6tn7_RuNmkvbc9XMn9yVks8b_nPZ2b9lH0tX3Cq4UByQK36bWo8Lq77d3GjZFa2UB4MdA65xS1MZILtGhYWD2JlOS3yIUXam94nScAEzK77RZBN9G3XQm-m>

name: Leaders We Deserve HQ
subject: Peter, who do you think is doing the best job taking on Trump?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
We want to hear from you — fill out our brief survey on which Democrats are meeting the moment and successfully taking on Trump.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250919-1&t=1&akid=2668%2E587540%2EcP9IBi)
Peter,
At Leaders We Deserve, we’re building the next generation of young progressive leaders — people ready to stand up for their communities and take on Trump and the far right.
But we can only accomplish our mission if we know what’s working — and what’s not. So tell us:
**[Which Democrats are taking charge and successfully leading the fight against Trump?](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/survey/em_ms_lwd_20250919_1?source=em20250919-2668&akid=2668%2E587540%2EcP9IBi)**
**[Take the Survey »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/survey/em_ms_lwd_20250919_1?source=em20250919-2668&akid=2668%2E587540%2EcP9IBi)**
Peter, we all know of too many Democratic incumbents asleep at the wheel.
They’ve grown silent, complacent, and beholden to special interests while their constituents need them more than ever. They view public office as a right that they deserve — not a responsibility they should have to earn from voters.
We’re calling them out and challenging them in races up and down the ballot. But more importantly, we’re uplifting the leaders who _are_ doing the work to organize, lead, and defend their communities from Trump.
Thankfully, some big-name Democrats have met the moment, fearlessly taken on Trump, and consistently shown up — folks like Newsom, Pritzker, AOC, and Bernie, among others.
We’re also proud of our LWD-backed champions making big waves:
* **Molly Cook,** the youngest person ever elected to the Texas State Senate, leading walkouts and fighting gerrymandering
* **Oscar De Los Santos,** repealing abortion bans and defending our rights in Arizona
* **Zohran Mamdani, Chi Ossé, Greg Casar** — young, unapologetic leaders beating the odds and spearheading progressive policies

And maybe there’s a leader you’re looking up to that we haven’t heard of yet. Whether it’s a small-town mayor, city council member, or community activist, no role is insignificant when it comes to building real grassroots power.
Your feedback helps us see what’s working, recruit bold candidates, win frontline races, and train the next generation of progressive leaders.
**[Take the survey now and tell us which Democrats are stepping up and meeting the moment during this critical time for our country.](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/survey/em_ms_lwd_20250919_1?source=em20250919-2668&akid=2668%2E587540%2EcP9IBi)**
**[Take the Survey »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/survey/em_ms_lwd_20250919_1?source=em20250919-2668&akid=2668%2E587540%2EcP9IBi)**
In solidarity,
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250919-1&t=2&refcode2=2668_587540_cP9IBi&akid=2668%2E587540%2EcP9IBi)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=2668%2E587540%2EcP9IBi)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2668%2E587540%2EcP9IBi)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115550518/570690218/-1080040549?refcode=email-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmYxZGY0NS05Njk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AP1JABtTor1M-mFGYs8hs_a3SBwcQMgOOiA7uZtRgYk=) Team, Donald Trump is ratcheting up his attacks on Oregon’s free and fair elections. Take a look at this headline: **_OPB: Trump administration sues Oregon for refusing to turn over voter data_** **The Trump administration just filed a lawsuit against Oregon for refusing to comply with their baseless demands to turn over our state’s voter rolls and election data.** _And this comes right after he vowed to “get rid of mail-in ballots” ahead of the 2026 midterms._ This is a massive escalation, but Oregon is standing firm against these attacks. Trump might think that he can demand anything, from anyone — including TV broadcasters, private businesses, and now, the states.
