clean_body: | | This is it. We're down to the wire. My election is less than 2 months away, and the future of Virginia and our nation hangs in the balance! I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I'm running for Governor of Virginia. But I'm not just running for office--I'm running to stop the liberal establishment from destroying our country. They're pouring MILLIONS into my Democrat opponent's campaign, and we're running out of time--chip in NOW to protect our country's future. I need 1,000 Patriots like you to contribute to my campaign in the next hour. If we can do that, I know we can win this. But if we fall short, the consequences will be devastating: higher taxes, more regulations, and a government completely out of touch with our values. Your donation right now can make all the difference. Let's send a loud and clear message that we won't back down. Thank you for standing with me when it matters most. Together, we can protect our values and continue leading America in the right direction. -Winsome Earle-Sears Immigrant. Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. Lieutenant Governor. name: JB Pritzker
subject: I want Chris Pappas in the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
I know Chris can win, but he needs our support.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250919_1_pritzker?refcode=em20250919-2438&amount=5&refcode2=2438_582294_ghRAGs&akid=2438%2E582294%2EghRAGs)
JB Pritzker here.
Let me cut to the chase: **New Hampshire’s Senate race could decide whether Democrats take back the majority — _and Republicans know it._**
Donald Trump and the MAGA GOP see this seat as one of their best shots to expand their power.
They’ve already got a Republican governor in New Hampshire, and they’re betting they can flip the Senate seat next. If they win here, our chances of taking back the Senate drop to zero.
_We can’t let that happen._
Chris is a proven fighter for working families — taking on Big Pharma, defending reproductive freedom, and making sure our government actually works for the people it serves.
I’ve seen what happens when leaders like Chris have the platform and the power to make change — and _I want him in the Senate._
I know Chris can win, but there’s no way around it: _**This isn’t a safe blue seat, folks._**
The GOP is ready to flood New Hampshire with attack ads and dark money. The only way to beat them is with early, grassroots support. That’s where you come in:
[**If you can, please make a $5 donation right now to help Chris Pappas win in New Hampshire and put Democrats on the path to a Senate majority.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250919_1_pritzker?refcode=em20250919-2438&amount=5&refcode2=2438_582294_ghRAGs&akid=2438%2E582294%2EghRAGs)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250919_1_pritzker?amount=5&refcode=em20250919-2438&refcode2=2438_582294_ghRAGs&akid=2438%2E582294%2EghRAGs)**
Thank you for standing up,
JB Pritzker
Governor of Illinois
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer&refcode=em20250919-1?t=1&refcode2=2438_582294_ghRAGs&akid=2438%2E582294%2EghRAGs)**

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Why do they ask me these ridiculous questions?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Never Surrender, Inc
body:
Friend, don’t share this with anyone else. This is only for you.
| | | | [](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
---
|
---
Friend,
The fake news media pool asks me, “Mr. President, why are you deporting these people, sir?” and they’re shocked to hear it when I say, “**BECAUSE THEY’RE ILLEGAL**!”
What part of that do they not understand?
_I’ll tell you:_ they understand it perfectly. It’s just that they don’t care about the rule of law.
I know what it takes to win – the fair way, the **AMERICAN** way.
Democrats flooded this country with illegals for political gain, and we’re putting a stop to it immediately.
Therefore, I have instructed our Department of Commerce to immediately begin work on a new and highly accurate census.
People who are in our Country illegally **WILL NOT BE COUNTED IN THE CENSUS.**
****
Please Patriot, it is imperative that you complete this **CITIZENS ONLY SURVEY!** ****
**Answering these questions will allow me to lock down the 2026 midterm elections – free from Democrat fraud and illegals.**

[COMPLETE VOTER CENSUS](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
– President Donald J. Trump

name: James Talarico
subject: Everywhere. Everyone.
body:
[1]Talarico for Texas

Peter —

I promised you on day one that this wouldn’t be a typical campaign.

A typical campaign won’t cut it for Democrats in Texas. We need a
different playbook to pull off a historic feat like this.

We have to go everywhere and talk to everyone.

[ https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em250919-ak&t=1001&akid=55%2E1347274%2EyoevRq ]If you agree with this approach, please consider contributing
$5 to keep us on the road.

[ https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em250919-ak&t=1002&akid=55%2E1347274%2EyoevRq ]DONATE

This campaign just started. But I’m already barnstorming the state —
starting with the 1,800 Texans who showed up in my hometown of Round Rock
to kick off this campaign with less than 12 hours notice.

[ https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em250919-ak&t=1003&akid=55%2E1347274%2EyoevRq ]1,800 Texans who showed up in my hometown of Round Rock to kick off
this campaign

The very next day, I went down to San Antonio where I first started my
public service as a public school teacher.

2,000 people showed up.

[ https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em250919-ak&t=1004&akid=55%2E1347274%2EyoevRq ]Fort Bend supporters

Then I went to Fort Bend...

[ https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em250919-ak&t=1005&akid=55%2E1347274%2EyoevRq ]Fort Bend supporters

Then Houston...

[ https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em250919-ak&t=1006&akid=55%2E1347274%2EyoevRq ]Houston supporters

And I wrapped up our first week in deep-red Longview, Texas.

It was standing room only.

[ https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em250919-ak&t=1007&akid=55%2E1347274%2EyoevRq ]Longview supporters

I’ve been overwhelmed by the number of Texans at these events.

And it’s not just Democrats showing up — it’s Independents and some
curious Republicans too. I’ve also been blown away by the number of people
at these events who tell me it’s their first political rally ever.

This is how we win.

But barnstorming the state and organizing large events everywhere is
expensive.

[ https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em250919-ak&t=1008&akid=55%2E1347274%2EyoevRq ]Please consider contributing $5 to help us organize
everywhere. Grassroots donations are the backbone of this campaign. We
wouldn’t have the resources to do this without your support.

If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution
instantly.

[ https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/506?c0=jt-em-launch.3s2pDp&refcode=em250919-ak&t=1027&akid=55%2E1347274%2EyoevRq ]Donate $5

[ https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/505?c0=jt-em-launch.soFUPy&refcode=em250919-ak&t=1028&akid=55%2E1347274%2EyoevRq ]Donate $25

[ https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/498?c0=jt-em-launch.qllyRI&refcode=em250919-ak&t=1029&akid=55%2E1347274%2EyoevRq ]Donate $50

[ https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/499?c0=jt-em-launch.UeXr9I&refcode=em250919-ak&t=1030&akid=55%2E1347274%2EyoevRq ]Donate $100

[ https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/500?c0=jt-em-launch.457jmL&refcode=em250919-ak&t=1031&akid=55%2E1347274%2EyoevRq ]Donate $250

[ https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/503?c0=jt-em-launch.jEYg2l&refcode=em250919-ak&t=1032&akid=55%2E1347274%2EyoevRq ]Other Amount

This is just the beginning.

James

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.jamestalarico.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=55%2E1347274%2EyoevRq

**Team: The First Amendment is under attack --** **and President Obama is speaking out!**

By targeting news networks and threatening critics, Trump is undermining our most fundamental freedoms -- _and we must say NO!_ He's counting on Democrats like us to stay quiet, but we REFUSE to sit by while he erodes our constitutional rights.

**We've launched an EMERGENCY petition to confirm that Democrats stand with President Obama and Jimmy Kimmel -- and we need as many signatures before MIDNIGHT as possible,****_so please:_**

**[Add your name to say you'll join the fight to protect free speech from Trump's relentless attacks>>](http://go.dscc.org/go/22036?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250919-BREAKING-JimmyKimmelObamaSpeaksOutRR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250919-BREAKING-JimmyKimmelObamaSpeaksOutRR-Pros-sl1&akid=21279%2E9716520%2ECUForJ)**

name: Stasha Rhodes, United for Democracy
subject: It’s up to the people
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United for Democracy
body:
The Constitution belongs to us, not wannabe dictators and corrupt judges. | |
---
Peter, **237 years ago this week, the Constitution of the United States of America was ratified.** The document established the rights we have as Americans, and our democratic system of government. With every Amendment, we’ve strengthened this foundation and secured the promise of liberty for more of our people. **That democracy is now being dismantled piece by piece in the name of the law and the Constitution.** Moneyed special interests, extremist factions, and wannabe dictators are pulling the strings and corrupting our institutions against the people. **That’s why United for Democracy is fighting for a Constitution that belongs to the people, and**** _the people_****get to decide how it’s interpreted on our behalf. Not wannabe dictators, and not corrupt judges.** Not enough Americans realize we aren’t meant to be powerless against the whims of the executive and judicial branch. Not enough of us truly understand the importance of our democracy—and how close to the edge it’s been pushed. **Supreme Court Justice Sonia Sotomayor recently highlighted the increasing lack of civic education we’re facing.** She questioned whether American citizens really know the difference between a king and a president. She argued that if more people understood the powers and the limits the Constitution sets on the executive branch, they’d be outraged at Trump’s moves toward authoritarianism. **That’s why United for Democracy exists. We’re here to inform the public of what the Supreme Court can and can’t do, how it’s meant to keep the executive branch in check, and how these choices are made for us by shadowy special interests.** Last year, Justice Sotomayor wrote, “In every use of official power, the president is now a king above the law.” She’s right. And it’s time We the People take back our Constitution. [**This Constitution Week, we’re reclaiming our founding document for those it was written for in the first place—We the People. Our Constitution set forth democracy, not monarchy, and it should not be used to prop up a king in America. Chip in today to power our fight.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsQNarR6PCR1lUtXpWTyhe6ika4VmbNv7twwH6JtdHotLb7pO-ljEqOxqFpXvFt4dCVEVBkOu2j0JHco2vpj2_JLurQFmpR1tugd8cQqZ5jm1ND-UUw1c1xt4LP-I3CEeeBGHOA3hpWgbawl0LtPWKJJDAuMfm4GZ2mNiwhAIlBLUMBah5aV1_W2NQ5E-09SuDyXDc74TYcwzUVFXzfpK5J8Qq999BFfQ31XiUC652GAY-Nk0NNr66uZuNFOt6w20TUQ_RjqGeT6iPGJOfHR1aBvlPy6QhSD0rTpePNGiOljQ/4k1/wO-hfm-JR267PcwN0hK89g/h0/h001.jss_4Ndl0QokrIlotmADhM52EZuvt6rb0zts2Zdl8FA) Thank you for fighting for democracy, Stasha Rhodes

It's critical because I have a radical Leftist opponent who has gained national grassroots support from Democrats. They hate that President Donald J. Trump has endorsed my campaign repeatedly, so from Hollywood celebrities to small-dollar donors in Blue states like New York and California, Liberal donors are stepping up in a major way for my opponent. name: Gavin Newsom
subject: Legally required to report what we've raised
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
Derek,
In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a well-timed donation to help me pass the Election Rigging Response Act. Please give me a chance to explain why this request -- especially today -- is so important.
Here's the truth:
Tomorrow, we have our first, official fundraising deadline of this campaign. When it ends, we're legally required to report how much we've raised.
This is the biggest election in the country and everyone will be watching: the press, the Trump administration and Republican states considering re-drawing their maps.
They're looking to see how much grassroots enthusiasm there is in opposing the Republican power grab happening everywhere.
If we report a big number, they'll know Americans are deeply opposed to their efforts to rig the next election. Plus, every donation will help us win our race here in California.
So this is a big deal. We may have enjoyed our last free and fair election. They're redrawing districts to hold the House; going after ActBlue and Democrats' ability to fundraise; going after colleges, the free press and those they don't like in the media.
Time is running out:
**[If stopping Trump's power grab is important to you, please contribute to help pass the Election Rigging Response Act in California and to help Adam Schiff fight for our democracy in the Senate. Our average donation is around $30. Many give more. Some give less. All that matters is that lots and lots of people are donating before this deadline.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=abs-em-caredistricting.VKsGBY&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250919_PM1_V1_S1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=3&akid=8994%2E5257348%2EX3TYWs)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Adam Schiff and Governor Newsom’s Ballot Measure Committee will go through immediately:_

Gavin Newsom

subject: child care costs more than college 🫠
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
[ https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51612?t=1001&akid=10317%2E434096%2EuI6S42 ]John Fetterman

Folks, raising kids is expensive – and it's only getting worse.

In most states, infant care costs more than in-state college tuition. 🫠 Yep – day care costs more than a degree. Multiply that by two or three kids, and you’re paying more than rent or a mortgage.

And unless you're lucky enough to have a grandparent who's up for the job, this is a mandatory thing – parents need child care to get to work.

So that's why we were STUNNED to see what just happened ↘↘

From AP News → "New Mexico is the first state to promise free child care for all families"

This is the kind of action that truly puts working families first.

So as John fights for working families in PA and across this country, he wants to know if you think we should make a program like this available to ALL Americans. Will you be one of the 5,000 responses we need from your area before 11:59 p.m.?

https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51672?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=1005&akid=10317%2E434096%2EuI6S42

Team Fetterman 💛

body:

_Head’s up, Peter:_ A dark money organization that pours _millions_ into right-wing causes just launched a TV ad for our opponent.

name: research@voteractionproject.org
subject: Survey: Jeanine Pirro as DC Attorney
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Huffpost: Jeanine Pirro’s Cases Keep Falling Apart, And The Judges Have Had Enough [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/Huffpost_PirroDC.png]
Former Fox News host Jeanine Pirro was sworn in as the US attorney for the District of Columbia earlier this year. The position of US Attorney for DC is important because it serves as both the federal prosecutor and the local district attorney in the nation's capital, often handling some of the most impactful cases across the country.
Pirro's qualifications for the job -- aside from serving as the elected district attorney for Westchester County in New York decades ago -- appeared to be her unwavering support of Donald Trump on TV and his claims about the 2020 election, which she repeated on air and was named a defendant in the cases Fox News settled with Dominion Voting Systems.
Now that she's in office, Pirro has seen a historically bad run of casework, including the felony assault charges she brought against a man who threw a sandwich at a Customs & Border Patrol agent who was part of Trump's DC takeover. A grand jury refused to indict him, and it's one of several examples of Pirro's office filing made-for-TV charges that have been thrown out.
We want to hear from voters in your area about her appointment. Will you take our one-click poll right away?
Team: Do you approve of Jeanine Pirro's work in the crucial position of US Attorney for DC?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=091925_2yes&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=091925_2no&amount=15]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=091925_2&amount=20]

name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: This is legalized corruption
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250919-1527-foote&t=1001&akid=1527%2E342411%2EXr6AVz ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

Big news: Congress may finally vote to bar lawmakers and their families
from trading individual stocks in the same industries they oversee.

For too long, members of Congress have been allowed to buy and sell stocks
in the very industries they’re supposed to regulate — from Big Pharma and
Big Oil to defense contractors — making millions while everyday people
struggle to afford rent, groceries, and health care.

Let’s be clear: This isn’t just a conflict of interest. It’s legalized
corruption. And it puts private profits over public trust.

Ayanna, Ilhan, Rashida, and AOC are leading the charge to make this ban

clean_body: [ ]Squad Victory Fund Peter, Big news: Congress may finally vote to bar lawmakers and their families from trading individual stocks in the same industries they oversee. For too long, members of Congress have been allowed to buy and sell stocks in the very industries they’re supposed to regulate — from Big Pharma and Big Oil to defense contractors — making millions while everyday people struggle to afford rent, groceries, and health care. Let’s be clear: This isn’t just a conflict of interest. It’s legalized corruption. And it puts private profits over public trust. Ayanna, Ilhan, Rashida, and AOC are leading the charge to make this ban real — strong, enforceable, and free from loopholes. They’ve been fighting for this reform for years, and they won’t let special interests water it down behind closed doors. But entrenched forces are pushing back hard — because their profits are on the line. And they’ll do whatever it takes to protect the status quo. This is where you come in. clean_body: We are taking the fight to the GOP to protect hardworking Americans | = Did you see the breaking news? = | = Earlier this summer, the GOP ripped away healthcare from 15 million Americans, slashing food assistance for hungry families, and added more than $4 trillion in debt just to hand billionaires more tax breaks. And today’s vote makes one thing clear: Republicans would rather shut down the government than work across the aisle to lower costs and protect healthcare for everyday Americans. New Dems are standing strong against their reckless agenda. We reject the idea that families should pay more for groceries, housing, and healthcare while Republicans cater to the ultra-wealthy. That’s why we’re working around the clock to break the GOP’s stranglehold on power, hold Trump Republicans accountable, and deliver a better, more united future. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thank you! Fellow American,

During Charlie Kirk’s Turning Point USA event at the University of Wyoming in April of this year, Charlie gave this answer to a student on what he wanted for humanity and for America:

> _“We want to reverse the fertility crisis in the West. We are increasingly having less children, and we have a population collapse that is plaguing our entire society. People need to get married more and have children younger, and have a lot more children in this country. We want to see that reverse. ... With automation, AI, and the hyper-digitization of our country, we are becoming less human to one another. I want to see more people go back to church. I want to see church attendance go up. I want us to become a less violent country and have violence go down. I want a country where you don’t have to lock your doors at night because you know your neighbor by name and you don’t have to worry that someone’s gonna come in and steal your stuff. I think Wyoming is a great model for part of the America that we lost, where there is that kind of rugged independence, but there’s also that neighborly dependence — where you’re so far from the town center that if something happens to your kid, you drive to a neighbor first to see if they can help or they can pitch in. We’ve lost that. We’re increasingly a nation of strangers. We’re foreign to one another.”_

These are the virtues and principles that Charlie Kirk espoused and the message he was championing on college campuses across the country.

Charlie played a pivotal role in mobilizing the younger generation of voters. His work was key to helping re-elect President Trump and achieve conservative majorities in both houses of Congress.

**He believed in the American Comeback** , which is currently underway and has a long road ahead [**if we can take up the mantle and fight harder than ever for the conservative principles we share and the country we love.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d8f59b2a993a450a83224c69e79ef8b0&_e=JAfOun3PgBIQTz4kgtHO5jbVzTg43O0zLABGyUSI7E6pzCLJF-2JTE7_JlO8jGgbwgQAOo3xZpmj8ZU5gUcoKuzEv1YqTnp2vxsiE205u_Qdlxy5URkhN0Mezr1DUcsDiO173T0N0HsdNS1c4mdsB3E340nD8jBcs19wOCo3yK3tReuej6r5jpDTBW6kRr66DfRz5-PMCfex8hwYHSk1bXHQzifShUdHTb7LCIc58H6EKhuMEhA0XT9vAKq0EMNMxwkvgH1Oq0YCAID7IdKwZXy9_gHV51rMr7oGKwreM2uku2minK2BiIuSbWt1CWAs32G3dsRfcn-Q7tU8nq_iTfV48LMJf7KfyVqfRHV-5XmdIbkXRmBn_gJsxRrdfYteXHRBw1lHWu-PcfA82ksG9yXm0CmM9j22SzdAiuVzJPFNU4E5jI7hs-RCx0t5LZIKSxlmncuA3NQOyj9_MVI0r2H7dju5KVUqb7iqxgj_CjFcpv2cZejBI8KfqKmSnpvXxqJ15QzAYFHgMIte53XeWkC8Nq9Vuu8u3_NBo21oF_L7fyS9lYjpsEFS9fsU9yrHYoPlgsu8DeBRGH7yyARK7CC4AkHwyyZ_zmD8f7XYxVb9gZWFCCs3erwiRnMRfu9tBaHt5Lc5Xm79nSqWiJQ-Cwg-Fr3ZgKVvzxjvNapKyC1b8LRX7IPhivRRFHaKhv6wsqg_8NfdwUsjGFS4-598xg%3D%3D)

| [ KEEP UP THE FIGHT! ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d8f59b2a993a450a83224c69e79ef8b0&_e=JAfOun3PgBIQTz4kgtHO5jbVzTg43O0zLABGyUSI7E6pzCLJF-2JTE7_JlO8jGgbwgQAOo3xZpmj8ZU5gUcoKuzEv1YqTnp2vxsiE205u_Qdlxy5URkhN0Mezr1DUcsDiO173T0N0HsdNS1c4mdsB3E340nD8jBcs19wOCo3yK3tReuej6r5jpDTBW6kRr66DfRz5-PMCfex8hwYHSk1bXHQzifShUdHTb7LCIc58H6EKhuMEhA0XT9vAKq0EMNMlDyehD2zLgbgQ4LEjnNiwBNXuSVQmp_4PLBxxakErop83_XLN5tahhEkOfbCiQ5hkM9CFqp5wPm23yyEe4ylmD3XvfZok2Rlf-6__J9BBC9E62exoqOHpn0MHsins4dzlmbfUaOoOo-4Fw1As7XEMTRMpxe1xSdG5lUxy4Itj33dAnzZk5KjvNeGpSE5wH8rs5oceiNcL9_V66EwVeSMWffr-YpMhNzGLUuVv02kxbsUdoNl3NTVcqh8x-uKQt4cep5D_OLGgVsv79-CzpFpCc3No5LyGf5g8DFJ7vRkz7ud_ZvmCvlMNI0gqFranvRjQwE8KMGcNZUHn04TyuEe9_7iOPitiwZk7nzMGH6ztJLeCdGy50Uli17JiTq42j-7V1WgC3wjATtPdjgy0tqERbB84UscpM5jjwt9CBMgDB42oUkkfeu3EiaR4Yvuw5AKyjYHqfye4m8sIJ-Pd0r3dQ%3D%3D)

The radical Left is the author of the divisive language that has inspired violence against conservatives, and they continue to show their true colors.

**The WORST thing we could do right now is let up on the fight.** This would only allow the Left to better position themselves for their own comeback.

[**We MUST ensure the American Comeback can continue**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d8f59b2a993a450a83224c69e79ef8b0&_e=JAfOun3PgBIQTz4kgtHO5jbVzTg43O0zLABGyUSI7E6pzCLJF-2JTE7_JlO8jGgbwgQAOo3xZpmj8ZU5gUcoKuzEv1YqTnp2vxsiE205u_Qdlxy5URkhN0Mezr1DUcsDiO173T0N0HsdNS1c4mdsB3E340nD8jBcs19wOCo3yK3tReuej6r5jpDTBW6kRr66DfRz5-PMCfex8hwYHSk1bXHQzifShUdHTb7LCIc58H6EKhuMEhA0XT9vAKq0EMNMy_j_Z9jQeqjEGKC0AYj6CTObFxvKRS1ypging2bfxTbFiN4AbAbcQoeq3cR3mFA7FXUJJJH9XXZ6SA0m-KFSNdzM9fGxZUs4SYILO-CeZ9tu_qMyJVcXdvMo0Vs5fFHEGwfHJHSW8O46byMG-glX-Zee-asRyUb6h9SzPxM0aLkfoADjeq-NausS-1F1BoUUSIhnRK_EcJkC78pxtwVs4aNDVPW1o0LazBJx2fTrh6uulAYQuvWjD-ksnu0onVtv6lGmYGhOeWL7xGZzu34RcmMEMJ06XXRyI52FQsG-NdU5IVQU7gXsVS99T6R7wnSDBknAPu3eIJk90E1DeyueO6a97-RrMW7vaVneu2GvUVvemQz-En7n8bK1K6VLGzCpNKQ3zhQs0JxVuUr0dVhJkgypZkVcr7SH3WbPaa-9NDk_jLFZYwOV0Q_LEEo-rSof1dZBbbjrpOc2GfzAX6H4AQ%3D%3D) – that President Trump has a Congress that will work with him to fight for these principles and deliver on the promises to the American people.

Push forward with us. Take up the mantle. [**Anything you can give now to help us continue the fight for these principles and ensure the future of our movement will be greatly appreciated and make a huge impact.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d8f59b2a993a450a83224c69e79ef8b0&_e=JAfOun3PgBIQTz4kgtHO5jbVzTg43O0zLABGyUSI7E6pzCLJF-2JTE7_JlO8jGgbwgQAOo3xZpmj8ZU5gUcoKuzEv1YqTnp2vxsiE205u_Qdlxy5URkhN0Mezr1DUcsDiO173T0N0HsdNS1c4mdsB3E340nD8jBcs19wOCo3yK3tReuej6r5jpDTBW6kRr66DfRz5-PMCfex8hwYHSk1bXHQzifShUdHTb7LCIc58H6EKhuMEhA0XT9vAKq0EMNM598xi9Im3U1-a7sNs2PJZ2L6PWv3JCTydTkuynQZ7rb7T7KDXoTbzSpqDzIrj_I7-ng2eDvXunqc_yA2xOXMD6pvSQ8DZUMX1rsTuAUF04I502gqbwuE4eoAptdpls0BVU07f3HaAKJkMRUpRJmJTI3gfFBNKiaPQrshs86E9lnmHtDcz4pqUeIhW9R_GaZrnnB_gEHMCQtdb2CT7t11jhPXiHmN76sC_b-iY12873QnVKs0GuW5qIUJGR38SG1qohloJsLsnQo1mhXFEa0q3RYcNDiBmBNC84mOUodaaBtYZGmxLmq4EIdB70-BAftc8k6hKGXc1l1O-1wMtOaKcjnQ0LXAq3fq3HfEeWawqhBszH3YylOcs0yZYLnzwyFpKBAMTkl4yM3DHpjf1cTbl6AjJL0VL_JkpAslh8QrFWQFVbk0BtJjH1nTBshVC_fJrc9dVWFmOxKzS2kFg2Lzvw%3D%3D)

I’m going to keep fighting, fellow American – harder than ever before. I hope you’ll join us.

For the American Comeback,

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d8f59b2a993a450a83224c69e79ef8b0&_e=JAfOun3PgBIQTz4kgtHO5jbVzTg43O0zLABGyUSI7E6pzCLJF-2JTE7_JlO8jGgbwgQAOo3xZpmj8ZU5gUcoKuzEv1YqTnp2vxsiE205u_Qdlxy5URkhN0Mezr1DUcsDiO173T0N0HsdNS1c4mdsB3E340nD8jBcs19wOCo3yK3tReuej6r5jpDTBW6kRr66DfRz5-PMCfex8hwYHSk1bXHQzifShUdHTb7LCIc58H6EKhuMEhA0XT9vAKq0EMNMzihDE3hYj_PMt9CXsoSTtBkQg4QRjTEnydaaPo_zfXN0ImZ17T0edXgs4A_xDNaQazcpEXHlOsA6RO0STxMy7BDA_G9ImXBMWjQnzwj1hV5yLoVb2kvDFODKwS5m9dL74_yudZbHvlIQnpQ3lcAKeJ4tPujHnnilgnEBetovh5TGgMaqpCRjJO4cZ9bSONKuLblaopTQRPwGGh3lndqR69GrvgurBNIt4bR9xuSlh1izNfHKpoWtquN4y1dmsH3cinbok3xW9IT6_3o0fqyDO3nRHzvZoG-ReXgQIaAvAtFa1pFOkaf1H27gzFkbyU9-gQhT6fqYtdggTO1MICHILF9gSQo8R3Z0yLWci-IcLre1zKKOC6craoyG1KLFNe3lwrUjvs2LUEHKuSU-Pys0Z6_i0AjwiFfvE9nFImkRD2sJtfTgv2HI0EAfFo_xjB0ED4ulTRTuS9YxWfSnlERGCg%3D%3D)

clean_body: The WORST thing we could do right now is let up on the fight. | Fellow American, During Charlie Kirk’s Turning Point USA event at the University of Wyoming in April of this year, Charlie gave this answer to a student on what he wanted for humanity and for America: “We want to reverse the fertility crisis in the West. We are increasingly having less children, and we have a population collapse that is plaguing our entire society. People need to get married more and have children younger, and have a lot more children in this country. We want to see that reverse. ... With automation, AI, and the hyper-digitization of our country, we are becoming less human to one another. I want to see more people go back to church. I want to see church attendance go up. I want us to become a less violent country and have violence go down. I want a country where you don’t have to lock your doors at night because you know your neighbor by name and you don’t have to worry that someone’s gonna come in and steal your stuff. I think Wyoming is a great model for part of the America that we lost, where there is that kind of rugged independence, but there’s also that neighborly dependence — where you’re so far from the town center that if something happens to your kid, you drive to a neighbor first to see if they can help or they can pitch in. We’ve lost that. We’re increasingly a nation of strangers. We’re foreign to one another.” These are the virtues and principles that Charlie Kirk espoused and the message he was championing on college campuses across the country. Charlie played a pivotal role in mobilizing the younger generation of voters. His work was key to helping re-elect President Trump and achieve conservative majorities in both houses of Congress. He believed in the American Comeback , which is currently underway and has a long road ahead | The radical Left is the author of the divisive language that has inspired violence against conservatives, and they continue to show their true colors. The WORST thing we could do right now is let up on the fight. This would only allow the Left to better position themselves for their own comeback. – that President Trump has a Congress that will work with him to fight for these principles and deliver on the promises to the American people. Push forward with us. Take up the mantle. I’m going to keep fighting, fellow American – harder than ever before. I hope you’ll join us. For the American Comeback, Cynthia Lummis U.S. Senator – Wyoming Follow Cynthia Lummis | Paid for by Lummis for Wyoming Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go: .

This is a direct threat to public health. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115553254/570699104/823540626?refcode=ea.d7048d66-9e95-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.d7048d66-9e95-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzA0OGQ2Ni05ZTk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zzS-AU_9JDuUhSVraqlUPwFzdvSqI84yLEeZV-irMKo=&emci=67b8b1b9-8495-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=d7048d66-9e95-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=17205535)
_Yesterday, the CDC advisory panel that recommends vaccine policy for Americans voted against recommending access to one safe, effective vaccine for young children. They are planning to take more votes, where they might recommend limiting other childhood vaccines. We’re on the precipice of a public health disaster._ **Here’s how we got here:** Over the summer, Health and Human Services Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. purged trusted experts from the advisory panel. **In their place, he appointed vaccine critics and proponents of conspiratorial and unproven medical interventions.** And this new anti-vaccine advisory panel is doing exactly what Kennedy wanted all along: They’re paving the way to make it harder for Americans to get the vaccines we need to keep our families, and our communities, safe. **[Peter, this is exactly what you get when you appoint an anti-vax conspiracy theorist to lead our nation’s health policy. We’re facing a critical juncture for public health, and we need to speak out. Will you add your name here to call on the vaccine advisory panel to follow the science and protect Americans’ access to vaccines?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115553255/570699105/-439907237?refcode=ea.d7048d66-9e95-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.d7048d66-9e95-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzA0OGQ2Ni05ZTk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zzS-AU_9JDuUhSVraqlUPwFzdvSqI84yLEeZV-irMKo=&emci=67b8b1b9-8495-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=d7048d66-9e95-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=17205535)** Attacks on vaccination are opening the door for dangerous diseases to return. Measles. Diphtheria. Polio. Generations of Americans experienced first hand the suffering they caused — but thanks to the miracle of vaccination, we have been spared seeing the consequences of those infectious diseases. Our leaders are supposed to protect this country. That means protecting public health. Instead, our Health Secretary and his anti-vaccine allies are endangering American lives. **[We have to unite against this threat to our country. Join Roy Cooper and sign our petition demanding the vaccine panel protect vaccine access >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115553256/570699106/-439907237?refcode=ea.d7048d66-9e95-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.d7048d66-9e95-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzA0OGQ2Ni05ZTk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zzS-AU_9JDuUhSVraqlUPwFzdvSqI84yLEeZV-irMKo=&emci=67b8b1b9-8495-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=d7048d66-9e95-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=17205535)** | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115553257/570699107/-439907237?refcode=ea.d7048d66-9e95-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.d7048d66-9e95-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzA0OGQ2Ni05ZTk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zzS-AU_9JDuUhSVraqlUPwFzdvSqI84yLEeZV-irMKo=&emci=67b8b1b9-8495-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=d7048d66-9e95-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=17205535)

name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: Let me be clear: He’s not running for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress
body:
We can’t let Trump’s pick take this seat.

Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/lNYIdkhPikOBrh6RGc-KWg2?unsubscribedata=5RZ5UThO%2FX5BmzKf%2BuTwSNXjJ9oc0QcVb0HvqAkxXlJzppR7w2qu7S24rYmi0TG5XH8y2QaxSN3NOPOFNkT2mlsT60XlL4Ln3r%2Bd9IWSIKaYV5xKYTxaGvZt%2FTWyPzAL7mib5SVdeM1eqs3tefhRJ996xZOoSsXfKFQbs%2BPxil3gzM9DhSN%2BNfY%2BeMQIXy2vQhGACJbDXO7zQP6dszmZfZwdhXsTf166fV1m4Pt5NvYHzBsbZGH2en2cj2BNyOcWK33pSa4RpzI0i7puB0Gvb28VRl3XGw2zb3%2FxFe4Ke0Gf2uLQBb2Y7BEnQwB3TfNMFZX%2F%2Fm%2BXXer2TSaJ1snL%2B4tTdo6txkLTJTX3kbV9HFAFCJMW5xu1rZl61%2F2nV8NEXMvxpBVdMDgnfsf%2FMnDJVaN4askOloOQnZAopr%2FftHo%3D)

Before he ever lifts a finger, he'll have _big-time_ Republican money waiting to attack me with. [We’ve set an emergency $15,000 fundraising goal to reach by tonight at midnight to prove we have what it takes to go dollar-for-dollar with the NRCC. ---
Let’s be honest — they didn’t pick him because he has a strong vision for southern New Mexico. They picked him because he’ll support Donald Trump’s MAGA agenda, no matter how extreme or damaging it is for the rest of us.
We’ve already seen what that agenda looks like. We’re living with the consequences.
This past year alone, Trump called for the National Guard to be sent into American cities to shut down peaceful protests.
He pushed to censor the media, attacking media outlets simply for saying things he didn’t like.
And his allies in Congress passed what they proudly called the “Big Beautiful Bill” — a sweeping law that delivered massive tax breaks to the wealthy while gutting support for everyday Americans.
Now that the consequences are setting in — rising energy bills, health care cuts, and higher costs across the board — they’re trying to distance themselves from the very bill they pushed through.
But let me be clear: **they passed it. They celebrated it. And they made it law.**
This is why we simply cannot afford to lose this seat.
If Republicans flip NM-02, they’ll have another reliable vote to push through more destructive legislation like their “Big Beautiful Bill” — which means more tax giveaways for the wealthy, more cuts to health care and essential programs, more pollution in our communities, and more power handed to Donald Trump and his extreme MAGA agenda.
The people of southern New Mexico deserve a representative who works for them — not for Trump, not for party leaders, and not for the ultra-wealthy.
Since taking office in 2023, I’ve fought every single day for our communities in NM-02. Not for donors, not for elites at the top, but for _you_.
Together, we’ve won this race twice before, and with your help, I know we can do it again. But I need you on my team for the fight ahead.
[Will you rush a donation of $10 right now to help us reach our emergency $15,000 fundraising goal to protect this seat, flip the House blue in 2026, and ensure our government works _for the people_ — not for Donald Trump?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115553556/570700239/961986198?amount=10&source=SBD_GV_EM_FR_091925_NRCCOPPONENT_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2E3ZGRjZS05Zjk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=74w3fATIrac9blj4052PG8NJGyhbd4Xgbk3ui6rjynI=)

clean_body: We can’t let Trump’s pick take this seat. Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | It's Gabe Vasquez with a critical update in our toss-up race: The NRCC is quietly backing a candidate to run against me in NM-02. And he'll start at an advantage. Before he ever lifts a finger, he'll have big-time Republican money waiting to attack me with. = | | = Let’s be honest — they didn’t pick him because he has a strong vision for southern New Mexico. They picked him because he’ll support Donald Trump’s MAGA agenda, no matter how extreme or damaging it is for the rest of us. We’ve already seen what that agenda looks like. We’re living with the consequences. This past year alone, Trump called for the National Guard to be sent into American cities to shut down peaceful protests. He pushed to censor the media, attacking media outlets simply for saying things he didn’t like. And his allies in Congress passed what they proudly called the “Big Beautiful Bill” — a sweeping law that delivered massive tax breaks to the wealthy while gutting support for everyday Americans. Now that the consequences are setting in — rising energy bills, health care cuts, and higher costs across the board — they’re trying to distance themselves from the very bill they pushed through. But let me be clear: they passed it. They celebrated it. And they made it law. This is why we simply cannot afford to lose this seat. If Republicans flip NM-02, they’ll have another reliable vote to push through more destructive legislation like their “Big Beautiful Bill” — which means more tax giveaways for the wealthy, more cuts to health care and essential programs, more pollution in our communities, and more power handed to Donald Trump and his extreme MAGA agenda. The people of southern New Mexico deserve a representative who works for them — not for Trump, not for party leaders, and not for the ultra-wealthy. Since taking office in 2023, I’ve fought every single day for our communities in NM-02. Not for donors, not for elites at the top, but for you. Together, we’ve won this race twice before, and with your help, I know we can do it again. But I need you on my team for the fight ahead. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = In this fight together, Gabe | | | ---|---|--- = Together, we flipped NM-02 in 2022. Now, Gabe is busy in Congress fighting for reproductive choice, economic opportunity, affordable healthcare, and the best interests of the people. Gabe won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022, and is running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone.** | = = Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: To receive less email from Gabe Vasquez for Congress, . name: Sen. Jacky Rosen
subject: The Trump administration silenced my friend Jimmy Kimmel
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
My friend Jimmy was just taken off the air
| | |
---
Friend,

When the government silences speech it disagrees with, that is a dictatorship – not a democracy.

Every American, including my friend Jimmy Kimmel, has the right to speak out against politicians who want to weaponize political violence to further divide our country.
This week, the Trump administration and _ABC_ silenced Kimmel for using his platform to speak out against MAGA Republicans. In fact, Jimmy was pulled off the air just hours after President Trump’s FCC chairman threatened _ABC_ ’s broadcast license.
Let me be clear, friend: I think it’s outrageous for _anyone_ to be silenced and have their platform taken away like this.
The First Amendment is not up for debate. Using the power of the federal government to punish political commentary is unacceptable, and we cannot allow this kind of authoritarian censorship to become the new normal.
I will _always_ fight for Americans' freedom of speech – no matter what. And at this urgent moment, I'm counting on you to join me in making it clear that the American people won't stand for this administration's blatant attacks on the First Amendment.
**My team has launched an important new poll, and you were specifically chosen from 37087 to respond before midnight. Please, tell me now:**
**Do you believe the First Amendment is under attack from Trump and his cronies?**
| | | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115553730/570700634/-1172378837?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=37087&ask=5&amounts=250,100,50,25,5&code=jtk5609-su-nd&refcode=jtk5609-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZWQ3NWU3Yi1hMDk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sh7GuBMZrfWkPpy_0oG1llE9fLCNWg7TKny-HH31IYE=&emci=48418284-e694-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=1ed75e7b-a095-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=3800590)

Jacky

Jacky Rosen:**

Friend, I’m fighting tirelessly in the Senate to deliver progress for people across Nevada and our country. But with Donald Trump in the White House and Republicans in control of both houses of Congress, I need your grassroots support to keep up the fights that matter most.

Senate Democrats like me are the only thing standing in the way of Trump's extreme agenda that will hurt everyday Americans. That's why I need people like you on my side to help defend our progress and take back power from the GOP.

**[Will you chip in now to turn Nevada blue and take back the Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115553733/570700637/616501713?refcode=footer&code=jtk5609-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZWQ3NWU3Yi1hMDk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sh7GuBMZrfWkPpy_0oG1llE9fLCNWg7TKny-HH31IYE=)** You can also **[text JACKY to 30508](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115553734/570700638/616501713?refcode=footer&code=jtk5609-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZWQ3NWU3Yi1hMDk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sh7GuBMZrfWkPpy_0oG1llE9fLCNWg7TKny-HH31IYE=)** to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive updates from my campaign.

Thank you,
Jacky _By entering your mobile number, you agree to receive periodic text messages from Rosen for Nevada. Message and data rates may apply. Text STOP to quit or HELP for help.[Privacy policy.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115553735/570700639/1198389084?code=jtk5609-su-nd&refcode=jtk5609-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZWQ3NWU3Yi1hMDk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sh7GuBMZrfWkPpy_0oG1llE9fLCNWg7TKny-HH31IYE=&emci=48418284-e694-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=1ed75e7b-a095-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=3800590)_

clean_body: My friend Jimmy was just taken off the air | | | Friend, When the government silences speech it disagrees with, that is a dictatorship – not a democracy. Every American, including my friend Jimmy Kimmel, has the right to speak out against politicians who want to weaponize political violence to further divide our country. This week, the Trump administration and ABC silenced Kimmel for using his platform to speak out against MAGA Republicans. In fact, Jimmy was pulled off the air just hours after President Trump’s FCC chairman threatened ABC ’s broadcast license. Let me be clear, friend: I think it’s outrageous for anyone to be silenced and have their platform taken away like this. The First Amendment is not up for debate. Using the power of the federal government to punish political commentary is unacceptable, and we cannot allow this kind of authoritarian censorship to become the new normal. I will always fight for Americans' freedom of speech – no matter what. And at this urgent moment, I'm counting on you to join me in making it clear that the American people won't stand for this administration's blatant attacks on the First Amendment. My team has launched an important new poll, and you were specifically chosen from 37087 to respond before midnight. Please, tell me now: Do you believe the First Amendment is under attack from Trump and his cronies? | | | | Thank you for speaking out, Jacky | | = A note from Sen. Jacky Rosen: Friend, I’m fighting tirelessly in the Senate to deliver progress for people across Nevada and our country. But with Donald Trump in the White House and Republicans in control of both houses of Congress, I need your grassroots support to keep up the fights that matter most. Senate Democrats like me are the only thing standing in the way of Trump's extreme agenda that will hurt everyday Americans. That's why I need people like you on my side to help defend our progress and take back power from the GOP. = You can also =** to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive updates from my campaign. Thank you, Jacky By entering your mobile number, you agree to receive periodic text messages from Rosen for Nevada. Message and data rates may apply. Text STOP to quit or HELP for help.

name: Marie Gluesenkamp Perez
subject: I’m just trying to do my job
body:
| | Peter – The far-right is so desperate to take back this seat and kick me out of Congress that they’ll say, do, and spend whatever it takes.

**Get this: The NRCC just launched another huge ad blitz smearing me, spreading misleading claims, and trying to distort my record.**

If these extremists are spending this much to defeat me this early in the race – we could be in trouble. This is already shaping up to be another expensive, highly competitive re-election fight, and we still have a long road ahead.

We have to stop them.

We’ve done this once before, and I know we can do it again.

I’m counting on your grassroots support to power our movement to victory. Our next Federal Election Commission (FEC) deadline is just days away, and we can’t afford to fall short now.

name: Eric H. Holder, Jr.
subject: Let’s talk about why they’re so desperate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
When maps are fair, we win. We don’t need special treatment or a leg up.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115554100/570702125/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMwMGY4Zjc0LWEyOTUtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=u1wkZLc2VMJzuq_E-UT6KoVt2yzov2u1yYk_bASKPco=&emci=2f0f8f74-a295-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=300f8f74-a295-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, My team and I have been working day and night for the last few months to stop what feels like constant attempts to dismantle and undermine our democracy. They passed an egregious racial gerrymander in Texas and Missouri. Fights in Indiana and Ohio are on deck. It’s been a hectic few months to say the least. So I want to take a step back — and talk about why they’re so desperate to rewrite the rules of the next election. **The Republicans are scared. Donald Trump is scared.** They’re worried that if the election is fair, they’re going to lose the House and their anti-democracy agenda will finally be put in check. We fight for fairness for a reason. For us, fairness is an invaluable tool. If things are fair, Democrats win. We don’t need special treatment or a leg up. We win because we have better candidates, better policies, and better ideas. [**If you’re with the NDRC in our fight for fairness, we need your support. This is an existential moment for our democracy, and what we do today will resonate for years to come. Rush your donation today.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115554101/570702126/1110433579?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_HolderUpdate_email_20250919-NDRC-Tier1-HolderUpdate_B&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250919-NDRC-Tier1-HolderUpdate_B&utm_campaign=HolderUpdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMwMGY4Zjc0LWEyOTUtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=u1wkZLc2VMJzuq_E-UT6KoVt2yzov2u1yYk_bASKPco=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Make no mistake: Being committed to fairness does not mean being blind to reality.
This movement has a state-by-state strategy that deploys different tactics to combat unfairness in whatever form it takes. That allows our side to challenge unfair and illegal maps in the courts. We organize grassroots supporters to hold state lawmakers accountable. In California, we’re supporting responsible, temporary measures to respond to craven Republican power grabs. And throughout the country, we have kept our eyes on a 10-year plan to ensure we’re winning the most critical state-level elections for the future of our democracy.
**So even as we’re ready to push back against the new egregious gerrymanders coming down the pike, we’re also laser-focused on our long-term strategy to secure fairness. **
Because we know one thing for certain — Republicans are not going to suddenly give up and start playing fair. Texas Governor Greg Abbott swore the redistricting fight “could last years.” Florida Governor Ron DeSantis is demanding a redo of the 2020 Census to “award Florida what we’re entitled to.”
[**They’re not going to let up — so we’ve got to be ready for whatever it is they try to throw at us. Make a donation so we can respond strategically to preserve our democracy.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115554108/570702133/1110433579?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_HolderUpdate_email_20250919-NDRC-Tier1-HolderUpdate_B&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250919-NDRC-Tier1-HolderUpdate_B&utm_campaign=HolderUpdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMwMGY4Zjc0LWEyOTUtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=u1wkZLc2VMJzuq_E-UT6KoVt2yzov2u1yYk_bASKPco=)
Peter, you’re a critical part of this effort — thank you for never giving up on our movement.
Sincerely,
Eric H. Holder, Jr.
82nd Attorney General of the United States

clean_body: When maps are fair, we win. We don’t need special treatment or a leg up. | Peter, My team and I have been working day and night for the last few months to stop what feels like constant attempts to dismantle and undermine our democracy. They passed an egregious racial gerrymander in Texas and Missouri. Fights in Indiana and Ohio are on deck. It’s been a hectic few months to say the least. So I want to take a step back — and talk about why they’re so desperate to rewrite the rules of the next election. The Republicans are scared. Donald Trump is scared. They’re worried that if the election is fair, they’re going to lose the House and their anti-democracy agenda will finally be put in check. We fight for fairness for a reason. For us, fairness is an invaluable tool. If things are fair, Democrats win. We don’t need special treatment or a leg up. We win because we have better candidates, better policies, and better ideas. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Make no mistake: Being committed to fairness does not mean being blind to reality. This movement has a state-by-state strategy that deploys different tactics to combat unfairness in whatever form it takes. That allows our side to challenge unfair and illegal maps in the courts. We organize grassroots supporters to hold state lawmakers accountable. In California, we’re supporting responsible, temporary measures to respond to craven Republican power grabs. And throughout the country, we have kept our eyes on a 10-year plan to ensure we’re winning the most critical state-level elections for the future of our democracy. So even as we’re ready to push back against the new egregious gerrymanders coming down the pike, we’re also laser-focused on our long-term strategy to secure fairness. Because we know one thing for certain — Republicans are not going to suddenly give up and start playing fair. Texas Governor Greg Abbott swore the redistricting fight “could last years.” Florida Governor Ron DeSantis is demanding a redo of the 2020 Census to “award Florida what we’re entitled to.” = Peter, you’re a critical part of this effort — thank you for never giving up on our movement. Sincerely, Eric H. Holder, Jr. 82nd Attorney General of the United States = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: URGENT: Leave a comment about citizen-only voting!
body:
This proposed rule change would require proof of citizenship—in time for the 2026 election.
[](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org/1/0100019963f9120f-94eb8933-12b0-496c-b003-05d000628edd-000000/lu98BYYGY3cBiCMkdseYIhhMg-Y-PphDrt6Dryo10zg=423)Patriot–I have an urgent, yet simple call to action for you. The Election Assistance Commission (EAC) is taking public comment on a petition to require documentary proof of U.S. citizenship on the National Mail Voter Registration Form. **The comment window closes** **Monday, October 20th**. If you believe only citizens should register and vote in federal elections, now is the time to say so—clearly, respectfully, and on the record.[_**Submit your comment using our form**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Faction.teapartypatriots.org%2Fpetition%2Feac-comment%2F/1/0100019963f9120f-94eb8933-12b0-496c-b003-05d000628edd-000000/SVE25flQ_VJ5ZgDkagqBMo1cY6wnFjZYCCRntav14Pg=423)**and we will forward your comment on for you.****What about the SAVE Act?****_This does not replace our push for the SAVE Act._** Even if the EAC grants this petition and updates the federal form, we still need Congress to pass the SAVE Act so the standard is _codified in law_ and can’t be rolled back by future bureaucrats. Think of this as doing both: take the win we can work on today while we keep pressing for the long-term win in Congress.You can bet the Left will flood the EAC with comments against this. They _despise_ the idea of requiring proof of citizenship to register to vote. Furthermore, this would be the rule under which the 2026 election would operate, even if the Senate hasn’t passed the SAVE Act by then.**Don’t sit this one out.** It may seem like one of those actions that doesn’t matter much, or you might think other people will leave enough comments to drown out the Left’s—but both of these of thoughts are incorrect! The EAC will not make this rule change if it looks like Americans don’t care. It will also make it much harder to get the SAVE Act passed because the senators who oppose it or on the fence will see that our side doesn’t care enough to submit a simple comment.In a few sentences, explain why proof of citizenship matters, how it protects everyone’s vote, and why it’s worth the little bit of work it takes to show proof. If you’ve worked elections, include what you’ve seen. Make sure you point out that those who are opposed to this rule change lie when they say it will disenfranchise voters, such as married women who have changed their last names. In fact, we put together a [_**myth vs. fact sheet**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Ftpp-resources.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fdocuments%2FOnlyCitizensVote-Myths.pdf/1/0100019963f9120f-94eb8933-12b0-496c-b003-05d000628edd-000000/uDtRPBaAYjgHeN4VZQ2YTn6lgimyDGz3BI_cq8HB4PU=423) to answer these sorts of objections that you may find useful as you write your comment.**Then ask the EAC to** **grant the petition and amend its regulations and the federal registration form accordingly**.So, remember:
* **Comment by** **October 20th**. [_**Use our form**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Faction.teapartypatriots.org%2Fpetition%2Feac-comment%2F/2/0100019963f9120f-94eb8933-12b0-496c-b003-05d000628edd-000000/QqdaY9oxCllliJl7I7EZXQOGzAv9Muop5Xtzl298LCY=423) to submit your comment quickly and easily.
* **Share this call to action with everyone you know** who believes that only Americans should vote in American elections.

Let’s get this done—**comment now, keep pushing the SAVE Act, and protect our elections!** In liberty,Jenny Beth Martin[CONTRIBUTE](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org%2Fdonate%2F/1/0100019963f9120f-94eb8933-12b0-496c-b003-05d000628edd-000000/Zol4CpjKVeRjQm87LOjU6C94UY018ras66jx5bsmIdE=423) _This email list is a joint venture of the following separate organizations: Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc., Tea Party Patriots Foundation, and Tea Party Patriots Citizens Fund. All rights reserved.__Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. operates as a social welfare organization under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes._ To donate by mail, send your check made payable to:[_**Tea Party Patriots Action**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org%2Fdonate%2F/2/0100019963f9120f-94eb8933-12b0-496c-b003-05d000628edd-000000/VPQZeRleNC55hjv6Ysa2Q5NJbqwmWTm1nvLTg-HRQFI=423)
2295 Towne Lake Pkwy Ste 116-314
Woodstock, GA 30189Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [unsubscribe](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Ftpot.teapartypatriots.org%2Fcontact-preferences%2F01jp3rk1m05jb3jy5xyw9vqr5t%3Fct=1ebd6a5833cd%26et=a8fe34ad85d9/1/0100019963f9120f-94eb8933-12b0-496c-b003-05d000628edd-000000/X1OvCZAAgJzlWnI8p6p1bCh8rjL4_w1Wk6O3Eks4XLU=423) or [update your preferences](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Ftpot.teapartypatriots.org%2Fcontact-preferences%2F01jp3rk1m05jb3jy5xyw9vqr5t%3Fct=1ebd6a5833cd%26et=a8fe34ad85d9/2/0100019963f9120f-94eb8933-12b0-496c-b003-05d000628edd-000000/9BN0UIJDTmW7CBbWXkQI7W7aJo5yLQfKXvfDMWj75_U=423).

name: Tim Walz
subject: I’m running for reelection

Team, I wanted you to hear it from me first: **I’m running to continue serving as Governor of Minnesota.**
Here in Minnesota, we’ve cut child poverty, expanded labor rights, invested in education, made sure every student gets free breakfast and lunch at school, and so much more.
We’re putting people first — and giving folks the freedom to live their own lives the way they want to live them.
But team, everything we’re building is under attack. Donald Trump and his fellow extremists are dismantling basic services like Social Security and Medicare, leaving working families behind, and threatening our freedoms.
That’s why I’m running — because we’ve got a lot more work to do, and I’m sure as hell not going to let MAGA extremists flip this state red.
**[Will you stand with me and split a donation between my campaign and the Nevada State Democratic Party to show that we are fired up and ready to win?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqt4ICK6wCz5WVtfTzAfYTNzcmgAkGamnibqC7gmqf60em-djDYZDSXP4VOk0XAdSI075s2fWOkFhyqKLlvgZzxH3FdgEPz0JvW6yvcde4eT3QJqe4ysLQth02Sixp8xqrngC0S1bhR62PDaUYU0qg8HBDQXwBZ2oyMRgvj8dgQvYyTM4IwVqT1TsdTylbz_iP8Y8JBqntvmSTKDOWGNWCf0X9PE_lbWdKYtvP-GxvpOAOVGzOlcASRTxfr8IqyKd60raiZCsUBKQv7BpDBYhJ9dK7i3pU35mXWQfL5LAoMLdq2aOgiEZ6kOFiOrs2cOVrQCRx6cmKCqjgCj6oqGeIJaNBDKrbE28bbr3gu1y9yFqQ/4k1/SDggqGrFTaGtk4BniyAe2Q/h1/h001.pFyr-GDug1C18bk2YdAXN2qSIbLOSBIrrrip4L5_TLA)**

Republicans want to gut your benefits and hand out tax breaks to billionaires. They think no one will notice. And if we do, they think we won’t fight back.
We’re going to prove them wrong. But to do it, we need the resources to fight back starting right now — there’s no time to waste.
[**If you're with me, pitch in and split a donation between my campaign and NV Dems today so we can continue showing the country that there is a better way forward.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqt4ICK6wCz5WVtfTzAfYTNzcmgAkGamnibqC7gmqf60em-djDYZDSXP4VOk0XAdSI075s2fWOkFhyqKLlvgZzxHk4SoHOiSrmlYnevBdv7BCKgTAOC4XYwG3y1bF2jhM6t8BL1IvcgOMHzCP7hVLAYMB6dIk8fFzGUtLP65xnc-JDJ155r7pDlHyJ1HUqExY7yBzXcttG2fbco21zk75TgoXc2hy7rjrm8KAecwrQX7VVDRRESM9aynn5U3yQEAN-ukdZYWZEMRFVM1W7JhbSvkySPcB4qoXzgqPswYsi3k98BIGWsfMQnVjxsTrISnCLENcC8-IJVtDFn8h5j5KE2EwhnTlb5wVHtCeP_yJ4vXog/4k1/SDggqGrFTaGtk4BniyAe2Q/h6/h001.0sFOb6xRSF9jHoDhfiPeyUcNHLvaukd_9EwtWatQ8x8)

clean_body: We’ve got a lot more work to do, and I’m sure as hell not going to let MAGA extremists flip this state red. | | | | Team, I wanted you to hear it from me first: I’m running to continue serving as Governor of Minnesota. Here in Minnesota, we’ve cut child poverty, expanded labor rights, invested in education, made sure every student gets free breakfast and lunch at school, and so much more. We’re putting people first — and giving folks the freedom to live their own lives the way they want to live them. But team, everything we’re building is under attack. Donald Trump and his fellow extremists are dismantling basic services like Social Security and Medicare, leaving working families behind, and threatening our freedoms. That’s why I’m running — because we’ve got a lot more work to do, and I’m sure as hell not going to let MAGA extremists flip this state red. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | Republicans want to gut your benefits and hand out tax breaks to billionaires. They think no one will notice. And if we do, they think we won’t fight back. We’re going to prove them wrong. But to do it, we need the resources to fight back starting right now — there’s no time to waste. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | ---|---|--- | | Let’s get to work. Tim Walz The Nevada State Democratic Party fights for progress in the Silver State. We believe that we are stronger together than on our own, and that America succeeds when everyone gets a fair shot, everyone does their fair share, and everyone plays by the same rules. | | Paid for by the Nevada State Democratic Party. Paid for by Tim Walz for Governor. Nevada State Democratic Party 2310 Paseo Del Prado, Suite A120 Las Vegas, NV 89102 | | Sent via . body:
Help me finish the job | [ ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=81a379d5a7ca4a859dc8b049119bad54&_e=QiVcx75__nPt0dhSA32zs4gvBkj4TuJp0gLL-bEO4ezANiqGHa2L7tpaTcGwsCVWtA2NdcG7l1v9KcUAV0ZEsAmXb6QQSWYJXXE2reCaVID6fhSn06McO0xUkzeN9nsvEm7p9NewyLdsQmMaf5tYLv7njq4K-23qehrD0m-qaVcCM21JER7E4qZQD5-lCpZiZ9QN-tj-6dzXkNtRGQlkL6wiIhEDVszyGdF1NyYXbdniJzEh7EnJGq3DDbJ74bX9MJbJ8eYiDhYr39rhLMTKSD5SSGa-83S-xKFNpR998xrtBT1_LcSjxnpph8Y__JFd52PmYkyrG7MwJGEEevybxK05YUjl5pdFNGA-F9Lx7_Y94uqk51pEY77ZCICkFSlneyU1e41K7cy6D8uvb592_8FnmyY0692zMEciC4va7SfcKXnT4MvQ7b22VGjbqgNwUvAL1qfAHjlFa7pOzczhfvi_wOsEA-zcWvL6M7TOB-nznlzvD6GEY1uOOTR5OQWpR9l97CBwudk8NBMs5sDYubUQx3Eh5JpPt6wdo_r3mmgtzVGPvXCfzHQpO2TyP3VW)
---

Peter,

In recent weeks, the left has effectively ensured their defeat come 2026. Once again, they have overplayed their hand and made a grave error. "Progressive" is one thing, but to the point of inhumanity is another. As decadent as our society has become, we still cling to some common sense.

**Fortunately for us in America and most of modern society, we still have some humanity intact.**

Thank you, MSNBC, CNN, etc. All the institutions that just can't help themselves and continue to jump the gun with these strange, counterintuitive cultural agendas. We appreciate your willing participation in your own political demise. Don't for one second believe the mid-term swing they're going to try and sell. More and more people see the left for who they really are every day. **The young people are coming, the Christians are coming, the moderates are coming, the unions, the farmers, the people who just know to show respect to the dead are coming.** We will have another overwhelming victory in 2026.

| [ **HELP ME WIN IN 2026** ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=81a379d5a7ca4a859dc8b049119bad54&_e=QiVcx75__nPt0dhSA32zs4gvBkj4TuJp0gLL-bEO4ezANiqGHa2L7tpaTcGwsCVWtA2NdcG7l1v9KcUAV0ZEsAmXb6QQSWYJXXE2reCaVID6fhSn06McO0xUkzeN9nsvEm7p9NewyLdsQmMaf5tYLv7njq4K-23qehrD0m-qaVcCM21JER7E4qZQD5-lCpZieGVtFvHVtn4KsPj7U6usirJCVwyjBrR6HXlRsSBR7hUYXO5akP11ygJ36J34sqMZxqPW-Aa8dxqmx6sWzAfb2VS6y83-AKPaafa8sTvHfpJ42KI2dEMQD5Mg6xzIM8y0XpMy_YnuOY6OBXnlsZ7DC6lGkWZI3Q8zeSTOEG892dNrFIUaHpCclLiNldrgQbh6OtZLs6R6UIiiHNb7GvjO1lPhtFHomJfOSKpfBG7dIDzORBo-v90oGMiwMIpPQxmJiAAr8j0Pg5z07QPKw2KDhb3YOxJ8Pf5X2x9RyKBRW5SVarlWBoUzrStCjDTV-EFi61ESgIw6bZ8bfyPcQWUO-0oVB0XTsE2PtCXxpmkFg23DZf7j2VHJOy95iAFe7OXO)
---

The key is securing our elections and making sure our party isn't captured by foreign interests, special interests, and lobbyists. Yes, we still have a fight on the right despite a moment of solidarity. We have to fight back against the military interventionism that has become so convenient for us as the world's superpower.

[ **SECURE OUR ELECTIONS** ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=81a379d5a7ca4a859dc8b049119bad54&_e=QiVcx75__nPt0dhSA32zs4gvBkj4TuJp0gLL-bEO4ezANiqGHa2L7tpaTcGwsCVWtA2NdcG7l1v9KcUAV0ZEsAmXb6QQSWYJXXE2reCaVID6fhSn06McO0xUkzeN9nsvEm7p9NewyLdsQmMaf5tYLv7njq4K-23qehrD0m-qaVcCM21JER7E4qZQD5-lCpZiv1mVvzqMCnJoahGkFxUoJm9gKr7u0y88heYo4ObEODbL6QHK9OXmBFp_RyBva7Sz1beNtY0Sji97HDsgBtohevnOu_rTJTww1C0vk6CfnL0_bdWwVZg2QYdsxKv_Nn9ah994Ig3hg7-oYLL6bJYdiJozoQzRteAqsUoThOGFy9fenqjzkT_OqImGcFx8chjMVW1i9MUHMoRFzMAKdeoP8tHm9bMV2oPtF7slo6WrDZLBdrnGPknufBrhv2bnyeH3tiF8cppzORscuvfgBuGxKYuU0YpqtS0YYqmffZUQiYfap7FhX1SqrjLHEJ8fnXQjIbwWXH3Y7ShB44_G6Fw2VHgHQgmVg7Z18vqDw86ekgt5DT3T7ZX88IEB-gypNPwy)
---

**Now is the time for peace everywhere we can, and war only when we must.**

[ **STAND UP FOR PEACE** ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=81a379d5a7ca4a859dc8b049119bad54&_e=QiVcx75__nPt0dhSA32zs4gvBkj4TuJp0gLL-bEO4ezANiqGHa2L7tpaTcGwsCVWtA2NdcG7l1v9KcUAV0ZEsAmXb6QQSWYJXXE2reCaVID6fhSn06McO0xUkzeN9nsvEm7p9NewyLdsQmMaf5tYLv7njq4K-23qehrD0m-qaVcCM21JER7E4qZQD5-lCpZiiw7aL9mS7j2uuq5lZQU6dWCYzDYjA7d5v1qCn_FdL5mV1sO0mcDIEzzcWE_af8pjhGlh1k5hJVD4yX71suf5DxWWdq7bJxexaBTMAuSuFfMYoIE8v4KnZoS4Cm0EN1cSu3kagZ1zRRALUT5zmrZ5e1GxEFlGJmYZDF5Lrl5aZN1OB7WyDzRyFPtv6DdP_amgjq0D2hOke5nQ_BmjOIrQR4yunAzCCTx7xrPY0yZOjTsaC9ibN69e_v1Yn16zA03YCxYPbczI0ihg8ZFZEujDLAtip1nzR0gsJk3A-_5MR_ZvhOASm1K4Bj_-riNxO2W6gxYEZhnxTs1k6UvUO_9S4rDXIb81FndzLwnksjWGFvP8E8EFewZ3tZrcr09p1BGQ)
---

I encourage our great President Donald Trump to continue focusing on his hemispheric strategy. It is economically, geographically, and most importantly, morally appropriate.

_**We can save this country. I see the light at the end of this tunnel.**_

I’m running for Senate in Minnesota to take over Tina Smith’s vacant seat. But I’m up against RINOs, the Radical Left, and the Industrial Media Complex. I need help.

[**I’m humbly asking you to donate $5 before midnight to help me win and help President Trump save our country.**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=81a379d5a7ca4a859dc8b049119bad54&_e=QiVcx75__nPt0dhSA32zs4gvBkj4TuJp0gLL-bEO4ezANiqGHa2L7tpaTcGwsCVWtA2NdcG7l1v9KcUAV0ZEsAmXb6QQSWYJXXE2reCaVID6fhSn06McO0xUkzeN9nsvEm7p9NewyLdsQmMaf5tYLv7njq4K-23qehrD0m-qaVcCM21JER7E4qZQD5-lCpZicmCcmQQ18zGThq1yAe4Wc1FGRpDSynMoAZhDPqRl3Fd4hhakTafrUmpKNByx7ivdTRHbx_xwIlJTsdUnDi7XJy5SlMEjaAgVwOwUtsPM8RCXCRKB_0hRmwHyko1natqBs_EgOWtz5-LR9XJz7Qu_7QWRM22bM0j9Iiet4N0M0XmFbkgo3pSCd1-loOnjGFeG-aHaWOYdvQX72-egkH5a-R9ciK3b8oRWnlu906nYDFrw0nfuEyLjlE-ZMe9393iurrXGNTHnI4kLSJeLSxJJng8NZEHAuJwzGSkENvKIQfetD30nADQZe5YIgZZfsNctt0J-0zMXoz_dtOoSan_EWgFPpN3_vcFCcQFFzCANxhCgr7hNSU_G8mC02Ho2RwA2)

Again, my thoughts and prayers continue to be with the Kirk family... Charlie was a bright light that will never go out. If you can, say a prayer! Remember that Jesus loves you!

Royce White for U.S. Senate MN 2026
God Bless America

[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=81a379d5a7ca4a859dc8b049119bad54&_e=QiVcx75__nPt0dhSA32zs4gvBkj4TuJp0gLL-bEO4ezANiqGHa2L7tpaTcGwsCVWtA2NdcG7l1v9KcUAV0ZEsAmXb6QQSWYJXXE2reCaVID6fhSn06McO0xUkzeN9nsvEm7p9NewyLdsQmMaf5tYLv7njq4K-23qehrD0m-qaVcCM21JER7E4qZQD5-lCpZi287MJyYru1y9LSz2EnXCy8ySYSESOaBunjf5IWuMx1zZdzxfeeDI239BxEpaLoKpmPK4Hy4EnTipp7i_iUUv6SfmZXWMHZ0j9mhPQmuNJ5dcnDEytMmDHK3ASHM117LsdGyNEGdGpKisBKLTVAeYpAUAe4wh_KN4EM82b5KtYi43OyALLqW4drYPSTT7a_WH0MoKhZ5d5nSGLS3vBK_kRz1vhpq--SjsYST_SR7gemprjFZjLBU-axAjJv_22ZecPRg-xMbDoOVyZ952JqEI_POkMObg6Hqal3KQU9l1FNEHBGB8jQpx_RAIjqXliatmQdsInlF1w009j40VAFQXea_6lkjL5nKviypkNcHw2DbP2bCC2KyPsG-XUf-GIjkU)

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc._

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

** [**PASS ROYCE AN ASSIST**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=81a379d5a7ca4a859dc8b049119bad54&_e=QiVcx75__nPt0dhSA32zs4gvBkj4TuJp0gLL-bEO4ezANiqGHa2L7tpaTcGwsCVWtA2NdcG7l1v9KcUAV0ZEsAmXb6QQSWYJXXE2reCaVID6fhSn06McO0xUkzeN9nsvEm7p9NewyLdsQmMaf5tYLv7njq4K-23qehrD0m-qaVcCM21JER7E4qZQD5-lCpZiXGYZRiWwBzeOWmlRECU9ooajwJgwp2ufz4Yycq_SxgX5WJ0HdBOBbmBpymr4FDBXLO6_VRAOqgI7WmeJHpmHSrYNp2d84SsqiKJTqd2ORAd2kKziMKKYtK1QKGb33XpV2rJudP5Gup1QZC3aM9i61YzIysy0DjlRWlh3NOzIvKrLeAXAHSa_xnZfGobYxaGTG0VvHlRFgLk7X2yoYJYSNAw6VWkmgP7wdjV_viM5Dft7Ntq3EkcT9c_iCG2DWNOU7Ryk5EZubEvt41UsbtOICKuJjIg4zqfuErLpK43Y8jk6-tcBxiw6U5LfECeQLjIqj3QmNg1snpqHEsvAGWzVx7CWEM4ouocv-jurI8uuL0ZYQTXhKWTgTmhcsFtKLtHi)

body:
It's our last opportunity to reach voters before Election Day in less than 4 DAYS! Join us in making history!

# LAST WEEKEND: Join us for Adelita!
Adelita for Congress Newsletter
---
| | Hi Peter,
**This is it. Our last weekend to fight to ensure we make history and send Adelita to Congress as the first Latina from AZ!**
We have just **4 days left** —4 days to help elect **Adelita Grijalva**. These final conversations with voters? They’re the difference between winning and losing. **This is the moment. We can’t afford to sit it out.**
Every door we knock, every call we make, every single conversation could be the one that tips this race. If we don’t show up now, **we may not get another chance.**
**We’ve come too far to fall short. Let’s finish strong—together.**
**Will you be there?**
---
| | **ELECTION DAY OPPORTUNITIES:**[ Put Poll Signs](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=9f2bb3ba6f&e=f7c3700ccb)[Lit Drop ](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=b1b18c1afa&e=f7c3700ccb)[We got it all, Check it out !🤩](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=9be17a48f6&e=f7c3700ccb)[ ](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=001dc9e9f5&e=f7c3700ccb)[**E LECTION NIGHT PARTY**](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=fb32d43ea4&e=f7c3700ccb)

Adelita for Congress Newsletter | | Hi Peter, This is it. Our last weekend to fight to ensure we make history and send Adelita to Congress as the first Latina from AZ! We have just 4 days left —4 days to help elect Adelita Grijalva. These final conversations with voters? They’re the difference between winning and losing. This is the moment. We can’t afford to sit it out. Every door we knock, every call we make, every single conversation could be the one that tips this race. If we don’t show up now, we may not get another chance. subject: My cries will echo around the world like a battle cry

We will never surrender. Ever.
