Peter, I want to thank you for loving my husband. For standing with us in the worst days of our lives. For praying. For mourning. For remembering. But now, _I need you to listen closely..._ **Because the evildoers who took Charlie 's life? They have NO idea what they have done. ** They didn't just try to silence a man...
They tried to silence his message -- a message of patriotism, of faith, and of God's merciful love. Instead, they ignited something even greater. **If they thought my husband 's mission was powerful before... ****_They have NO idea what they have just UNLEASHED._** **Not just across this country...**_**_But in me_**** _._**_ They have no idea the fire they've lit inside this wife. And to those listening across America... Let me be clear: The movement my husband built will not die.
**_I refuse to let that happen._** And I know all of us will refuse to let that happen, too. Charlie's mission will grow: Stronger. Bolder. Louder. Greater than ever. I shared these words publicly, from my heart -- just two days after I lost the love of my life.
[**I want you to watch. I want you to hear what Charlie meant to me. And I want you to hear what comes next:**](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/LrEV3xH9KcNDs26G8I5ww6jVixZFvjEPdUi2ZBwM07ffcydaYxWC_F8Y3h7OdNgTqQ7gOx65WGy3khosCj91Uts3m4OoYsQCa488FPo1Frpko1NfsLaCf2Z5tbi6-jkATTZAKq1ATUvXiDgTaD1UElmFt9NJZk9ZZ2g6AoIWyWja7dIgKRoY14t1DED2tnsZwUMC94v53h410oOkX8y3vcykINqZf_zYO2s94pKqOOLgZR136hpjeO5g_IORrKOKIxZ-ElfnUDkiFHxGrSe7H_Q_qx1O8iaaBPcT7T-Jr82e0rAjYevph7Jh6msyKDwHf7nwrFhTnfx24-nsyIfOFXBZkfsMfvB1glfoSSxm02ovWjMw9Mx7I7XmRsGQ0BFon3T4CvYxVV_KRw-PXW-xG964KilVZM143QzbFPP2OofX6VN_pTi_YhSCpObfnvAViZNg21YT6OQHLU8_-ilkd-kpFu7IuvDcvFDC_sIpcWdHwf59gV7NspKW7gWeEU9Ab8mDEChiMVvpiiz_8kFeCHMwNwT92Z5MRSkaooZWK0oVjBiEQKS0W2wKGrMUyekqtEjgAGqTEcuLqQUQ3bZSTP2XcRR5OXjrBaKCzCUiclzNnygRMLXFBbnKEzN8E-CKq4aBtr6tMyLIa3lfeWB5kvQSF7AI2R9U5kIXRagbVrDofP0yB8I1NvExXLWtwmZs22o_hG59wYAS6TIW02oNFpicseKxaK9FsxXqClU36V0QjGtkGUz1HbAOEaJsGypiy31z5tni7iAU5H3moRl-v4_McEt0wQq-djhaVFKI9rxnvqYpYEPX5v9YBJhbK4tgkX7h3At8Myvoy7gGFq56VvaFlTtnjzgpZyoxvqfraV3IzM6oZEyhpS7UZJYHDnSG3w/UKAKMm26EvV9RNhepruRiaiLEViYrFDF/13)

name: Team Schrier
subject: Trump’s economy is failing working families
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
We can’t afford more Republican failures [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115554598/570703992/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDdlMmFmYy1hMzk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=URwTqmPcUgZTblfJCoLpH0-wRrP4mOr0zoze1GvyHdA=&emci=e963633f-b094-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=707e2afc-a395-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=15820338)
---
From reckless tariffs to weak jobs reports, one thing is clear: **Donald Trump is hurting our economy.**

This past month, unemployment went up, and more Americans are losing jobs or facing the threat of layoffs. Families are being asked to carry the burden of tariffs that create chaos and uncertainty, while businesses across the country are already making hard choices— _cutting back and preparing for the worst._

This downward trend is alarming, Peter. It puts families on edge, and it leaves workers wondering if they’ll be next. **Yet, President Trump keeps insisting there’s nothing to worry about.** Try telling that to the parents who suddenly don’t have a paycheck coming in, folks who are trying to choose between paying rent and filling a prescription, and seniors who are already struggling to afford their medications and can’t stretch their budgets any further.

For millions of Americans, **Trump’s failures aren’t abstract, they’re personal, painful, and impossible to ignore.** We cannot afford to let Republicans keep running our country into the ground. They’ve shown us time and time again exactly what their priorities are and who they're working for, and it's not every day Americans. That’s why we’re fighting to flip the House, restore stability, and get our government back on the side of the people— _not corporations, billionaires, or special interests._

[**But, this work is going to take all of us. Before our mid-month fundraising deadline, will you chip in $5 to help Kim hold onto WA-08 and flip the House blue in 2026? Together, we can ensure we have leaders in Congress, like Kim, who will fight for us every day clean_body: We can’t afford more Republican failures From reckless tariffs to weak jobs reports, one thing is clear: Donald Trump is hurting our economy. This past month, unemployment went up, and more Americans are losing jobs or facing the threat of layoffs. Families are being asked to carry the burden of tariffs that create chaos and uncertainty, while businesses across the country are already making hard choices— cutting back and preparing for the worst. This downward trend is alarming, Peter. It puts families on edge, and it leaves workers wondering if they’ll be next. Yet, President Trump keeps insisting there’s nothing to worry about. Try telling that to the parents who suddenly don’t have a paycheck coming in, folks who are trying to choose between paying rent and filling a prescription, and seniors who are already struggling to afford their medications and can’t stretch their budgets any further. For millions of Americans, Trump’s failures aren’t abstract, they’re personal, painful, and impossible to ignore. We cannot afford to let Republicans keep running our country into the ground. They’ve shown us time and time again exactly what their priorities are and who they're working for, and it's not every day Americans. That’s why we’re fighting to flip the House, restore stability, and get our government back on the side of the people— not corporations, billionaires, or special interests. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you, Team Schrier Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat. = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. clean_body: Mid-Month decides the story | | | | = | | Peter, The other side is testing their message against us right now! They’re looking at this Mid-Month filing to decide whether to flood our district with dark money from Super PACs or step away completely. There are 8 Democrats in a clown-car primary vying to be the most radical. If our mid-month number looks soft, they’ll pounce. If it looks strong, we control the narrative heading into the final stretch of Q3. This is YOUR seat. = | | = | | | = | | — Lawler War Room | | | = | | | LIMITED EDITION MERCHANDISE | | | | | | | | = | | Mike Lawler is a Republican running for reelection in New York’s 17th Congressional District. He is passionate about standing with law enforcement and making our communities more safe, protecting Social Security and Medicare, fixing our crumbling roads and bridges, and restoring the SALT deduction to lower taxes and make New York more affordable. | | | | | | | | USE THE ADDRESS BELOW TO CONTRIBUTE BY CHECK** LAWLER FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 137 CHAPPAQUA, NY 10514 | | Let's work together to ensure that Mike Lawler has the support he needs to make a real difference for New York! | | | == | Paid for by Lawler for Congress, Inc. | | =

Our approach is different — and it works. At EMILYs List, we build wins **one race, one woman, and one victory at a time.**

We've been with leaders like Abigail Spanberger and Mikie Sherrill since the very beginning of their careers. And because of this community, we've helped them rise from first-time candidates to Congress. This year, both of them are running for governor of their home states. That's the power of the work you fuel.

But here's the deal:**early voting is already underway, the first election of the cycle is just days away — and tonight is the LAST day of our Race to 2025 Fund.**

Every dollar you give before midnight will go directly to electing Democratic pro-choice women across the country — keeping them competitive, pushing back against Republican money, and setting the tone for the fights ahead.

We don't have billionaires or disinformation machines. We have you. And when our grassroots community shows up, we win.

We've been with leaders like Abigail Spanberger and Mikie Sherrill since the very beginning of their careers. And because of this community, we've helped them rise from first-time candidates to Congress. This year, both of them are running for governor of their home states. ## Thank You For Saving Me From Antifa, Mr. President!
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/589c2e82-601a-485b-ba71-a2aa8ac18274?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
One of few known Antifa sightings
Thank you Mr. Trump!
I know I have doubted you at times, what with the rampant criminality, con artistry and a general willingness to shart in mixed company.
And for that I am truly sorry.
You did what _no other President has been able to do_! You got Antifa--which literally stands for anti-fascist, and doesn't actually exist--designated a terrorist organization!
You, sir, have just sent the strongest message to phantom terrorist organizations across the globe in the history of America. Now **they know** they had better not f*k with the good ole US of A! [Just like Venezuelan fishermen!](https://substack.com/redirect/713ffcad-2402-4132-b8e6-aa8f5c3a3c70?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**And!** You managed to take time off from having caddies drop your balls on the green to do it!
Something you wouldn't even do for Charlie Kirk's Kennedy Center memorial service, which you chair due to your critically acclaimed roles as "old guy who says five words" in Home Alone II, and your Daniel Day Lewis-esque performance below.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/686a5a2d-deeb-495e-9205-3541fad4fd73?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
I know you're busy doing president stuff.
Like training your hair to stop growling, neural-linking into Fox & Friends and choosing between the Double Quarter Pounder with Cheese meal and Double Quarter Pounder with Bacon and Cheese meal.
So I'll be brief, Mr. President.
**Thank you for having the courage to protect us from counter-insurgency chimeras like Antifa!!** And[ banning their free speech](https://substack.com/redirect/2a4b32e3-4bae-4b97-a0b2-468b76b05338?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), because who said made up groups have a right to speak freely?? Ya know, [relentlessly pursuing the real threats](https://substack.com/redirect/21cdb55c-47a0-45b4-a567-a1707af7c966?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)!
I hate to ask more of you, sir...but...
...with the world so dangerous--as you constantly say!--can you stiffen that girdle, flex that lean muscle and keep us safe from the caravan that's been on its way up from Central America for eight years, kale, cankles, the people eating the dogs, eating the cats, eating the pets of the people who live there, [Eric](https://substack.com/redirect/96f0846a-39d1-4abe-bf2f-5357b7bafd54?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), Begin, Reagan, Palestine, Terror on the airline, the girl from The Ring and Kash Patel's left, but not right eye?
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.RqvLNRLsqdqG3qihhvB8uQVnrXr0fT3rbvC7x2Y2scE?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=173901363)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/97711dd5-cadd-4e70-ad56-c01a81e852fc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The caravan is getting closer...
I don't want to ask for too much of a man hasn't committed outright insurrection every year of his life from January 1st through 5th and 7th through 31st, but if you do this for us, sir, people are saying you'd be the best President ever.
Like nothing they've ever seen before!
Thank you, Mr. Trump!

Cliff

_**Cliff Schecter wrote ads for former President Biden 's winning campaign vs Donald Trump in 2020, and authored the besteller, "The Real McCain." He was an executive producer for the 2015 award-winning film "The Algerian," a former columnist at The Daily Beast and founder of The Blue Amp Substack, with has over 500,000 subscribers**_
* * *
### **A Summary From Fred 's Emergency Video On Jimmy Kimmel**
Jimmy Kimmel's firing isn't about late-night comedy--it's about the future of free speech in America. When ABC caves to pressure and boots a comedian for daring to take a shot at Charlie Kirk, it's not just about Kimmel.
It's about silencing every critic of this corrupt, authoritarian regime.
We've seen this un-reality tv show before. The Alien and Sedition Acts. The Palmer Raids. McCarthyism. COINTELPRO. The Iraq War.
Whenever an unpopular government or movement feels its grip slipping, it reaches for the same tool: censorship through fear. Fire one big name, and suddenly millions of everyday people start asking themselves--_if they can do this to him, what can they do to me?_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d9f6a1ea-35e2-4e04-973f-ea44a680e38f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_When even FoxNews can 't hide the truth about what a failure you are_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.RqvLNRLsqdqG3qihhvB8uQVnrXr0fT3rbvC7x2Y2scE?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=173901363)
But the truth is, authoritarianism _always_ overreaches.
Trump couldn't even bother to show up at the vigil for Charlie Kirk at the Kennedy Center, where he installed himself--great man of the arts that he is--as Board Chair, because he was too busy cheating at golf.
This was the young man who was supposedly a friend, a protege, and who "gave his life" for MAGA. But Bedminster was calling, so [shooting, schmooting](https://substack.com/redirect/21cdb55c-47a0-45b4-a567-a1707af7c966?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Which tells you everything about how much Trump values even his own people. Which is to say, not super bigly.
Trump values power. He values money. [He values what's probably in the Epstein file](https://substack.com/redirect/3aa3a8d0-b41c-4876-a370-157f14ea076c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)s. He values loyalty (to him, no backsies). He values silence. Yours.
That's why this moment matters. Because history also shows that people push back. They resist. They link arms and refuse to let despair win.
It's what Americans did under McCarthy. It's what generations before us did in harder, darker times. And [it's what we must do now](https://substack.com/redirect/6e6b7c67-3a8d-495a-a031-c894c0e61c9a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
So here's the call: Don't give in. Don't shut up. Don't let a coward like Trump convince you your voice doesn't matter.
If they're going after comedians, it's because comedy cuts deepest. If they're going after critics, it's because criticism works. And [if they're going after democracy](https://substack.com/redirect/6abaee8f-f6a1-4f93-a41d-0359259ff582?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), it's because they know they've lost the ability to remain in control while we are one.
This isn't just about Jimmy Kimmel. Remember what we saw CNN do to Jim Acosta. The NY Times do to Paul Krugman. CBS do to Stephen Colbert. The Washington Post do to Karen Attiah.
It's about whether we'll let the weakest President we've ever seen use his pathetic insecurities as justification for destroying democracy.
In the end, this is about all of us. And it's about what we do next. Vote. Organize. Speak out. Protest. Convince. Refuse. Uplift. Fight.
Be the candle in the dark. Because Donald J. Trump may be the most feeble and corrupt president in our history--but that means he's also the most beatable.
* * *
_**Frederic Poag is a contributor to Blue Amp and writer for[Missives from a Middle Aged Man](https://substack.com/@fredericpoag). He's worked in digital media as a producer and writer. As a former Marine, is passionate about veterans' issues and civil rights**_

The NY Times do to Paul Krugman. CBS do to Stephen Colbert. The Washington Post do to Karen Attiah. It's about whether we'll let the weakest President we've ever seen use his pathetic insecurities as justification for destroying democracy. In the end, this is about all of us. And it's about what we do next. Vote. Organize. Speak out. Protest. Convince. Refuse. Uplift. Fight. Be the candle in the dark. Because Donald J. Trump may be the most feeble and corrupt president in our history--but that means he's also the most beatable. Frederic Poag is a contributor to Blue Amp and writer for. He's worked in digital media as a producer and writer. As a former Marine, is passionate about veterans' issues and civil rights With Trump cancelling Jimmy Kimmel, independent media's our last line of defense. Please help keep us going with a Paid Subscription Thank you , , , , , and many others for tuning into my live video! name: Karen Hamilton
subject: Virginia: NOW is the TURNING POINT
body:
Hamilton for Delegate!
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in browser](https://hamiltonforvirginia.com/so/61PbYxu1H/c?w=01CJBlYK7Kvz-__fm4z59DKLEpzBb5TGsiDNYT2U118.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9oYW1pbHRvbmZvcnZpcmdpbmlhLmNvbS9zby82MVBiWXh1MUg_bGFuZ3VhZ2VUYWc9ZW4iLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI0NDI4ODkzMy1lNGNjLTRmMTItOGYzZS02ZjQ1ZjM3NjIxZjQifQ)_**
---
| | |
---
| | [](https://hamiltonforvirginia.com/so/61PbYxu1H/c?w=MgDPwIXzPCPM0-gX4cXCrOGI_JCq05bSDaeuin2JCnE.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGFtaWx0b25mb3J2aXJnaW5pYS5jb20vbWVldC1rYXJlbiIsInIiOiI0MDAyMTEyMy0xMjE0LTQ1ZTItODA2OC0wYWJiNDhjODJkNzQiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI0NDI4ODkzMy1lNGNjLTRmMTItOGYzZS02ZjQ1ZjM3NjIxZjQifQ)
---
| | | |
---
| | VIRGINIA IS FOR PATRIOTS!
---
| |
---
| | | |
---
| | Virginia: NOW is theTurning Point
---
| | | |
---
| |
---
| | Last week we lost an incredible Patriot, voice and visionary in our movement. While we continue to grieve Charlie's loss, Virginians have a chance to show the impact of his life and tragic death by casting our ballot for ALL the things he so bravely and unapologetically stood for: THE TRUTHTHE CONSTITUTIONDEFENSE OF THE FAMILYDEFENSE OF LIFEFREE MARKET ECONOMYLIMITED GOVERNMENTFAITH IN GOD Today marks the FIRST day of early voting here in Virginia, and this election couldn’t be more important. Over the last two years, since Democrats regained control of the General Assembly, we've seen nothing short of an aggressive overhaul of our way of life here in the Commonwealth. Perhaps the most egregious action taken by that side is the advancing of 3 Constitutional Amendments to: force churches to perform marriages that oppose the written Word of God or face legal consequences, give violent felons the right to vote again, and enshrining the "right" to murder unborn children up to the moment of birth.
---
| | [](https://hamiltonforvirginia.com/so/61PbYxu1H/c?w=foGL28IsodFh3FJiVAoJxd272bNbazo95P80OsQDpl4.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly92aXJnaW5pYW1lcmN1cnkuY29tLzIwMjUvMDEvMjkvY2FyLXRheC1jcmVkaXQtaGl0cy1kZWFkLWVuZC1iZWZvcmUtc2VuYXRlLXBhbmVsLyIsInIiOiI5ZGRmNzQ0Ni1kY2FkLTQwOGUtODRlYy0zYjczNWFjNzI1MjAiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI0NDI4ODkzMy1lNGNjLTRmMTItOGYzZS02ZjQ1ZjM3NjIxZjQifQ)
---
| | If the Democrats manage to win this year, Virginia will be unrecognizable in a few short years. They will inflict irreversible damage on our home, the likes of which we've never seen. With that being said, I want to share where I stand on the ten most pressing issues facing our commonwealth, and where the Democrats have failed us, so you can be as informed as possible as you go to cast your vote.
---
| | Life:Karen Hamilton: I will always stand in defense of the unborn and push tirelessly for their right to life and their 14th amendment protections. Democrats: Want to expand abortion, enshrining it up until to the moment of birth, stripping away parental consent and patient protections. The Second Amendment:Karen Hamilton: I support your constitutional right to keep and bear arms, and to carry them in the way that you see fit, as our founding fathers intended.Our free state depends upon it! Democrats: Advanced a bill to ban any semi-automatic firearm in the Commonwealth of Virginia, which will lead to the confiscation of ALL of your guns. Taxes:Karen Hamilton: I will never vote to increase your taxes. The more government spends, the more they take from you. Being a good steward of your taxpayer dollars will be my top priority. Democrats: Voted for massive spending increases that significantly raise your taxes. They also refused to bring relief to all Virginians by voting NO on cutting the car tax. Parental Rights:Karen Hamilton: As a mother of 3, I will be a staunch advocate for the rights of parents to be upheld concerning the education, care and upbringing of their children.We don't co-parent with the government. Democrats: Blocked legislation to give you transparency in your child's curriculum and library, blocked parental notification of gender dysphoria behavior in schools, and voted YES to allow minors to obtain abortions without parental consent. Same-Sex Marriage and Churches: Karen Hamilton: I will always defend the liberty of the Church to teach and live according to God's Word, without interference or threat from the state. Democrats: Trample on your religious beliefs by voting to force churches to violate their conscience and submit to the demands of the state. Agriculture:Karen Hamilton: I will always support our farmers here at home by advocating for tax breaks, property rights, and by restraining government overreach. Our farmers are the backbone of our district, and food security is national security. Democrats: With inflationary policies, over-regulation and green energy mandates, Democrats have raised the cost of just about everything associated with farming, hamstringing productivity and profitability. Energy: Karen Hamilton: I will support the most efficient and truly cost-effective energy that brings down your energy bills, doesn't rely on green subsidies, and doesn't destroy our rural landscapes. Democrats: Have forced wind and solar on the commonwealth with no alternatives, causing your energy bills to shoot up and requiring us import 40% of our energy from out of state. Virginia Clean Economy Act (VCEA): Karen Hamilton: I will fight to repeal this terrible law passed by the Democrats in 2020 which hasn't achieved anything except significantly raising our electricity bills, making Virginia less reliable and destroying our natural beauty. Democrats: Want to ensure that the VCEA remains the law of the land so they can enforce wind and solar mandates. They will subsidize green energy inadequacies with your tax dollars, increase costs for everyone, and lead us to California-like grid failures.
---
| | School Choice:Karen Hamilton: School choice benefits all children by giving them options, and forcing schools to compete for the privilege to educate the next generation. It's imperative we deliver this for Virginians. Democrats: Seek to make it more difficult to homeschool your children and refuse to allow taxpayers to have educational options that best suit the needs of their children. Public Safety: Karen Hamilton: Endorsed by the VPBA and Attorney General Jason Miyares. I will always back our Law Enforcement and push for policies that protect Virginians, and prioritize the victim, not the criminal. The Democrats: Advocated for defunding the police, sanctuary cities, cashless bail, and soft-on-crime policies that shield violent criminals from facing swift and just consequences.
---
| |
---
| | "THE FUTURE BELONGS TO THOSE WHO REFUSE TO REMAIN SILENT." -CHARLIE KIRK

clean_body: Hamilton for Delegate! | | Can't see this message? | | | | | | | | | | | VIRGINIA IS FOR PATRIOTS! | | | | | | | | Virginia: NOW is theTurning Point | | | | | | | | Last week we lost an incredible Patriot, voice and visionary in our movement. While we continue to grieve Charlie's loss, Virginians have a chance to show the impact of his life and tragic death by casting our ballot for ALL the things he so bravely and unapologetically stood for: THE TRUTHTHE CONSTITUTIONDEFENSE OF THE FAMILYDEFENSE OF LIFEFREE MARKET ECONOMYLIMITED GOVERNMENTFAITH IN GOD Today marks the FIRST day of early voting here in Virginia, and this election couldn’t be more important. Over the last two years, since Democrats regained control of the General Assembly, we've seen nothing short of an aggressive overhaul of our way of life here in the Commonwealth. Perhaps the most egregious action taken by that side is the advancing of 3 Constitutional Amendments to: force churches to perform marriages that oppose the written Word of God or face legal consequences, give violent felons the right to vote again, and enshrining the "right" to murder unborn children up to the moment of birth. | | | | If the Democrats manage to win this year, Virginia will be unrecognizable in a few short years. They will inflict irreversible damage on our home, the likes of which we've never seen. With that being said, I want to share where I stand on the ten most pressing issues facing our commonwealth, and where the Democrats have failed us, so you can be as informed as possible as you go to cast your vote. | | Life:Karen Hamilton: I will always stand in defense of the unborn and push tirelessly for their right to life and their 14th amendment protections. Democrats: Want to expand abortion, enshrining it up until to the moment of birth, stripping away parental consent and patient protections. The Second Amendment:Karen Hamilton: I support your constitutional right to keep and bear arms, and to carry them in the way that you see fit, as our founding fathers intended.Our free state depends upon it! Democrats: Advanced a bill to ban any semi-automatic firearm in the Commonwealth of Virginia, which will lead to the confiscation of ALL of your guns. Taxes:Karen Hamilton: I will never vote to increase your taxes. The more government spends, the more they take from you. Being a good steward of your taxpayer dollars will be my top priority. Democrats: Voted for massive spending increases that significantly raise your taxes. They also refused to bring relief to all Virginians by voting NO on cutting the car tax. Parental Rights:Karen Hamilton: As a mother of 3, I will be a staunch advocate for the rights of parents to be upheld concerning the education, care and upbringing of their children.We don't co-parent with the government. Democrats: Blocked legislation to give you transparency in your child's curriculum and library, blocked parental notification of gender dysphoria behavior in schools, and voted YES to allow minors to obtain abortions without parental consent. Same-Sex Marriage and Churches: Karen Hamilton: I will always defend the liberty of the Church to teach and live according to God's Word, without interference or threat from the state. Democrats: Trample on your religious beliefs by voting to force churches to violate their conscience and submit to the demands of the state. Agriculture:Karen Hamilton: I will always support our farmers here at home by advocating for tax breaks, property rights, and by restraining government overreach. Our farmers are the backbone of our district, and food security is national security. Democrats: With inflationary policies, over-regulation and green energy mandates, Democrats have raised the cost of just about everything associated with farming, hamstringing productivity and profitability. Energy: Karen Hamilton: I will support the most efficient and truly cost-effective energy that brings down your energy bills, doesn't rely on green subsidies, and doesn't destroy our rural landscapes. Democrats: Have forced wind and solar on the commonwealth with no alternatives, causing your energy bills to shoot up and requiring us import 40% of our energy from out of state. Virginia Clean Economy Act (VCEA): Karen Hamilton: I will fight to repeal this terrible law passed by the Democrats in 2020 which hasn't achieved anything except significantly raising our electricity bills, making Virginia less reliable and destroying our natural beauty. Democrats: Want to ensure that the VCEA remains the law of the land so they can enforce wind and solar mandates. They will subsidize green energy inadequacies with your tax dollars, increase costs for everyone, and lead us to California-like grid failures. | | School Choice:Karen Hamilton: School choice benefits all children by giving them options, and forcing schools to compete for the privilege to educate the next generation. It's imperative we deliver this for Virginians. Democrats: Seek to make it more difficult to homeschool your children and refuse to allow taxpayers to have educational options that best suit the needs of their children. Public Safety: Karen Hamilton: Endorsed by the VPBA and Attorney General Jason Miyares. I will always back our Law Enforcement and push for policies that protect Virginians, and prioritize the victim, not the criminal. The Democrats: Advocated for defunding the police, sanctuary cities, cashless bail, and soft-on-crime policies that shield violent criminals from facing swift and just consequences. | | | | "THE FUTURE BELONGS TO THOSE WHO REFUSE TO REMAIN SILENT." -CHARLIE KIRK | | | | | | It's time for the silent majority to AWAKEN! Let's shock the nation and return Virginia back to her liberty-loving roots! Cast your early vote and together we can SAVE VIRGINIA! Please STAND with me! Consider chipping in $10, $20, or even $50 if you’re able to support my efforts. With your generosity, we can get our message out far and wide! | | | | | | | | | | | | | You can find out more about me at: General Jason Miyares Member Joe Short, Town of Culpeper for AmericaPolice Benevolent AssociationNRA | | | | Find me on social media | | | This email was sent from .

name: Deb Haaland
subject: I know what grocery store math feels like
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
Despite their hard work, too many families are barely scraping by month to month.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=4527%2E400544%2E43lyBt)
Everywhere I go across New Mexico, I hear the same thing:
**Despite their hard work, too many families are barely scraping by month to month.**
Right now, New Mexicans are struggling to keep up with skyrocketing costs as Donald Trump continues to wreck our economy and cut vital programs that have helped keep our families afloat. _And now, the latest jobs report shows that the U.S. economy is losing jobs for the first time since 2020._
I know what it’s like to struggle. I know what grocery store math feels like. To count every dollar and pray it’ll stretch far enough to cover the roof over your head. I won’t stand by while Trump and MAGA Republicans make life harder.
**That’s why, as Governor, lowering rising costs will be one of my top priorities.** I’ll stand up to Donald Trump, create good-paying jobs, invest in local economies, and help bring down the cost of living so working families can breathe again.
But let me be clear: Donald Trump and right-wing megadonors see this state as their next pickup opportunity. If they flip New Mexico red, they’ll bring Trump’s dangerous billionaire-first economic agenda with them.
We can’t let that happen, and it’s going to take _all_ of us to stop them.
**[If you’re not able to contribute today, I completely understand. But if you’re in a position to do so, will you chip in $5 to help us fight back, win this wide-open race, and elect a governor who puts people first?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250919_1_economy?amount=5&refcode=em20250919-4527&refcode2=4527_400544_43lyBt&akid=4527%2E400544%2E43lyBt)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250919_1_economy?amount=5&refcode=em20250919-4527&refcode2=4527_400544_43lyBt&akid=4527%2E400544%2E43lyBt)**
Be fierce,
Deb
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250919-1&t=4&refcode2=4527_400544_43lyBt&akid=4527%2E400544%2E43lyBt)**

name: Mark Kelly
subject: I owe you an explanation
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
I often get asked what I’m doing, right now, to counter Trump.
#

Folks, Mark Kelly here.
I often get asked what I’m doing right now to counter Trump.
I think I owe it to you to explain what exactly it is that I’m doing, and why I’m doing it.
First off, I’m talking to Republicans. I know that might not sound all that impressive, but with tensions as high as they are, it’s getting kind of rare. I’m trying to continue to set an example and show you can still find common ground with people you disagree with.
What we do in response makes all the difference. I firmly believe that the only way we’ll see ourselves out of the situation we are in now, the only way we can bring back some real accountability, is by retaking majorities in the House and Senate. And that’s exactly what I’ve been working towards.
In Arizona, I’m working to support the Arizona Democratic Party and our slate of candidates. I’m making sure the people running — from the top of the ballot to the bottom — are getting the help they need from me. And I continue to help build out the infrastructure it’s going to take to win across the state next year.
And around the country, I’m doing the same thing. In the Senate, we need to defend all of our seats and grab a few more to win a majority. I took the Vice Chair position at the DSCC because I knew I could make a difference by helping out the candidates running in those races.
I’m not doing any of this for attention, publicity, or a thank you. I’m doing it because it’s what I can do to turn things around, and because we have to win next year.
Now, if any of that sounds like something you’d like to be a part of, I’ve got a humble request for you:
[**This work does not happen without the support of people like you. So, I’m asking you to chip in today, because we’ve got an FEC reporting deadline on September 30th. It’s critical that we show strength in that report. Can I count on you?**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-sept25/.-bETEu&refcode=em250919-1-700k&t=1&akid=6190%2E6688874%2EWkZOW2)

Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.
clean_body: I often get asked what I’m doing, right now, to counter Trump. Folks, Mark Kelly here. I often get asked what I’m doing right now to counter Trump. I think I owe it to you to explain what exactly it is that I’m doing, and why I’m doing it. First off, I’m talking to Republicans. I know that might not sound all that impressive, but with tensions as high as they are, it’s getting kind of rare. I’m trying to continue to set an example and show you can still find common ground with people you disagree with. What we do in response makes all the difference. I firmly believe that the only way we’ll see ourselves out of the situation we are in now, the only way we can bring back some real accountability, is by retaking majorities in the House and Senate. And that’s exactly what I’ve been working towards. In Arizona, I’m working to support the Arizona Democratic Party and our slate of candidates. I’m making sure the people running — from the top of the ballot to the bottom — are getting the help they need from me. And I continue to help build out the infrastructure it’s going to take to win across the state next year. And around the country, I’m doing the same thing. In the Senate, we need to defend all of our seats and grab a few more to win a majority. I took the Vice Chair position at the DSCC because I knew I could make a difference by helping out the candidates running in those races. I’m not doing any of this for attention, publicity, or a thank you. I’m doing it because it’s what I can do to turn things around, and because we have to win next year. Now, if any of that sounds like something you’d like to be a part of, I’ve got a humble request for you: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you in advance for the help. It menas a lot to me. Mark Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate

| | | Breaking news, Friend:
Apple just enabled Starlink satellite support to T-Mobile iPhones.
One of the biggest potential winners from global satellite coverage?
**[Mode Mobile.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
Just about everything Elon touches turns to gold:
* SpaceX now worth $350B+
* Tesla up by over 25,000% since IPO
* And now - iPhone’s get satellite access

But while Wall Street focuses on Apple, Mode Mobile is quietly positioned to capitalize on this global satellite revolution.
Their EarnPhone technology already:
* Reaches 50M+ users worldwide
* Helped those users save and earn $325+ million
* Grew revenue 32,481%

And that was before global satellite coverage.
With SpaceX eliminating "dead zones" worldwide, Mode's earning technology can reach 3B+ unbanked people globally in rural populations worldwide.
We’re talking about emerging markets with no infrastructure.
And right now, you can still **[invest in Mode, but only limited space remains in the current round.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**
They’ve secured their Nasdaq ticker $MODE, and their pre-IPO offering is live now. But their previous round at **$0.30/share** sold out fast, with over 55,000 investors.
**The time to invest is now,** before any potential IPO.
**[See how to get in before Mode’s potential public debut.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**
* * *

_*Mode Mobile recently received their ticker reservation with Nasdaq ($MODE), indicating an intent to IPO in the next 24 months. An intent to IPO is no guarantee that an actual IPO will occur._
_*The Deloitte rankings are based on submitted applications and public company database research, with winners selected based on their fiscal-year revenue growth percentage over a three-year period._
_*Tesla return calculated based on Yahoo Finance adjusted stock price data from June 29, 2010 to January 31, 2025._
_In making an investment decision, investors must rely on their own examination of the issuer and the terms of the offering, including the merits and risks involved. Mode Mobile has filed a Form C with the Securities and Exchange Commission in connection with its offering, a copy of which may be obtained here:[https://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/1748441/000164117225025402/ex99.pdf](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e22849027/VaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2VjLmdvdi9BcmNoaXZlcy9lZGdhci9kYXRhLzE3NDg0NDEvMDAwMTY0MTE3MjI1MDI1NDAyL2V4OTkucGRm/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MTk/LbmNsOGE2UzFhQQ/gaM3X0A/sfhb7c85f83)_

body:
I owe my life to the United States of America. | | | [](http://links.gopwins.info/u/click?_t=98057da4e99f4c609080f212fe1184e1&_m=0b7170b587a04ecaade8e1a819f1f86c&_e=OAdJEwnPvDxqTWDxn0VC5PEpiUx_UGgD_Oq0sko6NZxa9Mj1gZkTKrcoWSPUhnJkqfuWmBIn0ztLcK_37SYywwTPkrgiusWpIZm87Nt24IbBDlcP3VV8bEScWVnYVz99yCEsZYADgmpX3CaWLnsnPW7Nb60hzfe43_DLLQ4tUHpnLZSxCNa8uKKG5IuvwGG1z2LXGN5t0iNO_LPkqROlXzEgHJheZIEYbJnHji8sfJHJa9-dDOWgp941fRwuSEyG6vyoxUXDoajbpv9I_6993J8tQkv0OKHMzSajRhHe1PIcILOhhHsVZQ2_m1-itRYN67vDG1YjKrF26P9E1D8djoUfHE-sBm_KOzMHU1L3myUxr2J7rLaYbi1-K8To-fTm6_N2Yz25xYbub_6KNYDjbgn8CW-Afq_ruNZ1P9NkdK1mCoImP_HTdLoKVZlgAkmS)
---
I never got to use a toilet seat. Instead, we had to share a hole in the ground with 8 other families. I was raised on food rationing coupons in the Sichuan province of China during Mao’s Cultural Revolution. I was only a child, yet I worshiped him like a God. I had no other choice. I was brainwashed. We all were. Eventually, I was able to escape from China and flee to the United States.
---
[](http://links.gopwins.info/u/click?_t=98057da4e99f4c609080f212fe1184e1&_m=0b7170b587a04ecaade8e1a819f1f86c&_e=OAdJEwnPvDxqTWDxn0VC5PEpiUx_UGgD_Oq0sko6NZxa9Mj1gZkTKrcoWSPUhnJkqfuWmBIn0ztLcK_37SYywwTPkrgiusWpIZm87Nt24IbBDlcP3VV8bEScWVnYVz99FBdM1knBO0-YtLkrOlKJGgsCM9NFWheXV3a9rWg0EsWwHW2iCZgmv53binMWr_hnypUBCtvoc7-GrZ89pqI2M1plphdHaEsJd_TNIQtfskO4l054FUMOcZMj7-e2bRd5ItT8hJvpBsk0r08LYS_DvNPCsP3gu2l8iJQcJ1ebEtRR9Ha-1yW84LCz38DORczSvO--g6MXZmh_ehAzu3Hya5LPuMhmlih6A9sWdE1tuTO99hk5Uwai9isGMVnXFGun0v4LQm9yG21qQxiaLVrKCEakEPuLOOy6IIpWpZiCswVaWXuIfJa2B74j4xu4jy5V)
---
I spent the next 20 years uninstalling everything Mao’s regime had programmed into my brain, only to discover the very same evil was now being promoted in America and celebrated by the radical left. Then it hit me. I wasn’t just a product of the American Dream - I was also a survivor of Communist rule. **[My name is Lily Tang Williams, and I’m the Republican running for Congress in New Hampshire's 2nd Congressional District.](http://links.gopwins.info/u/click?_t=98057da4e99f4c609080f212fe1184e1&_m=0b7170b587a04ecaade8e1a819f1f86c&_e=OAdJEwnPvDxqTWDxn0VC5PEpiUx_UGgD_Oq0sko6NZxa9Mj1gZkTKrcoWSPUhnJkqfuWmBIn0ztLcK_37SYywwTPkrgiusWpIZm87Nt24IbBDlcP3VV8bEScWVnYVz99Ap71FN9nPpgXyVlnL2jH_NQayzijo2AUUkR8XXE0ehUQlmHPuZRb1Q36mpP9UfgounPrtBBgWEEDVsjgE5H2hsMkRkcbtvSNzuXKEn6BygCH3hZRp5EDRMiZ5aD-fX6BfxruOa62hinNPuiyhnbptZ9CYxtparS7mQJejaD0T7C5M6iXTXae2MRoHqCSste91jOGdrSOA_GbX6HZvt38vlRVYyOu5RKnmErrmLJs891m509VGLGW1G-TpLsgF0dfeOH77sfEBRLxiCjPqyUxGtjBKWOKCYdyN2AqGH-PY5bn1HBAWP1REtmcOac-rEaD)**
---
[**SUPPORT LILY'S CAMPAIGN**](http://links.gopwins.info/u/click?_t=98057da4e99f4c609080f212fe1184e1&_m=0b7170b587a04ecaade8e1a819f1f86c&_e=OAdJEwnPvDxqTWDxn0VC5PEpiUx_UGgD_Oq0sko6NZxa9Mj1gZkTKrcoWSPUhnJkqfuWmBIn0ztLcK_37SYywwTPkrgiusWpIZm87Nt24IbBDlcP3VV8bEScWVnYVz99ibz2p2VOKlYwtcLhGysA8JL5yYSjrrhNVl6jfNJtjzmkZCwNg-kggnXekogb1yOvFuHlLFJpm0Z0RM1BDv8Z-3X6HvbC5RbxdDOxokaQb0ka3jaTYa0r0woRRiJ99zwV2D4kNIyFprX29zwauS7BfHPU2IgQkACYzQW9Hc58sfLjjrnuFWC_h9hHphaQZsc4H-VLCNQ8LPxps2iaOOzS_bXOw229wMsGLk7Oyci4n5WoIvk_GdcPqTG0TqvtXzX8vpd3sRgOuJ8CBRKdZ3XiV6mFF6nPnFQ1WDquDdhoitnt9yXNy91L7g7pxuv_F318)
---
My story, my voice, and my campaign endanger everything the Democrats have built their party on - _I don’t fit their mold_. **[And now they’re preparing to spend millions to browbeat me into silence& end my candidacy.](http://links.gopwins.info/u/click?_t=98057da4e99f4c609080f212fe1184e1&_m=0b7170b587a04ecaade8e1a819f1f86c&_e=OAdJEwnPvDxqTWDxn0VC5PEpiUx_UGgD_Oq0sko6NZxa9Mj1gZkTKrcoWSPUhnJkqfuWmBIn0ztLcK_37SYywwTPkrgiusWpIZm87Nt24IbBDlcP3VV8bEScWVnYVz99A6b6eEY9xT4lc3Xjyx91k-ewpsO4XpPc5sPtk8cY6jkd6axu87RXXUUaMUde708fPNtsGe4eu15w9X7VEgAgPaiyx9tRS7DU_hsgcT0vvuJEtexbvz1OQZGA6e4s83ip33UI4TrMw20IGwTC5eyNv6V5fWuODNJV29GIuUDedq98UMbOAr9qKX-cSTDm30iqkQJXF76rAdRfx-8W1SytRM-rwbW9pO3aWrEKjnJiNgQEGdqcjWEp2P2byI8Vc1gB3Crz-Y2xmYsgOzczeb4xcD-ZdZFCkG_fcAad7dKiAc9I-gOG1cflD8IHzUuf938k)** That’s why I’m humbly asking for your help today. My candidacy & our country truly do depend on it. I hope you’ll do what you can to save both today. Help me make history, Patriot.
---

U.S. Sen. Katie Britt (R-Montgomery) thinks it’s past time for Congress to close a loophole in the law that incentivizes the mass illegal migration of unaccompanied alien children to the southern border and leads to them being released into the U.S.

Britt discussed the issue during the Senate Judiciary Border Security and Immigration Subcommittee Hearing titled, “Another Biden Blunder: Missing Unaccompanied Alien Children and Criminal Sponsors.”

U.S. Senator Katie Britt spoke from the Senate’s press briefing room Thursday morning alongside top leadership to introduce legislation designating Russia as a state sponsor of terrorism under certain humanitarian conditions.

It came after the Wednesday assassination of conservative political activist and Turning Point USA co-founder Charlie Kirk.

Britt spoke candidly on Kirk’s killing and addressed the media directly.

“Political violence has no place in America. What we saw yesterday — and everyone saw it — is sickening. It is disgusting. It was a political assassination, and all of you sitting in these rows have a duty and an obligation to call it that,” Britt (R-Montgomery) said.

U.S. Sen. Katie Britt (R-Montgomery) reintroduced the Prevent Government Shutdowns Act of 2025 on Friday.

The legislation would end the practice of government shutdowns, mandating that Congress stay in session until the government is funded. U.S. Sen. Tommy Tuberville (R-Auburn) is also a co-sponsor of the legislation.

I didn’t run for Senate to sit on the sidelines. I’m a mom, a conservative, and proud to stand for every corner of Alabama—our cities, small towns, and rural communities alike. **I’m rooted in faith, built on family, and committed to making Alabama stronger and better for generations to come.** Alabama is a place of hard work, strong values, and unyielding independence. But the Left is trying to tear that all down. I didn’t come to Washington to play games. I came to fight for every Alabamian who feels forgotten and left behind. Whether it’s securing our borders, protecting our children, or defending our way of life, I’m here fighting for Alabama’s future. **This fight isn’t easy, but it's worth it. And I’m not going anywhere.** Will you stand with me?

clean_body: | | | | | | | U.S. Sen. Katie Britt (R-Montgomery) thinks it’s past time for Congress to close a loophole in the law that incentivizes the mass illegal migration of unaccompanied alien children to the southern border and leads to them being released into the U.S. Britt discussed the issue during the Senate Judiciary Border Security and Immigration Subcommittee Hearing titled, “Another Biden Blunder: Missing Unaccompanied Alien Children and Criminal Sponsors.” | | U.S. Senator Katie Britt spoke from the Senate’s press briefing room Thursday morning alongside top leadership to introduce legislation designating Russia as a state sponsor of terrorism under certain humanitarian conditions. It came after the Wednesday assassination of conservative political activist and Turning Point USA co-founder Charlie Kirk. Britt spoke candidly on Kirk’s killing and addressed the media directly. “Political violence has no place in America. What we saw yesterday — and everyone saw it — is sickening. It is disgusting. It was a political assassination, and all of you sitting in these rows have a duty and an obligation to call it that,” Britt (R-Montgomery) said. | | U.S. Sen. Katie Britt (R-Montgomery) reintroduced the Prevent Government Shutdowns Act of 2025 on Friday. The legislation would end the practice of government shutdowns, mandating that Congress stay in session until the government is funded. U.S. Sen. Tommy Tuberville (R-Auburn) is also a co-sponsor of the legislation. | | | | | | | I didn’t run for Senate to sit on the sidelines. I’m a mom, a conservative, and proud to stand for every corner of Alabama—our cities, small towns, and rural communities alike. I’m rooted in faith, built on family, and committed to making Alabama stronger and better for generations to come. Alabama is a place of hard work, strong values, and unyielding independence. But the Left is trying to tear that all down. I didn’t come to Washington to play games. I came to fight for every Alabamian who feels forgotten and left behind. Whether it’s securing our borders, protecting our children, or defending our way of life, I’m here fighting for Alabama’s future. This fight isn’t easy, but it's worth it. And I’m not going anywhere. name: Sarah McBride
subject: Republican politicians and MAGA trolls want to distract you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
I’m focused on something far more important.
#
Hi,
**Right now, a right-wing mega influencer is misgendering and attacking me online.**
Republican politicians and their MAGA trolls want you distracted by culture wars because they don’t want you to see the harm they’re causing.**I refuse to give them that power.**
I came here to Congress to fight for working families, so right now I'm focused on something really important: making health care affordable for you and your loved ones.
**That’s why I want you to know that right now, Congressional Republicans are refusing to renew critical Affordable Care Act subsidies — subsidies that have helped millions of Americans afford health insurance.** If they let these subsidies expire, your health care costs could skyrocket, and they know it.
I’m fighting back.
I’m sounding the alarm, and I’m doing the work to protect your wallet and your health care — but I can’t do it alone. [**If you’re with me, please rush a grassroots donation now to help me cut through the noise and get real things done for working families.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250920?refcode=em20250919-2349&refcode2=2349_21716_MvdWcW&akid=2349%2E21716%2EMvdWcW)
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250920?refcode=em20250919-2349&refcode2=2349_21716_MvdWcW&akid=2349%2E21716%2EMvdWcW)**
Thank you
— Sarah
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20250919-1&t=1&refcode2=2349_21716_MvdWcW&akid=2349%2E21716%2EMvdWcW)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=2349%2E21716%2EMvdWcW)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=2349%2E21716%2EMvdWcW)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2349%2E21716%2EMvdWcW)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)

body:
|
---
Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important facts - a kernel of truth - from the week. _[If you were forwarded this newsletter, you can sign up to receive the Kernel every week by clicking here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115555641/570707219/1416943042?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzdlMGMzZi1hOTk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y5CxPB18dplPqt7OwuUkhwi_PTMVsx6w0uID0GISbSI=&emci=14e75b6a-9795-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=8c7e0c3f-a995-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=4925535)_ [_**If you'd like to donate to the INDems' Reorganization Fund, you can do so by clicking here.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115555642/570707220/1764064610?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzdlMGMzZi1hOTk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y5CxPB18dplPqt7OwuUkhwi_PTMVsx6w0uID0GISbSI=) ****
_Hoosiers Pack the Statehouse For Rally Against Gerrymandering_
[__](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115555643/570707221/942454713?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzdlMGMzZi1hOTk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y5CxPB18dplPqt7OwuUkhwi_PTMVsx6w0uID0GISbSI=&emci=14e75b6a-9795-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=8c7e0c3f-a995-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=4925535) Yesterday, around 1,000 Hoosiers came out from all across our state to the People's House in downtown Indianapolis for a rally against gerrymandering. Hoosiers know that Republicans don't want to run on fair maps or even the maps they drew four years ago and called "perfect". Yesterday's rally was another sign that Hoosiers see through this plot and oppose any attempts by Republicans to cheat Hoosier voters. President Trump and the GOP party bosses in DC are ramping up the pressure on states across the country, but we're here to push back and note that Hoosiers are against any attempts to cheat and rig our elecrions. **Our message: elections should be decided on the issues, not by politicans before a single vote is cast. Hands off our maps.** ****_Braun Warns of "Consequences" From Washington D.C. if Indiana Doesn't Redistrict_
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115555644/570707222/972764065?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzdlMGMzZi1hOTk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y5CxPB18dplPqt7OwuUkhwi_PTMVsx6w0uID0GISbSI=&emci=14e75b6a-9795-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=8c7e0c3f-a995-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=4925535) This week, Governor Mike Braun went on the radio in Fort Wayne said that there would be "consequences" for Indiana, and that our state would lose out on "benefits" if state Republicans don't call a special session to redraw the maps and rig the 2026 elections in our state. It's the clearest sign yet that pressure is building on Indiana Republicans to redraw the maps, and Braun in response hinted that a special session is likely in November, despite the fact that state leaders in the House and Senate remain quiet when asked by media or consituents. We ask Braun: what would the "consquences" be? Is it that Indiana will lose out on Medicaid funding or that the federal government won't approve his waivers for toll roads? Tell us the full story. ****_Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks._ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115555645/570707223/289507754?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzdlMGMzZi1hOTk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y5CxPB18dplPqt7OwuUkhwi_PTMVsx6w0uID0GISbSI=&emci=14e75b6a-9795-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=8c7e0c3f-a995-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=4925535) Rep. Frank Mrvan of Northwest Indiana isn't letting any redistricting talk change how he works for Hoosiers. Case in point: this week, Frank once again went to bat to get needed federal funds to increase the ability for Indiana police departments to do their jobs and keep our communities safe. Frank knows how important it is that our public safety officers and units have the resources they need to take on crime and protect our neighnorhoods and communities. That's why he's brought back millions to NW Indiana in police funding in just his four years in Cobgress. **[Click here to see other opportunities and party events near you on Mobilize!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115555646/570707224/1316591425?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzdlMGMzZi1hOTk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y5CxPB18dplPqt7OwuUkhwi_PTMVsx6w0uID0GISbSI=&emci=14e75b6a-9795-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=8c7e0c3f-a995-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=4925535)** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115555647/570707225/626575025?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzdlMGMzZi1hOTk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y5CxPB18dplPqt7OwuUkhwi_PTMVsx6w0uID0GISbSI=&emci=14e75b6a-9795-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=8c7e0c3f-a995-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=4925535)** Information on County Party events, Town Halls, protests, volunteer opportunities, and more can be found on our [Mobilize!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115555648/570707226/1316591425?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzdlMGMzZi1hOTk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y5CxPB18dplPqt7OwuUkhwi_PTMVsx6w0uID0GISbSI=&emci=14e75b6a-9795-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=8c7e0c3f-a995-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=4925535) _**Make Your Voice Heard! Submit Public Input on Upcoming Indiana Projects**_ **INDOT –** INDOT is taking comments on its proposed upgrades and changes to the I-80/94 corridor in Northwest Indiana (FlexRoad), which is the busiest stretch of interstate in Indiana. [Learn more and comment here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115555649/570707227/1956497106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzdlMGMzZi1hOTk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y5CxPB18dplPqt7OwuUkhwi_PTMVsx6w0uID0GISbSI=&emci=14e75b6a-9795-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=8c7e0c3f-a995-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=4925535) **Bartholomew Co –** The Indiana Office of Utility Consumer Counselor (OUCC) is asking for public comments on Southwestern Bartholomew Water Corporation’s rate increase request, [accepting comments through Oct. 1.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115555650/570707228/-1496287385?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzdlMGMzZi1hOTk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y5CxPB18dplPqt7OwuUkhwi_PTMVsx6w0uID0GISbSI=&emci=14e75b6a-9795-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=8c7e0c3f-a995-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=4925535) ****[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115555651/570707229/1180151052?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzdlMGMzZi1hOTk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y5CxPB18dplPqt7OwuUkhwi_PTMVsx6w0uID0GISbSI=&emci=14e75b6a-9795-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=8c7e0c3f-a995-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=4925535) clean_body: | Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important facts - a kernel of truth - from the week. = ** Hoosiers Pack the Statehouse For Rally Against Gerrymandering Yesterday, around 1,000 Hoosiers came out from all across our state to the People's House in downtown Indianapolis for a rally against gerrymandering. Hoosiers know that Republicans don't want to run on fair maps or even the maps they drew four years ago and called "perfect". Yesterday's rally was another sign that Hoosiers see through this plot and oppose any attempts by Republicans to cheat Hoosier voters. President Trump and the GOP party bosses in DC are ramping up the pressure on states across the country, but we're here to push back and note that Hoosiers are against any attempts to cheat and rig our elecrions. Our message: elections should be decided on the issues, not by politicans before a single vote is cast. Hands off our maps. Braun Warns of "Consequences" From Washington D.C. if Indiana Doesn't Redistrict This week, Governor Mike Braun went on the radio in Fort Wayne said that there would be "consequences" for Indiana, and that our state would lose out on "benefits" if state Republicans don't call a special session to redraw the maps and rig the 2026 elections in our state. It's the clearest sign yet that pressure is building on Indiana Republicans to redraw the maps, and Braun in response hinted that a special session is likely in November, despite the fact that state leaders in the House and Senate remain quiet when asked by media or consituents. We ask Braun: what would the "consquences" be? Is it that Indiana will lose out on Medicaid funding or that the federal government won't approve his waivers for toll roads? Tell us the full story. Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks. Rep. Frank Mrvan of Northwest Indiana isn't letting any redistricting talk change how he works for Hoosiers. Case in point: this week, Frank once again went to bat to get needed federal funds to increase the ability for Indiana police departments to do their jobs and keep our communities safe. Frank knows how important it is that our public safety officers and units have the resources they need to take on crime and protect our neighnorhoods and communities. That's why he's brought back millions to NW Indiana in police funding in just his four years in Cobgress. Information on County Party events, Town Halls, protests, volunteer opportunities, and more can be found on our Make Your Voice Heard! Submit Public Input on Upcoming Indiana Projects INDOT – INDOT is taking comments on its proposed upgrades and changes to the I-80/94 corridor in Northwest Indiana (FlexRoad), which is the busiest stretch of interstate in Indiana. Bartholomew Co – The Indiana Office of Utility Consumer Counselor (OUCC) is asking for public comments on Southwestern Bartholomew Water Corporation’s rate increase request, Upcoming Candidate Trainings Join the National Democratic Training Committee on Monday, October 6th from 7-8 pm ET for a free virtual live training on How to Have Successful Volunteer Recruitment Conversations. INDems IN the News IndyStar: WTHR: Indiana Capital Chronicle: * Indiana Capital Chronicle: [content goes here] 101 W Washington St., #1110E Indianapolis, IN 46204 Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www.indems.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

There are two very different kinds of politicians in our government right now: The ones who treat elected office like a job — and the ones who treat it like an audition.
I’m proud to be part of the first category. For years, I’ve worked hard in Congress to ignore all the DC distractions and make progress on the issues that matter most.
That’s how I helped create thousands of clean-energy jobs here in KS-03, secure millions of dollars to support early childhood education, and enact the most significant gun safety law in a generation.
But today, far too many politicians belong to the _other_ category. Instead of placing their constituents’ needs first, they’re more interested in proving their loyalty to Donald Trump.
And that’s exactly what’s happening right now in the Kansas Legislature. Instead of lowering costs and helping families pay their bills, Republican politicians in Topeka are focused on one thing, and one thing only: Kicking me out of office — all because Donald Trump told them to.
**But I’m not going down without a fight.**
[_**I don’t care how many Republican politicians stand in my way. Whether it’s dozens of Republican politicians or the President himself, I won’t stop working to make sure Kansans’ voices are heard — but I need you by my side. Please, can you chip in to help me keep fighting back against Trump’s gerrymander?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115555818/570707746/-2097022923?refcode=email_091925_message&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MWUxYmU4Zi1hYTk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F8VBVFVFjao8VNlN_74zvSFEyn-3j90SojsnZvUgqVc=)

clean_body: Kansas Republicans in the state legislature are traveling to Washington to take direct marching orders from Donald Trump — and Sharice needs our help. = We wanted to make sure you didn’t miss this message from Sharice. Kansas Republicans in the state legislature are traveling to Washington to take direct marching orders from Donald Trump — and Sharice needs our help. = | | = -Sharice for Congress HQ –––––– Begin Forwarded Message –––––– = = | = There are two very different kinds of politicians in our government right now: The ones who treat elected office like a job — and the ones who treat it like an audition. I’m proud to be part of the first category. For years, I’ve worked hard in Congress to ignore all the DC distractions and make progress on the issues that matter most. That’s how I helped create thousands of clean-energy jobs here in KS-03, secure millions of dollars to support early childhood education, and enact the most significant gun safety law in a generation. But today, far too many politicians belong to the other category. Instead of placing their constituents’ needs first, they’re more interested in proving their loyalty to Donald Trump. And that’s exactly what’s happening right now in the Kansas Legislature. Instead of lowering costs and helping families pay their bills, Republican politicians in Topeka are focused on one thing, and one thing only: Kicking me out of office — all because Donald Trump told them to. But I’m not going down without a fight. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = With gratitude, Sharice | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: You can’t shut down the people of Texas
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

Last week, a court—whose judges were all appointed by Greg Abbott—ruled
against Ken Paxton and threw out his baseless restraining order against
Powered by People.

It was a major win. Not just for us, but for the foundational principle
that no one—not even the chief law enforcement officer of the state—can
silence Texans who are organizing, mobilizing, and using their first
amendment right to speak freely.

But here’s the hard truth: It has already cost us nearly $400,000 to
defend ourselves from this political attack.

That’s money that should have gone into registering voters, holding town
halls, and reaching communities that will decide the next election.

And while we were busy defending ourselves, they kept attacking-because
they’re scared of our movement.

Now we have the chance to shift the narrative—and the momentum.

We chose to defend ourselves against these attacks, to fight back, because
our work is critical to the future of this country and because we’re sick
of watching the conventional centers of power—like Disney/ABC which just
cancelled Jimmy Kimmel—bend the knee to these thugs. We’re taking this
fight directly to them, winning important victories in courts from El Paso
County to the 15th Court of Appeals. We want to show that in Texas, our
knees don’t bend.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250919.eWXod8&refcode=ema20250919-240363&t=1002&akid=240363%2E444211%2EBqEfma ]Will you help us fight to win with a $3 donation to
Powered by People today?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250919.eWXod8&refcode=ema20250919-240363&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=240363%2E444211%2EBqEfma ]DONATE $3

I don’t take a salary from Powered by People. Just like thousands of our
other volunteers, every hour I put into this work is because I believe in
this state and our country, and in what we can accomplish when we work
together.

That’s why Paxton came after us in the first place. He knows what we’re
doing can change what’s possible for Texas and for America.

But to finish this fight—and win it—we need to rebuild what we lost and
take this movement as far as it can go.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250919.eWXod8&refcode=ema20250919-240363&t=1004&akid=240363%2E444211%2EBqEfma ]If you’re with us, I’m asking you to step up today.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250919.eWXod8&refcode=ema20250919-240363&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=240363%2E444211%2EBqEfma ]DONATE $3

Beto O'Rourke

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=240363%2E444211%2EBqEfma

name: Lauren Groh-Wargo, Fair Fight
subject: Terrifying and unacceptable
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT ACTION
body:
I sit in John Lewis’ congressional district, and I’m thinking about how he talked about nonviolence |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115556572/570710434/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250919_T1_MessageLGW_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzgwZTBjYi1hYzk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jF_wXuJlK3ARL_cv4ka0mooe29q0RPSnlON3vl_tTW4=&emci=e780e0cb-ac95-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=ec80e0cb-ac95-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=1037277)

| | Our team has been reflecting over the past week about the challenging time we are in, how it impacts our work and the larger environment. It’s a sobering, terrifying time in our country. Political violence is increasing, and more political violence begets more political violence. Every shooting, murder, and assassination adds to the body count, and those bodies are the brutal evidence of a country in an unhealthy spiral. Our heart breaks for every life lost, for each family and community. When people are gunned down — no matter if we agree with them or not — it makes the work of advancing spirited debate, supporting candidates running for office, and organizing around issues and building leaders so much harder. It’s the opposite of a Fair Fight — it’s the ultimate unfair fight, and it’s breaking all of us along with our democracy. We condemn political violence, and we condemn those who use violence to advance their own agenda. We condemn those who escalate rather than deescalate in the aftermath of unspeakable horrors. From the deaths of Charlie Kirk and Speaker Emerita Melissa Hortman and her husband Mark, to the death threats and doxxing of those who speak up or get caught in the crossfire of disinformation and violent rhetoric — like Ruby Freeman, or leaders like Governor Whitmer, who faced a kidnapping attempt. Political violence is all around us, locally and nationally; it’s terrifying and unacceptable. Yet, we persist. We organize, we speak out, and we fight on, because it’s not only our right but our duty to advance an inclusive, robust, messy democracy where we strive to support leaders and push our institutions to truly serve the people. Where elections are free and fair expressions of our will. Where leaders, organizers, and activists can come together and make change. Where we can engage in thoughtful, robust debate, and vehemently disagree with our opponents, but also find common cause in our shared humanity and in this shared country of ours. Where our coalitions can be broad and deep, but we can also stake out unpopular opinions. Where making our unique voices heard and respected is crucial. Where voter suppression isn’t a policy choice. Where we can all agree that expanding access to participating in our democracy is how we best serve our nation. We also respond to violence with deep care and compassion for each other: from our supporters to our broader community. I sit in Atlanta, in John Lewis’ congressional district, and I’ve been reflecting on how he talked about love as strength, about nonviolence, and our role in making good trouble to fight for justice. The moment is heavy, but I am also filled with gratitude to do this work with such an incredible team and community. Our organization was born in response to the crisis of the deepening callousness of the modern voter suppression machine. Together we bring happiness and optimism to this fight for our freedom to vote, our freedom of expression, and our freedom to live our lives. And we are undeterred in our mission today. Together, Lauren Groh-Wargo
CEO, Fair Fight

clean_body: I sit in John Lewis’ congressional district, and I’m thinking about how he talked about nonviolence | | | Our team has been reflecting over the past week about the challenging time we are in, how it impacts our work and the larger environment. It’s a sobering, terrifying time in our country. Political violence is increasing, and more political violence begets more political violence. Every shooting, murder, and assassination adds to the body count, and those bodies are the brutal evidence of a country in an unhealthy spiral. Our heart breaks for every life lost, for each family and community. When people are gunned down — no matter if we agree with them or not — it makes the work of advancing spirited debate, supporting candidates running for office, and organizing around issues and building leaders so much harder. It’s the opposite of a Fair Fight — it’s the ultimate unfair fight, and it’s breaking all of us along with our democracy. We condemn political violence, and we condemn those who use violence to advance their own agenda. We condemn those who escalate rather than deescalate in the aftermath of unspeakable horrors. From the deaths of Charlie Kirk and Speaker Emerita Melissa Hortman and her husband Mark, to the death threats and doxxing of those who speak up or get caught in the crossfire of disinformation and violent rhetoric — like Ruby Freeman, or leaders like Governor Whitmer, who faced a kidnapping attempt. Political violence is all around us, locally and nationally; it’s terrifying and unacceptable. Yet, we persist. We organize, we speak out, and we fight on, because it’s not only our right but our duty to advance an inclusive, robust, messy democracy where we strive to support leaders and push our institutions to truly serve the people. Where elections are free and fair expressions of our will. Where leaders, organizers, and activists can come together and make change. Where we can engage in thoughtful, robust debate, and vehemently disagree with our opponents, but also find common cause in our shared humanity and in this shared country of ours. Where our coalitions can be broad and deep, but we can also stake out unpopular opinions. Where making our unique voices heard and respected is crucial. Where voter suppression isn’t a policy choice. Where we can all agree that expanding access to participating in our democracy is how we best serve our nation. We also respond to violence with deep care and compassion for each other: from our supporters to our broader community. I sit in Atlanta, in John Lewis’ congressional district, and I’ve been reflecting on how he talked about love as strength, about nonviolence, and our role in making good trouble to fight for justice. The moment is heavy, but I am also filled with gratitude to do this work with such an incredible team and community. Our organization was born in response to the crisis of the deepening callousness of the modern voter suppression machine. Together we bring happiness and optimism to this fight for our freedom to vote, our freedom of expression, and our freedom to live our lives. And we are undeterred in our mission today. Together, Lauren Groh-Wargo CEO, Fair Fight ---|--- | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2025 Fair Fight Action - All rights reserved. name: George Latimer
subject: This isn’t about dollars
disclaimer_text: Paid for by George Latimer for Congress
body:
George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by serving as your Congressman, representing New York's 16th District. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/-Phg2RhDIEGJVPbb5vK87g2?unsubscribedata=Hfi%2BuNWIcr0XMUzelPNptac64m1xh080waKcxQrMFpIIg%2FueUhfclj1itjXFHz0Wz7XbBoa8Cn8%2FLxlP0pnNnlzE%2B6RVkZPzE5TOKYuf30jllANNF%2FaGZqgnVN8D8oPOSwjDDctXPjk5H6LMpqQeb9g0Utvu25Utr7ZAMayA5InxKXBqd39%2Bv9La%2F1dWUQeGZ%2BkfWqSugEtCCsRKnAQnk6mFYkYHf9cBYfv4LoQgwNETjOaBTcYfkTnyvvd%2FvJaUeIcGIXCc7IABeb%2B3AAWudN9y%2FdoyUOqJav0pDJSxflbJTpxxGy7DTYh%2Fz30xOCn9ApatSqtK9keSNY6X%2FIztRAmrBbl4nX%2BZRNeCFD%2BBl9tALxEE60tdw5k8pwVMIP%2FpLwRcWF3dtN5weYryfi%2BB7NsMKQIf%2F2KvlZeLfHujL0%2FBpT5xbUJFfJpzjRSWeqmG]

# [#]
Peter,Over the past few weeks, I’ve been talking to constituents, small business owners, and local leaders — and it’s clear that people want solutions, not headlines

They want leadership that shows up, gets things done, and fights for our community, not special interests and the ultra-wealthy — and that’s exactly what I’m focused on every day in Congress.

At the end of September, our fundraising numbers will go public, and right now, we’re behind our $5,000 mid-month goal.

This isn’t just about dollars — it’s about showing that we have a strong, organized campaign ready to stand up for our communities that won’t be slowed down by extremist rhetoric or political games.

So, if you can, will you please chip in $ or any amount before midnight?

Here’s a link you can use: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/latimer-em-fr-sept25?amount= [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/latimer-em-fr-sept25?amount=]

Thank you for your time,

George
https://www.facebook.com/LatimerforNY [https://www.facebook.com/LatimerforNY] https://twitter.com/LatimerforNY [https://twitter.com/LatimerforNY]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/latimer-em-footer-23 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/latimer-em-footer-23]
For over three decades, George Latimer has been a champion for progressive policies and leaders, helping lead the effort to make Westchester, a formerly solid Republican County, into a blue firewall that has withstood multiple red waves in recent years. George’s unparalleled track record in advancing Democratic goals includes successfully cutting regressive taxes, fighting for civil rights and racial equality, defending a woman’s right to choose, standing up to the NRA to keep guns off our streets, and voting for marriage equality.
