name: Mazie Hirono
subject: Let me be more direct
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#
---
Peter, Millions of small businesses in our country are being harmed because of Donald Trump’s disastrous tariffs. That is a _fact_ — regardless of how much the regime tries to deny it. That’s why I held a press conference alongside my colleagues discussing legislation we introduced to exempt small businesses from Trump’s tariffs. Trump’s head of the U.S. Small Business Administration, Kelly Loeffler _(who, like every Trump official, is completely unqualified for her job),_ didn’t like the fact that I was speaking the truth about their extreme economic agenda. She even called me out on social media: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115557235/570712580/-848736975?refcode=AU_MKH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250919_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWVkNjFhNC1hZjk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j7OFC7Y9S0PbOVeEmGujIHf2rNzp2AGq3J2uP-PXCLc=&emci=a58dae85-9f95-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=3eed61a4-af95-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=23190490) Let me be even more direct, Peter: **Small businesses are getting f*cked by Donald Trump’s reckless tariffs.** I’m fighting to protect hardworking Americans from this administration’s disastrous agenda and make sure Republicans can’t run from the truth, no matter how hard they try. **[If you’re with me, add your name today to show your support and help me keep the spotlight on just how devastating Trump’s tariffs are for families and small businesses →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115557236/570712581/-848736975?refcode=AU_MKH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250919_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWVkNjFhNC1hZjk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j7OFC7Y9S0PbOVeEmGujIHf2rNzp2AGq3J2uP-PXCLc=&emci=a58dae85-9f95-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=3eed61a4-af95-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=23190490)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115557237/570712582/-848736975?refcode=AU_MKH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250919_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWVkNjFhNC1hZjk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j7OFC7Y9S0PbOVeEmGujIHf2rNzp2AGq3J2uP-PXCLc=&emci=a58dae85-9f95-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=3eed61a4-af95-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=23190490)
---
I’m fed up with this regime, and I know you are too. Let’s keep doing everything we can to hold them accountable.
Thank you for standing with me.
— Mazie

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Are you in it to win with me?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lofgren for Congress
body:
You can make the difference.| | |
---
| | I don’t mess around with something as important as representing the people of my home, Peter. Every race I’ve ever run, I’ve been in it to win — even when the odds seemed long. You’ve been there with me every time, and together, we’ve succeeded. Now, this election for the U.S. Senate may be our toughest challenge yet.**__**[**_So when I ask you to split a donation between our campaign and Zoe Lofgren_** _**, it’s because your contribution could make the difference between victory and defeat.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115557255/570712824/-1295102943?amount=25&refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FRS_1_2025-09-19_RYC_SWS_ES-31777&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGQ2ODQ5MS1iMDk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FhtrPc7f7uV18nNgm8EEofIcqeKIcZz9u9IbE-uvBH4=)__ **Republicans see me as the top challenger to their Senate majority. They know that we have the team, the support, and the momentum to win.** That means national attention will be on us. I will always be straightforward about this campaign: our plans, where we stand in the polls, what we expect to come, and what we need from you. Right now, we’re preparing for national GOP money groups to spend _hundreds of millions_ against us, and Democrats are being outraised by Republicans. Meanwhile, various polls have shown either a dead heat or us with a slight lead.
---
**[I am asking you to split a contribution between my campaign and Zoe Lofgren today because we can’t afford to leave this race up to chance — or up to Republicans’ deep-pocketed donors and their dark-money groups. We can win this race, but ONLY if we stick together. Please, give what you can today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115557256/570712825/-1295102943?amount=25&refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FRS_1_2025-09-19_RYC_SWS_ES-31777&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGQ2ODQ5MS1iMDk1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FhtrPc7f7uV18nNgm8EEofIcqeKIcZz9u9IbE-uvBH4=)**

subject: This is good news… but…

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25]
Peter,
Jimmy Kimmel being yanked off the air isn’t just about one late-night comedian. It’s about a president who is sinking in the polls every month and lashing out the way tyrants do by silencing anyone who challenges them.
First, it’s comedians. Next, it’s Democratic organizations like ours.
If Trump and his allies can strong-arm networks, they’ll try to shut down our ability to raise money, organize, and win elections. Trump has already weaponized his DOJ to go after ActBlue, and we know this is likely just the beginning.
That is why we cannot afford to sit back. Every election on the ballot matters. Every seat we can win is a chance to push back. It is exhausting, but the worst thing we could do now is sleepwalk into authoritarianism.
This November, we are going all in for Democrats in Virginia, Pennsylvania, and New Jersey. These races are frontline fights for free speech and democracy.
But we need you with us. Chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can so we can keep organizing, keep fighting, and keep winning. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09182025]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

This is bigger than Jimmy Kimmel. It is about whether America still has the freedom to laugh, speak, and vote without fear of retribution.

Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]

**High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**
---
| |
# PAID FOR BY NANCY MACE FOR GOVERNOR

name: Abdul for U.S. Senate
subject: Can you give Abdul a spot?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20250919-947&t=1001&akid=961%2E251025%2ElMmQm0 ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20250919-947&t=1002&akid=961%2E251025%2ElMmQm0 ]Abdul for US Senate

Peter,

You may know Abdul is a doctor, a dad, and a lifelong fighter for working
people. But did you know he can do this?

[ Abdul ]Abdul on a bench press, lifting 315 pounds repeatedly.

Abdul loves to lift weights and recently went viral for benching 315 lbs.
Not bad for a candidate running one of the toughest Senate races in
America. 💪

For Abdul, fitness has always been about discipline, resilience, and
showing up — the same qualities he brings to this campaign.

While it’s fun to move big weight in the gym, the heavier lift is taking
on wannabe oligarchs, corporate PACs, and politicians who put profits
before people. And sometimes, you need a spotter. That’s where we come
in, Peter.

Our quarterly fundraising deadline is coming up later this month, and
finishing this month strong ensures we’ll have the resources to host more
events, print more campaign literature, and grow our campaign.

So, we’ve set a goal: [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20250919-2-ak?amount=3&refcode=em20250919-947&refcode2=961_251025_lMmQm0&akid=961%2E251025%2ElMmQm0 ]315 donations of $3 or more today. Let’s show
that our movement is every bit as strong as Abdul’s bench press.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20250919-2-ak?amount=3&refcode=em20250919-947&refcode2=961_251025_lMmQm0&akid=961%2E251025%2ElMmQm0 ]Donate $3 ››

Every contribution is another rep toward building a government that works
for us, not the wealthy few.

Thanks for spotting us on this one.

— Team Abdul

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. To contribute via check, please address it to Abdul for U.S. Senate, PO Box 126, St. Clair Shores, MI 48080.

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1004&akid=961%2E251025%2ElMmQm0
Update Your Information: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/update-your-information
Unsubscribe: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1005&akid=961%2E251025%2ElMmQm0

Email us: info@abdulformichigan.com

Paid for by Abdul for U.S. Senate
